Experiments on PascalVOC, COCO, and real-device deployment show that XiYOLO achieves a stronger energy-accuracy tradeoff than YOLO baselines. On PascalVOC, the medium XiYOLO model reaches 86.15 mAP50 while reducing energy relative to YOLOv12m by 20.6% on GPU and 35.9% on NPU. On COCO, XiYOLO reduces energy relative to YOLOv12 by up to 53.7% on GPU and 51.6% on NPU at the small scale. The proposed two-stage estimator also improves sample efficiency over a joint predictor under few-shot adaptation with only 2-20 target-device samples.

</details>


### [213] [Learning Visual Feature-Based World Models via Residual Latent Action](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07079)
*Xinyu Zhang,Zhengtong Xu,Yutian Tao,Yeping Wang,Yu She,Abdeslam Boularias*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 本文提出Residual Latent Action (RLA)表示，通过flow matching预测RLA构建世界模型RLA-WM，在仿真和真实数据集上超越现有方法，并应用于机器人策略学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于视觉特征的世界模型在复杂交互中会出现模糊或坍塌预测，而高维特征空间中的生成式建模仍具挑战。作者希望找到一种更高效、不易产生幻觉的世界模型表示方法。

Method: 从DINO残差中学习Residual Latent Action (RLA)表示，利用flow matching预测RLA序列，构建RLA-WM世界模型。

Result: RLA-WM在仿真和真实数据集上超越现有特征基和视频扩散世界模型，速度比视频扩散快数个数量级；并成功应用于无动作演示视频的策略学习和基于离线视频的视觉强化学习。

Conclusion: RLA是一种预测性、可泛化且编码时间演进的潜在动作表示，基于flow matching的RLA-WM为高效世界模型提供了新范式。

Abstract: World models predict future transitions from observations and actions. Existing works predominantly focus on image generation only. Visual feature-based world models, on the other hand, predict future visual features instead of raw video pixels, offering a promising alternative that is more efficient and less prone to hallucination. However, current feature-based approaches rely on direct regression, which leads to blurry or collapsed predictions in complex interactions, while generative modeling in high-dimensional feature spaces still remains challenging. In this work, we discover that a new type of latent action representation, which we refer to as *Residual Latent Action* (RLA), can be easily learned from DINO residuals. We also show that RLA is predictive, generalizable, and encodes temporal progression. Building on RLA, we propose *RLA World Model* (RLA-WM), which predicts RLA values via flow matching. RLA-WM outperforms both state-of-the-art feature-based and video-diffusion world models on simulation and real-world datasets, while being orders of magnitude faster than video diffusion. Furthermore, we develop two robot learning techniques that use RLA-WM to improve policy learning. The first one is a minimalist world action model with RLA that learns from actionless demonstration videos. The second one is the first visual RL framework trained entirely inside a world model learned from offline videos only, using a video-aligned reward and no online interactions or handcrafted rewards. Project page: https://mlzxy.github.io/rla-wm

</details>


### [214] [PicoEyes: Unified Gaze Estimation Framework for Mixed Reality with a Large-Scale Multi-View Dataset](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07188)
*Fuxin Duan,Hui Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: PicoEyes是一个统一的注视估计框架，能从单目或双目输入直接预测3D眼部参数、分割、光轴、视轴和深度图，支持校准、预测和多姿态，在混合现实应用中达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有注视估计方法通常分开处理不同任务（如校准、预测、姿态适应），缺乏一个端到端统一框架，且缺乏大规模多视角近眼数据集，难以实现鲁棒且泛化的注视估计。

Method: 提出PicoEyes统一框架，端到端联合估计眼部参数、分割图、光轴、视轴和深度图；支持单目/双目输入；引入大规模多视角近眼数据集，包含2D/3D标注及多种场景（训练、测试、重新佩戴、校准）。

Result: 在无校准、校准、重新佩戴后校准、预测等多种设置下均取得SOTA性能，显著优于学术界和工业界的注视追踪方法。

Conclusion: 该工作为混合现实中的鲁棒、可泛化注视估计建立了一个实用的端到端范式。

Abstract: We present PicoEyes, a unified gaze estimation framework that directly predicts all key attributes of gaze, including 3D eye parameters, eye-region segmentation, optical axis, visual axis, and depth maps, from either monocular or binocular inputs. The framework simultaneously addresses calibration, gaze forecasting, and varying device postures, while also supporting 3D eye reconstruction via joint estimation of eye parameters and depth maps in an end-to-end manner. In addition, we introduce a large-scale multi-view near-eye dataset containing comprehensive 2D and 3D annotations under diverse conditions, including train, test, rewear-test, and calibration sessions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PicoEyes achieves state-ofthe-art performance, consistently outperforming both academic and industrial gaze tracking methods across nocalibration, calibration, rewear-after-calibration, and forecasting settings. This work establishes a practical, end-toend paradigm for robust and generalizable gaze estimation in mixed reality (MR) applications.

</details>


### [215] [From Pixels to Primitives: Scene Change Detection in 3D Gaussian Splatting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07203)
*Chamuditha Jayanga Galappaththige,Jason Lai,Timothy Patten,Donald Dansereau,Niko Suenderhauf,Dimity Miller*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 论文提出GS-DIFF方法，直接在3D高斯原语空间进行场景变化检测，而非传统的"渲染后比较"范式。通过各向异性漂移模型和可观测性项解决高斯表示优化不稳定的问题，实现多视图一致的变化检测，并能区分几何变化和外观变化，性能提升约17% mIoU。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统高斯泼溅变化检测采用"渲染-比较"范式，将问题视为像素级任务。本文指出高斯原语本身（位置、各向异性协方差、颜色）已包含足够的变化信号，但直接比较原语面临优化不稳定性问题。作者旨在探索原语空间的变化检测，并实现多视图一致性和变化类型区分。

Method: 提出GS-DIFF方法：(1) 构建各向异性几何和光度漂移模型，补偿因独立优化导致的原语差异；(2) 设计逐原语可观测性项，反映每个高斯受相机几何约束的程度；(3) 直接在3D高斯原语空间进行变化检测，同时独立输出几何变化和外观变化。

Result: 在真实世界基准上，GS-DIFF相比先前最先进方法在平均交并比(mIoU)上提升约17%。

Conclusion: 原语空间的变化检测是可行且优越的，相比像素级方法天然具有多视图一致性，并能无监督地区分结构变化和表面变化。

Abstract: Scene change detection methods built on Gaussian splatting universally follow a render-then-compare paradigm: the pre-change scene is rendered into 2D and compared against post-change images via pixel or feature residuals. This change detection problem with Gaussian Splatting has been treated as a question about pixels; we treat it as a question about primitives. We provide direct evidence that native primitive attributes alone -- position, anisotropic covariance, and color -- carry sufficient signal for scene change detection. What makes primitive-space comparison hard is the under-constrained nature of Gaussian splatting representation: independent optimizations yield primitive solutions whose count, positions, shapes, and colors differ even where nothing has changed. We address this challenge with anisotropic models of geometric and photometric drift, complemented by a per-primitive observability term that reflects the extent to which each Gaussian is constrained by the camera geometry. Operating directly on primitives gives our method, GD-DIFF, two properties that distinguish it from render-then-compare methods. First, change maps are multi-view consistent by construction, where prior work had to learn this through an additional optimization objective. Second, geometric and appearance changes are scored separately, identifying not just where but what kind of change occurred, distinguishing structural changes (e.g., an added object) from surface-level ones (e.g., a color change) without supervision or external model dependencies. On real-world benchmarks, GS-DIFF surpasses the prior state-of-the-art approach by approximatelt 17% in mean Intersection over Union.

</details>


### [216] [Sat3R: Satellite DSM Reconstruction via RPC-Aware Depth Fine-tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07264)
*Qiaoyi Yang,Chaoyi Zhou,Xi Liu,Run Wang,Minghui Xu,Mert D. Pesé,Feng Luo,Yuhao Xu,Zhi-Qi Cheng,Qiushi Chen,Hairong Qi,Siyu Huang*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: Sat3R通过RPC感知的度量深度微调，将单目深度基础模型（Depth Anything V2）适配到卫星领域，无需逐场景优化即可实现与优化方法相当的DSM重建精度，同时速度提升300倍以上。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 卫星影像DSM重建中，优化方法精度高但计算慢（需数小时），通用几何基础模型推理快但无法泛化到卫星领域（因RPC相机模型和深度分布差异带来的域差距）。旨在解决这一精度-速度权衡问题。

Method: 基于Depth Anything V2，利用RPC几何构造物理一致的伪深度监督，采用尺度不变对数（SiLog）损失进行度量深度微调，使模型适应卫星域的RPC模型和深度分布。

Result: 在DFC2019基准上，MAE比零样本前馈基线降低38%，精度与优化方法相当，速度提升300倍以上。

Conclusion: 前馈模型经过恰当的领域适配（RPC感知的度量深度微调）后，能够以极低计算成本达到与优化法相当的卫星DSM重建精度，为大规模实用化铺平道路。

Abstract: Accurate Digital Surface Model (DSM) reconstruction from satellite imagery is critical for applications such as disaster response, urban planning, and large-scale geographic mapping. Existing approaches face a fundamental trade-off: optimization-based methods achieve strong accuracy but require hours of per-scene computation, while generalizable geometry foundation models offer near-instant inference but fail to generalize to satellite imagery due to the domain gap introduced by the Rational Polynomial Camera (RPC) model and mismatched depth scale distributions. We present Sat3R, a feed-forward framework that bridges this gap via RPC-aware metric depth fine-tuning of Depth Anything V2 using the Scale-Invariant Logarithmic (SiLog) loss. By constructing physically consistent pseudo depth supervision from RPC geometry, Sat3R adapts a monocular depth foundation model to the satellite domain without per-scene optimization. Experiments on the DFC2019 benchmark demonstrate that Sat3R reduces MAE by 38% over zero-shot feed-forward baselines and achieves competitive accuracy against optimization-based methods, while delivering over 300x speedup. Sat3R demonstrates that feed-forward models, when properly adapted to the satellite domain, can match optimization-based accuracy at a fraction of the computational cost, paving the way for practical large-scale satellite DSM reconstruction.

</details>


### [217] [GC-ART: Global Learnable Second-Order Rational Tone Curves for Illumination Robustness](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07329)
*Wei Huang,Joyce Huang*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: GC-ART 是一个轻量级可微分的图像预处理模块，通过预测有理色调曲线进行全局自适应色调映射，在CIFAR-10上以极低计算成本提升了图像分类模型对对比度损坏和乘性变暗的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 提升图像分类模型在图像损坏（如对比度变化、亮度变化）下的鲁棒性，同时保持干净图像上的准确率，且计算开销要小。

Method: 设计了一个仅643参数的MLP，从每通道软直方图中预测端点固定的有理色调曲线，然后在分类器之前逐像素点应用该曲线。训练时使用交叉熵损失和软单调性惩罚进行端到端学习。

Result: 在CIFAR-10上用ResNet-18，GC-ART在干净图像上匹配基线准确率，在乘性变暗上优于基线，在对比度损坏上达到48.45%（基线46.27%，Zero-DCE++ 47.13%），且FLOPs远低于卷积类方法。

Conclusion: 直方图条件化的有理曲线能够学习有用的全局色调校正，包括对比度扩展行为，且通过逐点映射天然保持边缘位置；当前超参数未经调优，仍有提升空间。

Abstract: We introduce GC-ART (Global Curve Adaptive Rational Tone-mapping), a lightweight differentiable pre-processing module for robust image classification. GC-ART predicts an endpoint-pinned rational tone curve from per-channel soft histograms using a 643-parameter MLP, then applies the curve pointwise before the classifier. The module is trained end-to-end with cross-entropy and a soft monotonicity penalty. On CIFAR-10 with a CIFAR-style ResNet-18, GC-ART matches clean accuracy with the unenhanced baseline and other learned enhancers, improves over the baseline on multiplicative darkening, and achieves the best learned-method result on contrast corruption (48.45% vs. 46.27% for the baseline and 47.13% for Zero-DCE++). These results suggest that histogram-conditioned rational curves can learn useful global tone corrections, including contrast-expanding behavior, while preserving edge locations by construction through pointwise mapping. GC-ART also uses substantially fewer FLOPs than convolutional learned enhancers at 32 x 32. The current hyperparameters are untuned, leaving room for systematic improvement.

</details>


### [218] [InsHuman: Towards Natural and Identity-Preserving Human Insertion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07402)
*Jie Li,Shulian Zhang,Yangyang Gao,Wenbo Li,Yulun Zhang,Yong Guo,Jian Chen*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出InsHuman框架，通过人体-背景自适应融合（HBAF）、人脸一致性保持（FFIP）和双向数据配对（BDP）策略，实现自然且身份保留的人像插入。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图像编辑模型在人像插入任务中存在姿态不自然、人数不一致、面部身份改变等问题，且公开人体数据集缺乏全身肖像和真实的人-背景物理交互。

Method: 1) HBAF：检测前景人体获取二值掩码，通过区域感知加权对齐人体区域；2) FFIP：检测并匹配生成图像与源图像的人脸识别特征，强制保持身份一致性；3) BDP：构建高质量双向数据配对数据集。

Result: 实验结果表明InsHuman在生成合理图像的同时能保持人物身份不变，取得显著改进。

Conclusion: InsHuman通过区域感知融合和人脸身份保持机制，有效解决了人像插入中的姿态、数量和身份一致性问题。

Abstract: Human insertion aims to naturally place specific individuals into a target background. Although existing image editing models may have such ability, they often produce failure cases, including inappropriate human pose in new background, inconsistent number of people, and modified facial identity. Moreover, publicly available human datasets often lack full-body portraits and realistic physical interaction between humans and their background. To address these challenges, we propose InsHuman for natural and identity-preserving human insertion. Specifically, we propose Human-Background Adaptive Fusion (HBAF), which detects foreground humans to obtain a binary mask and applies region-aware weighting to align the human regions between predicted and ground-truth latents, ensuring the person's pose, count, and overall appearance are coherently adapted to the target background.We further propose Face-to-Face ID-Preserving (FFIP), which detects and matches faces between the generated image and the source image in terms of face recognition features to enforce identity consistency for each face.In addition, we propose Bidirectional Data Pairing (BDP) strategy to construct BDP-InsHuman, a high-quality dataset with realistic human-background interactions. Experiments demonstrate that InsHuman achieves significant improvements in generating plausible images while keeping human identity unchanged.

</details>


### [219] [Mind the Gap: Geometrically Accurate Generative Reconstruction from Disjoint Views](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07550)
*Grzegorz Wilczynski,Mikołaj Zielinski,Bartosz Świrta,Dominik Belter,Przemysław Spurek*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了"无重叠视角生成式3D重建"新范式，建立了专用数据集和评估指标，并提出了GLADOS框架——通过生成桥接、粗粒度重建和迭代优化三阶段，解决了现有方法在零重叠视角下重建失败的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统3D视觉系统依赖视觉重叠进行几何对齐和多视角一致性，但在分布式机器人集群、众包数据采集等真实场景中，空间和外观重叠往往无法保证。现有方法在零重叠场景下完全失效，产生不连续几何或语义不一致的重建。

Method: GLADOS是一个模块化三阶段框架：(1)生成桥接——利用基础模型合成中间视角连接不重叠输入；(2)鲁棒粗粒度3D重建——通过全局对齐建立粗略几何骨架，吸收生成过程的局部矛盾；(3)迭代上下文扩展与一致性优化——填充缺失区域并统一重建。框架架构无关，可集成未来生成、重建和修复技术。

Result: 现有SOTA方法在零重叠任务上完全失败，产生断开几何或语义不一致重建。GLADOS框架有效解决了这一挑战。

Conclusion: GLADOS作为架构无关的通用框架，为零重叠视角的3D重建提供了有效解决方案，并能无缝集成未来技术进步。

Abstract: 3D vision systems are fundamentally constrained by their reliance on visual overlap: reconstruction methods require it for geometric alignment, while generative models use it to enforce multi-view consistency. This limitation is particularly acute in real-world scenarios such as distributed swarm robotics or crowd-sourced data collection, where capturing overlapping perspectives, both in terms of spatial and appearance overlap, is often impossible. We introduce Generative Reconstruction from Disjoint Views as a new paradigm, establish a comprehensive dataset, and propose specialized evaluation metrics for zero-overlap scenarios. Our benchmarking demonstrates that existing state-of-the-art methods fail catastrophically on this task, producing disconnected geometries or semantically incoherent reconstructions. To address these limitations, we propose GLADOS, a general, modular framework that operates through three stages: (1) Generative Bridging, where foundation models synthesize intermediate perspectives to connect disjoint inputs; (2) Robust Coarse 3D Reconstruction, that establish coarse geometric scaffold via global alignment which absorbs local contradictions from generative process; and (3) Iterative Context Expansion and Consistency Optimization to fill missing regions and unify the reconstruction. As an architectureagnostic framework, GLADOS enables seamless integration of future advances in generation, reconstruction, and inpainting. The source code is available at: https://github.com/gwilczynski95/GLADOS.

</details>


### [220] [PolarVLM: Bridging the Semantic-Physical Gap in Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07574)
*Yuliang Li,Chu Zhou,Heng Guo,Boxin Shi,Imari Sato,Zhanyu Ma*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: PolarVLM是将偏振物理参数融入视觉语言模型的第一个多模态框架，通过双流架构和两阶段训练解决光学歧义问题，在反射和透明场景任务中比RGB基线提升25.4%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准VLM在处理反射、透明物体等光学歧义场景时表现严重不足，而现有的偏振成像方法输出格式固定，无法进行开放式推理。作者希望弥合语义理解与物理参数之间的鸿沟。

Method: 提出双流架构（RGB流+偏振物理参数流）和渐进式两阶段训练策略，构建了75K物理知识驱动的VQA基准数据集PolarVQA。

Result: 在五项评估任务上整体超越RGB基线25.4%，反射识别提升26.6%，玻璃计数提升34.0%。

Conclusion: 成功解锁了物理感知的语义理解能力，证明将物理先验知识注入VLM是处理光学歧义场景的有效途径。

Abstract: Mainstream vision-language models (VLMs) fundamentally struggle with severe optical ambiguities, such as reflections and transparent objects, due to the inherent limitations of standard RGB inputs. While polarization imaging captures polarimetric physical parameters that resolve these ambiguities, existing methods are constrained by fixed-format outputs and remain isolated from open-ended reasoning. To bridge this semantic-physical gap, we introduce PolarVLM, the first multimodal framework integrating polarimetric physical parameters into VLMs. By employing a dual-stream architecture and a progressive two-stage training strategy, PolarVLM effectively prevents physical misinterpretations while preserving general visual abilities. Complementing our architecture, we construct PolarVQA, the first benchmark for polarization-aware VQA, featuring 75K physics-grounded instruction-tuning pairs targeting reflective and transparent scenes. Experiments show that PolarVLM surpasses the RGB baseline by 25.4% overall across five evaluation tasks, with remarkable gains of 26.6% in reflection recognition and 34.0% in glass counting, successfully unlocking physics-aware semantic understanding.

</details>


### [221] [OphEdit: Training-Free Text-Guided Editing of Ophthalmic Surgical Videos](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07695)
*Ritul Jangir,Arkya Jyoti Bagchi,Aiman Farooq,Mangalton Okram,Saurabh Seetaram Korgaonkar,Deepak Mishra*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: OphEdit是一个无需训练、基于ODE反演和注意力值注入的文本引导眼科手术视频编辑框架，能够在不改变解剖结构的前提下实现手术属性（如器械、阶段）的语义编辑。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高保真手术视频生成可改善医学培训与AI发展，但现有生成模型难以进行精确视频编辑，尤其是修改手术属性（如器械-组织交互、手术阶段）时受严格解剖和时间约束的限制。

Method: 采用确定性二阶ODE反演流水线提取原始视频的Attention Value (V) 张量，在去噪阶段将这些存储的张量选择性注入到条件CFG分支中，以保留眼部精细解剖几何结构的同时实现文本驱动的语义修改。

Result: 临床评估表明OphEdit能有效处理复杂手术变换（如器械替换、手术阶段变化），在结构保真度和时间一致性上优于自然域视频编辑方法。

Conclusion: 这是首个在眼科手术领域应用无需训练的视频编辑方法，为生成多样化、带标注的医学数据集提供了可扩展方案，无需大量人工录制或昂贵的模型微调。

Abstract: High-fidelity surgical video generation can greatly improve medical training and the development of AI, adapting these generative models for precise video editing remains a formidable challenge. Modifying surgical attributes, such as instrument tissue interactions or procedural phases is challenging due to the strict anatomical and temporal constraints. In this paper, we propose OphEdit, a novel training-free framework for the text-guided editing of ophthalmic surgical videos. Our approach leverages a deterministic second-order ODE inversion pipeline to capture Attention Value (V) tensors from the original video. By selectively injecting these stored tensors into the conditional Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG) branch during the denoising phase, OphEdit rigorously preserves the intricate anatomical geometry of the eye while seamlessly mapping text-driven semantic modifications onto the video stream. Clinical evaluations demonstrates that OphEdit effectively handles complex surgical transformations, such as instrument swaps and procedural variations, with superior structural fidelity and temporal consistency compared to natural-domain video editors. Our work represents the first application of training-free video editing in the ophthalmic surgical domain, offering a scalable solution for generating diverse, annotated medical datasets without the need for exhaustive manual recording or costly model fine-tuning. The code and prompts can be accessed at https://github.com/ophedit/OphEdit

</details>


### [222] [Head Similarity: Modeling Structured Whole-Head Appearance Beyond Face Recognition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07766)
*Yingfeng Wang,Yuxuan Xiao,Shengcai Liao*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 本文提出"头部相似度"(Head Similarity)概念，将传统身份识别扩展到结构化全头相似度建模，捕捉同身份内外观变化，实现遮挡或后视角下的有意义比较，并构建了大规模基准数据集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统人脸识别模型强制身份内不变性，会压缩发型、造型等外观变化，无法处理非正面视角或面部线索缺失时的身份一致性需求，因此需要一种能建模外观变化的结构化相似度方法。

Method: 提出Head Similarity框架，通过层次化监督（跨身份、同身份不同外观）和身份感知蒸馏，联合建模身份判别与外观敏感相似度；从长视频中弱监督构建包含多样化姿态、遮挡和时间变化的大规模基准。

Result: 实验表明传统人脸识别模型无法捕捉外观依赖的相似度，而所提方法展示了结构化全头相似度建模的可行性。

Conclusion: 本文为超越严格生物特征识别的身份一致性需求提供了新思路，在遮挡、后视角等困难场景下实现有意义的视觉相似度比较。

Abstract: Many vision applications require identity consistency beyond strict biometric recognition, especially under non-frontal views or when facial cues are missing. However, conventional face recognition models enforce intra-identity invariance, collapsing appearance variations such as hairstyle or styling changes into a single representation, limiting their use in appearance-sensitive scenarios. To address this limitation, we introduce Head Similarity, a new formulation that extends identity-centric recognition to structured whole-head similarity modeling. Our approach explicitly captures intra-identity appearance variation and enforces hierarchical similarity ordering across identity and appearance states, enabling meaningful comparison even under occlusion or rear-view conditions. We construct a large-scale benchmark from long-form videos with weakly-supervised appearance states, covering diverse poses, occlusions, and temporal changes. As a first step, we develop a simple yet effective framework that jointly models identity discrimination and appearance-sensitive similarity through hierarchical supervision and identity-aware distillation. Experiments show that conventional face recognition models fail to capture appearance-dependent similarity, while our approach demonstrates the feasibility of structured whole-head similarity modeling.

</details>


### [223] [Text-to-CAD Evaluation with CADTests](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07807)
*Dimitrios Mallis,Marco Wang,Ahmet Serdar Karadeniz,Elisa Ricci,Anis Kacem,Djamila Aouada*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出CADTestBench——首个基于可执行软件测试的Text-to-CAD评估基准，通过自动化测试验证生成CAD模型是否满足几何与拓扑要求，并展示了该测试可用于指导模型生成以提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Text-to-CAD任务日益重要，但评估方法严重缺乏，现有工作对如何衡量CAD模型生成质量几乎没有研究，亟需系统化的评估方案。

Method: 设计CADTests可执行软件测试，从几何和拓扑两个维度验证生成模型是否满足输入提示的要求；基于此构建CADTestBench基准，并用其对现有Text-to-CAD方法进行系统评测。

Result: 通过CADTestBench对近期Text-to-CAD方法进行了全面基准测试，并证明CADTests还可作为训练指导信号，产生超越现有方法的简单基线。

Conclusion: CADTestBench填补了Text-to-CAD评估空白，提供了一种自动化、可复现的评测方式，同时测试本身也能反过来提升生成质量。

Abstract: Text-to-CAD has recently emerged as an important task with the potential to substantially accelerate design workflows. Despite its significance, there has been surprisingly little work on Text-to-CAD evaluation, and assessing CAD model generation performance remains a considerable challenge. In this work, we introduce a new evaluation perspective for Text-to-CAD based on automated testing. We propose CADTestBench, the first test-based benchmark for Text-to-CAD, based on CADTests, executable software tests that verify whether a generated CAD model satisfies the geometric and topological requirements of the input prompt. Using CADTestBench, we conduct comprehensive benchmarking of recent Text-to-CAD methods and further demonstrate that CADTests can also guide CAD model generation, yielding simple baselines that surpass performance of current methods. CADTestBench code and data are available at GitHub and Hugging Face dataset.

</details>


### [224] [Explainable Part-Based Vehicle Classifier with Spatial Awareness](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07831)
*Andreas Caduff,Klaus Zahn,Jonas Hofstetter,Martin Rechsteiner,Patrick Flaig*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于部件检测的车辆分类方法，通过将CNN分解为检测器、特征构建和分类器三个模块，在保持较高准确率的同时提升模型可解释性。扩展版本引入了空间概率图来增强部件检测的空间感知能力，提高了对误检测的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统端到端CNN在车辆分类中缺乏可解释性且难以扩展新类别，作者希望通过分解CNN架构，在保持准确率的同时实现模型的解释性和易扩展性。

Method: 将CNN分解为三个模块：1) CNN部件检测器（检测车辆语义部件）；2) 空间概率图构建（每个部件的空间分布概率）；3) softmax回归分类。相比之前二值化特征判断，新方法通过空间概率图增强空间感知能力。

Result: 基于部件的方法在准确率上与端到端CNN相当，且对部件误检测具有更强的鲁棒性，证明了准确率与可解释性之间并非必然存在权衡关系。

Conclusion: 该方法为智能交通系统中的车辆分类提供了一种兼具高准确率和直观可解释性的方案，对实际应用具有重要意义。

Abstract: In the area of Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITS), fine-grained vehicle classification systems play an essential role. Recently, the authors have presented a novel vision-based classification approach in which standard end-to-end Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have been decomposed into 1) a CNN-based detector for semantically strong vehicle parts, followed by 2) feature construction and 3) final classification by a decision tree. In contrast to conventional CNNs, this allows both easy extensibility to new vehicle categories - without the need to fully retrain the part detector - and an important step towards the interpretability of the model, removing partially the black-box nature inherent to CNNs. Here we present an important extension of this approach that now incorporates spatial awareness of the vehicle parts: while the feature construction 2) of the previous approach used a binary decision for each feature (present vs. absent), now a full spatial probability map is constructed to condition the presence of each individual part with respect to a given vehicle category. The classification is performed using a softmax regression approach for the overall vehicle probabilities. This method shows a considerably improved robustness against false (part-)detections, a point that is crucial for practical application. Comparative analyses with a state-of-the-art end-to-end CNN indicate that our part-based methods achieve comparable accuracy, effectively challenging the presumed trade-off between accuracy and explainability. This research represents a significant advance in vehicle classification for ITS and forms the basis for systems that combine high accuracy with intuitive interpretability.

</details>


### [225] [Enhancing Eye Movement Biometrics for User Authentication via Continuous Gaze Offset Score Fusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06810)
*Hashim Aziz,Mehedi Hasan Raju,Oleg V. Komogortsev*

Main category: cs.HC

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 本文研究连续注视偏移能否作为辅助特征提升眼动生物特征识别（EMB）系统的性能，实验表明非线性融合方法在多个数据集和任务上均有效，尤其当融合多任务信息时认证效果更佳。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度学习EMB系统忽略了连续注视偏移中可能包含的用户判别信息，本文旨在验证这一特征是否能提升生物识别性能。

Method: 在实验室级眼动仪和VR头显两个公开数据集上，评估线性和非线性融合方法，将连续注视偏移与现有生物特征结合，并在多种任务和观测时长下进行测试。

Result: 非线性融合在两个数据集上均优于线性融合；融合多任务信息进一步提升了认证性能。

Conclusion: 连续注视偏移可作为有用的辅助信息，尤其在眼动数据降质或含噪条件下，能提升眼动生物特征识别系统的性能。

Abstract: Eye movement biometrics (EMB) use subject-specific gaze dynamics for user authentication and identification. Recent deep learning-based EMB systems achieve strong performance by modeling temporal eye movement behavior. However, these systems typically overlook continuous gaze offset, despite prior evidence that it contains user-discriminative information. This work examines whether continuous gaze offset can improve biometric performance when combined with existing biometric features. We evaluate linear and nonlinear fusion methods on two publicly available datasets, collected via the lab-grade eye tracker and virtual reality headset across multiple tasks and observation durations. Results indicate that fusion offers performance benefits on both datasets, particularly when using nonlinear fusion. Additionally, fusing biometric information across multiple tasks further improves authentication performance. These findings support the hypothesis that continuous gaze offset may serve as useful auxiliary information under conditions of degraded or noisy eye tracking.

</details>


### [226] [Weather-Robust Scene Semantics with Vision-Aligned 4D Radar](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07367)
*Kali Hamilton,Christoffer Heckman*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 该研究将毫米波雷达编码器与冻结的SigLIP视觉嵌入对齐，通过冻结的视觉语言模型解码结构化场景描述，仅需约7M可训练参数。在雨、雾、雪等恶劣天气下，雷达配置优于摄像头基线（后者产生超过90%的幻觉），并发现token-norm不匹配是主要失败模式，通过投影层输出的LayerNorm可解决。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 摄像头和LiDAR在雨、雾、雪等恶劣天气下性能严重下降，而毫米波雷达几乎不受影响。作者希望利用雷达的鲁棒性，结合预训练视觉语言模型的强大语义理解能力，实现全天候的场景理解。

Method: 将雷达编码器对齐到冻结的SigLIP视觉嵌入，通过大约7M可训练参数，利用冻结的VLM解码结构化场景描述。分析了token-norm不匹配问题，并提出投影层输出的LayerNorm来缓解。

Result: 在K-RADAR数据集的雾、小雪、大雪场景下，所有雷达配置均优于摄像头基线（后者幻觉率超90%）。揭示了token-norm不匹配是主要失败模式，LayerNorm可有效解决。

Conclusion: 毫米波雷达可有效替代恶劣天气下的视觉传感器，通过少量可训练参数即可适配冻结的VLM；编码器复杂度、描述格式和池化策略之间存在权衡，为未来雷达-VLM流水线设计提供了指导。

Abstract: Cameras and LiDAR degrade in rain, fog, and snow, while millimeter-wave radar remains largely unaffected. We align a radar encoder to frozen SigLIP vision
  embeddings and decode structured scene captions through a frozen vision-language model (VLM) with approximately 7M trainable parameters. On K-RADAR with
  held-out fog, light snow, and heavy snow sequences, all radar configurations outperform a camera baseline that collapses to over 90% hallucination. We
  identify a token-norm mismatch as the dominant failure mode when bridging radar to a frozen VLM and show that projector-output LayerNorm resolves it.
  Analysis of encoder complexity, caption format, and pooling strategy reveals tradeoffs that inform future radar-VLM pipeline design.

</details>


### [227] [Bringing Multimodal Large Language Models to Infrared-Visible Image Fusion Quality Assessment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06969)
*Yuchen Guo,Junli Gong,Yao Lu,Xintong Xu,Yiuming Cheung,Weifeng Su*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 20.0

TL;DR: 针对红外-可见光图像融合（IVIF）评估中现有方法过度优化手工统计指标、且多模态大模型（MLLM）被简单用于离散评分导致对相似质量图像区分不足的问题，本文提出FuScore，利用MLLM生成连续质量分数，并引入基于子维度一致性的软标签和三项联合优化目标，实现与人类视觉偏好高度相关的评估结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有IVIF评估方法要么过度优化手工/全参考指标，要么在奖励建模中使用聚合分数的标量回归，无法利用MLLM的推理能力；而简单引入MLLM做离散预测会导致相似质量的融合图像被分到不同等级，缺乏细粒度区分能力。

Method: 1) 利用MLLM生成连续质量分数（而非离散等级）；2) 利用四个IVIF子维度的一致性构建每张图像的软标签，其锐度反映判断共识程度；3) 提出三部分联合目标：分布监督（每张图像的软标签）、同源图像对Thurstone保序损失、跨源图像对Thurstone保序损失。

Result: 实验表明FuScore与人类视觉偏好的相关性达到最优水平，优于现有方法。

Conclusion: MLLM在IVIF质量评估中可以有效模拟人类视觉感知，连续评分与软标签机制显著提升了评估的细粒度和可靠性。

Abstract: Infrared-Visible image fusion (IVIF) aims to integrate thermal information and detailed spatial structures into a single fused image to enhance perception. However, existing evaluation approaches tend to over-optimize both hand-crafted no-reference statistics and full-reference metrics that treat the source images as pseudo ground truths. Recent IVIF reward-modelling efforts learn from human ratings but use scalar regression on aggregated scores, neither leveraging the reasoning of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) nor encoding per-image perceptual ambiguity in their supervision, but naively introducing MLLMs with discrete one-hot supervision likewise collapses fused images of similar quality into different rating levels. To address this, we introduce FuScore, which utilizes an MLLM to mimic human visual perception by producing continuous quality score, rather than discrete level predictions, enabling fine-grained discrimination among fused images of similar quality. We exploit the agreement among four IVIF-specific sub-dimensions to construct a per-image soft label whose sharpness reflects how consensual the overall judgment is. We further introduce a tripartite objective combining per-image distributional supervision, within-source-pair Thurstone fidelity for method-level ordering, and cross-source-pair Thurstone fidelity for scene-level ordering across scenes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FuScore achieves state-of-the-art correlation with human visual preferences.

</details>


### [228] [OneViewAll: Semantic Prior Guided One-View 6D Pose Estimation for Novel Objects](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07023)
*Yang Luo,Yan Gong,Yongsheng Gao,Jie Zhao,Xinyu Zhang,Huaping Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 20.0

TL;DR: OneViewAll提出了一种基于语义先验的"投影-比较"框架，仅需单张真实RGB-D参考视图即可完成6D物体姿态估计，无需CAD模型，在LINEMOD等数据集上显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有6D姿态估计方法大多依赖CAD模型或多视角数据，在实际应用中可扩展性差。作者希望解决仅有一张真实参考视图时的高效姿态估计问题。

Method: 提出Project-and-Compare范式，在投影等变空间中直接对齐参考和查询观测。渐进整合三级语义先验：类别/场景级（假设初始化）、物体级对称先验（镜像融合补全）、patch级先验（判别细化）。

Result: LINEMOD上单参考视图ADD-0.1达92.5%，远超CVPR 2025基线One2Any的52.6%；在YCB-V、Real275、Toyota-Light上也有提升，且推理延迟低。

Conclusion: 对称感知投影在对称、无纹理和遮挡物体上效果显著，证明了无需CAD模型的单视图姿态估计的可行性和高效性。

Abstract: In many practical 6D object pose estimation scenarios, we often have access to only a single real-world RGB-D reference view per object, typically without CAD models. Existing methods largely rely on explicit 3D models or multi-view data, which limits their scalability. To address this challenging single-reference model-free setting, we propose \textbf{OneViewAll}, a semantic-prior-guided framework that performs pose estimation via a novel Project-and-Compare paradigm. Instead of relying on computationally expensive CAD-based rendering, our method directly aligns reference and query observations within a projection-equivariant space. OneViewAll progressively integrates hierarchical semantic priors across three levels: (1) \textit{category- and scene-level} priors for efficient hypothesis initialization; (2) \textit{object-level symmetry} priors for geometry completion via mirror fusion; and (3) \textit{patch-level} priors for discriminative refinement. Extensive experiments demonstrate that OneViewAll achieves \textbf{92.5\%} ADD-0.1 accuracy on the LINEMOD dataset using only one real reference view -- significantly outperforming the CVPR 2025 baseline One2Any (52.6\%). It also yields consistent improvements on YCB-V, Real275, and Toyota-Light while maintaining low inference latency. Our results underscore the efficacy of symmetry-aware projection in handling symmetric, texture-less, and occluded objects.

</details>


### [229] [LENS: Low-Frequency Eigen Noise Shaping for Efficient Diffusion Sampling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07253)
*Haewon Jeon,Si-Hyeon Lee*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 20.0

TL;DR: 提出LENS框架，在低维子空间中对噪声的低频成分进行调制，以高效提升扩散模型蒸馏后的图像质量，实现400-700倍FLOPs降低和10-20倍推理加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散模型蒸馏虽能加速生成，但常导致图像质量下降。现有测试时优化方法推理慢，超网络方法则需要在高维隐空间进行昂贵的噪声调制，效率低。

Method: 观察到噪声低频成分决定图像全局结构和视觉保真度，据此将噪声调制约束到低维低频子空间，设计轻量级独立网络选择性地调制这些低频分量，并推导了 principled 训练目标。

Result: 在保持竞争性图像质量的同时，相比先前方法，FLOPs减少400-700倍，模型参数减少25-75倍，推理开销降低10-20倍。

Conclusion: LENS通过在低维低频子空间进行高效的噪声调制，有效缓解了蒸馏扩散模型速度与质量之间的权衡，显著提升了计算效率。

Abstract: Distilled diffusion models accelerate image generation by reducing the number of denoising steps, but often suffer from degraded image quality. To mitigate this trade-off, test-time optimization methods improve quality, yet their iterative nature incurs substantial computational overhead and leads to slow inference, limiting practical usability. Recent hypernetwork-based approaches amortize this process during training, but still require costly noise modulation in high-dimensional latent spaces. In this work, we propose LENS (Low-frequency Eigen Noise Shaping), an efficient noise modulation framework that operates in a low-dimensional subspace. Our approach is motivated by the observation that low-frequency components of the noise largely determine the global structure and visual fidelity of generated images. Based on this observation, we provide a theoretical justification for restricting modulation to the low-frequency subspace and derive a principled training objective. Building on this, LENS employs a lightweight, standalone network to selectively modulate these components, enabling efficient and targeted noise modulation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that LENS achieves competitive image quality while reducing FLOPs by 400-700$\times$, model parameters by 25-75$\times$, and inference-time overhead by 10-20$\times$ compared to prior methods.

</details>


### [230] [UniISP: A Unified ISP Framework for Both Human and Machine Vision](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07359)
*Hanxi Li,Yao Cheng,Bo Zhang,Li Zeng*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 20.0

TL;DR: 本文提出UniISP，一个统一的ISP框架，通过混合注意力模块(HAM)生成视觉上美观的图像，同时利用特征适配器(Feature Adapter)将ISP阶段的信息特征有效传递到下游网络，在多种场景和数据集上达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统ISP流程为人类视觉生成美观RGB图像时会造成信息压缩和损失，而现有直接利用raw数据的方法虽然保留信息，但生成的图像难以可视化或不符合人类审美。本文旨在设计一个同时满足人类视觉感知和计算机视觉应用需求的ISP框架。

Method: 提出UniISP框架：1）设计混合注意力模块(HAM)生成视觉上美观的图像；2）引入特征适配器(Feature Adapter)，将ISP阶段的信息特征有效传递到下游网络；3）采用监督学习进行训练。

Result: 在多种场景和多个数据集上实现了SOTA性能，证明了方法的泛化能力和有效性。

Conclusion: UniISP能够同时满足人类视觉感知和计算机视觉应用的需求，通过特征适配器有效桥接了ISP与下游任务的鸿沟。

Abstract: Compared to RGB images, raw sensor data provides a richer representation of information, which is crucial for accurate recognition, particularly under challenging conditions such as low-light environments. The traditional Image Signal Processing (ISP) pipeline generates visually pleasing RGB images for human perception through a series of steps, but some of these operations may adversely impact the information integrity by introducing compression and loss. Furthermore, in computer vision tasks that directly utilize raw camera data, most existing methods integrate minimal ISP processing with downstream networks, yet the resulting images are often difficult to visualize or do not align with human aesthetic preferences. This paper proposes UniISP, a novel ISP framework designed to simultaneously meet the requirements of both human visual perception and computer vision applications. By incorporating a carefully designed Hybrid Attention Module (HAM) and employing supervised learning, the proposed method ensures that the generated images are visually appealing. Additionally, a Feature Adapter module is introduced to effectively propagate informative features from the ISP stage to subsequent downstream networks. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance across various scenarios and multiple datasets, proving its generalizability and effectiveness.

</details>


### [231] [EditTransfer++: Toward Faithful and Efficient Visual-Prompt-Guided Image Editing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07455)
*Lan Chen,Qi Mao,Yiren Song,Yuchao Gu,Siwei Ma*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 20.0

TL;DR: 提出EditTransfer++框架，通过文本解耦训练、对比精炼机制和条件压缩重用策略，解决了扩散Transformer在视觉提示编辑中的结构不匹配和效率问题，在保真度和推理速度上达到SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有扩散Transformer方法因预训练的文本偏向和采样的随机不稳定性，导致无法忠实地复现视觉示例对的编辑变换。

Method: 1) 文本解耦训练策略（微调时移除文本条件，强制模型仅从视觉证据推断变换，推理时可选文本引导）；2) 最佳-最差对比精炼机制（重塑去噪轨迹，抑制不忠实生成）；3) 条件压缩与重用策略（减少token冗余，支持1024像素长边高效生成）。

Result: 在现有基准和新提出的EditTransfer-Bench上达到SOTA视觉提示保真度，且推理速度显著快于先前方法。

Conclusion: EditTransfer++为可扩展的提示引导图像编辑和视觉上下文学习提供了有前景的方向。

Abstract: Visual-prompt-guided edit transfer aims to learn image transformations directly from example pairs, offering more precise and controllable editing than purely text-driven approaches. However, existing diffusion transformer-based methods often fail to faithfully reproduce the demonstrated edits due to structural mismatches between the task and the backbone, including a pretrained bias toward textual conditioning and inherent stochastic instability during sampling. To bridge this gap, we present EditTransfer++, a framework that combines progressively structured training with an efficient conditioning scheme to improve both visual prompt faithfulness and inference efficiency. We first mitigate textual dominance with a text-decoupled training strategy that removes text conditioning during fine-tuning, compelling the model to infer transformations solely from visual evidence while still supporting optional text guidance at inference. On top of this visually grounded model, a best-worst contrastive refinement mechanism reshapes the denoising trajectories to suppress unfaithful generations and improve consistency across random seeds. To alleviate the computational bottleneck of high-resolution in-context editing, we further introduce a condition compression and reuse strategy that reduces token redundancy and enables efficient generation of images with a 1024-pixel long edge. Extensive experiments on existing benchmarks and the proposed EditTransfer-Bench show that EditTransfer++ achieves state-of-the-art visual prompt faithfulness with substantially faster inference than prior methods, suggesting a promising direction for scalable prompt-guided image editing and broader visual in-context learning.

</details>


### [232] [123D: Unifying Multi-Modal Autonomous Driving Data at Scale](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08084)
*Daniel Dauner,Valentin Charraut,Bastian Berle,Tianyu Li,Long Nguyen,Jiabao Wang,Changhui Jing,Maximilian Igl,Holger Caesar,Boris Ivanovic,Yiyi Liao,Andreas Geiger,Kashyap Chitta*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 18.0

TL;DR: 本文提出123D，一个统一多模态驾驶数据集的开源框架，通过独立时间戳事件流API整合8个真实驾驶数据集（3300小时/9万公里）及1个合成数据集，支持跨数据集的3D目标检测迁移和强化学习规划等应用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自动驾驶数据集存在格式碎片化、标注不一致、同步机制各异等问题，无法在统一环境中共存，限制了数据的规模优势和跨数据集泛化能力。

Method: 提出123D框架，将每个模态存储为独立的时间戳事件流（无预设速率），通过统一API支持同步/异步访问；整合8个真实数据集+1个合成数据集，提供数据分析和可视化工具。

Result: 成功统一了8个真实驾驶数据集（3300小时/9万公里）和1个合成数据集；展示了跨数据集3D目标检测迁移和强化学习规划的应用效果；提供了标注统计和标定精度的系统对比。

Conclusion: 123D框架有效解决了多模态驾驶数据碎片化问题，为自动驾驶研究提供了统一的数据接口和跨数据集评估能力，对未来数据收集和标注标准化具有指导意义。

Abstract: The pursuit of autonomous driving has produced one of the richest sensor data collections in all of robotics. However, its scale and diversity remain largely untapped. Each dataset adopts different 2D and 3D modalities, such as cameras, lidar, ego states, annotations, traffic lights, and HD maps, with different rates and synchronization schemes. They come in fragmented formats requiring complex dependencies that cannot natively coexist in the same development environment. Further, major inconsistencies in annotation conventions prevent training or measuring generalization across multiple datasets. We present 123D, an open-source framework that unifies such multi-modal driving data through a single API. To handle synchronization, we store each modality as an independent timestamped event stream with no prescribed rate, enabling synchronous or asynchronous access across arbitrary datasets. Using 123D, we consolidate eight real-world driving datasets spanning 3,300 hours and 90,000 kilometers, together with a synthetic dataset with configurable collection scripts, and provide tools for data analysis and visualization. We conduct a systematic study comparing annotation statistics and assessing each dataset's pose and calibration accuracy. Further, we showcase two applications 123D enables: cross-dataset 3D object detection transfer and reinforcement learning for planning, and offer recommendations for future directions. Code and documentation are available at https://github.com/kesai-labs/py123d.

</details>


### [233] [TRAJGANR: Trajectory-Centric Urban Multimodal Learning via Geospatially Aligned Neural Representations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06990)
*Maria Despoina Siampou,Gengchen Mai,Ni Lao,Jinmeng Rao,Neha Arora,Cyrus Shahabi,Shushman Choudhury*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出TrajGANR，一种面向人类移动轨迹的多模态自监督学习框架，通过学习轨迹的连续神经表示，实现与街景图像和地理位置的细粒度对齐，在城市移动和道路理解任务上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有地理空间多模态自监督学习主要针对静态成对模态（如卫星图像与文本），无法有效处理人类移动轨迹这种连续运动路径数据，而轨迹对城市理解至关重要但尚未被充分探索。

Method: 提出TrajGANR框架，学习轨迹沿路径任意点的连续神经表示，实现与附近街景图像的细粒度对齐（即使图像与轨迹路点不共位），并联合对齐轨迹、街景图像和地理位置三种模态。

Result: 在四个城市移动和道路理解任务上，TrajGANR一致优于现有地理空间MSSL框架和轨迹专用基础模型。

Conclusion: 细粒度地理空间对齐和地理空间多模态学习是提升性能的关键，证实了连续轨迹表示在理解人类移动模式中的重要性。

Abstract: Multimodal self-supervised learning (MSSL) has emerged as a key paradigm for pretraining geospatial foundation models. However, existing geospatial MSSL methods are mainly designed for static pairs of modalities, such as satellite imagery, street-view imagery, and text, where learning is driven by aligning observations from the same or nearby locations. This assumption breaks down for human mobility trajectories, which represent continuous movement along paths rather than discrete observations at individual locations. Although trajectories are important for urban understanding through their ability to capture human activity across roads, neighborhoods, and places over time, they remain largely underexplored in current geospatial MSSL frameworks. We present TrajGANR, a novel trajectory-centric geospatial MSSL framework that aligns continuous movement patterns with static, location-based observations. TrajGANR learns a continuous neural representation of trajectories at arbitrary points along each path, which enables fine-grained alignment with nearby street-view images, even when they are not co-located with any trajectory waypoints. We leverage this capability to introduce an MSSL objective that jointly aligns three modalities: trajectories, street-view images, and their geographic locations. We evaluate TrajGANR on four urban mobility and road understanding tasks. Across these tasks, TrajGANR consistently outperforms existing geospatial MSSL frameworks and a trajectory-specific foundation model. Ablation studies further demonstrate that our proposed MSSL objective and the multimodal learning framework are the primary drivers of these improvements, highlighting the importance of fine-grained geospatial alignment over coarser aggregation, as well as geospatial multimodal learning.

</details>


### [234] [InfoGeo: Information-Theoretic Object-Centric Learning for Cross-View Generalizable UAV Geo-Localization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07099)
*Hongyang Zhang,Maonnan Wang,Ziyao Wang,Hongrui Yin,Man OnPun*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出InfoGeo框架，通过信息瓶颈理论结合物体中心学习，增强跨视角地理定位在多样化环境和无人机场景下的鲁棒性与泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有跨视角地理定位方法依赖全局特征对齐，在面对区域纹理差异、天气变化以及无人机视角下的密集细粒度物体时，存在严重的领域偏移和视觉杂乱问题，鲁棒性不足。

Method: 提出InfoGeo框架，将优化问题重构为信息瓶颈过程，包含两个核心目标：(i) 通过对齐跨视角的物体中心结构关系，最大化视角不变信息；(ii) 通过跨视角知识约束，最小化视角特定的噪声信号。

Result: 在多个基准数据集和挑战性场景下，InfoGeo显著优于当前最先进方法。

Conclusion: 基于物体中心学习和信息瓶颈理论的跨视角地理定位框架能有效提升模型在复杂环境下的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

Abstract: Cross-view geo-localization (CVGL) is fundamental for precise localization and navigation in GPS-denied environments, aiming to match ground or UAV imagery with satellite views. While existing approaches rely on global feature alignment, they often suffer from substantial domain shifts induced by varying regional textures and weather conditions. This issue becomes even more pronounced in UAV-based scenarios, where the broader perspective inevitably introduces dense, fine-grained objects, creating significant visual clutter. To address this, we draw inspiration from Object-Centric Learning (OCL) and propose InfoGeo, an information-theoretic framework designed to enhance robustness and generalization. InfoGeo reformulates the optimization as an information bottleneck process with two core objectives: (i) maximizing view-invariant information by aligning the object-centric structural relations across views, and (ii) minimizing view-specific noisy signals through cross-view knowledge constraints. Extensive evaluations across diverse benchmarks and challenging scenarios demonstrate that InfoGeo significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods.

</details>


### [235] [AGA3DNet: Anatomy-Guided Gaussian Priors with Multi-view xLSTM for 3D Brain MRI Subtype Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07142)
*Peiyu Duan,Xueqi Guo,Sepehr Farhand,Mehmet Berk Sahin,Xinyuan Zheng,James S. Duncan,Gerardo Hermosillo Valadez,Yoshihisa Shinagawa*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: AGA3DNet是一个融合放射报告解剖短语先验与3D CNN及多视图xLSTM的脑MRI亚型分类框架，在单中心数据集上取得了平衡的性能提升和可解释性定位能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 精确的3D脑MRI亚型分类需要同时利用局部解剖线索和长程上下文推理，现有方法在这两方面存在不足。

Method: 从放射报告中提取简短解剖短语，映射到图谱定义区域，通过符号距离变换和高斯加权生成平滑空间先验，作为软解剖先验通道与轻量级3D CNN及多视图xLSTM聚合相结合。

Result: 在单中心回顾性数据集上，AGA3DNet在异常亚型判别任务中相比可复现的3D分类基线实现了整体性能指标的均衡提升，并通过先验通道支持临床可解释的定位。

Conclusion: 所提方法在无密集体素标注的情况下提供了解剖引导的可解释性，但受限于单中心评估和缺乏大规模公开配对数据集。

Abstract: Accurate 3D brain MRI subtype classification benefits from both localized anatomical cues and long-range contextual reasoning. We present AGA3DNet, a report-grounded framework that incorporates brief anatomical phrases extracted from radiology reports as a soft anatomical prior channel and fuses it with a lightweight 3D CNN and multi-view xLSTM aggregation. Specifically, extracted anatomical phrases are mapped to atlas-defined regions and converted into smooth spatial priors using a signed-distance transform followed by Gaussian weighting, providing interpretable, anatomy-grounded guidance without requiring dense voxel annotations. We evaluate AGA3DNet on a retrospective institutional brain MRI cohort for abnormal subtype discrimination and compare against reproducible 3D classification baselines. AGA3DNet achieves improved overall balance across performance metrics and supports clinically interpretable localization through the prior channel. We discuss limitations related to single-cohort evaluation and the lack of large-scale public brain MRI datasets paired with radiology reports under broadly usable terms.

</details>


### [236] [UniV2D: Bridging Visual Restoration and Semantic Perception for Underwater Salient Object Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07146)
*Laibin Chang,Shaodong Wang,Yunke Wang,Xu Zhang,Kui Jiang,Chang Xu,Bo Du*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出UniV2D，一种统一视觉恢复与显著目标检测的联合优化框架，通过语义驱动学习范式解决水下图像增强与检测之间的语义不一致问题，在多个基准上超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统"先增强后检测"的串行范式导致低层视觉恢复与高层语义感知割裂，恢复后的图像可能对检测任务非最优甚至引入噪声，亟需一种联合优化的方法。

Method: 提出UniV2D分层双分支架构：1) 自校准解码器预测初始显著图；2) 掩码感知恢复模块重建图像；3) 显著性引导的精炼模块通过跨层级调制对齐结构保真度与语义一致性。

Result: 在多个水下基准数据集上，UniV2D在定量和定性评估中均显著优于现有最先进方法，建立了水下联合感知的新标准。

Conclusion: 语义驱动的高层指导低层恢复能有效解决语义不一致问题，联合优化框架比串行"增强-检测"范式更适合水下显著目标检测。

Abstract: Underwater salient object detection (USOD) plays a vital role in marine vision tasks but remains fundamentally challenging due to severe visual degradation, such as selective absorption and medium scattering. Conventional pipelines typically adopt a sequential "enhance-then-detect" paradigm. However, isolating low-level visual restoration from high-level semantic perception often leads to semantic inconsistency, where the restored images may not be optimal for detection and can even introduce task-irrelevant noise. To break this sequential bottleneck, we propose UniV2D, a Unified Vision-to-Detection Network that jointly optimizes visual restoration and salient object detection within a mutually beneficial framework. Unlike traditional methods that rely on disjointed pipelines or rigid physical priors, UniV2D introduces a semantic-driven learning paradigm: high-level saliency semantics actively guide the restoration process, while the restored visual cues reciprocally enhance saliency perception. Specifically, UniV2D features a hierarchical dual-branch architecture. It first employs a self-calibrated decoder to predict initial saliency masks alongside a mask-aware restoration module to reconstruct image content. Subsequently, a saliency-guided refinement module equipped with cross-level modulation is utilized to align structural fidelity with semantic consistency. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks demonstrate that UniV2D significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both quantitative and qualitative evaluations, establishing a new standard for joint underwater perception.

</details>


### [237] [Real-IAD MVN: A Multi-View Normal Vector Dataset and Benchmark for High-Fidelity Industrial Anomaly Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07149)
*Wenbing Zhu,Jianing Liang,Linjie Cheng,Yurui Pan,Zhuhao Chen,Qingwang Yan,Yudong Cheng,Jianghui Zhang,Mingmin Chi,Bo Peng*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出了Real-IAD-MVN多视角法向图数据集，通过5个视角的高保真表面法向图替代稀疏3D点云，用于工业异常检测，并结合统一原型重建基线方法验证了该数据集的优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工业异常检测方法对微细几何缺陷（如划痕、凹坑）检测能力不足：2D RGB图像受纹理和光照影响，3D点云过于稀疏难以捕捉微观缺陷。需要一种能同时兼顾几何细节和宏观形状的数据表示。

Method: 1) 构建Real-IAD-MVN数据集，通过升级采集系统从5个视角捕获高保真表面法向图（替代稀疏3D点云）；2) 提出基于重建的基线方法，从图像和法向图流中学习跨模态统一原型。

Result: 密集的多视角伪3D（表面法向）数据在检测性能上显著优于稀疏3D点云数据；统一原型方法超越了现有最先进的多模态融合方法。

Conclusion: 表面法向图是一种有效的几何异常检测数据形式，结合多视角策略可充分捕捉微观缺陷；Real-IAD-MVN数据集为推进几何异常检测提供了新的基准。

Abstract: Industrial Anomaly Detection (IAD) is critical for quality control, but existing methods struggle with subtle, geometric defects. Standard 2D (RGB) images are sensitive to texture and lighting but often miss fine geometric anomalies. While 3D point clouds capture macro-shape, they are typically too sparse to detect micro-defects like scratches or pits. We address this fundamental data limitation by introducing Real-IAD-MVN (Multi-View Normal), a large-scale industrial dataset. By upgrading our acquisition system, Real-IAD-MVN captures high-fidelity surface normal maps from five distinct viewpoints, replacing sparse 3D data entirely. This provides a comprehensive geometric representation at a micro-detail level, making previously invisible side-wall and occluded defects explicitly detectable. Our experiments, conducted on this new dataset, first provide evidence that incorporating dense, multi-view pseudo-3D (surface normals) yields significantly better detection performance than using sparse 3D point cloud data. To further validate the dataset and provide a strong benchmark, we introduce a baseline method based on reconstruction, which learns to extract cross-modal unified prototypes from the image and normal map streams. We demonstrate that this unified prototype approach surpasses existing state-of-the-art multimodal fusion methods, highlighting the rich potential of our new dataset for advancing geometric anomaly detection.

</details>


### [238] [DPG-CD: Depth-Prior-Guided Cross-Modal Joint 2D-3D Change Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07151)
*Luqi Zhang,Zhen Dong,Bisheng Yang*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出DPG-CD框架，利用深度先验引导的多时相跨模态融合方法，实现联合2D语义变化和3D高度变化检测，解决预事件DSM与后事件影像之间的模态差异问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法难以同时捕获城市2D语义变化和3D高度变化，且预事件DSM与后事件影像存在显著的光谱-几何表征差异，模态差异易与实际变化混淆，需要有效的多时相跨模态融合方法。

Method: 1) 引入估计深度先验以缩小影像与DSM的模态差距；2) 门控融合机制选择性注入深度先验的几何线索并保留光谱表征；3) 多阶段跨时相跨模态特征融合架构提取变化感知特征；4) 多任务解码器联合预测2D语义变化和3D高度变化，辅以DSM预测任务提升结构一致性。

Result: 在Hi-BCD、3DCD和NYC-MMCD三个数据集上，DPG-CD在2D和3D变化检测任务上均优于现有方法。

Conclusion: 提出了一种有效的深度先验引导跨模态融合框架，解决了预事件DSM与后事件影像联合变化检测问题，在多个基准上取得最优结果。

Abstract: Urban spatial evolution is manifested not only through horizontal expansion but also through vertical structural changes. Consequently, jointly capturing 2D semantic changes and 3D height changes is essential for urban morphology analysis and emergency management. In practical scenarios, collecting 3D observations is often constrained by high acquisition costs and the inability to support frequent updates. The multi-temporal cross-modal input consisting of pre-event Digital Surface Model (DSM) and post-event imagery provides a practical solution for 3D change detection in high-frequency urban monitoring, disaster assessment, and emergency response scenarios. However, this setting remains challenging as imagery and DSM data exhibit significant spectral-geometric representation gaps. Moreover, modality differences may be confused with actual changes, and robust change detection requires effective fusion of semantic and geometric features from multi-temporal data. In this paper, we propose DPG-CD, a depth-prior-guided multi-temporal cross-modal fusion framework for joint 2D semantic and 3D height change detection. Specifically, an estimated depth prior is introduced into the imagery to mitigate the modality gap with DSM. A gated fusion mechanism then selectively injects geometric cues from depth prior while preserving discriminative spectral representations. Subsequently, a multi-stage cross-temporal cross-modal feature fusion architecture is employed to extract change-aware features. Finally, a multi-task decoder jointly predicts 2D semantic changes and 3D height changes, complemented by an auxiliary DSM prediction task to improve structural consistency and height estimation accuracy. Experiments on two public datasets, Hi-BCD and 3DCD, and a new dataset, NYC-MMCD, demonstrate that DPG-CD outperforms state-of-the-art methods on both 2D and 3D change detection tasks.

</details>


### [239] [Hierarchical Perfusion Graphs for Tumor Heterogeneity Modeling in Glioma Molecular Subtyping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07156)
*Han Jang,Junhyeok Lee,Heeseong Eum,Joon Jang,Yoseob Han,Seung Hong Choi,Kyu Sung Choi*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出了HiPerfGNN框架，利用VQ-VAE从DSC-MRI时间强度曲线中学习离散血流动力学表示，构建层次化图神经网络，实现胶质瘤分子亚型（IDH突变、1p/19q共缺失、WHO分级）的非侵入性精准预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统胶质瘤分子亚型分型依赖有创组织取样；基于结构MRI的深度学习方法无法捕获区分分子亚型的血流动力学特征；DSC-MRI的放射基因组学因站点间变异性和体素级分析的限制难以临床部署。

Method: 1) 使用VQ-VAE从原始时间强度曲线学习离散血流动力学表示（量化灌注编码）；2) 量化编码定义粗粒度图节点（功能肿瘤生境），由结构MRI引导细分为细粒度子区域；3) 层次化图神经网络跨尺度传播信息进行分子预测。

Result: 内部队列(n=475): IDH AUC 0.96, 1p/19q AUC 0.89, WHO分级 AUC 0.84; 外部独立队列(n=397): IDH AUC 0.89 (无需重新校准)。

Conclusion: 将灌注动力学整合到放射基因组学管道中对胶质瘤分子亚型分型有显著价值，模型具有生物学可解释性且跨中心泛化性强。

Abstract: Precise molecular subtyping of gliomas, including isocitrate dehydrogenase (IDH) mutation and 1p/19q codeletion, directly guides surgical and therapeutic decisions, yet currently relies on invasive tissue sampling. Deep learning on structural MRI has emerged as a non-invasive alternative, but anatomy-only approaches cannot capture the hemodynamic signatures that distinguish molecular subtypes. Radiogenomics based on dynamic susceptibility contrast (DSC) MRI holds immense potential for non-invasively characterizing glioma molecular subtypes, yet clinical deployment has been hindered by inter-site variability and the limitations of voxel-wise analysis. We introduce HiPerfGNN, a framework that first learns discrete hemodynamic representations from raw time-intensity curves using a vector-quantized variational autoencoder (VQ-VAE). These quantized perfusion codes define coarse-level graph nodes representing functional tumor habitats, each of which is hierarchically subdivided into fine-level subregions guided by structural MRI. A hierarchical graph neural network then propagates information across scales for molecular prediction. On an internal cohort (n=475), the model achieved AUCs of 0.96 (IDH), 0.89 (1p/19q), and 0.84 (WHO grade), and maintained robust IDH performance (AUC 0.89) on an independent external cohort (n=397) without recalibration. Gradient-based saliency analysis confirms biologically grounded attention patterns aligned with known glioma pathophysiology. Our results demonstrate the added value of integrating perfusion dynamics into radiogenomic pipelines for glioma molecular subtyping. Code is available at https://github.com/janghana/HiPerfGNN.

</details>


### [240] [SatSurfGS: Generalizable 2D Gaussian Splatting for Sparse-View Satellite Surface Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07181)
*Min Chen,Wei Guo,Bin Wang,Wen Li,Tong Fang,Jinbo Zhang,Junqi Zhao,Hong Kuang,Han Hu,Xuming Ge,Qing Zhu,Bo Xu*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出了SatSurfGS，一种基于2D高斯泼溅的可泛化稀疏视角卫星影像表面重建方法，通过粗到细的高斯属性预测框架和三层级局部几何可靠性建模，提升了重建质量和跨数据集泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 稀疏视角卫星影像表面重建中，多视角匹配的可靠性存在强烈的空间异质性（受大光度差异、弱纹理和重复纹理影响），而现有可泛化前馈2DGS框架在卫星表面重建领域尚属空白。

Method: 1) 粗到细的高斯属性预测框架；2) 置信度感知的单目多视角特征融合模块；3) 跨阶段自一致性残差引导模块；4) 置信度双向路由损失函数。

Result: 在卫星数据集上，相比可泛化基线和逐场景优化方法，在渲染质量、表面重建精度、跨数据集泛化能力和推理效率上均有提升。

Conclusion: 通过显式建模局部几何可靠性，有效解决了稀疏视角卫星影像中匹配可靠性不均的问题，为卫星影像表面重建提供了高效可泛化的解决方案。

Abstract: Sparse-view satellite image surface reconstruction remains highly challenging, fundamentally because the reliability of multi-view matching under satellite imaging conditions is strongly spatially heterogeneous. Affected by large photometric differences, weak textures, and repetitive textures, multi-view geometric constraints are often sparse, unevenly distributed, and locally unreliable. Although 2D Gaussian Splatting (2DGS) is more suitable than 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) for the explicit representation of continuous surfaces, research on generalizable feed-forward 2DGS frameworks for sparse-view satellite surface reconstruction is still lacking. To address this issue, we propose SatSurfGS, a generalizable sparse-view surface reconstruction method for satellite imagery based on 2DGS. The proposed method builds a coarse-to-fine Gaussian attribute prediction framework and explicitly models local geometric reliability at three levels: feature learning, Gaussian parameter estimation, and training optimization. Specifically, we propose a confidence-aware monocular multi-view feature fusion module to adaptively integrate monocular priors and multi-view matching features according to local confidence; a cross-stage self-consistency residual guidance module to stabilize stage-wise Gaussian parameter refinement using the residual between the rendered height map from the previous stage and the current-stage MVS height map, together with confidence information; and a confidence bidirectional routing loss to achieve differentiated allocation of geometric and appearance supervision. Experiments on satellite datasets show that the proposed method achieves improved rendering quality, surface reconstruction accuracy, cross-dataset generalization, and inference efficiency compared with representative generalizable baselines and competitive per-scene optimization methods.

</details>


### [241] [High-Fidelity Surface Splatting-Based 3D Reconstruction from Multi-View Images](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07254)
*Nandhana Sunil,Abhirami R Iyer,Avirup Mandal*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于改进隐式移动最小二乘（IMLS）的多视角网格重建方法，通过引入紧支撑多项式核和拉普拉斯随机正则化，解决了现有方法难以恢复高频几何细节的问题，在表面重建和渲染上达到了SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法（如3DGS、NeRF）依赖后处理进行网格提取，限制了几何与外观的联合优化；而IMLS虽支持端到端重建，但其指数核函数难以捕捉高频细节。

Method: 1) 用紧支撑的**多项式核**替代指数核，提升对频域内容的控制能力；2) 引入**拉普拉斯滤波的随机正则化**，增强高频结构保留能力，同时保持优化稳定性。

Result: 在表面重建和渲染任务上均达到SOTA，生成的几何更精确、视觉效果更清晰。

Conclusion: 通过多项式核和拉普拉斯正则化，有效提升了IMLS框架对高频几何的恢复能力，实现了端到端的精细多视图重建。

Abstract: Multi-view mesh reconstruction remains a core challenge in computer graphics and vision, especially for recovering high-frequency geometry from sparse observations. Recent methods such as 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) and Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) rely on post-processing for mesh extraction, thereby limiting joint optimization of geometry and appearance. Implicit Moving Least Squares (IMLS) instead enables direct conversion of point clouds into signed distance and texture fields, supporting end-to-end reconstruction and rendering. However, existing IMLS formulations use exponential kernels that struggle with high-frequency detail. We introduce a compact polynomial kernel with local support and greater flexibility, allowing better control over frequency content and improved geometric fidelity. To further enhance fine details, we incorporate stochastic regularization with Laplacian filtering. Together, these improve the preservation of high-frequency structure while maintaining stable optimization. Experiments show state-of-the-art performance in both surface reconstruction and rendering, yielding more accurate geometry and sharper visuals from multi-view data.

</details>


### [242] [SoLAR: Error-Resilient Streamable Long-Horizon Free-Viewpoint Video Reconstruction with Anchor Activation and Latent Recalibration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07346)
*Haotian Zhang,Xu Mo,Yixin Yu,Guanhua Zhu,Jian Xue,Tongda Xu,Yan Wang,Jiaqi Zhang,Siwei Ma,Wen Gao*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: SoLAR是一个面向长时程自由视角视频（LFVV）的弹性流式重建框架，通过动态锚点激活与隐空间差异重校准机制，在无需分组处理的情况下实现稳定高质量重建，并达到最优性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自由视角视频方法主要针对短序列设计，在处理长时程自由视角视频（LFVV）时性能显著下降，且缺乏错误弹性和流式支持，限制了沉浸式系统的实际部署。

Method: 提出Anchor Activation Dynamics (AAD)动态激活/抑制锚点以建模非刚性变换，以及Latent Discrepancy Aware Recalibration (LaDAR)识别隐表示差异并重校准编码对应关系，从而抑制误差传播。

Result: 在长序列上实现SOTA重建性能，同时保持最小存储开销，且不牺牲实时性能。

Conclusion: SoLAR为长时程自由视角视频重建提供了新方向，推动了沉浸式系统的实际部署。

Abstract: Free-Viewpoint Video (FVV) has emerged as a cornerstone of next-generation immersive media systems and attracted widespread attention. Previous methods primarily focus on short video sequences and suffer from significant performance degradation when processing long-horizon free-viewpoint video (LFVV). Motivated by bit allocation theory, we analyze dynamic-anchor-based volumetric video representation within a rate-distortion optimization framework and propose \textbf{SoLAR}, which is the first error-resilient streamable FVV framework that maintains stable reconstruction quality on long sequences without requiring group-of-pictures partitioning. We propose the Anchor Activation Dynamics (AAD), which enables dynamic anchors to model non-rigid transformations by dynamically activating informative anchors and suppressing redundant ones. Furthermore, we introduce Latent Discrepancy Aware Recalibration (LaDAR), which is a mechanism to identify discrepancies between latent representations and recalibrate the correspondences encoded in the network, effectively mitigating error propagation in LFVV without compromising real-time performance or storage compactness. Extensive experiments demonstrate that \textbf{SoLAR} achieves state-of-the-art reconstruction performance while maintaining minimum storage overhead, which provides a new direction for LFVV reconstruction and advances the practical deployment of immersive systems. Demo free-viewpoint videos are provided in the supplementary material.

</details>


### [243] [UniD-Shift: Towards Unified Semantic Segmentation via Interpretable Share-Private Multimodal Decomposition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07356)
*Shuai Zhang,Zhecheng Shi,Zhuxiao Li,Jing Ou,Tengxi Wang,Yuan Liu,Wufan Zhao*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于显式分解共享/私有子空间的多模态框架（UniD-Shift），用于联合2D-3D语义分割，在SemanticKITTI和nuScenes上取得SOTA效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LiDAR点云稀疏采样与图像几何畸变导致跨模态对齐困难，现有融合方法不稳定。作者受2D图像本质是3D世界投影的启发，认为2D和3D特征既有共享语义也有模态特有属性，希望显式建模这种分解以提升融合效果。

Method: 1) 使用SAM视觉编码器+SPTNet几何编码器提取互补特征；2) 将特征显式分解为共享子空间（公共语义）和私有子空间（模态特有）；3) 轻量级注意力融合模块聚合共享特征为一致跨模态表示；4) 正则化训练目标确保语义对齐与子空间独立性。

Result: 在SemanticKITTI和nuScenes上一致优于多模态基线，计算效率有竞争力；跨域（nuScenes USA-Singapore）泛化能力强。

Conclusion: 显式分解共享/私有子空间是实现稳定跨模态融合的有效策略，方法兼具高精度与良好泛化性。

Abstract: Semantic segmentation of large-scale 3D point clouds is crucial for applications such as autonomous driving and urban digital twins. However, the sparse sampling pattern of LiDAR and the view-dependent geometric distortion in image observations complicate cross-modal alignment and hinder stable fusion. Inspired by the fact that 2D images captured by cameras are representations of the 3D world, we recognize that the features learned from 2D and 3D segmentation share some common semantics, while other aspects remain modality-specific. This insight motivates a unified multimodal framework for joint 2D-3D semantic segmentation. We combine a SAM-based vision encoder with a SPTNet-based geometric encoder to extract complementary semantic and geometric representations. The resulting features from both modalities are explicitly decomposed into shared and private subspaces, where the shared components summarize semantic factors common to both domains, and the private components preserve properties that are unique to each modality. A lightweight attention-based fusion module aggregates the shared features into a consistent cross-modal representation, and a regularized training objective ensures both semantic alignment and subspace independence. Experiments on the SemanticKITTI and nuScenes benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements in segmentation accuracy over representative multimodal baselines, accompanied by competitive computational efficiency. Cross-domain evaluation on nuScenes USA-Singapore shows stable performance under distribution shifts, demonstrating strong generalization. The implementation code is publicly available at: https://github.com/shuaizhang69/UniD-Shift.

</details>


### [244] [RELO: Reinforcement Learning to Localize for Visual Object Tracking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07379)
*Xin Chen,Chuanyu Sun,Jiao Xu,Houwen Peng,Dong Wang,Huchuan Lu,Kede Ma*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: RELO是一种基于强化学习的视觉目标跟踪方法，将目标定位建模为马尔可夫决策过程，用奖励驱动的定位策略替代传统手工设计的空间先验（如热力图），并引入层对齐的时间令牌传播提升语义一致性，在多个基准上取得了优异性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统目标跟踪方法使用手工设计的空间先验（热力图）提供代理监督信号，这些先验与跟踪优化和评估指标（如IoU、AUC）对齐不良，导致性能受限。

Method: 1) 将目标定位建模为马尔可夫决策过程；2) 通过强化学习在空间位置上学习定位策略；3) 奖励函数结合帧级IoU和序列级AUC；4) 引入层对齐的时间令牌传播以提升语义一致性。

Result: 在多个基准上取得优异的跟踪结果，在LaSOText上无需模板更新即可达到57.5% AUC。

Conclusion: 奖励驱动的定位方法可以有效替代传统先验驱动的定位方法，为视觉目标跟踪提供了新的范式。

Abstract: Conventional visual object trackers localize targets using handcrafted spatial priors, often in the form of heatmaps. Such priors provide only surrogate supervision and are poorly aligned with tracking optimization and evaluation metrics, such as intersection over union (IoU) and area under the success curve (AUC). Here, we introduce RELO, a REinforcement-learning-to-LOcalize method for visual object tracking that formulates target localization as a Markov decision process. Specifically, RELO replaces handcrafted spatial priors with a localization policy learned over spatial positions via reinforcement learning, with rewards combining frame-level IoU and sequence-level AUC. We additionally introduce layer-aligned temporal token propagation to improve semantic consistency across frames, with negligible computational overhead. Across multiple benchmarks, RELO achieves superior results, attaining 57.5% AUC on LaSOText without template updates. This confirms that reward-driven localization provides an effective alternative to prior-driven localization for visual object tracking.

</details>


### [245] [Learning Image-Adaptive Scale Fields for Metric Depth Recovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07418)
*Yuanyan Li,Matthias Althoff*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种从稀疏度量锚点恢复度量深度的方法，通过将深度校正建模为图像自适应基映射的线性组合，利用MDE的语义和几何线索，权重由最小二乘法确定。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 单目深度估计通常输出尺度/位移不确定的深度，而实际应用需要准确的度量深度。现有的稀疏度量锚点恢复方法精度不足，对极端稀疏情况鲁棒性差。

Method: 将度量深度恢复问题重新表述为图像自适应尺度场建模：从MDE估计和中间表示中提取语义/几何线索，生成低维图像自适应基映射，然后通过最小二乘法从稀疏度量锚点确定基映射的线性组合权重。

Result: 在多个数据集和多种MDE模型上验证了方法的有效性和泛化能力，提升了度量深度精度，在极端锚点稀疏条件下仍保持强鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 提出了一种通用、高效且可解释的度量深度恢复方法，能利用稀疏锚点实现准确的度量深度估计，并为空间尺度变化提供了可分解的解释。

Abstract: Monocular depth estimation (MDE) typically produces depth estimations that are defined up to an unknown scale or shift. When only sparse metric anchors are available, recovering accurate metric depth becomes challenging yet necessary for practical applications. We address this problem by formulating metric depth recovery as image-adaptive scale field modeling. Instead of directly correcting the depth, we reformulate the correction as a low-dimensional linear combination of image-adaptive basis maps. These maps are derived from semantic and geometric cues encoded in the MDE estimations and intermediate representations. The weights of basis maps are efficiently determined from sparse metric anchors via a least-squares problem. This formulation yields improved metric depth accuracy, strong robustness under extreme anchor sparsity, and an interpretable decomposition of spatial scale variations. Extensive experiments across multiple datasets and representative MDE models demonstrate the effectiveness and general applicability of our approach.

</details>


### [246] [Towards Photorealistic and Efficient Bokeh Rendering via Diffusion Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07429)
*Linxiao Shi,Siming Zheng,Zerong Wang,Hao Zhang,Jinwei Chen,Bo Li,Shifeng Chen,Peng-Tao Jiang*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: MagicBokeh是一个统一的扩散框架，通过联合优化散景渲染和超分辨率，专门针对低质量/高变焦手机照片生成逼真的散景效果，采用交替训练策略和焦点感知掩码注意力机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有移动设备因紧凑光学设计（小光圈）难以产生自然的散景效果；现有学习方法在高变焦低分辨率照片上表现不佳；简单的两阶段方案（先增强再渲染）效率低且误差累积。

Method: 提出MagicBokeh统一扩散框架：（1）交替训练策略联合优化散景渲染和超分辨率；（2）焦点感知掩码注意力机制提升可控性和视觉保真度；（3）退化感知深度模块从低质量输入中更准确地估计深度。

Result: MagicBokeh能高效生成逼真的散景效果，尤其在真实世界低分辨率图像上表现优异。

Conclusion: 该工作为移动设备上的散景渲染铺平了道路，代码和模型已开源。

Abstract: Existing mobile devices are constrained by compact optical designs, such as small apertures, which make it difficult to produce natural, optically realistic bokeh effects. Although recent learning-based methods have shown promising results, they still struggle with photos captured under high digital zoom levels, which often suffer from reduced resolution and loss of fine details. A naive solution is to enhance image quality before applying bokeh rendering, yet this two-stage pipeline reduces efficiency and introduces unnecessary error accumulation. To overcome these limitations, we propose MagicBokeh, a unified diffusion-based framework designed for high-quality and efficient bokeh rendering. Through an alternative training strategy and a focus-aware masked attention mechanism, our method jointly optimizes bokeh rendering and super-resolution, substantially improving both controllability and visual fidelity. Furthermore, we introduce degradation-aware depth module to enable more accurate depth estimation from low-quality inputs. Experimental results demonstrate that MagicBokeh efficiently produces photorealistic bokeh effects, particularly on real-world low-resolution images, paving the way for future advancements in bokeh rendering. Our code and models are available at https://github.com/vivoCameraResearch/MagicBokeh.

</details>


### [247] [EditRefiner: A Human-Aligned Agentic Framework for Image Editing Refinement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07457)
*Zitong Xu,Huiyu Duan,Yifei Nie,Mingda Du,Sijing Wu,Xiongkuo Min,Tianyi Zheng,Jian Zhang,Shusong Xu,Jinwei Chen,Bo Li,Guangtao Zhai*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出EditRefiner，一个用于文本引导图像编辑后修正的分层、可解释、与人类对齐的智能体框架，通过感知-推理-行动-评估循环来检测和修复编辑图像中的伪影和编辑失败问题。同时构建了包含15K图像、60K标注区域和45K主观评分的EditFHF-15K数据集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文本引导图像编辑模型生成的图像存在细粒度问题（如物体不自然、光照不匹配、意外变化），而现有的修正方法要么依赖昂贵的迭代重建，要么使用空间定位能力弱的视觉语言模型，导致语义漂移和不可靠的局部修正。

Method: 构建EditFHF-15K数据集，并提出EditRefiner框架，包含四个智能体组件：感知智能体（检测伪影和编辑失败的上下文显著性图）、推理智能体（进行类人诊断推理）、行动智能体（规划和执行局部重新编辑）、评估智能体（评估重编辑图像并决定是否需要进一步修正），形成感知-推理-行动-评估的闭环。

Result: 在畸变定位、诊断准确性和人类感知对齐方面，EditRefiner持续优于现有最先进方法。

Conclusion: EditRefiner建立了一种新的自修正、感知可靠的图像编辑范式，代码已开源。

Abstract: Recent text-guided image editing (TIE) models have made remarkable progress, yet edited images still frequently suffer from fine-grained issues such as unnatural objects, lighting mismatch, and unexpected changes. Existing refinement approaches either rely on costly iterative regeneration or employ vision-language models (VLMs) with weak spatial grounding, often resulting in semantic drift and unreliable local corrections. To address these limitations, we first construct EditFHF-15K, a dataset of fine-grained human feedback for edited images, comprising (1) 15K images from 12 TIE models spanning 43 editing tasks, (2) 60K annotated artifact regions and 80K editing failure regions, each accompanied by textual reasoning, and (3) 45K mean opinion scores (MOSs) assessing perceptual quality, instruction following, and visual consistency. Based on EditFHF-15K, we propose EditRefiner, a hierarchical, interpretable, and human-aligned agentic framework that reformulates post-editing correction as a human-like perception-reasoning-action-evaluation loop. Specifically, we introduce: (1) a perception agent that detects contextual saliency maps of artifacts and editing failures, (2) a reasoning agent that interprets these perceptual cues to perform human-aligned diagnostic inference, (3) an action agent that uses the reasoning output to plan and execute localized re-editing, and (4) an evaluation agent that assesses the re-edited image and guides the action agent on whether further refinements are required. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EditRefiner consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods in distortion localization, diagnose accuracy and human perception alignment, establishing a new paradigm for self-corrective and perceptually reliable image editing. The code is available at https://github.com/IntMeGroup/EditRefiner.

</details>


### [248] [Cloud-top infrared observations reveal the four-dimensional precipitation structure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07499)
*Tianchi Xu,Ziqiang Ma,Andrea Marinoni,Yuanpeng He,Xiaoqing Li,Chuanfeng Zhao,Kang He,Jintao Xu,Bohan Zhou,Wenbo Zhao,Haoshuang Chen,Tun Wang,Dongdong Wang,Yang Hong*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出4DPrecipNet，一种物理约束的深度学习框架，证明云顶红外观测实际上编码了足够的亚云降水信息，能够从地球静止轨道重建降水的四维（4D）垂直和时间结构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统理论认为地球静止轨道红外观测主要感知云顶特性，对云下降水灵敏度有限。为弥补全球尺度上降水四维信息观测的缺失，作者探索云顶红外数据是否能够编码足够的亚云降水信息。

Method: 提出物理约束的深度学习框架4DPrecipNet，核心是"湿度优先"约束（moisture-first constraint），要求潜在表示恢复可降水水汽量以实现热力学一致性。集成多通道红外辐射数据、物理约束和雷达降水廓线，从地球静止轨道重建降水系统的垂直和时间演化。

Result: 框架能够捕获深对流结构及其演化，在大样本和独立雷达对比中表现出稳健性能。证明亚云降水实际上物理编码在云顶红外观测中。

Conclusion: 建立了从云顶红外观测连续全球监测降水结构的新途径，揭示了此前未开发的亚云过程可观测性。

Abstract: Accurate four-dimensional (4D) precipitation information is essential for understanding the Earth's energy and water cycles, yet remains observationally unresolved at global scales. Conventional theory holds that geostationary infrared observations primarily sense cloud-top properties, with limited sensitivity to sub-cloud precipitation. Here we show that cloud-top infrared measurements nevertheless encode sufficient information to recover the four-dimensional structure of precipitation, revealing a previously unexploited observability of sub-cloud processes. We introduce a physically constrained deep learning framework, 4DPrecipNet, in which a moisture-first constraint requires the latent representation to recover precipitable water vapour, anchoring the model in thermodynamic consistency. By integrating multi-channel infrared radiances with these constraints and radar-derived precipitation profiles, we reconstruct the vertical and temporal evolution of precipitation systems from geostationary orbit. The framework captures deep convective structures and their evolution, with robust performance across large samples and independent radar comparisons. These results demonstrate that sub-cloud precipitation is physically encoded in cloud-top infrared observations, establishing a new pathway for continuous global monitoring of precipitation structure.

</details>


### [249] [SAM 3D Animal: Promptable Animal 3D Reconstruction from Images in the Wild](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07604)
*Xuyi Hu,Jin Lyu,Jiuming Liu,Yebin Liu,Silvia Zuffi,Liang An,Stefan Goetz*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 首个支持提示驱动的多动物3D重建框架，结合SMAL+参数模型和Herd3D数据集，在遮挡和拥挤场景下实现SOTA效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 野外3D动物重建面临物种多样性大、频繁遮挡及多动物场景等挑战，现有方法多针对单动物场景，缺乏有效的多动物重建方案。

Method: 基于SMAL+参数化动物模型构建提示驱动框架，支持关键点和掩码作为灵活提示，实现多实例联合重建；并构建多动物3D数据集Herd3D（5000+图像）用于训练。

Result: 在Animal3D、APTv2、Animal Kingdom数据集上超越现有模型基和模型无关方法，达到SOTA。

Conclusion: 提出了一种可扩展且有效的提示驱动动物3D重建方案，填补了多动物场景下3D重建的空白。

Abstract: 3D animal reconstruction in the wild remains challenging due to large species variation, frequent occlusions, and the prevalence of multi-animal scenes, while existing methods predominantly focus on single-animal settings. We present SAM 3D Animal, the first promptable framework for multi-animal 3D reconstruction from a single image. Built on the SMAL+ parametric animal model, our method jointly reconstructs multiple instances and supports flexible prompts in the form of keypoints and masks which enable more reliable disambiguation in crowded and occluded scenes. To train such a model, we further introduce Herd3D, a multi-animal 3D dataset containing over 5K images, designed to increase diversity in species, interactions, and occlusion patterns.
