Experiments on the Animal3D, APTv2, and Animal Kingdom datasets show that our framework achieves state-of-the-art results over both existing model-based and model-free methods, demonstrating a scalable and effective solution for prompt-driven animal 3D reconstruction in the wild.

</details>


### [250] [FS-I2P:A Hierarchical Focus-Sweep Registration Network with Dynamically Allocated Depth](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07607)
*Zhixin Cheng,Yujia Chen,Xujing Tao,Bohao Liao,Xiaotian Yin,Baoqun Yin,Tianzhu Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出“聚焦-扫描”范式，基于状态空间模型（SSM）设计层次化交互模块，并引入动态层分配策略，以解决图像到点云配准中的尺度模糊、注意力漂移等问题，在RGB-D Scenes V2和7-Scenes数据集上达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有无检测方法虽利用多尺度特征和Transformer交互缓解了视角变化、跨模态差异和重复纹理带来的尺度模糊问题，但存在层间注意力漂移和尺度内不一致性，阻碍了精确配准。

Method: 1) 提出“聚焦-扫描”范式；2) 基于SSM框架构建层次化聚焦-扫描交互模块，增强多层级跨模态特征关联；3) 引入动态层分配策略，自适应确定迭代深度以利用几何约束。

Result: 在RGB-D Scenes V2和7-Scenes两个基准上达到SOTA性能，通过大量实验和消融研究验证了有效性。

Conclusion: “聚焦-扫描”范式和SSM-based框架能有效解决图像-点云配准中的跨模态和尺度问题，动态层分配策略进一步提升了匹配鲁棒性。

Abstract: Image-to-point cloud registration is often challenged by viewpoint changes, cross-modal discrepancies, and repetitive textures, which induce scale ambiguity and consequently lead to erroneous correspondences. Recent detection-free methods alleviate this issue by leveraging multi-scale features and transformer-based interactions. However, they still suffer from attention drift across layers and intra-scale inconsistencies, hindering precise registration. Inspired by human behavior, we propose a ``Focus--Sweep'' paradigm and develop a Hierarchical Focus--Sweep Interaction Module within an SSM-based framework to enhance multi-level cross-modal feature association. In addition, we introduce a Dynamic Layer Allocation Strategy that adaptively determines the iteration depth to better exploit geometric constraints and improve matching robustness. Extensive experiments and ablations on two benchmarks, RGB-D Scenes V2 and 7-Scenes, demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance.

</details>


### [251] [Differentiable Ray Tracing with Gaussians for Unified Radio Propagation Simulation and View Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07781)
*Niklas Vaara,Lam Huynh,Pekka Sangi,Miguel Bordallo López,Janne Heikkilä*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出一种框架，在3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）的视觉神经场景中直接进行可微分射频（RF）传播模拟，将高斯原语嵌入硬件加速光线追踪结构，实现从视觉重建中提取物理上有意义的信道脉冲响应，统一了电磁传播模拟和逼真视图合成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3DGS优化的是外观而非可射线相交的几何结构，而RF数字孪生需要确定性多跳路径（几何决定轨迹、衰减和延迟）。传统RF模拟依赖手工构建网格，缺乏与视觉重建的统一表示。

Method: 将高斯原语嵌入硬件加速光线追踪结构中作为底层空间表示，在视觉重建的神经场景内直接进行可微分RF传播模拟，支持任意3D位置间的点对点路径计算。

Result: 从仅视觉重建中提取了物理上有意义的信道脉冲响应，证明了神经重建可作为统一的跨模态空间表示。

Conclusion: 视觉神经重建可以同时服务于电磁传播模拟和逼真视图合成，实现统一的跨模态空间表征。

Abstract: Explicit neural representations such as 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) enable high-fidelity and real-time novel view synthesis, yet optimize for alpha-composited optical appearance rather than ray-intersectable geometry. In contrast, radio-frequency (RF) digital twins require deterministic multi-bounce paths, where the geometry dictates trajectories and their associated attenuation and delay. We introduce a framework enabling differentiable RF propagation simulation directly within visually reconstructed neural scenes, allowing point-to-point path computation between arbitrary 3D locations while preserving high-quality visual rendering. Unlike conventional RF simulation pipelines that rely on manually constructed meshes, we embed Gaussian primitives into a hardware-accelerated ray tracing structure as the underlying spatial representation. By extracting physically meaningful channel impulse responses from visual-only reconstructions, we provide cross-modal evidence that neural reconstructions can serve as unified spatial representations for both electromagnetic propagation simulation and photorealistic view synthesis.

</details>


### [252] [ICDAR 2026 Competition on Writer Identification and Pen Classification from Hand-Drawn Circles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07816)
*Thomas Gorges,Janne van der Loop,Lukas Hüttner,Linda-Sophie Schneider,Fei Wu,Mathias Seuret,Vincent Christlein*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文介绍了CircleID——一个关于从手绘圆圈扫描图像进行笔迹识别和笔分类的大规模ICDAR 2026竞赛，包含开放集笔迹识别和跨书写者笔分类两个任务，提供了46,155个标注数据集，最终最佳准确率分别为64.801%和92.726%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究生物特征书写者特征与物理笔特征如何自然地纠缠在最小、静态的轨迹中，探索从极简笔画中提取身份和笔具信息的可行性。

Method: 构建了46,155个400 DPI扫描的圆圈图像数据集，包含50个已知和16个未知书写者、8种不同笔；设置开放集笔迹识别和跨书写者笔分类两个任务；在Kaggle上举办竞赛，提供ResNet基线。

Result: 389个团队参与笔分类任务（3,185次提交），113个团队参与笔迹识别任务（1,737次提交）；笔迹识别Top-1准确率64.801%，笔分类准确率92.726%。

Conclusion: CircleID为极简轨迹分析建立了新基线，揭示了OOD书写者对模型泛化和特征解缠的影响，表明即使是最简单的圆形轨迹也蕴含丰富的书写者身份和笔具信息。

Abstract: This paper presents CircleID, a large-scale ICDAR 2026 competition on writer identification and pen classification from scanned hand-drawn circles. The primary objective is to investigate how biometric writer characteristics and physical pen features naturally entangle within minimal, static traces. CircleID comprises two distinct tasks: (1) open-set writer identification, requiring models to recognize known writers while explicitly rejecting unknown ones, and (2) cross-writer pen classification, evaluated across both seen and unseen writers. Participants were provided with a new, controlled dataset of 46,155 tightly cropped circle images, digitized at 400 DPI and annotated for writer identity and pen type. The dataset comprises samples from 50 known and 16 unknown writers using eight different pens. Hosted on Kaggle as two separate tracks with public and private leaderboards, the competition provided participants with a ResNet baseline. In total, 389 teams (436 participants) made 3,185 submissions for the pen classification task, and 113 teams (141 participants) made 1,737 submissions for the writer identification track. The best-performing private leaderboard submissions achieved a Top-1 accuracy of 64.801% for writer identification and 92.726% for pen classification. This paper details the dataset, evaluates the winning methodologies, and analyzes the impact of out-of-distribution writers on model generalization and feature disentanglement. In this large-scale competition, CircleID establishes a new baseline for minimal-trace analysis.

</details>


### [253] [One World, Dual Timeline: Decoupled Spatio-Temporal Gaussian Scene Graph for 4D Cooperative Driving Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07910)
*Yulong Chen,Xiaoyun Dong,Haoyu Zhang,Zongxian Yang,Lewei Xie,Xinke Li,Yifan Zhang,Kai Wang,Jianping Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出DUST（解耦时空高斯场景图）方法，解决车-路协同自动驾驶（VICAD）中多摄像头异步采集导致的动态场景重建伪影问题。核心思想是让每个动态智能体共享一组规范高斯体保持外观一致性，同时为每个数据源维护解耦的位姿轨迹以对齐各自真实时间戳。理论证明该设计使位姿梯度核呈块对角化，彻底消除跨源干扰。在V2X-Seq数据集上，DUST在动态区域PSNR提升3.2dB，FVD降低37.7%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有高斯场景图方法隐式假设多源数据同步，为每个动态智能体每帧分配单一姿态，这在车-路协同场景中失效——不同相机独立时钟导致同一目标被不同时间捕获，梯度冲突引发严重鬼影。作者证明任何单时间线公式都会产生与智能体速度和跨源时间偏移二次方成正比的光度损失，这是一个表示层面的根本性问题。

Method: DUST的核心创新：1）解耦时空高斯场景图：共享规范高斯集保外观一致，各源独立维护对齐真实时间戳的位姿轨迹；2）理论证明解耦使梯度核块对角化，消除交叉源干扰；3）静态锚点引导的位姿校正流程，修正车-路标注的空间错位；4）位姿正则化的联合优化方案，防止训练早期轨迹抖动和漂移。

Result: 在V2X-Seq的26个序列上，DUST动态区域PSNR比最强基线提升3.2dB，FVD降低37.7%，且在更大时间异步下保持鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 从表示层面解决异步多源动态场景重建问题，理论和实践均证明了解耦位姿轨迹的有效性，为车-路协同自动驾驶的4D场景理解提供了新范式。

Abstract: Reconstructing dynamic scenes from Vehicle-to-Infrastructure Cooperative Autonomous Driving (VICAD) data is fundamentally complicated by temporal asynchrony: vehicle and infrastructure cameras operate on independent clocks, capturing the same dynamic agent such as cars and pedestrians at different physical times. Existing Gaussian Scene Graph methods implicitly assume synchronized observations and assign a single pose per agent per frame, which is an assumption that breaks in cooperative settings, where the resulting gradient conflicts cause severe ghosting on dynamic agents. We identify this as a representation-level failure, not an optimization artifact: we prove that any single-timeline formulation incurs an irreducible photometric loss scaling quadratically with agent velocity and cross-source time offset. To resolve this, we propose Dust (DecoUpled Spatio-Temporal) Gaussian Scene Graph for 4D Cooperative Driving Reconstruction. DUST Gaussian Scene Graph shares a canonical Gaussian set per agent for appearance consistency, while maintaining decouple pose trajectories aligned to each source's true capture timestamps. We prove that this decoupling enables the pose-gradient kernel block-diagonal, eliminating cross-source interference entirely. To make Dust practical, we further introduce a static anchor-based pose correction pipeline that corrects spatio misalignment between vehicle and infrastructure annotations, and a pose-regularized joint optimization scheme that prevents trajectory jitter and drift during early training. On 26 sequences from V2X-Seq, DUST achieves state-of-the-art performance, improving dynamic-area PSNR by 3.2 dB over the strongest baseline and reducing Fréchet Video Distance by 37.7%, with keeping robustness under larger temporal asynchrony. Code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/DUST-6A55.

</details>


### [254] [Rebalancing gradient to improve self-supervised co-training of depth, odometry and optical flow predictions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07945)
*Marwane Hariat,Antoine Manzanera,David Filliat*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: CoopNet提出了一种动态调整梯度分配的方法，以改善协同训练网络之间的合作，并将其应用于运动感知的自监督深度图预测，通过混合损失函数基于光度重构误差的分布模型来区分动态物体。在KITTI和CityScapes上的实验表明，该方法在深度、里程计和光流预测上达到了与SOTA相当或更优的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决多网络协同训练中梯度分配不均的问题，特别是在自监督深度估计中，如何有效区分静态场景与运动物体，避免动态物体对深度和里程计训练造成干扰。

Method: 提出CoopNet框架，通过动态调整梯度分配确保各网络公平学习；引入基于光度重构误差分布模型的混合损失，利用深度+里程计网络与光流网络的重构差异来识别运动物体像素并将其排除在深度训练之外。

Result: 在KITTI和CityScapes数据集上的对比评估显示，CoopNet在深度、里程计和光流预测任务上达到或超越了当前最先进方法的性能。

Conclusion: 动态梯度分配策略能有效提升协同训练网络的整体性能，基于重构差异识别运动物体的假设得到了理论和实验支持。

Abstract: We present CoopNet, an approach that improves the cooperation of co-trained networks by dynamically adapting the apportionment of gradient, to ensure equitable learning progress. It is applied to motion-aware self-supervised prediction of depth maps, by introducing a new hybrid loss, based on a distribution model of photo-metric reconstruction errors made by, on the one hand the depth + odometry paired networks, and on the other hand the optical flow network. This model essentially assumes that the pixels from moving objects (that must be discarded for training depth and odometry), correspond to those where the two reconstructions strongly disagree. We justify this model by theoretical considerations and experimental evidences. A comparative evaluation on KITTI and CityScapes datasets shows that CoopNet improves or is comparable to the state-of-the-art in depth, odometry and optical flow predictions.

</details>


### [255] [TimeLesSeg: Unified Contrast-Agnostic Cross-Sectional and Longitudinal MS Lesion Segmentation via a Stochastic Generative Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07955)
*Vicent Caselles-Ballester,Eloy Martínez-Heras,Giuseppe Pontillo,Zoe Mendelsohn,Elena M. Marrón,Juan Luis García Fernández,Laia Subirats,Jon Stutters,Jeremy Chataway,Frederik Barkhof,Sara Llufriu,Ferran Prados*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: TimeLesSeg是一个统一框架，用一个CNN同时处理横截面和纵向的MS病灶分割，通过空掩码实现跨场景适配，并利用形态学变形生成模拟病灶演变的先验时间点，再结合高斯混合模型实现对比度无关性，在多个数据集上超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MS病灶分割面临两大挑战：1）分布变化（如扫描仪差异）和输入结构变化（横截面 vs 纵向）导致现有深度学习SOTA性能不稳；2）纵向数据稀缺且不一致。需要统一框架来同时解决这两个问题。

Method: 1）病灶掩码作为病理先验，与当前扫描一起输入；横截面场景用空掩码处理。2）生成式pipeline：通过形态学操作随机变形单个病灶，模拟病灶演变模式，生成合成先验时间点。3）高斯混合模型领域随机化实现对比度无关性。

Result: 在3个公开+2个内部数据集上，TimeLesSeg在单模态输入上优于对比无关SOTA；纵向处理上优于SAMSEG，病灶负荷动态捕获比SAMSEG和LST-AI更准确。

Conclusion: TimeLesSeg是一个通用、对比度无关的MS病灶分割框架，能统一处理横截面和纵向场景，代码已开源。

Abstract: Multiple sclerosis (MS) expresses substantial clinical and radiological heterogeneity, which poses significant challenges for automatic lesion segmentation. The current deep learning-based SOTA is highly susceptible to changes in both distribution, e.g., changes in scanner; as well as the structure of inputs, evident in the current divide between cross-sectional and longitudinal approaches. We introduce TimeLesSeg, a unified contrast-agnostic framework designed to segment MS lesions regardless of the presence of a temporal dimension in its inputs, with a single convolutional neural network. Our approach models pathological priors through lesion masks, which are processed together with the current scan. Cross-sectional processing is enabled by exposing the model to training cases where no prior information is available, which are modeled with an empty mask, allowing it to operate seamlessly in both scenarios. To overcome the scarcity and inconsistency of longitudinal datasets, we propose a novel generative pipeline in which patterns of lesion evolution are simulated by stochastically deforming each individual lesion with morphological operations, producing realistic prior timepoints. In parallel, we achieve contrast agnosticism through Gaussian mixture model-based domain randomization, enabling the network to experience a wide spectrum of intensity profiles. Results on three publicly available and two in-house datasets show that TimeLesSeg outperforms the contrast-agnostic state of the art on single-modality inputs across overlap- and distance-based metrics. In longitudinal processing, our method outperforms SAMSEG, and captures lesion load dynamics more accurately than both the former and LST-AI. All source code related to the development of TimeLesSeg is available at https://github.com/NeuroADaS-Lab/TimeLesSeg.

</details>


### [256] [TRAS: An Interactive Software for Tracing Tree Ring Cross Sections](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08025)
*Henry Marichal,Diego Passarella,Gregory Randall*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文介绍了Tree Ring Analyzer Suite (TRAS)，一个开源的图形化软件，用于树木年轮自动检测、手动校正和测量，集成了传统图像处理方法和两种深度学习方法，在松木横截面图像上取得了良好效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 树木年轮标记是树木年代学中的关键步骤，但通常手动进行，过程耗时、主观且难以扩展到大规模图像数据集。

Method: TRAS集成了三种互补的检测算法：传统图像处理方法CS-TRD和两种深度学习方法DeepCS-TRD和INBD。界面允许用户细化自动检测、移除假阳性并手动添加缺失年轮，计算树木年代学指标。

Result: 在18张专家标注的松木横截面图像上，DeepCS-TRD达到81.0%的F-score和86.4%的精确率；自动检测将手动校正工作减少到约20%的年轮边界；与CooRecorder的一维年轮宽度测量一致性极好(r > 0.99)。

Conclusion: TRAS为树木年轮分析提供了灵活且可复现的解决方案，支持Windows、macOS和Linux平台，代码已开源。

Abstract: Tree ring marking remains a key step in dendrometry and dendrochronology, but it is often performed manually, making the process time-consuming, subjective, and difficult to scale to large image datasets.
  We present the Tree Ring Analyzer Suite (TRAS), an open-source graphical software for automatic delineation, manual correction, and measurement of tree rings in wood cross-sectional images. TRAS integrates three complementary detection algorithms: the classical image-processing method CS-TRD and two deep-learning approaches, DeepCS-TRD and INBD. The interface allows users to refine automatic detections, remove false positives, and manually add missing rings. It also computes dendrochronological metrics such as earlywood and latewood areas, ring perimeter, equivalent ring width, and custom path-based ring-width measurements.
  TRAS was evaluated on 18 expertly annotated Pinus taeda L. cross-section images. DeepCS-TRD achieved the best automatic detection performance, with an F-score of 81.0% and precision of 86.4%. Automatic detection reduced the required manual correction effort to approximately 20% of ring boundaries. For one-dimensional ring-width measurements, TRAS showed excellent agreement with CooRecorder ($r > 0.99$). Common detection errors, such as jump propagation or false positives near knots, were easily corrected through the postprocessing interface.
  TRAS provides a flexible and reproducible solution for tree-ring analysis on Windows, macOS, and Linux. Code is available at the https://hmarichal93.github.io/tras.

</details>


### [257] [6D Pose Estimation via Keypoint Heatmap Regression with RGB-D Residual Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08059)
*Ismail Aljosevic,Amir Masoud Almasi,Ana Parovic,Ashkan Shafiei*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出HeatNet，一个基于关键点热图回归的模块化6D姿态估计框架。使用YOLOv10m检测物体，ResNet18预测2D热图，通过PnP RANSAC估计姿态。RGB-only模型在LINEMOD上达到84.50% ADD精度，RGB-D融合模型达到92.41%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 提升6D物体姿态估计的精度，探索关键点选择策略、RGB-D融合以及训练优化方法对性能的影响。

Method: 采用YOLOv10m进行目标检测，ResNet18回归2D关键点热图，通过PnP RANSAC求解6D姿态；比较不同关键点选择策略；引入跨融合架构融合RGB与深度特征；实验激活函数和学习率调度策略。

Result: RGB-only模型在LINEMOD数据集上平均ADD精度84.50%，RGB-D融合模型达到92.41%。

Conclusion: 提出的模块化框架在6D姿态估计任务上有效，RGB-D融合显著提升精度，代码已开源。

Abstract: In this paper, we propose a modular framework for 6D pose estimation based on keypoint heatmap regression. Our approach combines YOLOv10m for object detection with a ResNet18-based network that predicts 2D heatmaps from RGB images. Keypoints extracted from these heatmaps are used to estimate the 6D object pose via the PnP RANSAC algorithm. We compare different keypoint selection strategies to assess their impact on pose accuracy. Additionally, we extend the baseline by incorporating depth data using a cross-fusion architecture, which enables interaction between RGB and depth features at multiple stages. We further explore general training improvements, such as experimenting with activation functions and learning rate scheduling strategies to improve model performance. Our best RGB-only model achieved a mean ADD-based accuracy of 84.50%, while the RGB-D fusion model reached 92.41% on the LINEMOD dataset. The code is available at https://github.com/ameermasood/HeatNet.

</details>


### [258] [Uncertainty Quantification for Cardiac Shape Reconstruction with Deep Signed Distance Functions via MCMC methods](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07987)
*Jan Verhülsdonk,Thomas Grandits,Francisco Sahli Costabal,Thomas Beiert,Simone Pezzuto,Alexander Effland*

Main category: eess.IV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出一种结合DeepSDF和MCMC的概率框架，用于心脏解剖结构的不确定性感知形状重建，能够从稀疏点云中重建左右心室并给出校准的不确定性估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的基于图谱的心脏形状重建方法主要依赖先验知识，但不确定性影响大，限制了临床可靠性。作者希望提出一种能感知不确定性的概率重建框架。

Method: 使用DeepSDF隐式建模心脏几何，通过学习潜在编码条件化神经网络；将重建损失解释为对数似然，在潜在空间中进行贝叶斯推断（MCMC采样），获得MAP估计和后验采样重建。

Result: 在公开心脏数据集上，该方法能实现准确的重建，并提供良好校准的不确定性估计。

Conclusion: 概率化DeepSDF结合MCMC能够有效处理心脏病理解剖重建中的不确定性，提升临床可靠性。

Abstract: Atlas-based approaches allow high-quality, patient-specific shape reconstructions of cardiac anatomy from sparse and/or noisy data such as point clouds. However, these methods are mainly prior-driven, so the impact of uncertainty can be large, limiting their clinical reliability. We propose a probabilistic framework for uncertainty-aware cardiac shape reconstruction that combines Deep Signed Distance Functions (DeepSDFs) with Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) sampling. Cardiac geometries are modeled implicitly as zero-level sets of a neural network conditioned on learned latent codes, enabling multi-surface reconstruction of the left and right ventricles. By interpreting the reconstruction loss as a log-likelihood, we perform Bayesian inference in the latent space to obtain both maximum a posteriori (MAP) and posterior-sampled reconstructions. Experiments on a public cardiac dataset show that our approach produces accurate reconstructions and well-calibrated uncertainty estimates.

</details>


### [259] [Pre-training Enables Extraordinary All-optical Image Denoising](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07810)
*Xudong Lv,Yuxiang Sun,Shuo Wang,Nanxing Chen,Jun Guan,Jingtian Hu*

Main category: physics.optics

Relevance: 12.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于预训练的扩散光学神经网络用于快照图像去噪，通过两步训练（大规模预训练+任务微调）显著提升了严重噪声（PSNR低于8dB）下的去噪效果，峰值信噪比提升至18dB以上，并在多种图像风格和视觉任务中验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 光学神经网络在速度和能效上有潜在优势，但其训练方法相比数字神经网络仍未被充分探索，导致性能欠佳。本文旨在通过预训练驱动的迁移学习方法提升光学神经网络的图像去噪能力。

Method: 采用两步训练策略：(1) 在包含345万张多样但简单图像的大规模数据集上进行预训练；(2) 在特定任务数据集上进行微调。该方法应用于自由空间光学衍射网络，实现快照图像去噪。

Result: 相比传统傅里叶域滤波和直接训练的衍射网络，该方法在严重噪声（PSNR<8dB）下表现优异，将PSNR提升至18dB以上；同一预训练网络可微调适配多种图像风格；在面部检测、车牌识别、无人机定位等视觉任务中验证了有效性。

Conclusion: 预训练驱动的迁移学习能够显著提升光学神经网络的去噪性能，且具有良好的泛化能力和实际应用价值。

Abstract: Optical neural networks are emerging as powerful machine learning and information processing tools because of their potential advantages in speed and energy efficiency. The training methods of these physical models, however, remain underexplored compared to their digital counterparts and are leading to suboptimal performance. This paper reports a pre-training-driven approach that leads to snapshot image denoising with substantially improved quality. We demonstrated effective free-space optical denoising by a diffractive network optimized by a two-step process including (1) pre-training using a massive dataset of 3.45 million diverse but simple images and (2) fine-tuning with the corresponding task-specific datasets. Compared to conventional Fourier-domain filtering and directly trained diffractive networks, such a transfer learning process exhibited prominent advantages for denoising images degraded by severe noise, peak signal-to-noise ratio (PSNR) below 8 dB, while preserving fine image features and improving the PSNR to above 18 dB. Importantly, the same pre-trained optical network could be consistently fine-tuned to process degraded images from highly diverse styles ranging from handwritten digits (MNIST) and chest X-rays (ChestMNIST) to CIFAR-10 images and human faces (CelebA). We further demonstrated the critical role of our optical denoisers in vision-based applications, including face detection, plate recognition, and localization of UAVs in noisy conditions.

</details>


### [260] [TriP: A Triangle Puzzle Approach to Robust Translation Averaging](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07143)
*Zhekai Fan,Wanze Li,Jinxin Wang,Yunpeng Shi*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 10.0

TL;DR: 提出TriP，一种基于三角形的平移平均框架，通过局部三角形尺度推断和对数域同步实现鲁棒的相机位置恢复，在合成和真实数据集上大幅优于以往方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 平移平均问题中，方向测量缺乏距离信息导致估计病态且对异常值敏感，现有方法在鲁棒性和可扩展性方面存在不足。

Method: TriP首先从三角形几何中推断局部相对边尺度，然后在对数域中同步重叠三角形的尺度，恢复全局一致的边长和相机位置。

Result: 在合成和真实数据集上，TriP在鲁棒性、效率（可扩展到百万级相机）和精度上大幅超越所有现有平移平均方法。

Conclusion: 通过三角形高阶一致性约束，TriP能有效抵抗对抗性、循环一致性等结构化异常，且对数域同步天然避免了零尺度坍塌问题。

Abstract: Translation averaging aims to recover camera locations from pairwise relative translation directions and is a fundamental component of global Structure-from-Motion pipelines. The problem is challenging because direction measurements contain no distance information, making the estimation problem highly ill-conditioned and highly sensitive to corrupted observations. In this paper, we propose TriP, a triangle-based framework for robust translation averaging. TriP first infers local relative edge scales from triangle geometry, and then synchronizes the scales of overlapping triangles in the logarithmic domain to recover globally consistent edge lengths and camera locations. By leveraging higher-order consistency across triangles, the proposed method is robust to adversarial, cycle-consistent, and other structured corruptions. In addition, TriP avoids the collapse issue without requiring any extra anti-collapse constraints, since log-scale synchronization excludes the degenerate zero-scale solution by construction. These structural advantages enable a particularly strong theory for exact location recovery. On the practical side, TriP is fully parallelizable, computationally efficient, and naturally scalable to graphs with millions of cameras. Moreover, it outperforms all previous translation averaging methods by a large margin on both synthetic and real datasets.

</details>


### [261] [AsyncEvGS: Asynchronous Event-Assisted Gaussian Splatting for Handheld Motion-Blurred Scenes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07192)
*Jun Dai,Renbiao Jin,Bo Xu,Yutian Chen,Linning Xu,Mulin Yu,Tianfan Xue,Shi Guo*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 10.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种异步高分辨率RGB-事件双摄像头系统和对应的3D重建框架AsyncEvGS，通过事件数据重建清晰图像、跨域位姿估计和结构驱动的事件损失函数，显著提升了严重运动模糊条件下的3D重建鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3DGS和NeRF方法在输入图像存在严重运动模糊时效果不佳，而事件辅助方法受限于低分辨率传感器和严格同步，缺乏实用性。

Method: 1) 从事件数据重建清晰图像；2) 基于VGGT的跨域位姿估计获取鲁棒的3DGS初始化；3) 结构驱动的事件损失和视图一致性正则化优化。

Result: 在自建AsyncEv-Deblur数据集和现有基准上达到SOTA性能，显著提升了严重运动模糊下的重建鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 异步高分辨率RGB-事件相机系统结合精心设计的损失函数，能有效解决运动模糊下的3D重建问题。

Abstract: 3D reconstruction methods such as 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) and Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) achieve impressive photorealism but fail when input images suffer from severe motion blur. While event cameras provide high-temporal-resolution motion cues, existing event-assisted approaches rely on low-resolution sensors and strict synchronization, limiting their practicality for handheld 3D capture on common devices, such as smartphones. We introduce a flexible, high-resolution asynchronous RGB-Event dual-camera system and a corresponding reconstruction framework. Our approach first reconstructs sharp images from the event data and then employs a cross-domain pose estimation module based on the Visual Geometry Transformer (VGGT) to obtain robust initialization for 3DGS. During optimization, we employ a structure-driven event loss and view-specific consistency regularizers to mitigate the ill-posed behavior of traditional event losses and deblurring losses, ensuring both stable and high-fidelity reconstruction. We further contribute AsyncEv-Deblur, a new high-resolution RGB-Event dataset captured with our asynchronous system. Experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on both our challenging dataset and existing benchmarks, substantially improving reconstruction robustness under severe motion blur. Project page: https://openimaginglab.github.io/AsyncEvGS/

</details>


### [262] [A Marine Debris Detection Framework for Ocean Robots via Self-Attention Enhancement and Feature Interaction Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07388)
*Yuyang Li,Jiashu Han,Yinyi Lai,Wenbin Kang,Zenghui Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 10.0

TL;DR: 提出YOLO-MD框架，通过双分支卷积增强自注意力模块、轻量级移位操作和SFG-Loss动态样本重加权，提升海洋机器人低质量图像中的垃圾检测性能，在UODM数据集上达到SOTA，并完成真实机器人边缘部署验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决海洋机器人在模糊、复杂背景和小目标等低质量图像条件下的垃圾检测性能退化问题。

Method: 1) 双分支卷积增强自注意力(DB-CASA)模块，增强空间-通道交互；2) 轻量级移位操作，提升多尺度细粒度特征提取；3) SFG-Loss通过动态样本重加权缓解类别不平衡和优化不稳定。

Result: 在UODM数据集上达到0.875精度、0.822 F1-score和0.849 mAP50，超越当前SOTA方法，并在真实机器人边缘部署中验证有效性。

Conclusion: YOLO-MD有效提升海洋垃圾检测在退化图像下的性能，且具备实际部署可行性。

Abstract: Marine debris detection for ocean robot is crucial for ecological protection, yet performance is often degraded by low-quality images with blur, complex backgrounds, and small targets. To address these challenges, we propose YOLO-MD, an enhanced YOLO-based detection framework. A Dual-Branch Convolutional Enhanced Self-Attention (DB-CASA) module is designed to strengthen spatial-channel interactions, improving feature representation in degraded images. Additionally, a lightweight shift-based operation is introduced to enhance fine-grained feature extraction for objects of varying scales while maintaining parameter efficiency. We further propose SFG-Loss to mitigate class imbalance and optimization instability via dynamic sample reweighting. Experiments on the UODM dataset demonstrate that YOLO-MD achieves 0.875 precision, 0.822 F1-score, and 0.849 mAP50, outperforming the latest state-of-the-art methods. The effectiveness of this method has also been verified through real-world robotic edge deployment experiments.

</details>


### [263] [Towards Billion-scale Multi-modal Biometric Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07655)
*Arka Koner,Chetan S. Naik,Lokesh Kurre,Vivek Raghavan,Barada P. Sabut,Tanusree Deb Barma,Anoop M. Namboodiri,Anil K. Jain*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 10.0

TL;DR: 本文介绍了Bharat ABIS，一个基于开源架构的大规模多模态生物特征搜索系统，能够处理印度Aadhaar数据库中15.5亿条记录。系统整合了指纹、人脸和虹膜三种模态，生成每人13.5KB的模板，在2.2亿身份的测试中实现了FNIR 0.3% @ FPIR 0.5%的性能，单服务器（8×H100）上对4000万规模库可实现每秒100次搜索。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 国家级的身份系统需要搜索十亿级多模态生物特征数据库，现有系统在规模、效率和准确性方面面临巨大挑战，且缺乏公开的大规模系统设计经验分享。

Method: 采用端到端流水线，对指纹、人脸和虹膜分别进行预处理（分割）、质量评估、呈现攻击检测和嵌入学习（特征提取），最终将三种模态的特征拼接成13.5KB的模板，并设计高效的1:N搜索（去重）方案。

Result: 在来自印度Aadhaar数据库的2.2亿身份（从15.5亿记录中抽样）上，成人探针的FNIR为0.3% @ FPIR 0.5%；在2000万库上与三款商用作对比；单服务器（8×Nvidia H100 GPU, 2TB RAM）对4000万库可实现100次搜索/秒的吞吐量。

Conclusion: 基于开源架构成功构建了国家级规模的生物特征去重系统，验证了多模态融合在超大规模身份识别中的可行性和有效性。

Abstract: Searching a multi-biometric database of a billion records for a country-level identity system requires pushing the limits of all aspects of a biometric system, including acquisition, preprocessing, feature extraction, accuracy, matching speed, presentation attack detection, and handling of special cases (e.g., missing finger digits). This is the first paper that gives insights into such a large-scale multimodal biometric search system, called Bharat ABIS, based on open-source architectures. The end-to-end pipeline of Bharat ABIS processes fingerprint, face and iris modalities through modality-specific stages of preprocessing (segmentation), quality assessment, presentation attack detection, and learning an embedding (feature extraction), producing a concatenated template of 13.5KB per person. We present a detailed analysis of the modalities and how they are integrated to create an efficient and effective solution for 1:N search (de-duplication). Evaluations on a demographically stratified gallery of 220 million identities, randomly sampled from 1.55 billion records in India's Aadhaar database, yield an FNIR of 0.3% at an FPIR of 0.5%, for adult probes (over 18 years). We also compare the performance of Bharat ABIS against three state-of-the-art COTS systems on a 20M gallery. Our system achieves a throughput of 100 searches per second on a gallery of 40M on a single server (8xNvidia H100 GPUs, 2TB RAM).

</details>


### [264] [LAMES: A Large-Scale and Artisanal Mining Environmental Segmentation Dataset](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07740)
*Matthias Kahl,Zhaiyu Chen,Sudipan Saha,Mrinalini Kochupillai,Lukas Kondmann,Xiao Xiang Zhu*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 10.0

TL;DR: 本文构建了一个包含150个大型采矿场和870km²小规模采矿标注区域的数据集，提供详细的元数据属性，旨在支持采矿活动监测与环境影响研究。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 采矿活动（尤其是非法采矿）对环境和生态造成严重负面影响，但缺乏系统化的数据集来支持远程监测、环境评估以及采矿类型与影响之间关系的研究。

Method: 收集并标注了150个大型采矿场（LSM）和870km²的小规模手工采矿（ASM）区域，为每个LSM站点提供了9个主要采矿类别和27个属性项作为元数据。

Result: 构建了一个包含多类别、多属性的采矿数据集，涵盖LSM和ASM两种采矿形式，并提供了详细的元数据注释。

Conclusion: 该数据集有望支持采矿活动监测、环境影响评估及相关社会伦理研究，同时强调了数据使用中的伦理责任。

Abstract: Mining operations are of utmost importance to the economy of some nations. However, such operations result in land-use change, very high energy consumption, and negative impacts on the environment, including soil erosion and deforestation. The mining process can impact an area much larger than the mining site itself. Adding to the negative externalities linked to mining is the fact that, in addition to government-sanctioned legal mining operations, illegal mining is widespread, including in various countries of Africa. The ability to monitor remote mining site activities can be useful, e.g., for the detection of illegal artisanal mining activities and their environmental impacts. An important outcome of such monitoring could include a better understanding of the interrelationship between mine facility attributes (e.g., mining types, processing methods, commodities, etc.) and their impact on the natural environment. In this work, we present a data set that contains 150 Large Scale Mining (LSM) sites and 870km^2 annotated area of Artisanal Small-scale Mining (ASM) sites. The metadata includes nine eminent LSM sections and 27 mining site attributes for each LSM site. We also discuss the data set's possible contribution to the research community, social and environmental consequences, and researchers' responsibilities from an ethics perspective.

</details>


### [265] [Aquatic Neuromorphic Optical Flow](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07653)
*Pei Zhang,Yunkai Liang,Kaiqiang Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 8.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于脉冲神经网络（SNN）的自监督框架，用于从异步事件流中估计水下光流，解决了水下数据稀缺问题，并在计算效率上优于现有技术。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 水下环境对传统成像系统限制极大，需要兼顾高质量感知和严格资源效率的方案。事件相机虽具潜力，但在水下场景中的探索不足，且水下数据标注稀缺。

Method: 基于神经形态视觉，采用脉冲神经网络（SNN）构建自监督框架，从异步事件流中逐像素估计光流，避免了对标注数据的依赖。

Result: 与领先技术相比，该方法在视觉和定量结果上具有竞争力，同时计算效率更优。

Conclusion: 该工作桥接了神经形态感知与水下智能，为资源受限的水下边缘平台提供了轻量级、实时、低成本感知的新方向。

Abstract: Underwater environments impose severe constraints on conventional imaging systems and demand solutions that balance high-quality sensing with strict resource efficiency. While emerging event cameras offer a promising alternative, their potential in aquatic scenarios remains largely unexplored. Through the lens of neuromorphic vision, this work pioneers the investigation of motion fields that serve as key media for agile underwater perception. Built upon spiking neural networks, we introduce a self-supervised framework to estimate per-pixel optical flow from asynchronous event streams, elegantly bypassing the long-standing bottleneck of underwater data scarcity. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that our method achieves competitive visual and quantitative results against leading techniques while operating with superior computational efficiency. By bridging neuromorphic sensing and aquatic intelligence, this work opens new frontiers for lightweight, real-time, and low-cost perception on resource-constrained underwater edge platforms.

</details>


### [266] [TriDE: Triangle-Consistent Translation Directions for Global Camera Pose Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06889)
*Francisco Chen,Yiran Wang,Yunpeng Shi*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 5.0

TL;DR: TriDE提出利用相机-三角形一致性作为高阶验证信号，通过消息传递机制在成对方向和加权三角形之间传播信息，从而联合优化全局成对平移方向，提升SfM中相机位置估计的准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有全局SfM方法独立估计每对图像的平移方向，导致局部合理但全局不一致的问题，需要一种能利用高阶一致性信号进行联合优化的方法。

Method: 提出TriDE方法，利用相机-三角形一致性作为高阶验证信号，通过在成对方向及其关联的加权三角形之间进行消息传递来优化不可靠的成对方向估计。

Result: 在真实图像图上的实验表明，TriDE大幅提升了方向估计精度，并得到更好的下游相机位置估计结果。

Conclusion: TriDE在局部成对估计和全局相机位姿几何之间建立了实际联系，提供了一种高效且鲁棒的全局方向联合估计方法。

Abstract: Pairwise translation directions are a key input to camera location estimation in global structure-from-motion. Existing estimators usually process each image pair independently, producing directions that may be locally plausible but inconsistent with the other relative directions in the viewing graph. To jointly estimate the direction, we propose TriDE, which exploits camera-triangle consistency as an efficient higher-order verification signal. Instead of solving a costly global nonlinear optimization problem that is sensitive to initialization, TriDE refines unreliable pairwise directions through message passing between directions and their incident weighted triangles. This information propagation strategy enables us to establish a strong phase-transition bound for exact recovery under a realistic random corruption model. Experiments on real image graphs show that TriDE improves direction accuracy by a large margin and yields better downstream camera locations, providing a practical link between local pairwise estimation and global camera pose geometry.

</details>


### [267] [LoHGNet: Infrared Small Target Detection through Lorentz Geometric Encoding with High-Order Relation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07213)
*Qianwen Ma,Yang Xu,Shangwei Deng,Xiaobo Li,Haofeng Hu*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 5.0

TL;DR: 本文提出LoHGNet，通过引入洛伦兹流形几何编码和高阶关系学习来解决红外小目标检测中目标线索稀缺和背景杂波严重的问题，在三个数据集上取得了有竞争力的检测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有红外小目标检测方法基于欧氏空间的传统特征学习和局部交互建模，难以描述弱目标的细微差异以及目标与背景之间的上下文关系。

Method: 提出LoHGNet，包含两个核心模块：1) 几何注意力引导的洛伦兹残差卷积模块(GA-LRCM)，在双曲几何约束下进行特征建模；2) 高阶关系学习模块(HORL)，通过对数映射将双曲特征映射到欧氏切空间，并通过超图构建建模目标与背景间的高阶上下文依赖关系。

Result: 在三个数据集上，LoHGNet在检测精度和复杂场景适应性方面均取得了有竞争力的性能。

Conclusion: 洛伦兹几何编码为红外小目标检测提供了与传统欧氏空间方法不同的特征表示，能提供新的判别性线索，高阶关系学习进一步提升了复杂背景下的目标判别能力。

Abstract: Infrared small target detection (IRSTD) remains challenging due to the scarcity of useful target cues and the presence of severe background clutter. Most current methods rely on conventional feature learning and local interaction modeling, where features are represented in Euclidean space. However, such designs may still be limited in describing the subtle differences of weak targets and the contextual relations between targets and backgrounds. To address these limitations, we propose LoHGNet, an IRSTD network that integrates Lorentz geometric encoding with high-order relation learning. By introducing Lorentz manifold based feature learning, LoHGNet offers a different feature representation from conventional IRSTD methods and provides new discriminative cues for IRSTD. Specifically, a Lorentz encoding branch is constructed with the Geometric Attention Guided Lorentz Residual Convolution Module (GA-LRCM) to perform feature modeling under hyperbolic geometric constraints and enhance the hierarchical geometric representation capability of weak targets. Subsequently, the hyperbolic features are mapped into the Euclidean tangent space through logarithmic mapping, and a High-Order Relation Learning Module (HORL) is designed to model the high-order contextual dependencies between targets and backgrounds via hypergraph construction, thereby improving target discrimination in complex backgrounds. Experimental results on three datasets demonstrate that the proposed LoHGNet achieves competitive performance in both detection accuracy and adaptability to complex scenes. The code will be available at https://github.com/Kingwin97.

</details>


### [268] [Implicit Multi-Camera System Calibration Using Gaussian Processes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07491)
*Ivan De Boi,Bart Ribbens,Veronika Golanova,Ursula Kapov,Simon Verspeek*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 5.0

TL;DR: 本文提出基于高斯过程回归的隐式多相机系统标定框架，利用GP直接学习2D图像坐标到3D世界坐标的非线性映射，绕过传统显式标定方法，并利用主动学习提升数据效率。实验表明靠近相机的区域3D预测不确定性更高。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统显式标定方法受刚性数学模型约束，难以处理复杂非线性畸变；现有基于神经网络的方法数据需求量大且缺乏不确定性量化。因此需要一种数据高效、具备UQ的标定方法。

Method: 1) 使用高斯过程回归隐式学习从多相机2D图像坐标到3D世界坐标的非线性映射；2) 利用GP固有的不确定性量化能力提供统计置信边界；3) 结合主动学习，利用预测不确定性指导新标定数据采集，提升数据效率。

Result: 实验表明靠近相机的区域3D预测不确定性更高，uv坐标空间在该区域数据点更稀疏（尽管3D空间并非如此），验证了GP-UQ的有效性。

Conclusion: 该方法提供了一种鲁棒、数据高效且可靠的隐式多相机标定方案，特别适用于标定数据采集受限的实际场景。

Abstract: This paper proposes a novel framework for implicit multi-camera system calibration utilizing Gaussian Process (GP) regression. Conventional explicit calibration methods are constrained by rigid mathematical models and struggle with complex, non-linear distortions from unconventional optics, while existing neural network-based implicit approaches are typically data-hungry and lack inherent uncertainty quantification (UQ). Our GP-based model directly learns the complex, non-linear mapping from 2D image coordinates across all cameras to a 3D world coordinate, completely bypassing time-consuming estimation of explicit intrinsic and extrinsic parameters. Moreover, the inherent UQ is critical for transforming a simple 3D point prediction into a verifiable 3D measurement, complete with statistically-sound confidence bounds. To further enhance data efficiency and practical deployment, we integrate Active Learning (AL), which intelligently leverages the GP's predictive uncertainty to strategically guide the acquisition of new calibration data. This approach results in a robust, data-efficient, and reliable calibration solution, proving particularly effective in practical scenarios where collecting extensive calibration data is a dominant constraint. Our experiments show that the uncertainty for the 3D predictions is higher closer to the cameras. The data points in $uv$-coordinate space are more sparse in that region, even though they are not in 3D space. This work is relevant for anyone who is tasked with the calibration of complex multi-camera systems.

</details>


### [269] [SIMI: Self-information Mining Network for Low-light Image Enhancement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07767)
*Xuanshuo Fu,Lei Kang,Javier Vazquez-Corral*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 5.0

TL;DR: 提出基于比特平面分解的无监督自信息挖掘网络(SIMI)，用于低光照图像增强，无需外部数据即可挖掘内在信息，加速收敛并降低计算开销，在标准基准上达到SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有低光照图像增强方法大多设计复杂模型，忽视了低光照图像本身包含的内在信息。

Method: 提出SIMI网络，一种无监督框架，通过比特平面分解将低光照图像分解为多个组件，从而挖掘内在信息。

Result: 在标准基准数据集上达到SOTA性能，收敛更快、计算开销更低。

Conclusion: 无监督的比特平面分解方法能有效挖掘图像内在信息，实现高效的低光照增强。

Abstract: Poor lighting conditions significantly impact image quality, posing substantial challenges for image editing and visualization. Many existing enhancement methods aim at proposing complex models while neglecting the intrinsic information contained within low-light images. In this work, we propose the Self-Information Mining (SIMI) network, an innovative unsupervised framework that decomposes low-light images into multiple components based on bit-plane decomposition. Our approach allows mining intrinsic information without relying on external data. This not only accelerates model convergence but also improves performance and reduces computational overhead. The unsupervised nature of our method facilitates real-world applicability. Experiments conducted on standard benchmarks demonstrate that SIMI achieves state-of-the-art performance.

</details>


### [270] [PET-Adapter: Test-Time Domain Adaptation for Full and Limited-Angle PET Image Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08030)
*Rüveyda Yilmaz,Yuli Wu,Johannes Stegmaier,Volkmar Schulz*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 5.0

TL;DR: 提出PET-Adapter，一种测试时领域自适应框架，用于在仅有体模数据预训练的生成式PET重建模型上，适应不同临床数据分布（解剖结构、示踪剂、扫描配置），通过低秩解剖条件调节和基于OSEM的预热启动，将扩散步数从50降至2而不损失质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: PET图像重建受泊松噪声和物理退化因素影响，尤其在有限角度采集下问题更严重；深度学习方法在临床数据分布上泛化能力有限，需要大量重新训练。

Method: 提出PET-Adapter，包含两个核心组件：1) 层间低秩解剖条件调节（layer-wise low-rank anatomical conditioning），在测试时自适应；2) 基于OSEM的预热启动（warm-starting），从物理信息重建初始化生成过程，将扩散步数从50减少到2。

Result: 在多个临床数据集上，全角度和有限角度设定下均展现了优越的3D重建性能，且计算效率显著提升。

Conclusion: PET-Adapter证明了无需配对真实数据即可实现从体模到临床的有效域自适应，具有临床可行性和计算效率。

Abstract: Positron Emission Tomography (PET) image reconstruction is inherently challenged by Poisson noise and physical degradation factors, which are further exacerbated in limited-angle acquisitions. While deep learning methods demonstrate promising performance, their generalization to unseen clinical data distributions remains limited without extensive retraining. We propose PET-Adapter, a test-time domain adaptation framework for generative PET reconstruction models pretrained solely on phantom data. Our method enables adaptation to clinical datasets with varying anatomies, tracers, and scanner configurations without requiring paired ground truth. PET-Adapter introduces layer-wise low-rank anatomical conditioning during adaptation and Ordered Subset Expectation Maximization-based warm-starting that initializes the generation from physics-informed reconstructions, reducing diffusion steps from 50 to 2 without compromising quality. Experiments across multiple clinical datasets demonstrate superior 3D reconstruction performance in both full-angle and limited-angle settings, highlighting the clinical feasibility and computational efficiency of the proposed approach.

</details>


### [271] [Dr-BA: Separable Optimization for Direct Radar Bundle Adjustment & Localization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07041)
*Daniil Lisus,Cedric Le Gentil,Timothy D. Barfoot*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 5.0

TL;DR: 本文提出Dr-BA，首个直接在2D旋转雷达强度图像上进行雷达光束法平差（BA）的框架，通过分离优化解耦位姿估计与建图，实现高精度雷达SLAM和跨会话定位。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 雷达在雨雪等恶劣天气下不受影响，是自动驾驶系统全天候鲁棒性的关键模态。现有方法通常从雷达数据中提取稀疏点云进行配准，未能充分利用完整雷达回波信息，Dr-BA旨在利用完整雷达数据实现更优的联合估计。

Method: 将雷达BA问题建模为可分离优化，解耦位姿估计与建图；直接对2D雷达强度图像进行操作而非稀疏点云；该方法自然地扩展到直接雷达定位（DRL）。

Result: 在超过200公里、跨越五条不同路线的道路数据上，实现了最先进的雷达BA和跨会话定位性能。

Conclusion: Dr-BA证明了直接利用完整雷达强度图进行BA是可行且高效的，为全天候自动驾驶定位提供了一种新的范式。

Abstract: This paper introduces Dr-BA, a first-of-its-kind radar bundle adjustment (BA) framework that operates directly on 2D spinning radar intensity images. Unlike camera or lidar sensors, radar is largely unaffected by precipitation, making it a critical modality for autonomous systems that require all-weather robustness. Existing state estimation approaches using spinning radar typically extract sparse point clouds from range-azimuth-intensity measurements and apply point cloud alignment techniques to estimate vehicle motion, scene structure, or to localize within an existing map. In contrast, Dr-BA uses the full radar returns from multiple scans to jointly estimate dense maps and sensor poses. By formulating the problem as a separable optimization, we derive an efficient and general solution that decouples pose estimation from mapping. In addition to solving the BA problem, this formulation naturally extends to direct radar-only localization (DRL) within a previously built map. Dr-BA achieves state-of-the-art radar-based BA and cross-session localization performance, demonstrated on more than 200 km of on-road data across five distinct routes. Our implementation is publicly available at https://github.com/utiasASRL/dr_ba.

</details>


### [272] [A Unified Framework for the Detection and Classification of Fatty Pancreas in Ultrasound Images](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07466)
*Ioan-Tudor-Alexandru Anghel,Ciprian-Mihai Ceausescu,Elena Dana Nedelcu,Elena Raluca Stirban,Camelia Croitoru,Despina Ungureanu,Ana Maria Palan,Gabriela Pop*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 3.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于TransUNet分割和纹理特征分析的非酒精性脂肪胰超声图像自动分类框架，在214张临床数据集上达到89.7%的准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 非酒精性脂肪胰(NAFPD)是一种常被漏诊的疾病，传统诊断依赖医生主观视觉评估超声图像，缺乏客观、自动化的分类方法。

Method: 采用TransUNet（ResNet编码器+Transformer瓶颈）进行胰腺和脾静脉分割，基于解剖结构提取斑块，通过配对纹理比较模拟临床推理，使用SVM（RBF核）进行分类，并通过迁移学习从肝脏分割任务初始化模型。

Result: 在214张超声图像数据集上，5折交叉验证下SVM达到89.7%准确率和0.898 F1分数，无监督K-Means基线也达到87.8%准确率。

Conclusion: 本文首次提出端到端的脂肪胰超声自动分类框架，通过分割引导的纹理分析有效捕获临床相关信号，具有较好的可解释性和准确性。

Abstract: Non-alcoholic fatty pancreas disease (NAFPD) is an underdiagnosed condition associated with metabolic syndrome, insulin resistance, and increased risk of pancreatic cancer. Diagnosis typically relies on subjective visual assessment of ultrasound images by clinicians. We propose an end-to-end framework for automatically classifying normal versus fatty pancreas from abdominal ultrasound images. Our method employs a TransUNet-based segmentation architecture with a ResNet encoder and transformer bottleneck to delineate the pancreas and the splenic vein, followed by anatomically-guided patch extraction and patient-level classification through pairwise texture comparison. The feature engineering mimics clinical reasoning by comparing the echogenicity of peri-venous fat to the pancreatic parenchyma, providing an interpretable signal for classification. The segmentation models are initialized via domain-specific transfer learning from a liver segmentation task. We validate the full pipeline on a clinical dataset of 214 abdominal ultrasound images with 107 expert-labeled cases using 5-fold cross-validation. SVM with RBF kernel achieves a mean cross-validated accuracy of 89.7\%\,$\pm$\,1.8\% and F1 of 0.898\,$\pm$\,0.019, while the unsupervised K-Means baseline reaches 87.8\% accuracy, demonstrating that the proposed features capture the relevant clinical signal even without labeled training data. To our knowledge, this is the first end-to-end automated framework for fatty pancreas classification from ultrasound using segmentation-guided texture analysis.

</details>


### [273] [EyeCue: Driver Cognitive Distraction Detection via Gaze-Empowered Egocentric Video Understanding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07859)
*Lang Zhang,JinYi Yoon,Matthew Corbett,Abhijit Sarkar,Bo Ji*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 3.0

TL;DR: 本文提出EyeCue，一种基于 gaze（注视）与 egocentric video（自我中心视频）结合的框架，用于检测驾驶员认知分心。同时引入CogDrive数据集，在多个驾驶场景下实现74.38%的准确率，优于11种基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 认知分心是导致交通事故的重要原因，但因其缺乏明显物理动作，难以通过传统方法检测。现有数据集规模小、多样性不足，亟需更有效的检测方法。

Method: EyeCue融合眼动注视（gaze）与自我中心视频，对驾驶员注意力与视觉上下文进行跨模态交互建模，捕捉认知分心时 gaze 与场景之间的动态关系。同时构建了CogDrive多场景数据集。

Result: 在CogDrive上准确率达74.38%，超越6个模型家族的11种基线方法超过7%。在不同道路类型、时间段和天气条件下均保持70%以上的准确率，泛化能力强。

Conclusion: 证明了 gaze-上下文交互建模以及跨模态交互建模对于多模态认知分心检测的有效性，强调了眼动与视觉上下文结合的重要性。

Abstract: Driver cognitive distraction is a major cause of road collisions and remains difficult to detect. Unlike manual or visual distraction, cognitive distraction is diverted by thoughts unrelated to driving, even when the driver appears visually attentive and exhibits no explicit physical movements. In this work, we propose EyeCue, a gaze-empowered egocentric video understanding framework, to detect driver cognitive distraction. A key insight is that cognitive distraction manifests in the interaction between eye gaze and visual context. To capture this interaction, EyeCue integrates eye gaze with egocentric video to enable context-aware modeling of the driver's attention over time. Furthermore, to tackle the limited scale and diversity of existing datasets, we introduce CogDrive, a comprehensive multi-scenario dataset that augments four existing driving datasets with cognitive distraction annotations. Through extensive evaluations on CogDrive, we show that EyeCue achieves the highest accuracy of 74.38%, outperforming 11 baselines from 6 model families by over 7%. Notably, EyeCue can achieve an accuracy of over 70% across various driving scenarios (different road types, times of day, and weather conditions) with strong generalizability. These results highlight the importance of modeling gaze-context interactions and the effectiveness of cross-modal interaction modeling for multimodal cognitive distraction detection. Our codes and CogDrive dataset resources are available at https://github.com/langzhang2000/EyeCue.

</details>


<div id='cs.AI'></div>

# cs.AI [[Back]](#toc)

### [274] [LLM hallucinations in the wild: Large-scale evidence from non-existent citations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07723)
*Zhenyue Zhao,Yihe Wang,Toby Stuart,Mathijs De Vaan,Paul Ginsparg,Yian Yin*

Main category: cs.DL

Relevance: 95.0

TL;DR: 本文通过审计arXiv、bioRxiv等数据库中的1.11亿条科学引用，发现LLM广泛采用后虚构引用急剧增加，2025年保守估计有146,932个幻觉引用。这些错误在AI使用率高的领域、有AI辅助写作特征的稿件以及小型/早期职业作者团队中尤为突出，且倾向于给已有声望的男性学者分配不实引用，加剧了学术认可的不平等。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管已知LLM会生成虚假信息，但"幻觉"问题在现实世界中的真实规模和影响尚不明确。作者希望利用可验证的科学引用作为切入点，量化LLM幻觉对科学文献的渗透程度及其社会后果。

Method: 作者对arXiv、bioRxiv、SSRN和PubMed Central中250万篇论文的1.11亿条参考文献进行审计，通过识别不存在的引用（虚构引用）来量化LLM幻觉的影响，并结合AI辅助写作的文本特征分析、作者团队特征分析以及引用偏倚分析等多维度方法。

Result: 发现LLM广泛采用后虚构引用数量急剧上升，2025年保守估计达146,932条；这些错误在AI快速采用领域、有AI写作特征的稿件、小型及早期职业作者团队中更突出；幻觉引用不成比例地分配给知名和男性学者，加剧学术不平等；预印本审核和期刊发表流程仅能捕获少量此类错误。

Conclusion: LLM幻觉正在大规模渗透知识生产过程，威胁科学发现的可靠性和公平性，且现有防护机制已不足以应对这一挑战。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are known to generate plausible but false information across a wide range of contexts, yet the real-world magnitude and consequences of this hallucination problem remain poorly understood. Here we leverage a uniquely verifiable object - scientific citations - to audit 111 million references across 2.5 million papers in arXiv, bioRxiv, SSRN, and PubMed Central. We find a sharp rise in non-existent references following widespread LLM adoption, with a conservative estimate of 146,932 hallucinated citations in 2025 alone. These errors are diffusely embedded across many papers but especially pronounced in fields with rapid AI uptake, in manuscripts with linguistic signatures of AI-assisted writing, and among small and early-career author teams. At the same time, hallucinated references disproportionately assign credit to already prominent and male scholars, suggesting that LLM-generated errors may reinforce existing inequities in scientific recognition. Preprint moderation and journal publication processes capture only a fraction of these errors, suggesting that the spread of hallucinated content has outpaced existing safeguards. Together, these findings demonstrate that LLM hallucinations are infiltrating knowledge production at scale, threatening both the reliability and equity of future scientific discovery as human and AI systems draw on the existing literature.

</details>


### [275] [Agentick: A Unified Benchmark for General Sequential Decision-Making Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06869)
*Roger Creus Castanyer,Pablo Samuel Castro,Glen Berseth*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 92.0

TL;DR: Agentick 是一个面向序列决策智能体的统一基准，支持RL、LLM、VLM和人类智能体在共同平台上进行公平比较，涵盖37个任务、6种能力类别、4个难度等级和5种观测模态。评估27种配置和90,000+个回合后发现：没有单一方法占优，GPT-5 mini以0.309的标准化得分领先，PPO主导规划和多智能体任务，推理增强将LLM性能提升3-10倍，ASCII观测始终优于自然语言。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI智能体研究涵盖从RL到基础模型等多种范式，但缺乏一个统一的基准来公平比较这些不同方法，阻碍了对序列决策基本挑战的研究进展。

Method: 提出Agentick基准，包含37个程序化生成的任务，覆盖6种能力类别、4个难度等级和5种观测模态。提供Coding API、oracle参考策略、预构建SFT数据集、可组合智能体框架和在线排行榜，所有任务通过统一的Gymnasium兼容接口暴露。

Result: 对27种配置、90,000+回合的评估表明：GPT-5 mini以0.309 oracle标准化得分总体领先；PPO在规划和多智能体任务上占优；推理增强机制将LLM性能提升3-10倍；ASCII观测始终优于自然语言观测。

Conclusion: 所有智能体范式都存在显著的改进空间。Agentick的能力解耦、多模态设计为推动通用自主智能体进步提供了实证基础设施，既可作评估框架，也可作为基础模型在序列环境中进行RL后训练的训练场。

Abstract: AI agent research spans a wide spectrum: from RL agents that learn from scratch to foundation model agents that leverage pre-trained knowledge, yet no unified benchmark enables fair comparison across these approaches. We present Agentick, a benchmark for sequential decision-making agents designed to evaluate RL, LLM, VLM, hybrid, and human agents on common ground and to power research on the fundamental challenges of sequential decision-making. Agentick provides 37 procedurally generated tasks across six capability categories, four difficulty levels, and five observation modalities, all exposed through a single Gymnasium-compatible interface. The benchmark ships with a Coding API, oracle reference policies for all tasks, pre-built SFT datasets, a composable agent harness, and a live leaderboard. An evaluation spanning 27 configurations and over 90,000 episodes reveals that no single approach dominates: GPT-5 mini leads overall at 0.309 oracle-normalized score while PPO dominates planning and multi-agent tasks; the reasoning harness multiplies LLM performance by 3-10x; and ASCII observations consistently outperform natural language. These findings highlight the substantial room for improvement that remains across all agent paradigms. Agentick's capability-decomposed, multi-modal design provides the empirical infrastructure needed to drive progress toward general autonomous agents, both as an evaluation framework and as a training ground for RL post-training of foundation models in truly sequential environments.

</details>


### [276] [The Context Gathering Decision Process: A POMDP Framework for Agentic Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07042)
*Chinmaya Kausik,Adith Swaminathan,Nathan Kallus*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 92.0

TL;DR: 本文形式化定义了LLM智能体在复杂环境中（如大型代码库、企业数据库）的上下文收集决策过程（CGDP），提出基于谓词的显式信念状态和程序化终止门控机制，分别提升多跳推理能力11.4%和节省39% token消耗。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM智能体在复杂环境中工作时，其工作记忆会退化为搜索状态的损失性表示，导致冗余工作（如重复循环）和过早停止，缺乏显式基础设施来管理搜索过程。

Method: 将LLM智能体循环形式化为CGDP（一种特殊的POMDP），建模LLM行为为近似Thompson采样；提出基于谓词的方法将隐式搜索分解为显式模块化操作，设计持久化谓词信念状态和程序化终止门控两种即插即用干预。

Result: CGDP信念状态提升多跳推理准确率最高11.4%；程序化终止检测节省39% token且不降低性能。

Conclusion: 将LLM智能体循环框架化为CGDP可以指导设计模块化、非干扰性的智能体搜索改进方案。

Abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) agents are deployed in complex environments -- such as massive codebases, enterprise databases, and conversational histories -- where the relevant state far exceeds their context windows. To navigate these spaces, an agent must iteratively explore the environment to find relevant information. However, without explicit infrastructure, an agent's working memory can degrade into lossy representations of the search state, resulting in redundant work (e.g. repetitive looping) and premature stopping. In this work, we formalize this challenge as the Context Gathering Decision Process (CGDP), a specialized Partially Observable Markov Decision Process, where an agent's objective is to adaptively refine its belief state to isolate the necessary information for a task. We model an LLM's behavior as approximate Thompson Sampling within this CGDP, and introduce a predicate-based method that decomposes an LLM's implicit search into explicit and modular operations. We then derive two plug-and-play interventions for iterative LLM agents: a persistent, predicate-based belief state that bounds context while preserving multi-hop reasoning, and a programmatic exhaustion gate that halts unproductive search without premature stopping. Across four methods and three question-answering domains, we empirically validate that replacing an LLM's implicit state with our CGDP-motivated belief state improves multi-hop reasoning by up to $11.4\%$; while the modular programmatic exhaustion detection saves up to $39\%$ of tokens without any degradation in agent performance. Ultimately, we argue that framing the LLM agent loop as a CGDP can guide the design of modular, non-interfering improvements to agentic search harnesses.

</details>


### [277] [Can Agents Price a Reaction? Evaluating LLMs on Chemical Cost Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07251)
*Yuyang Wu,Yue Huang,Shuaike Shen,Xujian Wang,Shuhao Zhang,Qiyao Xue,Weichen Liu,Runtian Gao,Jian Ma,Xiangliang Zhang,Olexandr Isayev*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 90.0

TL;DR: 本文提出ChemCost基准，用于评估LLM作为科学工具代理在化学采购成本估算任务中的表现，发现最强模型在干净输入下仅达50.6%准确率，且存在解析脆弱、证据整合不佳等问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM工具使用评估缺乏对科学工具使用的严格、无需裁判的精确评估，化学领域依赖人工或LLM评分而非客观真值。

Method: 构建ChemCost基准（1,427个可评估反应，覆盖2,261种化学品和230,775条供应商报价），设计四阶段诊断（接地、检索、采购、算术），并引入噪声注入测试鲁棒性。

Result: 最强模型（前沿/开源/化学专用）在干净输入上仅达50.6%准确率（25%相对误差内），加入噪声后性能大幅下降。失败源于脆弱解析、证据整合不足、无效包装选择及不收敛的工具使用。

Conclusion: 工具访问对科学任务必要但不充分，当前LLM代理在化学成本估算任务中鲁棒性不足，需要更可靠的推理和工具调用能力。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have become increasingly capable as tool-using agents, with benchmarks spanning diverse general agentic tasks. Yet rigorous evaluation of scientific tool use remains limited. In chemistry, recent agents can plan syntheses and invoke domain-specific tools, but evaluations often rely on curated demonstrations, expert assessment, or LLM-as-judge scoring rather than exact, judge-free ground truth. We address this gap with chemical procurement cost estimation, a practical task in which an agent must ground chemical identities, retrieve supplier quotes, select valid purchasable packs, normalize quantities, and compute cost from a reaction description. We introduce ChemCost, a benchmark of 1,427 evaluable reactions grounded to a frozen pricing snapshot covering 2,261 chemicals and 230,775 supplier quotes, supporting scalar scoring and stage-level diagnosis of grounding, retrieval, procurement, and arithmetic failures. To evaluate robustness, we further construct controlled noise-injected views that perturb chemical aliases, quantity expressions, missing fields, and input formatting. Experiments with frontier, open-weight, and chemistry-specialized LLM agents show that tool access is necessary but insufficient for solving the task. The strongest agents reach only 50.6% accuracy within 25% relative error on clean inputs and degrade substantially with realistic noise. Stage-level analysis further shows that failures arise from brittle parsing, ineffective evidence integration, invalid pack selection, and non-convergent tool use.

</details>


### [278] [An Interpretable and Scalable Framework for Evaluating Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07046)
*Xinhao Qu,Qiang Heng,Hao Zeng,Xiaoqian Liu*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 90.0

TL;DR: 提出基于Majorization-Minimization原则的可解释、可扩展的IRT框架用于LLM评估，将问题转化为约束矩阵分解子问题，实现稳定高效且可证收敛的参数估计，在合成数据和真实基准上取得数量级加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM评估方法依赖平均准确率，忽视了输出的随机性和基准项目的异质性；传统IRT方法计算昂贵且数值不稳定，难以大规模应用。

Method: 基于Majorization-Minimization原理，将IRT参数估计转化为一系列带约束的矩阵分解子问题，具有可识别性和收敛性的理论保证。

Result: 在MATH-500和六个Open LLM Leaderboard基准上，该方法相比现有方法实现数量级的加速，同时保持相当或更高的估计精度，结果符合缩放定律。

Conclusion: 该框架为LLM评估提供了更原则性的方法，能揭示项目难度和区分度，指导更合理的基准设计。

Abstract: Evaluation of large language models (LLMs) is increasingly critical, yet standard benchmarking methods rely on average accuracy, overlooking both the inherent stochasticity of LLM outputs and the heterogeneity of benchmark items. Item Response Theory (IRT) offers a principled framework for modeling latent model abilities and item characteristics, but conventional methods are computationally expensive and numerically unstable, limiting large-scale implementations. To address these challenges, we propose an interpretable and scalable framework for LLM evaluation based on the majorization-minimization principle. Our approach reformulates the problem as a sequence of constrained matrix factorization subproblems, enabling stable and efficient parameter estimation with theoretical guarantees for identifiability and convergence. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets, including MATH-500 and six Open LLM Leaderboard benchmarks, demonstrate that our method achieves superior scalability and interpretability. It delivers orders-of-magnitude speedups over competing methods while maintaining comparable or even higher estimation accuracy. Our results align with established scaling laws and offer insights into item difficulty and discrimination, informing more principled benchmark design.

</details>


### [279] [More Thinking, More Bias: Length-Driven Position Bias in Reasoning Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06672)
*Xiao Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 88.0

TL;DR: 本文发现推理模型（如DeepSeek-R1）的CoT推理轨迹越长，多选题中的位置偏见越严重（PBS与轨迹长度正相关，12/13配置显著），截断干预实验证明因果性。大模型（671B）整体偏见小但最长轨迹段仍明显，且CoT取代了直接回答的位置偏见。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 挑战"推理模型通过仔细思考减少启发式偏见"的常见假设，检验位置偏见是否与推理长度相关。

Method: 在13种推理模式配置上（R1蒸馏模型、基础模型+CoT提示、DeepSeek-R1 671B），使用MMLU/ARC-Challenge/GPQA数据集，计算位置偏见分数(PBS)与轨迹长度的偏相关，并进行截断干预因果实验。

Result: 12/13配置显示PBS与轨迹长度正相关（0.11-0.41, p<0.05）；截断干预使位置偏好转移率从16%增至32%；671B大模型整体PBS=0.019但最长四分位PBS=0.071；CoT取代了直接回答的固定位置偏见。

Conclusion: 推理模型不应被视为顺序鲁棒的，需在评测中审计位置偏见；提供PBS等诊断工具集。

Abstract: Chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning and reasoning-tuned models such as DeepSeek-R1 are commonly assumed to reduce shallow heuristic biases by thinking carefully. We test this on position bias in multiple-choice QA and find a different story: within any reasoning-capable model, per-question position bias scales with the length of the reasoning trajectory.
  Across thirteen reasoning-mode configurations (two R1-distilled 7-8B models, two base models prompted with CoT, and DeepSeek-R1 at 671B) on MMLU, ARC-Challenge, and GPQA, twelve show a positive partial correlation between trajectory length and Position Bias Score (PBS) after controlling for accuracy, ranging from 0.11 to 0.41 (all p < 0.05). All twelve open-weight reasoning-mode configurations show monotonically increasing PBS across length quartiles. A truncation intervention provides causal evidence: continuations resumed from later points in the trajectory are increasingly likely to shift toward position-preferred options (16% to 32% for R1-Qwen-7B across absolute-position buckets).
  At 671B, aggregate PBS collapses to 0.019, but the length effect still manifests in the longest quartile (PBS = 0.071), suggesting that accuracy gates the expression of length-driven bias rather than eliminating the underlying mechanism. We additionally find that direct-answer position bias is a distinct phenomenon with a different footprint (strong in Llama-Instruct-direct, weak in Qwen-Instruct-direct, and uncorrelated with trajectory length): CoT reasoning replaces this baseline bias with length-accumulated bias.
  Our results argue that reasoning-capable models should not be treated as order-robust by default in MCQ evaluation pipelines, and offer a diagnostic toolkit (PBS, commitment change point, effective switching, truncation probes) for auditing position bias in reasoning models.

</details>


### [280] [CASCADE: Case-Based Continual Adaptation for Large Language Models During Deployment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06702)
*Siyuan Guo,Yali Du,Hechang Chen,Yi Chang,Jun Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 88.0

TL;DR: 本文提出CASCADE框架，通过构建显式的、不断进化的情景记忆，使LLM智能体在部署阶段无需修改模型参数即可从经验中持续学习，在16个多样化任务中平均成功率提升20.9%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统LLM的训练和部署阶段严格分离，部署后学习基本停止，这与自然智能通过与环境交互不断适应的能力形成鲜明对比。作者旨在弥补这一差距，使LLM在部署后仍能持续改进。

Method: 提出CASCADE框架，为LLM智能体配备显式的、不断进化的情景记忆模块。将经验复用形式化为上下文赌博机问题，实现探索-利用的权衡，并建立长期交互的无悔保证。智能体可以积累、选择和精炼任务相关的案例，将过去经验转化为可操作知识。

Result: 在涵盖医疗诊断、法律分析、代码生成、网页搜索、工具使用和具身交互的16个不同任务上，相比零样本提示，CASCADE将宏平均成功率提升了20.9%，并持续优于基于梯度和基于记忆的基线方法。

Conclusion: 将部署重新定义为自适应学习过程，为持续改进的AI系统建立了基础，弥合了LLM当前生命周期与自然智能之间的差距。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have become a central foundation of modern artificial intelligence, yet their lifecycle remains constrained by a rigid separation between training and deployment, after which learning effectively ceases. This limitation contrasts with natural intelligence, which continually adapts through interaction with its environment. In this paper, we formalise deployment-time learning (DTL) as the third stage in the LLM lifecycle that enables LLM agents to improve from experience during deployment without modifying model parameters. We present CASCADE (CASe-based Continual Adaptation during DEployment), a general and principled framework that equips LLM agents with an explicit, evolving episodic memory. CASCADE formulates experience reuse as a contextual bandit problem, enabling principled exploration-exploitation trade-offs and establishing no-regret guarantees over long-term interactions. This design allows agents to accumulate, select, and refine task-relevant cases, transforming past experience into actionable knowledge. Across 16 diverse tasks spanning medical diagnosis, legal analysis, code generation, web search, tool use, and embodied interaction, CASCADE improves macro-averaged success rate by 20.9% over zero-shot prompting while consistently outperforming gradient-based and memory-based baselines. By reframing deployment as an adaptive learning process, this work establishes a foundation for continually improving AI systems.

</details>


### [281] [Extracting Search Trees from LLM Reasoning Traces Reveals Myopic Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06840)
*Sixing Chen,Ji-An Li,Saner Cakir,Sinan Akcali,Kayla Lee,Marcelo G. Mattar*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 88.0

TL;DR: 本文通过四子棋游戏提取LLM推理轨迹中的搜索树，发现LLM的规划比人类更浅，性能主要由搜索广度而非深度决定，且LLM的实际决策更符合忽略深层节点的短视模型。因果干预实验进一步证实了这一点，揭示了LLM与人类规划的关键差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM（尤其是推理模型）在生成CoT推理时经常包含对未来的显式思考，但这种思考是否构成真正的规划、其结构和性能驱动因素尚不明确。本文旨在系统刻画和量化LLM的规划行为。

Method: 提出从四子棋游戏的CoT推理轨迹中提取并量化搜索树的方法；通过拟合计算模型来表征规划结构和其对决策的影响；进行选择性剪枝CoT段落的因果干预实验。

Result: LLM的搜索比人类更浅；性能由搜索广度而非深度预测；LLM的决策最佳由忽略深层节点的短视模型解释；因果干预表明浅层节点主导走子选择。

Conclusion: LLM与人类规划存在关键差异：人类专家性能由深层搜索驱动，而LLM并未真正利用深层前瞻。这为对齐LLM与人类规划提供了精准指导，也为跨战略领域解释LLM规划结构提供了可推广的框架。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs), especially reasoning models, generate extended chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning that often contains explicit deliberation over future outcomes. Yet whether this deliberation constitutes genuine planning, how it is structured, and what aspects of it drive performance remain poorly understood. In this work, we introduce a new method to characterize LLM planning by extracting and quantifying search trees from reasoning traces in the four-in-a-row board game. By fitting computational models on the extracted search trees, we characterize how plans are structured and how they influence move decisions. We find that LLMs' search is shallower than humans', and that performance is predicted by search breadth rather than depth. Most strikingly, although LLMs expand deep nodes in their traces, their move choices are best explained by a myopic model that ignores those nodes entirely. A causal intervention study where we selectively prune CoT paragraphs further suggests that move selection is driven predominantly by shallow rather than deep nodes. These patterns contrast with human planning, where performance is driven primarily by deep search. Together, our findings reveal a key difference between LLM and human planning: while human expertise is driven by deeper search, LLMs do not act on deep lookahead. This dissociation offers targeted guidance for aligning LLM and human planning. More broadly, our framework provides a generalizable approach for interpreting the structure of LLM planning across strategic domains.

</details>


### [282] [Behavior Cue Reasoning: Monitorable Reasoning Improves Efficiency and Safety through Oversight](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07021)
*Christopher Z. Cui,Taylor W. Killian,Prithviraj Ammanabrolu*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 88.0

TL;DR: 本文提出行为提示推理（Behavior Cue Reasoning），通过训练LLM在推理过程中发出特殊行为提示令牌（Behavior Cues），使推理过程更可控和可监控。实验表明，该方法可帮助监控器剪枝多达50%的无效推理令牌，并在安全约束场景下将安全动作恢复率从46%提升至96%，且不影响性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM推理过程中存在监督困难，许多不良行为在推理结束前难以察觉，需要一种使推理更可控和可监控的方法来实现可扩展的监督。

Method: 提出行为提示推理方法，训练模型在推理过程中生成特殊的行为提示令牌（Behavior Cues），这些令牌既作为信号也作为控制杠杆。结合强化学习训练外部监控器，利用行为提示的压缩信息进行推理监督。

Result: 1) 在复杂数学问题求解中，可剪枝50%的无效推理令牌；2) 在约束违规环境中，将安全动作恢复率从46%提升至96%（超过80%的不安全推理轨迹可被恢复）。

Conclusion: 行为提示推理能有效提升LLM推理的可监控性和可控性，且不损害性能，为可扩展监督提供了新的思路。

Abstract: Reasoning in Large Language Models (LLMs) poses a challenge for oversight as many misaligned behaviors do not surface until reasoning concludes. To address this, we introduce Behavior Cue Reasoning for making LLM reasoning more controllable and monitorable. Behavior Cues are special token sequences that a model is trained to emit immediately before specific implicit and explicit behaviors, acting as dual purpose signal and control levers. When fine-tuning a weaker external monitor with Reinforcement Learning for reasoning oversight, a compressed view of only information surfaced by Behavior Cues is sufficient signal for the monitor to prune up to 50% of otherwise wasted reasoning tokens in complex math problem solving. When leveraged by an almost optimal rule-based monitor in an environment where excessive constraint violations results in failure, \ours allows for the recovery of safe actions from 80% of reasoning traces that would otherwise end with the proposal of an unsafe action, more than doubling the success rate from 46% to 96%. Through evaluation across two model families and three domains, we show that \bcreasoning improves reasoning monitorability and controllability with no cost to performance. More broadly, our work progresses scalable oversight by demonstrating how the monitored model itself can be trained to reason more tractably to oversight.
  Code to be released at https://github.com/christopherzc/text-games

</details>


### [283] [Can You Break RLVER? Probing Adversarial Robustness of RL-Trained Empathetic Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07138)
*Deeraj S K,Sadhana Devarajan,Krishna Mehra,Sudhakar Mishra*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 88.0

TL;DR: 论文构建了对抗性共情基准AEB和情感一致性分数ECS，发现RLVER-PPO-Think模型在对抗性对话中表现优异（0.963 vs 0.761），但ECS分数无显著提升（p=0.650），表明RL训练提升了情感响应能力但未改善状态追踪能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有共情基准假设用户是合作诚实的，但现实情感互动中存在gaslighting、升级施压等对抗性行为，因此需要构建能评估模型在对抗条件下共情鲁棒性的评测方法。

Method: 构建AEB基准（6种心理学对抗轨迹类型+区分性奖励结构）和ECS指标（区分状态追踪能力和改善能力），在8个场景匹配条件下对2个RLVER模型和2个基础模型进行480轮对抗对话实验。

Result: RLVER-PPO-Think显著优于基线（0.963 vs 0.761, p<0.001），零对话崩溃，隐藏意图检测提升47%；但ECS分数与Base-7B-Think无显著差异（p=0.650）。

Conclusion: RL训练提升了情感响应能力但未改善状态追踪能力，ECS-FS差距反映了行为/可读性分离，而非内部理解或临床就绪的证据。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning from verifiable emotion rewards RLVER has produced language models with strong empathetic performance, evaluated on benchmarks that assume cooperative, honest users. Yet real emotional interactions systematically violate this assumption: users gaslight, escalate, and pressure AI systems for unconditional validation, dynamics that cooperative benchmarks cannot surface. We construct the Adversarial Empathy Benchmark AEB and introduce the Emotional Consistency Score ECS to evaluate empathetic robustness under adversarial conditions. AEB comprises six psychologically grounded adversarial trajectory types with discriminative reward structures that penalize formulaic responses; ECS formally disentangles a model's capacity to track user emotional states from its capacity to improve them. In a controlled experiment across eight scenario-matched conditions (think and no-think conditions on 2 RLVER models, and 2 base models (Qwen 1.5B and 7B) with 480 adversarial dialogues), RLVER-PPO-Think substantially outperforms the same-scale untuned baseline (0.963 vs. 0.761, \(p<0.001, r=0.688\)), with zero dialogue collapses and 47\% higher hidden-intention detection. However, ECS remains nearly flat and is not significantly different for RLVER-PPO-Think versus Base-7B-Think (\(p=0.650\)): RL training improves emotional responsiveness without measurable gains in observable state tracking. We interpret the ECS--FS (Final Score) gap as a behavioral/legibility dissociation inside this simulator family, not as evidence about internal understanding or clinical readiness.

</details>


### [284] [Implicit Compression Regularization: Concise Reasoning via Internal Shorter Distributions in RL Post-Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07316)
*Chen Wang,Hexuan Deng,Yining Zhang,Yuchen Zhang,Jionghao Bai,Zhaochun Li,Ge Lan,Yue Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 88.0

TL;DR: 提出隐式压缩正则化（ICR）方法，利用策略 rollout 中最短正确回答作为压缩信号，在不牺牲准确率的前提下减少 LLM 推理过思考问题。相比长度惩罚和早退策略，ICR 能维持更好的长度-准确率相关性，避免过渡到欠思考状态。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有 RL+可验证奖励训练 LLM 推理存在过思考问题，模型生成不必要长推理链。长度惩罚会降低准确率并导致欠思考，早退策略假设大部分推理可安全截断。需要一种不牺牲准确率且不依赖截断假设的压缩信号。

Method: 提出隐式压缩正则化（ICR），一种在线策略正则化方法。基于对长度-准确率相关性的动态观察（负相关→过思考，正相关→欠思考），利用 rollout 组中最短正确回答构建虚拟更短分布，作为压缩信号引导策略生成简洁且正确的推理轨迹。

Result: 在多个推理基座和数学/知识密集型基准测试上，ICR 持续缩短响应长度，同时保持或提升准确率，实现更优的准确率-长度帕累托前沿。

Conclusion: ICR 通过维持更好的长度-准确率相关性，使短回答保持与正确性对齐而不滑向欠思考，是一种优于现有方法的 LLM 推理压缩正则化方案。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards improves LLM reasoning but often induces overthinking, where models generate unnecessarily long reasoning traces. Existing methods mainly rely on length penalties or early-exit strategies; however, the former may degrade accuracy and induce underthinking, whereas the latter assumes that substantial portions of reasoning traces can be safely truncated. To obtain a compression signal without these limitations, we revisit the training dynamics of existing compression methods. We observe that the length--accuracy correlation is initially negative but continually increases during compression, indicating that shorter responses are initially more likely to be correct but gradually lose this property as the policy moves toward underthinking. Based on this observation, we formalize overthinking: a negative correlation indicates an overthinking regime, while a positive one indicates underthinking. When overthinking, the shortest correct responses are shorter than the group-average response length in expectation, making them natural compression targets already present in on-policy rollouts. We therefore propose \emph{Implicit Compression Regularization} (ICR), an on-policy regularization method whose compression signal comes from a virtual shorter distribution induced by the shortest correct responses in rollout groups, guiding the policy toward concise yet correct trajectories. Training dynamics show that ICR maintains a better length--accuracy correlation during compression, indicating that short responses remain better aligned with correctness instead of drifting toward underthinking. Experiments on three reasoning backbones and multiple mathematical and knowledge-intensive benchmarks show that ICR consistently shortens responses while preserving or improving accuracy, achieving a stronger accuracy--length Pareto frontier.

</details>


### [285] [Confidence-Aware Alignment Makes Reasoning LLMs More Reliable](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07353)
*Kejia Chen,Jiawen Zhang,Yihong Wu,Kewei Gao,Jian Lou,Zunlei Feng,Mingli Song,Ruoxi Jia*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 88.0

TL;DR: 本文提出CASPO框架，通过迭代式直接偏好优化对齐token级置信度与步骤级逻辑正确性，无需独立奖励模型；并引入置信度感知思维（CaT）在推理时动态剪枝不确定分支，显著提升推理可靠性与效率，在多个基准测试中超越树搜索基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型推理模型常通过有缺陷的中间步骤得出正确答案，导致最终准确率与推理可靠性之间存在差距。现有对齐策略依赖外部验证器或大规模采样，可扩展性受限。

Method: 提出CASPO（置信度感知的步骤级偏好优化），通过迭代式DPO对齐token级置信度与步骤级逻辑正确性；推理阶段提出CaT（置信度感知思维），利用校准后的置信度动态剪枝不确定推理分支，仅引入O(V)延迟。

Result: 在十个基准测试和多个模型家族上，CASPO持续提升推理可靠性和推理效率；在Qwen3-8B-Base上扩展良好，在AIME'24和AIME'25上无需奖励模型数据即可超越树搜索基线。

Conclusion: CASPO有效弥合了模型准确率与推理可靠性之间的差距，提供了一种无需外部验证器的可扩展对齐方案；同时发布带置信度注释的步骤级数据集以支持细粒度分析。

Abstract: Large reasoning models often reach correct answers through flawed intermediate steps, creating a gap between final accuracy and reasoning reliability. Existing alignment strategies address this with external verifiers or massive sampling, limiting scalability. In this work, we introduce CASPO (Confidence-Aware Step-wise Preference Optimization), a framework that aligns token-level confidence with step-wise logical correctness through iterative Direct Preference Optimization, without training a separate reward model. During inference, we propose Confidence-aware Thought (CaT), which leverages this calibrated confidence to dynamically prune uncertain reasoning branches with negligible O(V) latency. Experiments across ten benchmarks and multiple model families show that CASPO consistently improves reasoning reliability and inference efficiency. CASPO scales to Qwen3-8B-Base and surpasses tree-search baselines on AIME'24 and AIME'25 without using reward-model data. We also release a step-wise dataset with confidence annotations to support fine-grained analysis of reasoning reliability. Code is available at https://github.com/Thecommonirin/CASPO.

</details>


### [286] [AgentEscapeBench: Evaluating Out-of-Domain Tool-Grounded Reasoning in LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07926)
*Zhengkang Guo,Yiyang Li,Lin Qiu,Xiaohua Wang,Jingwen Xv,Dongyu Ru,Xiaoyu Li,Xiaoqing Zheng,Xuezhi Cao,Xunliang Cai*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 88.0

TL;DR: 提出了AgentEscapeBench基准，一种密室逃脱风格的测试集，用于评估LLM智能体在长范围依赖约束下推理、执行和修正工具使用流程的能力。实验表明，随着依赖深度增加，模型性能急剧下降，主要失败原因在于长程状态跟踪、线索遵循和中间结果传播的崩溃。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准大多测试智能体的局部工具使用能力，但缺乏对长范围依赖约束下推理能力的系统性评估。用户研究兴趣中涉及LLM评估与基准测试，该工作正是填补这一空白。

Method: 设计了基于有向无环依赖图的密室逃脱式任务，涵盖5个难度层级共270个实例，要求智能体调用真实外部函数、跟踪逐步揭示的隐藏状态、传播中间结果并提交可验证的最终答案，支持全自动评估。

Result: 16个LLM智能体和人类参与者的实验显示，依赖深度增加时性能急剧下降：人类从98.3%（难度5）降至80.0%（难度25），最佳模型从90.0%降至60.0%。轨迹分析表明失败主因是长程状态跟踪、线索遵循和中间结果传播的崩溃。

Conclusion: 当前智能体能处理局部工具使用，但在深层上下文依赖上仍存在困难。AgentEscapeBench可作为诊断测试平台，推动更鲁棒的通用推理、行动和适应能力的训练。

Abstract: As LLM-based agents increasingly rely on external tools, it is important to evaluate their ability to sustain tool-grounded reasoning beyond familiar workflows and short-range interactions. We introduce AgentEscapeBench, an escape-room-style benchmark that tests whether agents can infer, execute, and revise novel tool-use procedures under explicit long-range dependency constraints. Each task defines a directed acyclic dependency graph over tools and items, requiring agents to invoke real external functions, track hidden state revealed incrementally, propagate intermediate results, and submit a deterministically verifiable final answer. AgentEscapeBench includes 270 instances across five difficulty tiers and supports fully automated evaluation.
