Abstract: Compile-pass rate is the dominant evaluation signal for LLM code generation, yet for multi-component domain-specific artifacts it can be actively misleading. We demonstrate this on executable game scene synthesis with a four-axis evaluation protocol (named `Mage') -- compile success, runtime success, structural fidelity, and mechanism adherence -- applied to 858 generation attempts across four open-weight LLMs (7B--30B), 26~hand-crafted Unity goal pattern playable concepts, and two automatically extracted IR granularity levels. Direct NL-to-C\# generation achieves the highest runtime-pass rate (43\% mean) yet produces structurally vacuous scenes (mechanism $F_1 \approx 0.12$). Structural IR conditioning halves the runtime rate but recovers domain-faithful structure ($F_1$ up to 1.00). Within IR conditioning, behavior-only and full-scene granularity are statistically indistinguishable (McNemar $p = 1.0$), indicating input-level granularity saturation. These results show that compile rate is anti-correlated with functional correctness in this domain and that multi-axis evaluation is necessary to detect the divergence. We release the benchmark, replay logs, and per-record metrics for independent verification.

</details>


### [468] [MISA: Mixture of Indexer Sparse Attention for Long-Context LLM Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07363)
*Ruijie Zhou,Fanxu Meng,Yufei Xu,Tongxuan Liu,Guangming Lu,Muhan Zhang,Wenjie Pei*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: MISA提出了一种混合索引器稀疏注意力机制，通过轻量级路由器从多个索引头中选择少量活跃头来执行细粒度token评分，显著降低了DSA索引器在长上下文中的计算开销，同时保持了性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: DSA虽然实现了细粒度推理时稀疏注意力，但其多查询头索引器在长上下文中成为主要计算瓶颈，每个查询都需要用所有索引头对每个前缀token进行评分，计算成本过高。

Method: 将DSA的索引器头视为专家池，通过轻量级路由器利用廉价的块级统计信息选择查询依赖的少量活跃头，仅对这些头执行高成本的token级评分。还提出了层次化变体，利用路由结果保留更大候选集并用原始DSA索引器重新排序以精确恢复最终选中的token集合。

Result: 仅用8个活跃头且无需额外训练，MISA在LongBench上匹配了DSA密集索引器的性能，分别减少8倍和4倍的索引器头数；在128K上下文上保持完整的Needle-in-a-Haystack热力图，每层恢复超过92%的DSA选中的token。TileLang内核在H200上实现了约3.82倍的加速。

Conclusion: MISA通过混合专家路由策略有效降低了推理时稀疏注意力的索引器开销，是一种无需额外训练即可直接替换DSA的高效方案，在长上下文场景下具有显著的实用价值。

Abstract: DeepSeek Sparse Attention (DSA) sets the state of the art for fine-grained inference-time sparse attention by introducing a learned token-wise indexer that scores every prefix token and selects the most relevant ones for the main attention. To remain expressive, the indexer uses many query heads (for example, 64 on DeepSeek-V3.2) that share the same selected token set; this multi-head design is precisely what makes the indexer the dominant cost on long contexts. We propose MISA (Mixture of Indexer Sparse Attention), a drop-in replacement for the DSA indexer that treats its indexer heads as a pool of mixture-of-experts. A lightweight router uses cheap block-level statistics to pick a query-dependent subset of only a few active heads, and only those heads run the heavy token-level scoring. This preserves the diversity of the original indexer pool while reducing the per-query cost from scoring every prefix token with every head to scoring it with only a handful of routed heads, plus a negligible router term computed on a small set of pooled keys. We further introduce a hierarchical variant of MISA that uses the routed pass to keep an enlarged candidate set and then re-ranks it with the original DSA indexer to recover the final selected tokens almost exactly. With only eight active heads and no additional training, MISA matches the dense DSA indexer on LongBench across DeepSeek-V3.2 and GLM-5 while running with eight and four times fewer indexer heads respectively, and outperforms HISA on average. It also preserves fully green Needle-in-a-Haystack heatmaps up to a 128K-token context and recovers more than 92% of the tokens selected by the DSA indexer per layer. Our TileLang kernel delivers roughly a 3.82 times speedup over DSA's original indexer kernel on a single NVIDIA H200 GPU.

</details>


### [469] [Rubric-based On-policy Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07396)
*Junfeng Fang,Zhepei Hong,Mao Zheng,Mingyang Song,Gengsheng Li,Houcheng Jiang,Dan Zhang,Haiyun Guo,Xiang Wang,Tat-Seng Chua*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 提出ROPD框架，用结构化语义评分替代教师logits，实现黑盒场景下的on-policy蒸馏，在多数场景下超越基于logits的先进方法，样本效率提升可达10倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统on-policy蒸馏依赖教师logits，限制其在黑盒场景（如仅能访问API的闭源模型）中的应用。作者认为结构化语义评分可以作为可扩展的替代方案。

Method: 从教师-学生的对比中诱导出提示特定的评分规则（rubrics），然后利用这些规则对学生rollout进行打分，用于on-policy优化。

Result: ROPD在大多数场景下优于先进的基于logits的OPD方法，样本效率提升最高达10倍。

Conclusion: 基于评分规则的OPD是一种灵活、兼容黑盒的替代方案，为跨闭源和开源LLM的可扩展蒸馏提供了简单而强大的基线。

Abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) is a powerful paradigm for model alignment, yet its reliance on teacher logits restricts its application to white-box scenarios. We contend that structured semantic rubrics can serve as a scalable alternative to teacher logits, enabling OPD using only teacher-generated responses. To prove it, we introduce ROPD, a simple yet foundational framework for rubric-based OPD. Specifically, ROPD induces prompt-specific rubrics from teacher-student contrasts, and then utilizes these rubrics to score the student rollouts for on-policy optimization. Empirically, ROPD outperforms the advanced logit-based OPD methods across most scenarios, and achieving up to a 10x gain in sample efficiency. These results position rubric-based OPD as a flexible, black-box-compatible alternative to the prevailing logit-based OPD, offering a simple yet strong baseline for scalable distillation across proprietary and open-source LLMs. Code is available at https://github.com/Peregrine123/ROPD_official.

</details>


### [470] [SHRED: Retain-Set-Free Unlearning via Self-Distillation with Logit Demotion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07482)
*Zizhao Hu,Ameya Godbole,Johnny Tian-Zheng Wei,Mohammad Rostami,Jesse Thomason,Robin Jia*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 提出SHRED，一种无需保留集的LLM机器遗忘方法，通过选择高信息量token进行遗忘、低信息量token保留，利用单一KL自蒸馏目标同时实现遗忘和效用保持。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM机器遗忘方法大多需要保留集（retain set）来防止模型效用灾难性下降，这带来了额外的数据依赖和部署复杂性。作者希望提出一种无需保留集的遗忘方法。

Method: 两阶段方法：(1) 选择阶段：对遗忘集实例做前向传播，收集逐token自回归概率，选择概率最低（信息量最高）的token作为遗忘位置，其余位置作为良性锚点。(2) 训练阶段：在遗忘位置降低记忆token的logit，在良性位置保留原始分布，通过单一top KL自蒸馏目标同时实现遗忘和效用保持。

Result: 在四个标准遗忘基准上，SHRED建立了新的Pareto最优的遗忘效果与模型效用权衡，优于依赖保留集的方法。对重学习攻击和成员推断攻击具有鲁棒性，且在多次连续遗忘后仍保持稳定效用。

Conclusion: SHRED表明无需保留集也能实现有效的LLM机器遗忘，关键在于区分token级别的信息量差异，高信息token集中了记忆知识，低信息token反映通用语言能力。

Abstract: Machine unlearning for large language models (LLMs) aims to selectively remove memorized content such as private data, copyrighted text, or hazardous knowledge, without costly full retraining. Most existing methods require a retain set of curated examples to prevent catastrophic degradation of general model utility, creating an extra data dependency that complicates deployment. We propose SHRED (Self-distillation via High-surprisal-only Retain-set-free Entropy Demotion), a retain-set-free unlearning method built on a key insight: not all tokens within a forget set instance carry memorized information equally. High-information tokens concentrate the model's memorized knowledge, while low-information tokens reflect general language competence. SHRED operates in two stages. (1) Selection: We perform a forward pass on a forget set instance, collect per-token autoregressive probabilities, and select the bottom (lowest probability, highest Shannon information) as forget positions; the remaining positions are retained as benign anchors. (2) Training: We construct modified KL targets that demote the memorized token's logit at forget positions while preserving the original distribution at benign positions. The model is then trained via a single top KL self-distillation objective that simultaneously drives forgetting and utility preservation. We evaluate SHRED across four standard unlearning benchmarks and demonstrate that it establishes a new Pareto-optimal trade-off between forget efficacy and model utility, outperforming retain-set-dependent methods. Our analysis shows that SHRED is robust against relearning attacks and membership-inference attacks, and it maintains stable utility even after many sequential unlearning runs.

</details>


### [471] [Does Your Neural Network Extrapolate? Feature Engineering as Identifiability Bias for OOD Generalization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07483)
*Leonel Aguilar,Jan Nagler,Christoph Hoelscher,Nino Antulov-Fantulin*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 本文揭示了深度神经网络在分布外（OOD）泛化上的根本困境：从单一分布内（ID）训练窗口出发，存在无限多个与ID数据几乎不可区分但在OOD上表现迥异的数据生成过程（DGP），仅靠ID准则无法唯一确定。模型成功OOD泛化的关键在于隐含的结构承诺（特征映射、标签映射和模型类），当该承诺正确且可识别时，OOD误差可降至零。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 作者希望从可辨识性（identifiability）角度解释深度神经网络何时以及为何能在分布外泛化或失败，关键在于将特征学习与数据生成过程的可辨识性解耦。

Method: 通过理论分析证明从ID训练窗口出发OOD泛化本质上不可辨识；提出结构承诺（φ, ψ, M）框架解释模型成功或失败的原因；在多个自然科学场景（质量作用化学、开普勒第三定律、跨物种DNA检测）和Transformer/Mamba/S4D位置编码研究中进行实验验证。

Result: 仅改变表示方式，相同架构、相同ID损失下，OOD表现可相差约520倍；当结构承诺正确且可辨识时OOD误差消失；傅里叶坐标可将周期性外推转化为内插；在264次位置编码实验中验证了理论预测。

Conclusion: 正确的特征是必要条件但不充分，模型类必须能表达目标，且转换后的训练数据必须覆盖相关表示空间。

Abstract: Successful deep neural networks discover salient features of data. We show when and why they fail to learn out-of-distribution (OOD)-relevant representations from an in-distribution (ID) training window. This requires decoupling feature learning from data-generating-process (DGP) identifiability. From a single training window, OOD extrapolation is non-identifiable: infinitely many DGPs are $\varepsilon$-observationally equivalent on the training data but diverge arbitrarily outside it, and no in-distribution criterion alone reliably breaks the tie. A structural commitment, the feature map, label map, and model class $(\varphi, ψ, \mathcal{M})$, dictates the assumed DGP and governs OOD generalization while leaving ID performance essentially unchanged. When architecture, pretraining, augmentation, input formats, or domain knowledge implicitly inject the missing commitment, the model succeeds. When it cannot infer OOD-relevant structure from ID evidence, it fails. Changing only the representation can make the same architecture, at the same in-distribution loss, differ by ${\sim}520\times$ out of distribution. When the commitment is correct and identifiable, OOD error vanishes. For example, Fourier coordinates turn periodic extrapolation into interpolation on $\mathbb{S}^1$. The same mechanism predicts outcomes in three natural-science settings (mass-action chemistry; Kepler's-third-law exoplanet prediction, $n=2{,}362$; and cross-species coding-DNA detection) and in a 264-run positional-encoding study across Transformer, Mamba, and S4D. Finally, a controlled study shows: correct features are necessary but not sufficient. The model class must express the target, and the transformed training data must cover the relevant representation space.

</details>


### [472] [On the Invariance and Generality of Neural Scaling Laws](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07546)
*Xing Han,Ziyin Liu,Suchi Saria,Paul Pu Liang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 本文研究可泛化的神经缩放定律：在资源充足的源领域拟合缩放定律，通过识别"信息分辨率"（ρ）这一核心不变量，将其可靠迁移到无法进行完整扫描的新领域，并在语言、视觉、语音三个模态上验证了跨领域迁移的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 神经缩放定律对资源分配至关重要，但为新任务-模型对拟合定律本身需要昂贵的扫描开销，消耗了本应节省的计算预算。因此需要一种可泛化的缩放定律：只需在资源充足的源领域拟合一次，就能可靠迁移到新领域。

Method: 识别缩放定律的"不变量"：在双射（信息保持）数据变换下缩放定律保持不变；在非双射变换下，缩放定律按信息论可预测的方式变化，核心变量是"信息分辨率"ρ——一个单一轴，沿着该轴可将一个领域拟合的定律迁移到另一个领域。

Result: 在语言、视觉、语音三个模态上验证了该方法。两个跨领域应用：1）从通用文本拟合的定律预测电子健康记录上语言模型的缩放；2）预测不同噪声注入水平下的时间序列分类缩放。数据缩放指数误差在3%以内。

Conclusion: 缩放定律可以在不同领域间泛化，关键在于识别信息分辨率ρ这一核心不变量，为资源受限的新领域提供可靠的缩放预测，避免昂贵的扫描开销。

Abstract: Neural scaling laws establish a predictable relationship between model performance and data or compute, offering crucial guidance for resource allocation in new domains and tasks. Yet such laws are most needed precisely where they are hardest to obtain: fitting one for a new model task pair demands expensive sweeps that typically exhaust the very compute budget the law is meant to economize. This paper poses the research question of how to develop generalizable scaling laws: laws fit once on a well-resourced source domain and reliably transported to new domains where running a full sweep is infeasible, which requires a fundamental understanding of when and why scaling properties change. We address this by identifying the right invariants: scaling laws are preserved under bijective (information-preserving) transformations of the data and modified in predictable, information-theoretically grounded ways under non-bijective transformations that lower its information resolution $ρ$: a single axis along which a law fit in one domain can be transported to another. We validate this across language, vision, and speech, and demonstrate two cross-domain applications: predicting scaling for language models trained on electronic health records from laws fit on general text, and predicting time-series classification scaling under varying levels of noise injection, recovering the data-scaling exponents to within $3\%$ error.

</details>


### [473] [Future Validity is the Missing Statistic: From Impossibility to $Φ$-Estimation for Grammar-Faithful Speculative Decoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07698)
*Wenhua Nie,Zijie Meng,Kun Zou,Zheng Lin,Ziwei Li,Haoran Zheng,Jyh-Shing Roger Jang,Hao Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 本文证明了语法约束解码中，结合局部词汇掩码和投机解码时，实际采样分布并非用户期望的语法条件分布，而是局部投影分布。作者提出未来有效性函数作为矫正统计量，并设计FVO-Spec解码器实现精确采样，同时给出近似情况下的误差界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有语法约束生成方法（局部掩码+投机解码）虽然高效，但用户实际期望的是语法条件分布，而现有方法采样的却是局部投影分布，两者存在巨大差异（在Dyck语法上TV距离可达0.996）。作者希望纠正这一偏差，实现真正符合语法条件分布的采样。

Method: 1) 理论分析：证明任何具备局部掩码、Leviathan拒绝和rollback soundness的投机解码器都采样自局部投影分布而非语法条件分布；2) 提出未来有效性函数Φ_t(y)作为缺失的矫正统计量，目标分布是基模型的Doob变换（h=Φ），局部掩码对应h=1；3) 设计FVO-Spec解码器，精确Φ时精确采样，近似Φ时给出TV误差界；4) 在Dyck语法和有限JSON语言上评估估计器层次。

Result: 在Dyck语法上，OneStep方法以不到1%的吞吐量开销将TV距离降低14%；精确动态规划降低97%；有限语言矫正可将JSON语法间隙降至数值精度极限。

Conclusion: 语法约束解码中常用的局部掩码+投机解码方法存在根本性的分布偏差，未来有效性函数是矫正这一偏差的关键。通过FVO-Spec解码器可以在不同精度水平上逼近真实的语法条件分布。

Abstract: Grammar-constrained generation is often combined with local vocabulary masking and speculative decoding, but the resulting sampling law is not the grammar-conditional distribution users usually intend. We show that any speculative decoder with local mask access, Leviathan rejection, and rollback soundness samples from the locally projected distribution $μ^{\mathrm{proj}}$ rather than the grammar-conditional distribution $μ^\star$. This extends the GAD impossibility result to speculative decoding; on Dyck grammars with Qwen3-8B, the total-variation gap can reach 0.996. We identify the future-validity function $Φ_t(y)=\Pr_p[\mathrm{valid\ completion}\mid y]$ as the missing correction statistic. The target distribution is a Doob transform of the base model with $h=Φ$, while local masking corresponds to setting $h$ to one. With exact $Φ$, our oracle decoder FVO-Spec samples exactly from $μ^\star$; with approximate $Φ$, we bound the resulting total-variation error. Because exact future validity is hard for general context-free grammars, we evaluate estimator hierarchies on tractable Dyck and finite JSON languages. OneStep reduces Dyck TV by 14% with under 1% throughput overhead, exact dynamic programming reduces it by 97%, and finite-language correction closes JSON gaps to numerical precision. All fidelity claims are scoped to enumerable grammars and token tries.

</details>


### [474] [Bayesian Fine-tuning in Projected Subspaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07706)
*Viktar Dubovik,Patryk Marszałek,Jacek Tabor,Tomasz Kuśmierczyk*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 提出一种参数高效的贝叶斯微调框架，通过在极低维参数空间中建模不确定性，实现与全参数贝叶斯方法相当的性能，同时保持LoRA的计算效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准LoRA缺乏不确定性量化机制，导致模型过度自信且校准不佳；现有贝叶斯LoRA变体虽能解决该问题，但大幅增加可训练参数数量，部分抵消了LoRA的效率优势，且训练更困难、收敛不稳定。

Method: 提出一种参数高效的贝叶斯微调框架，在极低维参数空间中实现有效的不确定性量化，利用权重协方差的低秩特性，通过适当的权重空间投影来建模不确定性。

Result: 在保持计算效率的同时，实现了更好的校准性能和泛化能力；实验表明权重协方差确实具有低秩特性，不确定性可以在低维空间中有效建模。

Conclusion: 不确定性量化可以在极低维参数空间中实现，无需牺牲LoRA的效率优势；权重协方差的低秩特性为设计更高效的贝叶斯微调方法提供了理论依据。

Abstract: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) enables parameter-efficient fine-tuning of large models by decomposing weight updates into low-rank matrices, significantly reducing storage and computational overhead. While effective, standard LoRA lacks mechanisms for uncertainty quantification, leading to overconfident and poorly calibrated models. Bayesian variants of LoRA address this limitation, but at the cost of a significantly increased number of trainable parameters, partially offsetting the original efficiency gains. Additionally, these models are harder to train and may suffer from unstable convergence. In this work, we propose a novel framework for parameter-efficient Bayesian fine-tuning, demonstrating that effective uncertainty quantification can be achieved in very low-dimensional parameter spaces. The proposed method achieves strong performance with improved calibration and generalization while maintaining computational efficiency. Our empirical findings show that, with the appropriate projection of the weight space uncertainty can be effectively modeled in a low-dimensional space, and weight covariances exhibit low ranks.

</details>


### [475] [An Efficient Hybrid Sparse Attention with CPU-GPU Parallelism for Long-Context Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07719)
*Feiyu Yao,Zhixiong Niu,Xiaqing Li,Yongqiang Xiong,Juan Fang,Qian Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: Fluxion是一种针对长上下文推理中CPU驻留KV缓存的混合稀疏注意力系统，通过输出感知的KV预算分配、头特定粒度感知的稀疏配置和跨设备协同执行，在保持模型质量（最差平均退化仅-0.26）的同时实现1.5-3.7倍加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长上下文推理中KV缓存常驻CPU内存，现有GPU-only设计受限于PCIe带宽和元数据开销，CPU-GPU混合设计则面临GPU空闲和CPU端top-k选择及稀疏注意力计算的瓶颈，需要更高效的解决方案。

Method: Fluxion包含三个关键组件：轻量级头部属性预测器（head-property predictor）、粒度预算选择器（granularity-budget selector）和优先级调度器（priority-based scheduler），三者协同优化预算分配、稀疏配置和CPU-GPU执行重叠。

Result: 在2个模型、3个基准测试和40个任务上，Fluxion最差平均退化仅为-0.26（相对全注意力），相比最强的固定稀疏混合基线（KV预算仅0.05）实现1.5-3.7倍加速。

Conclusion: 通过输出感知的KV预算、头部特定粒度的稀疏配置和跨设备协同执行的三重设计，混合稀疏注意力可以在CPU驻留KV缓存的长上下文推理中同时实现高精度和系统效率。

Abstract: Long-context inference increasingly operates over CPU-resident KV caches, either because decoding-time KV states exceed GPU memory capacity or because disaggregated prefill-decode systems place KV data in host memory. Although block-sparse attention reduces attention cost in this setting, sparsity alone is insufficient for end-to-end efficiency. GPU-only designs remain constrained by PCIe bandwidth and metadata memory overhead, while CPU-GPU hybrid designs still suffer from substantial GPU idle time and bottlenecks in CPU-side top-k selection and sparse attention computation.
  Fluxion is built on three key insights: output-aware KV budgeting, head-specific and granularity-aware sparse configuration, and cross-device coordinated execution for sparse attention over CPU-resident KV caches. Guided by these insights, Fluxion combines a lightweight head-property predictor, a granularity-budget selector, and a priority-based scheduler to jointly optimize budget allocation, sparse configuration, and CPU-GPU execution overlap. This co-design enables hybrid sparse attention to achieve both accuracy and system efficiency in long-context inference. Across 2 models, 3 benchmarks, and 40 tasks, Fluxion preserves quality well -- the worst average degradation is only -0.26 relative to FULL, while delivering 1.5$\times$-3.7$\times$ speedup over the strongest fixed sparse hybrid baseline, whose KV budget is only 0.05.

</details>


### [476] [Curated Synthetic Data Doesn't Have to Collapse: A Theoretical Study of Generative Retraining with Pluralistic Preferences](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07724)
*Ali Falahati,Mohammad Mohammadi Amiri,Kate Larson,Lukasz Golab*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 本文从对齐视角重新审视生成模型的递归训练（self-consuming loop）中的表示崩溃问题，证明基于多奖励函数的筛选可以避免崩溃，并推导出模型收敛到加权纳什谈判解的稳定分布。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究表明，在递归训练中仅依赖单一固定奖励信号筛选合成数据会导致模型输出坍缩到狭隘的最优区域，且该崩溃似乎不可避免。作者希望探索是否可以通过多奖励函数来缓解这一问题。

Method: 形式化刻画了异构偏好下的递归训练动态过程，证明在满足一定条件时，模型将收敛到一个在多个高奖励区域之间分配概率质量的稳定分布，并满足加权纳什谈判解。

Result: 多奖励函数筛选可以有效避免递归训练中的表示崩溃；收敛后的分布在多个竞争的高奖励区域之间保持多样性；该分布是加权纳什谈判解，为合成数据循环中的价值聚合提供了形式化解释。

Conclusion: 递归训练并非必然导致崩溃，关键在于使用异构偏好/多奖励函数而非单一奖励进行筛选。这为构建可持续的合成数据训练循环提供了理论依据。

Abstract: Recursive retraining of generative models poses a critical representation challenge: when synthetic outputs are curated based on a fixed reward signal, the model tends to collapse onto a narrow set of outputs that over-optimize that objective. Prior work suggests that such collapse is unavoidable without adding real data into the mix. We revisit this conclusion from an alignment perspective and show that collapse can be mitigated through curation based on multiple reward functions. We formalize the dynamics of recursive training under heterogeneous preferences and prove that, under certain conditions, the model converges to a stable distribution that allocates probability mass across competing high-reward regions. The limiting distribution preserves diversity and provably satisfies a weighted Nash bargaining solution, offering a formal interpretation of value aggregation in synthetic retraining loops.

</details>


### [477] [POETS: Uncertainty-Aware LLM Optimization via Compute-Efficient Policy Ensembles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07775)
*Nicolas Menet,Andreas Krause,Abbas Rahimi*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: POETS通过共享预训练主干+独立LoRA分支的策略集成框架，绕过复杂的奖励模型训练过程，直接利用KL正则化策略隐式编码的奖励函数进行Thompson采样，在蛋白质搜索、量子电路设计等科学发现任务和强化学习中实现了最先进的样本效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决顺序决策和黑箱优化中探索-利用的平衡难题，同时克服现有不确定性感知方法中训练奖励模型与拟合策略的嵌套复杂过程，以及大语言模型集成带来的计算和内存开销问题。

Method: 提出POETS框架，核心思想是利用KL正则化策略隐式编码奖励函数，直接训练策略集成来捕捉认知不确定性。采用共享预训练主干+独立LoRA分支的高效架构来实现LLM的策略集成，通过在线自举数据匹配隐式奖励函数，理论上等价于KL正则化的Thompson采样。

Result: 在蛋白质搜索和量子电路设计等科学发现任务中达到最先进样本效率；在强化学习中表现出色，特别是在离策略设置（经验回放）和小数据集场景下鲁棒性显著；理论上保证了O(√T γ_T)的累积遗憾界。

Conclusion: POETS为探索-利用平衡提供了一个高效且理论上可保证的框架，通过巧妙的架构设计克服了LLM集成的主要瓶颈，在多个科学发现和强化学习任务中验证了有效性。

Abstract: Balancing exploration and exploitation is a core challenge in sequential decision-making and black-box optimization. We introduce POETS ($\textbf{Po}$licy $\textbf{E}$nsembles for $\textbf{T}$hompson $\textbf{S}$ampling), a novel framework that bridges uncertainty quantification and policy optimization. Our approach is grounded in the insight that policies trained with Kullback-Leibler (KL) regularization implicitly encode an underlying reward function. Building on this, POETS bypasses the complex, nested process of training an uncertainty-aware reward model and separately fitting a policy to this model. Instead, we directly train a policy ensemble to capture epistemic uncertainty by matching implicitly encoded reward functions to online, bootstrapped data. To overcome the prohibitive compute and memory constraints of ensembling Large Language Models (LLMs), POETS utilizes an efficient architecture: the ensemble shares a pre-trained backbone while maintaining diversity through independent Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) branches. Theoretically, we prove that POETS implicitly conducts KL-regularized Thompson sampling and thus inherits strong cumulative regret bounds of ${\mathcal O}(\sqrt{T γ_T})$. Empirically, we demonstrate that POETS achieves state-of-the-art sample efficiency across diverse scientific discovery domains, including protein search and quantum circuit design. Furthermore, it improves the optimization trajectories of reinforcement learning, proving particularly robust in off-policy settings with experience replay or in small dataset regimes.

</details>


### [478] [Prune-OPD: Efficient and Reliable On-Policy Distillation for Long-Horizon Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07804)
*Zhicheng Yang,Zhijiang Guo,Yifan Song,Minrui Xu,Yongxin Wang,Yiwei Wang,Xiaodan Liang,Jing Tang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: Prune-OPD 通过动态检测学生模型与教师模型之间的前缀漂移事件，在发现教师奖励不可靠时自动截断无效推理并重新分配计算资源，在保持或提升性能的同时减少37.6%-68.0%的训练时间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: On-policy distillation (OPD) 在长程推理任务中面临关键缺陷：学生模型生成的前缀会逐渐偏离教师模型的思路，导致教师提供的稠密奖励失去局部可优化性，同时产生大量无效计算开销。

Method: Prune-OPD 通过持续监控学生与教师预测之间的局部兼容性（如 top-k 重叠度），实时检测前缀漂移事件。检测到严重漂移后，单调地降低后续不可靠奖励的权重，并触发动态 rollout 截断，将计算重新分配给可靠的教师监督。

Result: 在多样化的教师-学生组合下，Prune-OPD 将训练时间减少 37.6%-68.0%，同时在 AMC、AIME、HMMT 等挑战性基准上保持甚至提升性能。当兼容性好时，框架会自动保留长上下文监督。

Conclusion: Prune-OPD 的关键不在于盲目缩短 rollout，而在于将计算资源重新分配到局部可优化的教师奖励上，从而提升 OPD 训练效率。

Abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) leverages dense teacher rewards to enhance reasoning models. However, scaling OPD to long-horizon tasks exposes a critical flaw: as the student's generated prefix inevitably diverges from the teacher's thought process, the teacher's dense reward loses local exploitability. Continuing to generate and evaluate tokens on these ``drifted'' trajectories not only degrades reward quality but also incurs massive computational waste. To address this, we introduce \textbf{Prune-OPD}, a framework that dynamically aligns training budgets with supervision quality. By continuously monitoring the local compatibility between student and teacher predictions (e.g., via top-$k$ overlap), Prune-OPD detects prefix-drift events in real time. Upon detecting severe drift, it monotonically down-weights subsequent unreliable rewards and triggers dynamic rollout truncation. This allows the training process to halt futile generation and reallocate compute strictly to reliable teacher supervision. Across diverse teacher-student combinations, Prune-OPD consistently aligns computation with supervision reliability. When prefix drift makes dense teacher rewards unreliable, it reduces training time by 37.6\%--68.0\% while preserving, and often improving, performance on challenging benchmarks (AMC, AIME, HMMT). When student-teacher compatibility remains high, it automatically preserves long-context supervision by expanding the training window. These results suggest that Prune-OPD improves OPD not by blindly shortening rollouts, but by reallocating computation toward locally exploitable teacher rewards.

</details>


### [479] [Convergent Stochastic Training of Attention and Understanding LoRA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07959)
*Zhengkai Sun,Dibyakanti Kumar,Alejandro F Frangi,Anirbit Mukherjee,Mingfei Sun*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 本文通过统一框架严格证明了注意力层和LoRA浅层网络在随机优化方法下的可训练性，表明适当正则化下经验回归损失诱导的Gibbs测度满足Poincaré不等式，进而可通过模仿SGD的随机微分方程最小化损失。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管Transformer和LoRA在实践中取得了巨大成功，但对其在随机优化方法下可训练性的理论理解尚不充分。现有理论通常依赖于数据或架构规模等假设，本文旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 建立统一理论框架，证明在适当正则化条件下，注意力层和LoRA浅层网络的经验回归损失对应的Gibbs测度满足Poincaré不等式；进而利用最新结果，表明模仿SGD的SDE可以最小化相应损失。

Result: 首次在不依赖数据或架构规模假设的情况下，证明了注意力机制和LoRA网络的可训练性。

Conclusion: 为Transformer及LoRA在随机梯度方法下的可训练性提供了严格的理论保证，推动了深度学习理论的前沿。

Abstract: Transformers have revolutionized machine learning and deploying attention layers in the model is increasingly standard across a myriad of applications. Further, for large models, it is common to implement Low Rank Adaptation (LoRA), whereby a factorized parameterization of them is trained, to achieve a surprisingly beneficial accuracy-size trade-off. In this work, via a unified framework we rigorously establish trainability of such models under stochastic methods. We prove that for any mild regularization, the empirical regression loss on a attention layer and LoRA on a shallow neural net, both induce Poincaré inequality for the corresponding Gibbs' measure. Then it follows via invoking recent results that a certain SDE, which mimics the SGD, minimizes the corresponding losses. In both the cases, our first-of-its-kind results of trainability on attention and nets, do not rely on any assumptions on the data or the size of the architecture.

</details>


### [480] [Graph Representation Learning Augmented Model Manipulation on Federated Fine-Tuning of LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07961)
*Hanlin Cai,Kai Li,Houtianfu Wang,Haofan Dong,Yichen Li,Falko Dressler,Ozgur B. Akan*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 本文提出AugMP，一种针对联邦微调LLM的增强型模型操控攻击策略，利用图表示学习框架捕获良性更新的特征相关性，并通过增广拉格朗日对偶公式生成既有效又隐蔽的恶意更新，能显著降低全局和局部LLM精度，同时规避传统防御手段。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 联邦微调（FFT）在保护隐私的同时使LLM面临模型操控威胁（恶意参与者上传篡改更新破坏聚合过程），现有防御方法尚不足以应对精心设计的攻击，因此需要研究更强大的攻击策略以揭示漏洞并推动防御发展。

Method: 1) 图表示学习框架：捕获良性LLM更新之间的特征相关性，用于指导恶意更新生成；2) 基于增广拉格朗日对偶公式的迭代操控算法：优化恶意更新，嵌入对抗目标同时保持类似良性更新的参数特征（统计与几何一致性）。

Result: 在多LLM骨干网络上，AugMP：1) 全局LLM准确率降低最高26%；2) 局部LLM代理平均准确率降低最高22%；3) 在统计和几何上与良性更新保持高度一致，能规避距离和相似度基的防御方法。

Conclusion: AugMP在攻击效果上显著优于现有基线方法，揭示了FFT-LLM面临更严峻的安全威胁，为联邦LLM的安全防御研究提供了新的挑战和方向。

Abstract: Federated fine-tuning (FFT) has emerged as a privacy-preserving paradigm for collaboratively adapting large language models (LLMs). Built upon federated learning, FFT enables distributed agents to jointly refine a shared pretrained LLM by aggregating local LLM updates without sharing local raw data. However, FFT-based LLMs remain vulnerable to model manipulation threats, in which adversarial participants upload manipulated LLM updates that corrupt the aggregation process and degrade the performance of the global LLM. In this paper, we propose an Augmented Model maniPulation (AugMP) strategy against FFT-based LLMs. Specifically, we design a novel graph representation learning framework that captures feature correlations among benign LLM updates to guide the generation of malicious updates. To enhance manipulation effectiveness and stealthiness, we develop an iterative manipulation algorithm based on an augmented Lagrangian dual formulation. Through this formulation, malicious updates are optimized to embed adversarial objectives while preserving benign-like parameter characteristics. Experimental results across multiple LLM backbones demonstrate that the AugMP strategy achieves the strongest manipulation performance among all competing baselines, reducing the global LLM accuracy by up to 26% and degrading the average accuracy of local LLM agents by up to 22%. Meanwhile, AugMP maintains high statistical and geometric consistency with benign updates, enabling it to evade conventional distance- and similarity-based defense methods.

</details>


### [481] [Beyond Pairs: Your Language Model is Secretly Optimizing a Preference Graph](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08037)
*Ning Liu,Chuanneng Sun,Kristina Klinkner,Shervin Malmasi*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: GraphDPO将DPO从成对偏好扩展到有向无环图结构，利用多次rollout的排名信息进行偏好对齐，实验证明在推理和程序合成任务上优于成对和列表式方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: DPO仅利用成对偏好比较，无法充分利用多次rollout中的丰富偏好结构（如传递性），导致监督信号冗余或冲突，优化不稳定。

Method: 提出GraphDPO，在有向无环偏好图上建模，基于Plackett-Luce目标聚合邻域监督，引入等价类结构处理离散信号，支持ground-truth锚定，保持线性复杂度。

Result: 在推理和程序合成任务上相比DPO和列表式方法取得更好性能。

Conclusion: 图结构偏好建模是成对和列表式对齐目标的可扩展且鲁棒的替代方案。

Abstract: Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) aligns language models using pairwise preference comparisons, offering a simple and effective alternative to Reinforcement Learning (RL) from human feedback. However, in many practical settings, training data consists of multiple rollouts per prompt, inducing rich preference structure that pairwise DPO fails to exploit. Collapsing such data into independent pairs discards transitivity, introduces redundant or conflicting supervision, and can lead to unstable optimization. We propose Graph Direct Preference Optimization (GraphDPO), a principled generalization of DPO that operates over directed acyclic preference graphs induced by rollout rankings. GraphDPO encodes dominance relations as edges and optimizes a graph-structured Plackett--Luce-inspired objective that aggregates supervision over graph neighborhoods, enforcing transitivity while recovering standard DPO as a special case. To handle discrete or sparse signals, we introduce an equivalence-class construction where responses with identical preferences form graph layers, and intra-layer edges contribute zero loss, preventing spurious gradients. Despite leveraging full graph structure, GraphDPO maintains linear per-prompt complexity via efficient log-sum-exp aggregation. We further incorporate optional ground-truth anchoring by inserting verified solutions as dominant nodes and applying an annealed schedule that stabilizes early training while gradually relaxing oracle supervision. Experiments on reasoning and program synthesis tasks demonstrate superior performance, suggesting that graph-structured preference modeling is a scalable and robust alternative to pairwise and listwise alignment objectives.

</details>


### [482] [Coupling Models for One-Step Discrete Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07193)
*Fred Zhangzhi Peng,Avishek Joey Bose,Anru R. Zhang,Alexander Tong*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 82.0

TL;DR: 本文提出Coupling Models，一种一步式离散生成模型，通过学习离散序列与高斯潜变量之间的直接耦合，实现单步生成，在文本、生物序列和图像生成任务上显著优于现有一步式基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有离散结构生成模型通常依赖自回归解码或迭代精炼，效率低下。作者希望设计一种真正的一步式离散生成模型，避免复杂的连续流和预设的数据-噪声耦合，同时克服蒸馏方法需要预训练多步采样器的局限。

Method: 提出Coupling Models，学习离散序列与高斯潜变量之间的直接耦合（耦合过程），并训练一个专用解码器来逆转该耦合，从而在单步中生成样本。该方法不依赖连续流或手工指定的数据-噪声耦合。

Result: 在LM1B文本生成上困惑度降低33%，在Fly Brain增强子设计任务上FBD降低18%，在MNIST-Binary上FID降低46%，均达到各领域最佳一步式基线水平。

Conclusion: 有效的一步式离散生成强烈依赖于数据与噪声在解码前的耦合方式，Coupling Models通过直接学习这种耦合实现了显著性能提升。

Abstract: Generative modeling over discrete structures underpins applications across deep learning, from biological sequence design and code generation to large language models, yet generation often remains sequential, relying on autoregressive decoding or iterative refinement. In this work, we introduce Coupling Models(Coupling Models), a one-step discrete generative model that learns a direct coupling between discrete sequences and Gaussian latents. Unlike recent distillation methods that compress a pretrained multi-step sampler into a few steps, Coupling Model trains a purpose-built decoder to invert this coupling and generate samples in a single step. The model also avoids complex continuous flows over the simplex and hand-specified data-to-noise couplings. Empirically,Coupling Model improves the strongest one-step baselines in each domain: it reduces LM1B text-generation perplexity by 33% at its lowest-perplexity operating point, Fly Brain enhancer-design FBD by 18%, and MNIST-Binary FID by 46%. These results suggest that effective one-step discrete generation depends strongly on how data and noise are coupled before decoding. Code is available at https://github.com/pengzhangzhi/Coupling-Models.

</details>


### [483] [The Coupling Tax: How Shared Token Budgets Undermine Visible Chain-of-Thought Under Fixed Output Limits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07686)
*Wenhua Nie,Junlin Liu,Jianan Wu,Zijie Meng,Yilong Fan,Zhang Zijian,Haoran Zheng,Jyh-Shing Roger Jang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 82.0

TL;DR: 本文揭示了一种“耦合税”现象：当推理链和最终答案共享同一输出token预算时，长推理链会挤占答案空间，导致性能下降。作者通过分解公式预测了推理模式与普通模式在不同预算下的交叉点，并提出拆分预算的缓解方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究认为链式推理（CoT）总能通过让模型"思考更久"来提升性能。本文质疑这一假设，发现当推理和答案共享输出预算时，长推理链反而会伤害最终答案质量。

Method: 提出截断-浪费分解公式 Acc_think(b)=α_c F_L(b)+α_t(1-F_L(b)) 来预测推理模式与普通模式的性能交叉点；提出拆分预算（split-budget generation）方法，将推理和答案的token预算解耦。

Result: 在GSM8K和MATH-500上，非思考模式在不超过2048 token的预算下匹配或优于思考模式；硬任务需要更大预算才出现交叉。IRIS方法达74.0%，增强提取变体达78.8%，SC+IRIS门控达83.6%。

Conclusion: 测试时推理应被看作预算分配问题，而非仅仅是否使用长推理链的问题。

Abstract: Chain-of-thought reasoning is often treated as a monotone way to improve language-model accuracy by letting a model think longer. We identify a countervailing effect, the coupling tax: when reasoning traces and final answers share one output-token budget, long traces can crowd out the answer they are meant to support. Across GSM8K, MATH-500, and five BIG-Bench Hard tasks with Qwen3 models at three scales, non-thinking mode matches or outperforms thinking mode on GSM8K and MATH-500 at every budget up to 2048 tokens, while harder tasks shift the crossover to larger budgets. We derive a truncation-waste decomposition, $\mathrm{Acc}_{\mathrm{think}}(b)=α_c F_L(b)+α_t(1-F_L(b))$, that predicts this crossover from chain-length and accuracy statistics and explains inverse scaling within the Qwen family. A DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-8B replication shows the same pattern under a different thinking interface. As a mitigation, split-budget generation decouples reasoning and answer budgets; on full MATH-500, IRIS reaches 74.0% accuracy, a strengthened extraction variant reaches 78.8%, and a fixed non-oracle SC+IRIS gate reaches 83.6%. The results show that test-time reasoning should be evaluated as a budget-allocation problem, not only as a question of whether longer traces are available.

</details>


### [484] [Scaling Categorical Flow Maps](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07820)
*Oscar Davis,Anastasiia Filippova,Pierre Ablin,Victor Turrisi,Amitis Shidani,Marco Cuturi,Louis Béthune*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 82.0

TL;DR: 本文展示了连续扩散和流匹配模型在语言建模中的规模化可行性，训练了17亿参数的流模型，通过自蒸馏得到分类流映射（CFM），仅需4步推理即可生成高质量文本，并首次提出了半离散设置下的似然界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 先前连续扩散/流匹配模型在语言建模中仅在较小规模（<1B参数）上验证过，其可扩展性（scalability）是未知的开放问题。本文旨在验证该方法能否在大规模上有效工作。

Method: 训练17亿参数的基础流模型（2.1T tokens），通过自蒸馏得到分类流映射（CFM）实现加速采样。提出半离散设置下的似然界用于模型评分，并研究了损失加权和时间调度的最优策略。

Result: CFM仅需4步推理即可生成高质量、多样化的文本，并保持接近数据水平的token熵；在标准LM基准上达到与离散扩散方法相当的结果。

Conclusion: 连续流匹配模型在语言建模中可以有效规模化，加速采样能力使其成为自回归方法的有力替代方案，但训练时需注意损失加权和时间调度等挑战。

Abstract: Continuous diffusion and flow matching models could represent a powerful alternative to autoregressive approaches for language modelling (LM), as they unlock a host of advantages currently reserved for continuous modalities, including accelerated sampling and tilting. Recently, several works have demonstrated the possibility of generating discrete data continuously by a simple flow matching process between a Gaussian and the one-hot encoded data distribution. They have further shown the feasibility of accelerated sampling via Categorical Flow Maps (CFMs), resulting in competitive sample quality in the few-step regime. However, this method had only been evaluated at relatively modest scales ($<1$B), leaving the question of its scalability completely open. In this article, we train a $1.7$B-parameter base flow model on $2.1$T tokens and self-distill it into a CFM that generates diverse, high-quality text in as few as $4$ inference steps while maintaining near-data-level token entropy. Furthermore, we introduce a likelihood bound for CFMs in the semi-discrete setting, and show that they can be used to score the model on standard LM benchmarks, achieving results in the same range as discrete diffusion methods. Finally, we uncover some of the challenges that arise from training these models at scale, and we provide prescriptive insights on loss weighting and time scheduling.

</details>


### [485] [On the Role of Strain and Vorticity in Numerical Integration Error for Flow Matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06680)
*Chenxi Tao,Seung-Kyum Choi*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 80.0

TL;DR: 本文分析流匹配模型中速度场的雅可比矩阵分解（应变率和涡度）对积分误差的影响，发现应变率主导指数级误差放大而涡度仅带来线性误差，据此提出加权雅可比正则化方法，在低NFE下显著降低积分误差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 流匹配模型通过积分速度场生成数据，积分步数(NFE)直接决定推理成本。现有方法未深入分析速度场的哪些属性控制积分误差，缺乏理论指导来设计低NFE下仍保持高质量生成的方法。

Method: 将速度雅可比矩阵分解为对称部分S（应变率）和反对称部分Ω（涡度）；理论上证明应变通过对数范数控制指数级误差放大，涡度仅贡献线性局部截断误差；提出加权雅可比正则化方法，对不同分量施加不同正则化权重。

Result: 在2D合成数据上验证理论预测，NFE=5时积分误差降低2.7倍；CIFAR-10上轻量级微调在NFE=10时FID提升14%，同时保持高NFE质量。

Conclusion: 速度场的应变率是影响积分误差的主要因素，通过针对性的正则化可以显著提升低NFE下的生成质量，为高效流匹配模型设计提供了理论依据。

Abstract: Flow matching generates data by integrating a learned velocity field, where the number of integration steps (NFE) directly determines inference cost. We analyze which properties of the velocity field govern integration error by decomposing the velocity Jacobian into its symmetric part S (strain rate) and antisymmetric part Omega (vorticity). We prove that strain and vorticity play different roles: strain controls exponential error amplification through the logarithmic norm, while vorticity contributes only linearly to the local truncation error. We further show that the optimal transport velocity field is irrotational and has zero material derivative, implying second-order Euler accuracy; for exact displacement interpolation, the associated Lagrangian particle dynamics are integrated exactly by Euler. Motivated by this analysis, we study weighted Jacobian regularization with strain weight alpha and vorticity weight beta. Experiments on 2D synthetic data confirm the main theoretical predictions, showing up to 2.7x lower integration error at NFE=5. Preliminary CIFAR-10 experiments show consistent trends, with a lightweight fine-tuning procedure improving FID by 14 percent at NFE=10 while preserving high-NFE quality.

</details>


### [486] [Benchmarked Yet Not Measured -- Generative AI Should be Evaluated Against Real-World Utility](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06856)
*Ishani Mondal,Shweta Bhardwaj*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 80.0

TL;DR: 本文指出生成式AI在标准基准测试中表现优异但实际部署效果不佳，识别了28个案例中的"基准-实用差距"，并提出从静态基准评估转向以利益相关者、目标和场景为条件的实用性评估框架SCU-GenEval。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的生成式AI评估过度依赖静态基准测试，导致模型在标准benchmark上表现优秀却在实际场景中无法提供有效价值。作者通过28个部署案例（教育、医疗、软件工程、法律）识别出三种系统性的评估失败模式：代理指标偏移（proxy displacement）、时间坍缩（temporal collapse）和分布隐藏（distributional concealment），亟需评估范式转变。

Method: 提出SCU-GenEval四阶段评估框架：(1) 利益相关者-目标映射；(2) 构念-指标规范；(3) 机制建模；(4) 纵向效用测量。配套三种工具：结构化部署协议、上下文条件用户模拟器、以及角色-目标条件代理指标。

Result: 在28个实际部署案例中验证了现有评估的失效模式，并提出了一个以人类结果轨迹（human outcome trajectories）为核心的评估框架，强调通过长期交互衡量AI系统对利益相关者能力的实际提升。

Conclusion: 生成式AI的进步应通过可衡量的人类结果改善来评估，而非仅依赖基准测试性能。评估需要从"模型输出特性"转向"人机交互中目标达成能力的提升"。

Abstract: Generative AI systems achieve impressive performance on standard benchmarks yet fail to deliver real-world utility, a disconnect we identify across 28 deployment cases spanning education, healthcare, software engineering, and law. We argue that this benchmark utility gap arises from three recurring failures in evaluation practice: proxy displacement, temporal collapse, and distributional concealment. Motivated by these observations, we argue that generative AI evaluation requires a paradigm shift from static benchmark-centered transparency toward stakeholder, goal, and context-conditioned utility transparency grounded in human outcome trajectories. Existing evaluations primarily characterize properties of model outputs, while deployment success depends on whether interaction with AI improves stakeholders' ability to achieve their goals over time. The missing construct is therefore utility: the change in a stakeholder's capability induced through sustained interaction with an AI system within a deployment context. To operationalize this perspective, we propose SCU-GenEval, a four-stage evaluation framework consisting of stakeholder-goal mapping, construct-indicator specification, mechanism modeling, and longitudinal utility measurement. To make these stages practically deployable, we introduce three supporting instruments: structured deployment protocols, context-conditioned user simulators, and persona- and goal-conditioned proxy metrics. We conclude with domain-specific calls to action, arguing that progress in generative AI must be evaluated through measurable improvements in human outcomes rather than benchmark performance alone.

</details>


### [487] [PACEvolve++: Improving Test-time Learning for Evolutionary Search Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07039)
*Minghao Yan,Bo Peng,Benjamin Coleman,Ziqi Chen,Zhouhang Xie,Shuo Chen,Zhankui He,Noveen Sachdeva,Weili Wang,Ed H. Chi,Shivaram Venkataraman,Wang-Cheng Kang,Derek Zhiyuan Cheng,Beidou Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 80.0

TL;DR: PACEvolve++ 提出一种基于强化学习的 advisor-model 框架，用于演化搜索中测试时策略自适应。通过解耦策略选择与实现，并采用相位自适应优化（早期群体相对反馈、后期 best-of-k 前沿贡献），在负载均衡、推荐系统和蛋白质适应度预测等任务上实现了更快的收敛和更稳定的搜索性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有演化搜索系统依赖固定的 prompt 策略来采样候选解，缺乏对任务特定搜索动态的学习能力，导致在评估成本高昂的实际工程和研究任务中适应性不足。

Method: 提出 PACEvolve++ 框架，核心组件包括：(1) 可训练的 advisor 模型负责生成、评估和选择假设（策略决策）；(2) 更强的 frontier 模型将假设翻译为可执行候选解（实现层）。训练采用相位自适应方法：早期使用群体相对反馈学习宽泛搜索偏好，后期在奖励差距压缩时采用 best-of-k 前沿贡献以支持稳定精炼。

Result: 在专家并行负载均衡、顺序推荐和蛋白质适应度预测任务中，PACEvolve++ 优于使用前沿模型的最先进演化搜索框架，实现了更快的收敛速度，并且在演化搜索过程中稳定了测试时训练。

Conclusion: 通过解耦策略决策与执行实现，并结合自适应相位优化训练，PACEvolve++ 有效提升了 LLM 驱动的演化搜索在复杂任务上的适应性和收敛效率。

Abstract: Large language models have become drivers of evolutionary search, but most systems rely on a fixed, prompt-elicited policy to sample next candidates. This limits adaptation in practical engineering and research tasks, where evaluations are expensive, and progress depends on learning task-specific search dynamics. We introduce PACEvolve++, an advisor-model reinforcement learning framework for test-time policy adaptation in evolutionary search agents. PACEvolve++ decouples strategic search decisions from implementation: a trainable advisor generates, assesses, and selects hypotheses, while a stronger frontier model translates selected hypotheses into executable candidates. To train the advisor under non-stationary feedback, we propose a phase-adaptive approach that adapts its optimization strategy to different phases of the evolutionary process. Early in evolution, it uses group-relative feedback to learn broad search preferences; later, as reward gaps compress, it emphasizes best-of-$k$ frontier contribution to support stable refinement. Across expert-parallel load balancing, sequential recommendation, and protein fitness extrapolation, PACEvolve++ outperforms the state-of-the-art evolutionary search framework with frontier models, achieving faster convergence and stabilizing test-time training during evolutionary search.

</details>


### [488] [Adaptive Negative Reinforcement for LLM Reasoning:Dynamically Balancing Correction and Diversity in RLVR](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07137)
*Yash Ingle,Jaival Chauhan,Ankit Yadav,Sudhakar Mishra*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 80.0

TL;DR: 本文提出自适应负样本强化（A-NSR）和置信度加权负强化（CW-NSR）两种扩展方法，用于改进LLM推理能力，通过在训练中动态调整惩罚强度（时间调度和置信度加权）来优化负样本学习效果，在MATH、AIME 2025等数学推理数据集上取得良好表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有负样本强化（NSR）方法在训练中采用固定惩罚权重，且对所有错误回答同等对待，限制了模型推理能力的进一步提升。因此需要更精细的负样本训练策略。

Method: 1) A-NSR：使用时间依赖调度函数，训练初期侧重纠正错误以稳定模型，后期转向更精细的更新；2) CW-NSR：基于模型对token序列的标准化似然置信度分配惩罚权重，高置信度犯错重罚，不确定探索轻罚，并进行了形式化的token级更新分析。

Result: 在MATH、AIME 2025、AMC23等困难数学推理数据集上，使用Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B架构进行验证，方法在Pass@k指标上表现优异。

Conclusion: 动态调整负样本惩罚（时间和置信度两个维度）能有效提升LLM推理能力，同时提供对过拟合的自然防御，是一种比固定惩罚更优的强化学习方法。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has become a highly effective method for improving the reasoning abilities of Large Language Models (LLMs). Recent research shows that Negative Sample Reinforcement (NSR) -- which focuses on penalizing incorrect steps rather than simply rewarding correct ones -- can match or even exceed the performance of more complex frameworks like PPO and GRPO across the entire Pass@k spectrum. However, current NSR techniques usually apply a fixed penalty throughout the training process and treat every incorrect response with the same weight.
  To address these limitations, we propose two extensions to the NSR framework: Adaptive Negative Sample Reinforcement. Rather than using a fixed update rule, A-NSR uses time-dependent scheduling functions. In the initial training phases, the system focuses heavily on correcting errors to stabilize the model. As training continues, it shifts toward more subtle and controlled updates. We also introduce Confidence-Weighted Negative Reinforcement, which operates on the principle that different mistakes carry different levels of importance. CW-NSR assigns specific penalty weights based on the model's normalized sequence likelihood. If the model is highly confident in a wrong path, it receives a larger penalty and for uncertain errors -- where the model is effectively exploring -- are penalized less strictly. Our formal analysis shows how these mechanisms govern token-level updates, allowing the model to leverage prior-guided probability redistribution while providing a natural defense against overfitting. We evaluated these methods on difficult reasoning datasets, including MATH, AIME 2025, and AMC23, using the Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B architecture.

</details>


### [489] [The Convergence Gap: Instruction-Tuned Language Models Stabilize Later in the Forward Pass](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07282)
*Yifan Zhou*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 80.0

TL;DR: 本文提出“收敛差距”（convergence gap）诊断方法，通过逐层解码每个层的next-token分布并测量其与模型最终分布的距离，发现指令微调（IT）检查点比预训练（PT）检查点在更深层才收敛到最终预测。实验表明，这种延迟在多种条件下均成立，且晚期MLP层是控制该延迟的最强双向操纵点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解指令微调（instruction tuning）如何改变大型语言模型的内部计算过程，具体来说，指令微调检查点为何在推理时“更晚”做出最终预测。

Method: 提出“收敛差距”诊断——逐层解码每层的next-token分布，计算其到模型最终输出分布的KL散度。在6对预训练/指令微调检查点上进行多种实验：原生提示、端点匹配的raw/tuned readout、端点无关的same-history检查、固定历史模板回放、以及matched-prefix干预（交换PT和IT的晚期MLP层）。

Result: 指令微调检查点在网络更深层仍远离最终预测；晚期MLP层是最大杠杆点：将IT的晚期MLP移植到PT中，晚期KL增加+0.34 nats；反之减少-0.51 nats；随机扰动仅+0.003，真实移植为+0.327。

Conclusion: 指令微调后的检查点倾向于更晚才“定稿”其预测，且晚期MLP层是控制这一延迟的最强双向操作点，揭示了后训练在模型预测动力学上的鲁棒特征。

Abstract: Final outputs hide when a checkpoint commits to its next-token prediction. We introduce the convergence gap, a model-diffing diagnostic that decodes each layer's next-token distribution and measures its distance to the model's own final distribution. Across six paired pretrained and instruction-tuned checkpoints in native prompting regimes, instruction-tuned checkpoints remain farther from their final predictions later into the stack. The effect persists under endpoint-matched raw and tuned readouts, endpoint-free same-history checks, and fixed-history template replay. Matched-prefix interventions identify late MLP windows as the largest tested leverage point: late IT grafts into PT hosts increase late KL by +0.34 nats, while PT-late swaps into IT hosts reduce it by -0.51 nats; matched random late perturbations give only +0.003 versus +0.327 for the true late graft. A preselected Gemma case study provides behavior-facing plausibility for the same late swap, without serving as a benchmark claim. These results identify a robust predictiondynamics signature of post-training: released instruction-following checkpoints tend to settle later, and late MLP computation is the strongest tested bidirectional handle on that delay under matched histories.

</details>


### [490] [Revisiting Transformer Layer Parameterization Through Causal Energy Minimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07588)
*Jin Xu,Camille Couturier,Victor Rühle,Saravan Rajmohan,James Hensman*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 80.0

TL;DR: 本文提出因果能量最小化（CEM）框架，将Transformer层重新解释为条件能量函数上的优化步骤，推导出权重共享的MHA和门控MLP可从能量视角得到，并验证了这种约束参数化下的层在中等规模语言建模中能稳定训练并达到与标准Transformer相当的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Transformer块中多头注意力与门控MLP的许多参数化选择仍是经验性的，缺乏统一的理论理解。作者希望从能量最小化角度提供一个系统性框架，揭示不同参数化背后的共性原理。

Method: 提出Causal Energy Minimization (CEM)框架，将Transformer层视为对条件能量函数进行梯度更新的优化步骤。从该视角推导出：1）权重共享的MHA可视为交互能量的梯度更新；2）共享上下投影的门控MLP可视为逐元素能量函数。由此揭示了一个包含层内权重共享、对角加低秩交互、轻量级预条件子和递归更新的设计空间。

Result: 在数亿参数规模的语言建模实验中，CEM推导出的约束参数化层能够稳定训练，并与标准Transformer基线达到相当的性能水平。

Conclusion: CEM为理解Transformer层参数化提供了有价值的理论视角，将Transformer架构与能量模型联系起来，激励进一步探索基于能量引导的层设计。

Abstract: Transformer blocks typically combine multi-head attention (MHA) for token mixing with gated MLPs for token-wise feature transformation, yet many choices in their parameterization remain largely empirical. We introduce Causal Energy Minimization (CEM), a framework that recasts Transformer layers as optimization steps on conditional energy functions while explicitly accounting for layer parameterization. Extending prior energy-based interpretations of attention, CEM shows that weight-tied MHA can be derived as a gradient update on an interaction energy, and that a gated MLP with shared up/down projections can be viewed through an element-wise energy. This perspective identifies a design space for Transformer layers that includes within-layer weight sharing, diagonal-plus-low-rank interactions, lightweight preconditioners, and recursive updates. We evaluate CEM-derived layers in language-modeling experiments at the moderate hundred-million-parameter scale. Despite their constrained parameterizations, these layers train stably and can match corresponding Transformer baselines. Overall, our results suggest that CEM provides a useful lens for understanding Transformer layer parameterization, connecting Transformer architectures to energy-based models and motivating further exploration of energy-guided layer designs.

</details>


### [491] [Self Driving Datasets: From 20 Million Papers to Nuanced Biomedical Knowledge at Scale](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07022)
*Haydn Jones,Yimeng Zeng,Alden Rose,Li S. Yifei,Yining Huang,Kaiwen Wu,Jiaming Liang,Maggie Ziyu Huan,Yoseph Barash,Cesar de la Fuente-Nunez,Osbert Bastani,Zachary Ives,Mark Yatskar,Jacob R. Gardner*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 78.0

TL;DR: 本文提出一个基于LLM的自动化管线，将整个PubMed语料库（2250万篇论文）转化为结构化数据集。包含三个组件：基于9个生物医学本体的实体标注管线（标注45亿实体）、混合稀疏-稠密检索系统、以及多智能体深度研究系统Starling。在6个生物医学任务上生成约630万条记录，精度和规模均优于人工维护的数据库。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人工维护的生物医学数据库（如生物活性、基因组学、化学数据库）成本高昂、更新滞后于文献、且丢弃了实验背景信息（如"禁食vs进食状态"对生物利用度的影响）。作者希望利用LLM自动化地将PubMed原始文献直接转化为结构化数据集，解决这些痛点。

Method: (1) 基于LLM的实体标注管线，使用9个生物医学本体对22.5M篇论文、2.5T token的PubMed语料标注45亿实体（19个类别）；(2) 混合稀疏-稠密检索，支持基于实体过滤的语义查询；(3) Starling多智能体系统，接收自然语言任务描述后，自动设计检索过滤器、生成抽取模式、输出结构化记录并附带支持性原文段落。

Result: 在血脑屏障通透性、口服生物利用度、急性毒性、基因-疾病关联、蛋白质亚细胞定位、化学反应6个任务上生成约630万条记录。前沿模型对提取结果的拒绝率为0.6-7.7%，远低于现有标准数据库的错误率（如BBB_Martins 16.5%，Bioavailability_Ma 7.3%）。多个数据集是迄今公开最大的。

Conclusion: 基于LLM的自动化管线能够从PubMed文献中生成比人工维护数据库更大、更精确、且保留实验语境的结构化数据集。该语料库、检索系统和智能体为AI驱动的治疗设计奠定了基础。

Abstract: Manually curated biomedical repositories -- spanning bioactivity, genomics, and chemistry -- are expensive to maintain, lag behind primary literature, and discard experimental context, obscuring nuances needed to assess data correctness and coverage. We show that PubMed itself can be autonomously and cost-effectively turned into structured datasets that are larger, more nuanced, and more accurate than the curated databases they replace. We present three coupled contributions: (1) an LLM-based entity-tagging pipeline, grounded in nine biomedical ontologies, that tags 4.5B entities across 19 categories in a 22.5M-paper, 2.5T-token PubMed corpus; (2) hybrid sparse-dense retrieval supporting entity-filtered semantic queries over the tagged corpus; and (3) Starling, a multi-agent deep research system that, given only a natural-language task description, designs precision- and recall-targeted retrieval filters, induces an extraction schema, and emits structured records with nuance-rich fields and supporting passages. Across six tasks -- blood-brain barrier permeability, oral bioavailability, acute toxicity (LD50), gene-disease associations, protein subcellular localization, and chemical reactions -- Starling produces ~6.3M records (91K-3M per task); several are, to our knowledge, the largest public datasets for their property. Frontier-model rejection of our extractions is 0.6-7.7% across tasks, far below error rates we measure on widely used curated counterparts (e.g., 16.5% on BBB_Martins, 7.3% on Bioavailability_Ma). Beyond scale and accuracy, the supporting passages carry nuance tabular databases discard -- e.g., oral bioavailability may depend on fed vs. fasted state. Together, the corpus, retrieval, and agent establish a foundation for AI-driven therapeutic design. Code and datasets: https://github.com/starling-labs/starling.

</details>


### [492] [Breaking the Illusion: When Positive Meets Negative in Multimodal Decoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06679)
*Yubo Jiang,Yitong An,Xin Yang,Abudukelimu Wuerkaixi,Xuxin Cheng,Fengying Xie,Zhiguo Jiang,Cao Liu,Ke Zeng,Haopeng Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 提出Positive-and-Negative Decoding (PND)，一种无需训练的解码干预框架，通过双路径对比（放大视觉证据的正路径与构造反事实惩罚语言先验的负路径）来缓解VLM中的物体幻觉问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: VLM因过度依赖语言先验而频繁产生物体幻觉（生成与视觉现实矛盾的内容），现有方法需要重训练或微调，成本高且不灵活。

Method: 发现VLM中存在注意力失衡（视觉特征权重不足），据此设计双路径对比解码：正路径放大视觉证据，负路径构造反事实以惩罚语言先验主导的生成，通过对比两者输出引导模型生成视觉对齐的结果。

Result: 在POPE、MME、CHAIR基准测试上达到SOTA性能，且无需重新训练模型。

Conclusion: PND作为无需训练的解码干预方法，有效缓解物体幻觉，验证了通过解码阶段直接修正注意力失衡来提升VLM视觉忠实度的可行性。

Abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are frequently undermined by object hallucination, generating content that contradicts visual reality, due to an over-reliance on linguistic priors. We introduce Positive-and-Negative Decoding (PND), a training-free inference framework that intervenes directly in the decoding process to enforce visual fidelity. PND is motivated by our finding of an attention imbalance in VLMs, where visual features are under-weighted. Our framework introduces a dual-path contrast: a positive path that amplifies visual evidence and a negative path that constructs counterfactuals to penalize prior-dominant generation. By contrasting outputs from both paths during decoding, PND steers generation toward visually grounded results. Experiments on POPE, MME, and CHAIR demonstrate state-of-the-art performance without retraining.

</details>


### [493] [Conformal Agent Error Attribution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06788)
*Naihe Feng,Yi Sui,Shiyi Hou,Ga Wu,Jesse C. Cresswell*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于共形预测（CP）的多智能体系统错误归因框架，通过生成连续性预测集来定位首个关键错误，支持系统自动回滚恢复，并提供有限样本下的分布无关覆盖保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体系统（MAS）在失败时难以自动定位关键错误，因为LLM驱动的MAS会产生长交互轨迹，传统错误归因方法面临挑战。

Method: 提出基于共形预测（CP）的错误归因框架，设计了适用于序列数据的过滤式CP新算法，输出连续序列形式的预测集以支持高效恢复和调试。

Result: 在多种智能体和数据集上验证了理论保证，表明错误能被精确定位，并利用预测集回滚MAS以纠正自身错误。

Conclusion: 该方法具有模型无关性，为MAS错误归因提供了原则性的不确定性层，可有效支持自动化恢复。

Abstract: When multi-agent systems (MAS) fail, identifying where the decisive error occurred is the first step for automated recovery to an earlier state. Error attribution remains a fundamental challenge due to the long interaction traces that large language model-based MAS generate. This paper presents a framework for error attribution based on conformal prediction (CP) which provides finite-sample, distribution-free coverage guarantees. We introduce new algorithms for filtration-based CP designed for sequential data such as agent trajectories. Unlike existing CP algorithms, our approach predicts sets that are contiguous sequences to enable efficient recovery and debugging. We verify our theoretical guarantees on a variety of agents and datasets, show that errors can be precisely isolated, then use prediction sets to rollback MAS to correct their own errors. Our overall approach is model-agnostic, and offers a principled uncertainty layer for MAS error attribution. We release code at https://github.com/layer6ai-labs/conformal-agent-error-attribution.

</details>


### [494] [SHARP: A Self-Evolving Human-Auditable Rubric Policy for Financial Trading Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06822)
*Xiwen Chen,Wenhui Zhu,Songzhu Zheng,Kashif Rasul,Yueyue Deng,Huayu Li*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 提出SHARP框架，用结构化符号策略优化替代无约束文本突变，通过可读条件-动作规则、跨样本归因和向前验证，提升LLM金融交易性能10-20个百分点，同时增强透明度和可审计性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于LLM的自主交易智能体在低信噪比环境中使用无约束的自由文本提示优化，加剧了信用分配问题，优化器无法区分系统性逻辑缺陷与随机市场波动，导致策略漂移。

Method: 提出SHARP（Self-Evolving Human-Auditable Rubric Policy），一种神经符号框架：1）将智能体推理约束为有界、可读的条件-行动规则表；2）交易不佳时，归因智能体通过跨样本推理隔离具体规则故障；3）执行原子性的策略编辑；4）通过严格的向前验证进行正则化。

Result: 在三个不同股票板块和四个LLM骨干上评估，SHARP持续将通用初始启发式转化为高度稳健的策略，使紧凑模型（如GPT-4o-mini）的平均性能提升10-20个百分点。

Conclusion: 证明了LLM可以在实现动态高效适应的同时，显著增强机构金融所需的结构透明度和可审计性。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed for autonomous financial trading, a domain requiring continuous adaptation to noisy, non-stationary markets. Existing self-improving agents typically address this through unbounded free-form prompt optimization. However, in low signal-to-noise environments with delayed scalar rewards (P\&L), this unstructured approach exacerbates the fundamental credit assignment problem: optimizers cannot reliably distinguish systematic logic flaws from stochastic market variance, inevitably leading to policy drift. To overcome this bottleneck, we introduce the Self-Evolving Human-Auditable Rubric Policy (SHARP), a neuro-symbolic framework that replaces unconstrained text mutation with structured, symbolic policy optimization. SHARP confines the agent's reasoning to a bounded, human-readable rubric of explicit condition-action rules. When sub-optimal trades occur, an attribution agent employs cross-sample reasoning across multiple samples to isolate specific rule failures. This enables targeted, atomic policy edits that are subsequently regularized through strict walk-forward validation. Evaluated across three diverse equity sectors and four LLM backbones, SHARP consistently transforms generic initial heuristics into highly robust strategies, lifting the empirical performance of compact models by 10 to 20 percentage points on average (e.g., GPT-4o-mini). Ultimately, SHARP demonstrates that LLMs can achieve dynamic and efficient adaptation while significantly enhancing the structural transparency and auditability demanded by institutional finance.

</details>


### [495] [Don't Retrain, Align: Adapting Autoregressive LMs to Diffusion LMs via Representation Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06885)
*Fred Zhangzhi Peng,Alexis Fox,Anru R. Zhang,Alexander Tong*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 本文提出REPR-ALIGN方法，通过在训练时对齐扩散语言模型(DLM)与预训练自回归模型(AR)每层的隐藏状态表示，实现AR到DLM的有效转换，最高可加速4倍训练速度，尤其在低数据场景下效果显著。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的AR模型转DLM方法主要通过继续去噪训练，但未关注AR模型学到的内部表示几何结构能否在转换过程中得以保留。作者假设AR预训练学到的大量语义结构可以跨生成顺序迁移，DLM训练应被视为重新学习解码路径而非重新学习语言表示。

Method: 提出REPR-ALIGN方法：在标准掩码去噪目标基础上，额外使用余弦相似度损失将DLM每层的隐藏状态与冻结的AR模型的对应层表示对齐。无需适配器或架构修改，仅改变注意力掩码。

Result: 在相同架构下，REPR-ALIGN相比现有方法实现最高4倍训练加速，在低数据场景下表现尤为突出，表明语言表示可以跨生成顺序迁移。

Conclusion: 表示对齐是一种简单有效的训练扩散语言模型的技术，证明了AR模型学到的语义表示可以跨生成顺序迁移到DLM中。

Abstract: Diffusion language models (DLMs) have recently demonstrated capabilities that complement standard autoregressive (AR) models, particularly in non-sequential generation and bidirectional editing. Although recent work has shown that pretrained autoregressive checkpoints can be converted into diffusion language models, existing recipes primarily transfer parameters through continued denoising training with objective- and attention-level modifications. We instead ask whether the internal representation geometry learned by next-token prediction can be explicitly preserved during AR-to-DLM conversion. We hypothesize that much of the semantic structure learned by AR pretraining can transfer across generation orders, and thus DLM training should be viewed as relearning the decoding path rather than relearning language representations. To investigate this, we introduce REPR-ALIGN, a representation alignment objective that adapts a bidirectional masked diffusion model to reuse representations from a pretrained AR model of identical architecture. Concretely, we align the hidden states of the DLM to the frozen AR model at every layer using cosine similarity, while optimizing the standard masked denoising objective. This simple alignment, with no adapters and no architectural changes beyond the attention mask, yields up to 4x training acceleration in our setting and is particularly effective in low-data regimes. Our results suggest that linguistic representations can transfer across generation order, and that representation alignment provides a simple and effective technique for training diffusion language models. Code is available at https://github.com/pengzhangzhi/Open-dLLM.

</details>


### [496] [TraXion: Rethinking Pre-training Frameworks for Mobility and Beyond](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06906)
*Shang-Ling Hsu,Mark Tenzer,Cyrus Shahabi,Khurram Shafique*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 本文指出人类移动性数据具有三种结构化特性（联合分布、用户持久签名、跨用户依赖），现有预训练方法错误地将轨迹类比为文本。作者提出MESES（多实体时空事件流）概念及三个公理，并设计TraXion框架，在6个移动数据集上全面超越任务特定基线，且无需修改即可应用于企业认证日志和ICU死亡率预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有预训练方法将人类移动性数据类比为自然语言（轨迹=句子，访问=token），忽视了移动性数据的三个关键特性：事件是多元组且依赖位置-时间-活动的联合分布；用户跨轨迹携带持久签名；用户间存在共定位依赖。需要提出一个满足这些特性的统一预训练框架。

Method: 提出MESES（多实体时空事件流）概念，明确定义三个公理；设计TraXion框架，其预训练目标和架构联合设计以满足这三个公理。

Result: 在6个公开移动数据集（异常检测、下一POI推荐、下次访问预测、社交链接预测）上，单个TraXion检查点全面超越各任务特定基线。在无需修改的情况下，在企业认证日志和ICU死亡率预测上也达到或超越此前最佳结果。

Conclusion: 移动性、安全、医疗等截然不同领域的事件流可以在统一框架下建模，证明了跨领域预训练的可能性。

Abstract: Human mobility differs from text and from generic time series in three structural ways: visits are tuple-valued events whose meaning depends on the joint distribution over location, time, and activity; users carry persistent signatures across trajectories; and visits are not independent across users, since co-location at shared places is a primary signal. Existing pre-training recipes for mobility import objectives from language modeling, treating trajectories as sentences and visits as tokens, an analogy that fails against each of the three properties above. These properties define a broader class, multi-entity spatiotemporal event streams (MESES), spanning enterprise authentication logs, electronic health records, and other event-stream domains where entities share infrastructure, schedules, or contexts. We make the properties precise as three axioms that any pre-training framework for MESES should satisfy, and introduce TraXion, whose objectives and architecture are jointly designed to meet them. A single TraXion checkpoint per dataset beats task-specific baselines on every task across six public mobility datasets covering anomaly detection, next-POI recommendation, next-visit prediction, and social-link prediction. The same recipe, applied unchanged to enterprise authentication logs and ICU mortality prediction, matches or exceeds prior work on both, showing that event streams from domains as different as mobility, security, and healthcare can be modeled under a single framework.

</details>


### [497] [A Reproducible Optimisation Protocol for Calibrating Prompt-Based Large Language Model Workflows in Evidence Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06937)
*Teo Susnjak*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种可复现的校准工作流，用于基于提示的大语言模型（LLMs）在结构化证据合成任务中。该方法将任务规则与提示框架分离，通过标记示例和显式任务指标优化提示框架，并将校准后的工作流保存为可审计的制品（含规范、指标、设置和评估轨迹）。以标题和摘要筛选为验证案例，使用较小的学生LLM执行任务，较大的反思LLM引导提示优化过程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在结构化证据合成任务中，LLM的提示工程通常缺乏可复现性和系统性优化方法，难以保证任务执行的一致性和可靠性。现有方法往往将任务规则与提示混杂在一起，导致难以调试、迁移和审计。

Method: 1) 将任务规则与提示框架分离；2) 基于标记示例和显式任务指标进行提示优化；3) 保存完整工作流制品（规范、指标、设置、评估轨迹）；4) 采用学生-教师架构：小模型执行任务，大模型引导提示优化。

Result: 实现了可复现的校准工作流，通过DSPy和GEPA工具实例化代码，在标题和摘要筛选任务上验证了流程有效性，展示了编译、制品往返（artefact round-tripping）以及优化预算对小模型性能的影响。

Conclusion: 该工作流提供了一种可迁移、可审计的LLM校准方法，可推广到其他支持结构化任务定义、指标引导搜索和制品复用的提示优化框架中，提升了证据合成任务中LLM应用的可靠性和可复现性。

Abstract: This methods article presents a reproducible calibration workflow for prompt-based large language models (LLMs) in structured evidence-synthesis tasks. The method separates the rules that define the scientific task from the mutable prompt harness that frames and applies them. It optimises that harness against labelled or reference examples and an explicit task metric, then preserves the calibrated workflow as an inspectable artefact with its specification, metric, settings, and evaluation traces. The example code instantiates the protocol with DSPy and GEPA tools, but the underlying logic can transfer to other prompt-optimisation frameworks that support structured task definitions, metric-guided search, and artefact reuse. Title and abstract screening is the worked validation case because it provides labelled benchmark data and clear evaluation metrics. The demonstrated workflow uses a smaller student LLM for performing the scientific task execution and a larger reflection LLM to steer the prompt optimisation process during calibration. This work shows compilation, artefact round-tripping, and how optimisation budget affects a smaller student model.

</details>


### [498] [A Generalized Singular Value Theory for Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06938)
*Brian Charles Brown,Robert Bridges,David Grimsman,Mauricio Munoz,Sean Warnick*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 本文基于广义奇异值分解（GSVD）理论，证明大多数现代神经网络在最终线性层之前都可表示为左可逆且保范的形式，并据此提出一种数据驱动算法来估计该表示，展示了其在对抗性扰动检测中的应用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经网络缺乏可解释且保距的表示空间，导致输入空间的扰动无法在特征空间中可靠对应，作者希望建立一种理论上严格的表示，使得特征空间距离可以直接校准为输入空间距离。

Method: 基于Brown等人2025年的广义奇异值分解理论，证明神经网络在最终线性层前可重写为左可逆且保范的形式；提出数据驱动算法从训练好的模型中估计该表示；设计了一种自然支持该分解的模型架构。

Result: 成功证明了理论上神经网络存在保范左可逆表示；通过数据驱动算法可估计该表示；实验证明该表示可用于识别对模型输入的对抗性扰动。

Conclusion: 该工作为神经网络提供了可解释的保距表示空间，有助于对抗性检测，并为未来在模型偏差和可逆性等领域的应用奠定了理论基础。

Abstract: Building on the abstract Generalized Singular Value Decomposition (GSVD) theory of Brown et al. [2025], we prove that most modern neural architectures admit a generalized SVD representation in which they are left-invertible before a final linear layer, with no change in input-output behavior. Furthermore, the left-invertible nonlinear portion of the input-output behavior can be made to be \emph{norm preserving}, meaning that perturbations in the left-invertible ``embedding'' (the activations prior to the final linear layer in this representation) correspond proportionally to changes in the input, i.e., distance in feature space can be calibrated directly to distance in input space. We provide a data-driven algorithm for estimating this representation from trained models and propose a model architecture that naturally facilitates the decomposition. We then provide a proof-of-concept that the learned representation can be used to identify adversarial perturbations to model inputs, and develop the theory necessary for future applications to areas such as model bias and invertibility.

</details>


### [499] [Adaptive Memory Decay for Log-Linear Attention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06946)
*Yaxita Amin,Helen Zichen Li,Mengfan Zhang,Samet Ayhan*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 本文提出通过学习输入依赖的衰减参数来改进Fenwick树层次化注意力机制，使每个token和每个层级拥有自适应的衰减系数，从而在保持对数线性复杂度的情况下提升长程记忆能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的对数线性注意力机制（Fenwick树）使用固定的、与输入无关的衰减参数λ，这导致所有层级被赋予相同权重，无法根据内容自适应调整记忆强度，在长序列场景下存在不必要的僵化性。

Method: 通过轻量级两层MLP从输入中学习每个token每个层级的衰减参数λ，使用softplus激活函数让每个Fenwick树层级独立缩放，避免softmax带来的层级间竞争，保持了精确的对数线性复杂度。

Result: 在关联回忆、选择性复制和语言建模任务上，输入依赖的衰减策略一致优于固定衰减基线，尤其在长程记忆场景下提升最为显著，基线模型在该场景下性能退化甚至完全崩溃。

Conclusion: 通过学习输入依赖的衰减参数，可以显著改善层次化注意力机制的长程记忆能力，且不改变计算复杂度和参数量，是一种高效且实用的改进方案。

Abstract: Sequence models face a fundamental tradeoff between memory capacity and computational efficiency. Transformers achieve expressive context modeling at quadratic cost, while linear attention and state-space models run in linear time by compressing context into a fixed-size hidden state, inherently limiting recall. Log-linear attention navigates this tradeoff by organizing memory across a Fenwick tree hierarchy, growing its hidden state logarithmically with sequence length at log-linear compute cost. However, its memory decay parameter λ is fixed and independent of the input, assigning uniform weights across all hierarchy levels regardless of the content, which introduces unnecessary rigidity. We propose learning λ directly from the input via a lightweight two-layer MLP, producing per-token, per-level decay that adapts to content rather than position. A softplus activation lets each Fenwick tree level scale independently, avoiding the inter-level competition that softmax introduces. This modification preserves log-linear complexity exactly and adds negligible parameter overhead. We evaluate on associative recall, selective copying, and language modeling, finding that input-dependent decay consistently outperforms the baseline, with the largest gains in long-range memory settings where baseline λ degrades or collapses entirely.

</details>


### [500] [Why Does Agentic Safety Fail to Generalize Across Tasks?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06992)
*Yonatan Slutzky,Yotam Alexander,Tomer Slor,Yoav Nagel,Nadav Cohen*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 本文从理论和实验角度证明，智能体安全能力在不同任务间的泛化失败并非训练方法的局限，而是安全本身的固有属性：安全约束下的任务-最优控制器映射具有更高的Lipschitz常数，使得安全泛化比执行能力泛化更困难。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多任务场景下智能体需要泛化到未见过的任务，但实证表明即使执行能力能泛化，安全能力却常常失败。作者想探究这种失败是训练方法的局限还是安全本身的固有属性。

Method: 理论分析：在线性二次型控制（LQR）中加入H∞鲁棒性约束，证明有安全要求时的映射Lipschitz常数大于无安全要求时的常数。实验验证：在四旋翼无人机导航（神经网络智能体）和客户关系管理（LLM智能体）中进行模拟实验。

Result: 理论上证明了安全约束下的任务-最优控制器映射的Lipschitz常数更大；实验中观察到了安全能力泛化失败的现象，且与理论预测一致。

Conclusion: 当前增强智能体安全性的努力可能不足，需要从根本上不同的方法来解决安全泛化问题，因为这是安全本身的固有特性而非训练缺陷。

Abstract: AI agents are increasingly deployed in multi-task settings, where the task to perform is specified at test time, and the agent must generalize to unseen tasks. A major concern in such settings is safety: often, an agent must not only execute unseen tasks, but do so while avoiding risks and handling ones that materialize. Empirical evidence suggests that even when the ability to execute generalizes to unseen tasks, the ability to do so safely frequently does not. This paper provides theory and experiments indicating that failures of agentic safety to generalize across tasks are not merely due to limitations of training methods, but reflect an inherent property of safety itself: the relationship between a task and its safe execution is more complex than the relationship between a task and its execution alone. Theoretically, we analyze linear-quadratic control with $H_{\infty}$-robustness, and prove that the mapping from task specification to an optimal controller has higher Lipschitz constant with safety requirements than without, yielding a Lipschitz bound of independent interest. Empirically, we demonstrate our conclusions in simulated quadcopter navigation with a neural network agent and in CRM with an LLM agent. Our findings suggest that current efforts to enhance agentic safety may be insufficient, and point to a need for fundamentally different approaches.

</details>


### [501] [Dual-Agent Co-Training for Health Coaching via Implicit Adversarial Preference Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07011)
*Da Long,Lingyi Fu,Diya Michelle Rao,Jasmine Ruales Carrera,Yang Bai,Shandian Zhe*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 本文提出一种双智能体协同训练框架，同时训练健康教练智能体和客户模拟器，通过DPO和对抗训练动态提升AI健康教练的对话质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统方法只优化交互中的一端（要么固定客户端训练教练，要么固定教练训练客户端），限制了交互空间的探索，难以高效提升目标智能体的能力边界。本文旨在通过双智能体协同训练来解决这一局限。

Method: 提出双智能体框架：1) 教练智能体使用DPO优化，基于多维LLM裁判识别的帕累托主导响应对；2) 客户智能体通过反转偏好进行对抗训练，形成隐式对抗训练动态。该协同训练过程可解释为随机博弈。

Result: 实验表明该方法在多维度上有效提升了教练对话质量。

Conclusion: 双智能体协同训练（教练+客户对抗）相比单侧优化能更有效地提升AI健康教练的性能，且具有坚实的博弈论理论基础。

Abstract: Motivational-interviewing-based health coaching is an effective approach for improving mental health and promoting healthy behavior change. However, the scarcity of trained human coaches and the high cost of coaching services make such support inaccessible to many people who could benefit from it. This motivates the development of AI health coaches that can provide scalable and affordable support. Existing methods typically optimize only one side of the interaction: they either train a dialogue agent against a fixed client environment or train a client simulator against a fixed assistant. This one-sided setup can limit exploration of the interaction space and may be inefficient at developing the capabilities required by the target agent and pushing its performance boundaries. In this paper, we propose a dual-agent framework that interactively co-trains both the health coach agent and the client simulator. The coach is optimized with DPO using Pareto-dominant response pairs identified by a multi-dimensional LLM judge. In turn, the client is trained adversarially by reversing these preferences, inducing an implicit adversarial training dynamic. We further show that this co-training process admits a natural stochastic-game interpretation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method effectively improves coaching quality across several important dimensions.

</details>


### [502] [PolarAdamW: Disentangling Spectral Control and Schur Gauge-Equivariance in Matrix Optimisation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07067)
*Haozhou Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 本文提出PolarAdamW优化器，将Muon的矩阵级更新分解为谱控制（极映射）和Schur规范等变性两部分。实验发现：在DeiT视觉Transformer上，谱控制带来主要收益（PolarAdamW优于Muon和AdamW）；但在SO(3)-等变3D点云回归中，Muon由于保留了规范等变性而表现更优。这种双重分离揭示了两种效应的不同适用场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Muon优化器的矩阵级更新同时包含了谱控制（通过极映射）和Schur规范等变性两种效应，但二者的各自贡献未知。作者希望解耦这两种效应，分别评估它们在不同任务中的实际价值。

Method: 将Muon的极映射（Newton-Schulz迭代）应用于AdamW预条件后的梯度方向，而非原始动量，从而保留谱控制但破坏规范等变性。通过理论证明Muon的极步骤具有Schur规范等变性而AdamW不具备，并在两类任务上对比实验实现双重分离。

Result: DeiT-Tiny（ImageNet子集）：PolarAdamW平均超越Muon +1.93pp、AdamW +9.5pp；300 epoch配方下仍超Muon +1.37pp、AdamW +5.80pp。SO(3)-等变3D点云：Muon在所有容量下优于PolarAdamW，差距随容量扩大。两种优化器均优于AdamW。

Conclusion: 谱控制（极映射）与AdamW预条件在标准Transformer上兼容良好，是Muon在该场景下成功的主要原因；而Schur规范等变性在多重性基自由非平凡的结构（如SO(3)-等变网络）中才变得重要，此时保留规范等变性的Muon更优。

Abstract: Muon's matrix-level update couples two distinct effects: spectral control via a polar map, and equivariance under orthogonal changes of multiplicity-space basis (Schur gauge-equivariance). We separate them with PolarAdamW, a controlled hybrid that preserves Muon's polar spectral-norm control but breaks the gauge-equivariance, since AdamW's coordinatewise preconditioner is basis-dependent. Algorithmically, PolarAdamW applies Muon's Newton-Schulz polar map to AdamW's preconditioned direction rather than to raw momentum, at per-iteration wall-time comparable to Muon. We prove that Muon's polar step is Schur gauge-equivariant on multiplicity matrices while AdamW's coordinatewise step is not.
  On DeiT-Tiny trained from scratch on four independently sampled 100-class subsets of ImageNet-1k, where multiplicity-basis freedom is trivial, PolarAdamW outperforms Muon by +1.93 pp in test accuracy on average and AdamW by +9.5 pp; under the 300-epoch DeiT-style recipe, it remains ahead of Muon by +1.37 pp and AdamW by +5.80 pp on average. On SO(3)-equivariant 3D point-cloud regression, where multiplicity-basis freedom is non-trivial, the ordering reverses: Muon outperforms PolarAdamW at every audited capacity, and the gap widens with capacity. Both matrix-polar optimisers continue to outperform AdamW. This double dissociation separates spectral control from Schur gauge-equivariance: the first composes well with AdamW preconditioning on standard transformers, while the second becomes consequential when multiplicity-basis freedom is structurally non-trivial.

</details>


### [503] [Test-Time Compositional Generalization in Diffusion Models via Concept Discovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07078)
*Zekun Wang,Anant Gupta,Tianyi Zhu,Christopher J. MacLellan*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 本文提出一种方法，利用预训练扩散模型在时间索引分数中隐式包含的密度模式概念，在测试时通过梯度上升提取局部模态、子模似然选择原型、乘积-of-专家组合，实现无预定义概念库的查询特定组合生成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有扩散模型的组合生成方法通常假设相关概念或条件信号已预先可用，缺乏在测试时从模型自身学习到的信息中发现并组合新概念的能力。

Method: 对单个OOD查询，在多个噪声步上对s_θ进行梯度上升恢复局部密度模态，映射为干净空间高斯分布，用子模似然目标贪心选择相关原型，组合为乘积-of-专家（PoE）教师模型，可直接通过无分类器引导采样或用于训练新类嵌入和低秩适配器。

Result: 在ColorMNIST和CelebA的组合基准上，PoE解析采样器和低秩适配模型均优于仅查询基线和最近训练类基线。

Conclusion: 扩散模型的时间索引分数几何中包含了可重用的密度模式概念，支持测试时组合生成，无需预定义概念库。

Abstract: Compositional generalization requires models to produce novel configurations from familiar parts. In diffusion models, prior compositional generation methods typically assume that the relevant concepts or conditioning signals are already available.
