We instead ask whether a pretrained diffusion model can discover query-specific concepts from the time-indexed scores it learns for the noisy marginals $p_t(x_t)$ and compose them at test time. Given a single out-of-distribution query, our method performs gradient ascent on $s_θ(x_t,t) \approx \nabla_{x_t}\log p_t(x_t)$ at multiple noising timesteps to recover local density modes, maps these modes into clean-space Gaussians, greedily selects relevant prototypes with a submodular likelihood objective, and combines them into a product-of-experts (PoE) teacher model with an analytic score. This teacher model can be sampled directly through classifier-free guidance or used to generate a sample pool for training a new class embedding and low-rank adapter. On held-out composition benchmarks built from ColorMNIST and CelebA, both the analytic PoE sampler and the low-rank adapted model outperform query-only and nearest trained-class baselines. These results suggest that the time-indexed score geometry of the diffusion model contains reusable density-mode concepts that support test-time compositional generation without a predefined concept library.

</details>


### [504] [When Symbol Names Should Not Matter: A Logistic Theory of Fresh-Symbol Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07120)
*Wenjie Guan,Jelena Bradic*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 本文研究了Transformer在固定标签分类任务中是否真正使用抽象符号推理，通过分析正则化核逻辑分类在Transformer核机制下的行为，揭示了模型预测可分解为理想模板级分类器与有限样本扰动（由训练数据中偶然的token重叠引起），并提出了基于碰撞图的边距传递保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究Transformer在模板任务中是否真正基于抽象符号而非具体token名称进行推理，澄清其泛化能力的来源。

Method: 在Transformer核机制下分析正则化核逻辑分类，将预测分解为模板级分类器和有限样本扰动，通过有色碰撞图编码token重叠，并推导新鲜符号分类的高概率边距传递保证。

Result: 发现词汇量控制碰撞平均率，但碰撞几何决定理想分类边距是否保留；扰动框架可推广到抽象增强输入，提供边距-碰撞准则来识别提示策略何时改善新鲜符号泛化。

Conclusion: 该框架将模板分析扩展到逻辑分类，细化了标量多样性条件，并为理解提示策略的泛化效果提供了理论指导。

Abstract: Template tasks have emerged as a clean testbed for asking whether transformers reason with abstract symbols rather than concrete token names. We study the fixed-label classification version of this problem, where train and test examples share latent templates but may use disjoint vocabularies. Unlike next-token prediction, the model need not emit unseen symbols; it must learn a decision rule invariant to symbol renaming. We analyze regularized kernel logistic classification in the transformer-kernel regime. Our main result decomposes the learned predictor into an ideal template-level classifier and a finite-sample perturbation caused by accidental token overlaps in the training data. We encode these overlaps by a colored collision graph and prove high-probability margin-transfer guarantees for fresh-symbol classification. This perspective extends template-based analyses to logistic classification and refines scalar diversity conditions: vocabulary size controls the average rate of collisions, but collision geometry controls whether the ideal classification margin is preserved. More broadly, the same perturbation framework applies to abstraction-augmented inputs, yielding a general margin-versus-collision criterion for identifying when prompting strategies improve fresh-symbol generalization. Synthetic template experiments illustrate the predicted roles of regularization, sample size, and transformer-kernel structure.

</details>


### [505] [SparseRL-Sync: Lossless Weight Synchronization with ~100x Less Communication](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07330)
*Lucas Hu,Ranchi Zhao,Isaac Zhu,Zach Zhang,Hscos Zhang,Hugh Yin,Jason Zhao*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 提出SparseRL-Sync，利用大模型RL训练中参数更新的高度稀疏性（>99%），用稀疏更新代替全权重同步，在带宽受限场景下实现约100倍通信量压缩，且保持完全保真。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在大规模RL系统中，Trainer-Rollout解耦架构下权重同步的通信开销随模型规模增长而急剧上升，在跨数据中心、异构资源池等带宽受限场景中成为吞吐和延迟的瓶颈。

Method: 观察到主流大模型RL训练中参数实际变化位置在元素级高度稀疏（99%+），提出用无损稀疏更新负载（索引+值）替代全权重传输，在推理端可精确重构，结合分桶策略降低启动和控制平面开销。

Result: 在99%稀疏度下，单次更新通信量从S降至约S/100（约100倍减少），显著提升带宽受限和高异步RL场景下的可扩展性和端到端效率。

Conclusion: SparseRL-Sync通过利用梯度更新的固有稀疏性，以无损方式大幅降低通信开销，为大规模分布式RL训练提供了高效的同步方案。

Abstract: In large-scale reinforcement learning (RL) systems with decoupled Trainer-Rollout execution, the Trainer must regularly synchronize policy weights to the Rollout side to limit policy staleness. When inter-node bandwidth is abundant, such synchronization is usually only a small fraction of end-to-end cost. As model size grows, however, the communication demand rises rapidly. In bandwidth-constrained or network-variable deployments -- for example, cross-datacenter or cross-cluster settings, heterogeneous resource pools, and online RL -- weight synchronization can become a dominant bottleneck for throughput and tail latency. We observe that, in mainstream large-model RL training, the locations where parameters actually change are highly sparse at the element level (often 99%+ sparsity). Building on this observation, we propose and implement SparseRL-Sync, which replaces full-weight transfers with a lossless sparse update payload (indices and values) that can be exactly reconstructed on the inference side, thereby preserving 100% fidelity. Under a simplified cost model, sparse synchronization reduces the per-update communication volume from S to approximately S/X; with 99% sparsity (X ~ 100), this yields about a 100x reduction in transmitted data. Combined with appropriate bucketing, SparseRL-Sync also reduces launch and control-plane overhead, significantly improving scalability and end-to-end efficiency in bandwidth-limited and highly asynchronous RL settings.

</details>


### [506] [CellScientist: Dual-Space Hierarchical Orchestration for Closed-Loop Refinement of Virtual Cell Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07335)
*Mengran Li,Bo Li,Jiaying Wang,Wenbin Xing,Yixuan Dong,Chengyang Zhang,Hongliang Zhang,Yuzhong Peng,Jinlin Wu,Bob Zhang,Bingo Wing-Kuen Ling,Fuji Yang,Zhen Lei,Jiebo Luo,Zelin Zang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: CellScientist提出一个双空间层次框架（假设空间+可执行实现空间），将LLM辅助的虚拟细胞建模中的预测失败转化为结构化的假设修订信号，而非简单的代码调试。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM辅助建模面临"细化-路由"问题：预测偏差通过代码执行被发现，但根源可能在假设、表征、实现或任务约束层面，缺乏跨层次的结构化反馈传播机制。

Method: 构建双空间层次框架：高层次假设空间（结构化建模决策状态）+低层次可执行实现空间（符合任务和接口约束的可行程序）；执行偏差被路由回目标假设或实现更新，形成"假设→实现→假设"闭环。

Result: 在形态学和转录组学基准测试及单细胞扰动评估中，CellScientist选择的最终可执行模型在固定划分和评估协议下优于参考基线，并生成可审计的细化轨迹。

Conclusion: 将预测失败从调试事件转化为结构化的模型细化信号，而非盲目修复代码，实现了假设层面的可追溯修正。

Abstract: Virtual Cell Modeling (VCM) requires models that not only predict perturbation responses, but also support targeted revision when predictions fail. Current LLM-assisted modeling workflows face a refinement-routing problem: prediction discrepancies are observed through executable implementations, but the relevant revision may involve the modeling assumption, representation design, implementation, or task constraint. Without structured feedback propagation across these levels, iterative refinement may repair code while failing to revise the assumption responsible for the discrepancy. We propose CellScientist, a dual-space hierarchical framework that couples a high-level hypothesis space with a low-level executable implementation space. CellScientist represents modeling decisions as structured states, realizes them as admissible programs under task and interface constraints, and routes execution discrepancies back to targeted hypothesis or implementation updates. This enables a closed Hypothesis -> Implementation -> Hypothesis loop where failures become structured signals for model refinement rather than debugging events. Across morphology and transcriptomic benchmarks, with additional single-cell perturbation evaluations, the final executable models selected by CellScientist improve over reference baselines under fixed split and evaluation protocols, while the workflow produces auditable refinement traces.

</details>


### [507] [Zero-Shot Neural Network Evaluation with Sample-Wise Activation Patterns](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07378)
*Yameng Peng,Andy Song,HaythamM. Fayek,Vic Ciesielski,Xiaojun Chang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 本文提出SWAP-Score，一种通用且高效的零样本代理指标，用于评估神经网络性能，无需训练即可在CNN和Transformer上取得高相关性，并可用于神经架构搜索（NAS）显著降低计算开销。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有零样本代理指标存在相关性弱、泛化性差（通常只能用于CNN或Transformer之一）等问题，亟需一种跨架构、跨任务域的通用评估指标。

Method: 提出基于样本级激活模式（Sample-Wise Activation Patterns, SWAP）的SWAP-Score，通过衡量神经网络对一小批样本的表征能力（expressivity）来估计其真实性能，无需标签且不受架构类型限制。

Result: 在CIFAR-10上对DARTS CNN的Spearman相关系数达0.93，在GLUE任务上对FlexiBERT Transformer达0.71；SWAP-NAS在CIFAR-10和ImageNet上仅需约6和9分钟GPU时间即可取得竞争力性能。

Conclusion: SWAP-Score是一种普适性强、高效且有效的零样本评估指标，可同时适用于CNN和Transformer，显著降低NAS计算成本，并可用于预训练语言模型的性能预估。

Abstract: Zero-shot proxies, also known as training-free metrics, are widely adopted to reduce the computational overhead in neural network evaluation for scenarios such as Neural Architecture Search (NAS), as they do not require any training. Existing zero-shot metrics have several limitations, including weak correlation with the true performance and poor generalisation across different networks or downstream tasks. For example, most of these metrics apply only to either convolutional neural networks (CNNs) or Transformers, but not both. To address these limitations, we propose Sample-Wise Activation Patterns (SWAP), and its derivative, SWAP-Score, a novel and highly effective zero-shot metric. SWAP-Score is broadly applicable across both architecture families and task domains, demonstrating strong predictive performance in the majority of tasks. This metric measures the expressivity of neural networks over a mini-batch of samples, showing a high correlation with the neural networks' ground-truth performance. For both CNNs and Transformers, the SWAP-Score outperforms existing zero-shot metrics across computer vision and natural language processing tasks. For instance, Spearman's correlation coefficient between the SWAP-Score and CIFAR-10 validation accuracy for DARTS CNNs is 0.93, and 0.71 for FlexiBERT Transformers on GLUE tasks. Moreover, SWAP-Score is label-independent, hence can be applied at the pre-training stage of language models to estimate their performance for downstream tasks. When applied to NAS, SWAP-empowered NAS, SWAP-NAS can achieve competitive performance using only approximately 6 and 9 minutes of GPU time, on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet respectively. Our code is available at: https://github.com/pym1024/SWAP_Universal

</details>


### [508] [StreamPhy: Streaming Inference of High-Dimensional Physical Dynamics via State Space Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07384)
*Panqi Chen,Yifan Sun,Shikai Fang,Xiao Fu,Lei Cheng*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 提出StreamPhy框架，结合数据自适应观测编码器、结构化状态空间模型和函数型张量特征调制解码器，实现从不规则稀疏测量中实时流式推断高维物理场演变，相比扩散模型推理速度提升20-100倍，准确率至少提高48%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有物理场推断方法（扩散模型、函数张量方法）通常是离线设置、依赖完整时序观测或推理成本高，无法高效实时地从不规则稀疏测量中推断高维多模态物理场演化。

Method: 提出StreamPhy框架：1）数据自适应观测编码器（适应任意观测模式）；2）结构化状态空间模型（支持不规则时间间隔的在线更新）；3）函数型张量特征线性调制（FT-FiLM）解码器（连续场生成）。证明了FT-FiLM比函数型Tucker模型更具表达力。

Result: 在三个代表性物理系统实验中，StreamPhy一致优于SOTA基线，准确率提升至少48%，推理速度比扩散模型快20-100倍。

Conclusion: StreamPhy为不规则稀疏测量的实时物理场推断提供了高效准确的端到端解决方案，FT-FiLM的强表达能力是其核心优势。

Abstract: Inferring the evolution of high-dimensional and multi-modal (e.g., spatio-temporal) physical fields from irregular sparse measurements in real time is a fundamental challenge in science and engineering. Existing approaches, including diffusion-based generative models and functional tensor methods, typically operate in offline settings, depend on full temporal observations, or incur substantial inference cost. We propose StreamPhy, an end-to-end framework that enables efficient and accurate streaming inference of full-field physical dynamics from incoming irregular sparse measurements. The framework integrates a data-adaptive observation encoder that is robust to arbitrary observation patterns, a structured state-space model that supports memory-efficient online updates across irregular time intervals, and an expressive Functional Tensor Feature-wise Linear Modulation (FT-FiLM) decoder for continuous-field generation. We prove that FT-FiLM is more expressive than the functional Tucker model, admitting a richer function class for handling complex dynamics. Experiments on three representative physical systems under challenging sampling patterns show that StreamPhy consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, with at least 48\% improvement in accuracy and up to 20--100X faster inference than diffusion-based methods.

</details>


### [509] [Approximation Error Upper and Lower Bounds for Hölder Class with Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07463)
*Xin He,Yuling Jiao,Xiliang Lu,Jerry Zhijian Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 本文严格推导了标准Transformer对Hölder函数的逼近误差上界和下界：需要O(ε^{-d₀/α})个块达到ε精度，并首次证明至少需要Ω(ε^{-d₀/(4α)})个块，进一步将结果推广到回归任务并建立了超额风险界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究Transformer的表示能力，从理论上严格刻画其函数逼近的误差上下界，填补该领域在逼近下界方面的空白。

Method: 基于标准Transformer架构（含Softmax、ReLU激活和残差连接），利用VC维上界技术推导逼近下界，构造逼近器推得上界，并推广至回归任务分析超额风险。

Result: 上界：O(ε^{-d₀/α})个块即可逼近任意有界Hölder函数；下界：首次证明至少需要Ω(ε^{-d₀/(4α)})个块；回归任务上建立了相应的超额风险率。

Conclusion: 严格刻画了Transformer在Hölder类函数逼近中的表达能力边界，为理解其理论和实践效果提供了新见解。

Abstract: We explore the expressive power of Transformers by establishing precise approximation error upper and lower bounds for Hölder class. Specifically, a new approximation upper bound is derived for the standard Transformer architecture equipped with Softmax operators, ReLU activation functions, and residual connections. We prove that a Transformer network composed of at most $\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^{-{d_{0}}/α})$ blocks can approximate any bounded Hölder function with $d_{0}$-dimensional input and smoothness $α\in(0,1]$ under any accuracy $\varepsilon>0$. In the case of approximation lower bounds, leveraging the VC-dimension upper bound, we are the first to rigorously prove that Transformers demand for at least $Ω(\varepsilon^{-{d_{0}}/({4α})})$ blocks to achieve the $\varepsilon$ approximation accuracy. As a final step, we extend the derived results for standard Transformers to a general regression task and establish the corresponding excess risk rates demonstrating Transformers' empirical effectiveness in real-world settings.

</details>


### [510] [Tessellations of Semi-Discrete Flow Matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07513)
*Emile Pierret,Johannes Hertrich,Samuel Hurault,Julie Delon*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 该论文在理论层面研究了半离散流匹配（Semi-Discrete Flow Matching）的几何性质，发现其终端分配区域是开集、单连通且同胚于单位球，但与最优传输中的Laguerre细胞不同——可能非凸、边界弯曲且具有不同的邻接模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 流匹配（Flow Matching）是生成建模的一种重要方法，但其内在几何结构尚未被充分理解。作者希望在不考虑神经网络优化与近似的情况下，从理论上揭示流匹配在离散数据上的行为，特别是终端流映射的分配区域几何性质。

Method: 采用半离散设置（高斯源→有限离散目标），利用该设定下流匹配速度场存在闭式解的特点，严格分析终端流映射的预像（即分配区域）的拓扑与几何性质，并通过四点的平面例子展示与最优传输的差异。

Result: 证明了终端分配区域是开集、单连通，且在附加假设下同胚于单位球；但四点的平面例子表明这些区域可能非凸、边界弯曲，且邻接模式和有界性与半离散最优传输的Laguerre细胞显著不同。

Conclusion: 半离散流匹配在神经网络近似之前就已经具有与最优传输截然不同的内在几何结构，这为理解流匹配生成模型的行为提供了理论依据。

Abstract: We study Flow Matching in a semi-discrete setting where a Gaussian source is transported toward a discrete target supported on finitely many points. This semi-discrete regime is the theoretical setting behind the use of Flow Matching for generative modeling, where the target distribution is represented by a finite dataset. In this semi-discrete regime, the exact Flow Matching velocity field is available in closed form, which makes it possible to analyze the geometry induced by the terminal flow map independently of optimization and approximation effects. We investigate the terminal assignment regions, namely the preimages of the target atoms under the terminal flow. We show that these regions are open, simply connected and, under an additional assumption, homeomorphic to the unit ball. At the same time, a planar four-point example shows that these cells can differ sharply from Laguerre cells arising in semi-discrete optimal transport: they may be non-convex, have curved boundaries, and exhibit different boundedness and adjacency patterns. These results clarify the geometry intrinsically induced by the exact semi-discrete Flow Matching objective before neural approximation enters the picture.

</details>


### [511] [ProteinJEPA: Latent prediction complements protein language models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07554)
*Dan Ofer,Dafna Shahaf,Michal Linial*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 本文提出 masked-position MLM+JEPA 方法，在蛋白质语言模型的掩码语言建模（MLM）基础上，结合仅在掩码位置进行隐空间预测的 JEPA 目标。在匹配时间预算的条件下，该方法在预训练和继续训练中相比纯 MLM 在多数下游任务上表现更优（如ESM2-35M：10胜3负3平）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索在蛋白质语言模型中，隐空间预测（JEPA）能否在匹配计算时间预算的条件下，补充传统的 token 级掩码语言建模（MLM）目标，以提升下游任务性能。

Method: 提出 masked-position MLM+JEPA：保留 MLM 交叉熵损失，同时仅在掩码位置预测隐空间目标（latent targets）。对比了全位置预测、纯 JEPA、纯 MLM 等多种变体，在 35M-150M 参数的 ESM2 模型上进行实验。

Result: 在 16 个下游任务上，masked-position MLM+JEPA 在预训练模型上以 10胜3负3平（ESM2-35M）和 11胜2负3平（ESM2-150M）优于纯 MLM；从零预训练结果较混合（6胜8负2平）。全位置 MLM+JEPA 与纯 MLM 持平，纯 JEPA 几乎完全失效。

Conclusion: JEPA 与 MLM 结合在匹配时间预算下具有竞争力，能在多数任务上超越纯 MLM，尤其适用于蛋白质序列的继续训练和预训练场景。

Abstract: Protein language models are trained primarily with masked language modeling (MLM), which predicts amino-acid identities at masked positions. We ask whether latent-space prediction can complement these token-level objectives under matched wall-clock budget. Across pretrained and random-init protein sequence encoders at 35--150M parameters, we find that the best protein-JEPA design is not all-position latent prediction but a variant: predicting latent targets only at masked positions, and retaining the MLM cross-entropy. We call this recipe masked-position MLM+JEPA. On a 16-task downstream suite (15 frozen linear probes plus SCOPe-40 zero-shot fold retrieval), under matched wall-clock budgets, this recipe wins more tasks than it loses against MLM-only continuation: 10 wins / 3 losses / 3 ties (hereafter W/L/T) on pretrained ESM2-35M, 11/2/3 on ESM2-150M while results in pretraining from scratch are mixed (6/8/2). Gains are seen for multiple models on 11 of 16 tasks, including stability, \b{eta}β\b{eta}-lactamase fitness, variant effect, intrinsic disorder, remote homology, enzyme classification, and SCOPe-40 fold retrieval. Tasks with more losses than wins are Fluorescence (TAPE) and Peptide-HLA Binding. All-position MLM+JEPA matches MLM-only overall but does not reproduce the masked-position gains. JEPA-only (no MLM) collapses in nearly every experiment. We conclude that JEPA, when combined with MLM, is competitive and can outperform pure MLM in pretraining and continued training, even under matched wall-clock budgets.

</details>


### [512] [Flatness and Gradient Alignment Are Both Necessary: Spectral-Aware Gradient-Aligned Exploration for Multi-Distribution Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07914)
*Aristotelis Ballas,Christos Diou*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 本文提出SAGE方法，通过同时优化损失景观的锐度（曲率）和梯度对齐两项指标，在多重分布学习（如域泛化和多任务学习）中取得了SOTA性能。理论推导表明，这两项指标是互补且不可相互替代的。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法（如SAM系列关注锐度，梯度对齐方法关注对齐）各自只关注损失景观的单一几何性质，而本文证明在多分布学习场景下，这两项指标是结构性不可分割的，忽视其中任一项都会导致泛化性能受限。

Method: SAGE包含两个核心组件：(1) 曲率项：用每层梯度矩阵的极因子（Polar factor）替代SAM的梯度缩放扰动，通过Newton-Schulz迭代计算，使上升步在所有方向上以相似幅度探测；(2) 对齐项：在下降步注入各向同性噪声，噪声幅度与跨分布梯度不一致性（梯度协方差）成正比。理论推导了超额风险分解，包含对齐项（tr(Ḡ⁻¹Σ_g)）和曲率项（受Ḡ控制）。

Result: 在5个域泛化基准（DomainBed）和2个多任务学习基准上，SAGE在DomainBed上取得了新的SOTA，并且作为通用改进适用于基线的多任务求解器，与现有SOTA方法竞争甚至超越。

Conclusion: 多分布学习中必须同时考虑锐度和梯度对齐两个几何性质，SAGE通过同时优化这两项实现了更好的泛化性能。

Abstract: Sharpness-aware and gradient-alignment methods have been shown to improve generalization, however each family of methods targets a single geometric property of the loss landscape, while ignoring the other. In this paper, we show that this omission is structurally unavoidable and that both flatness and gradient alignment should be considered in multi-distribution learning settings. Specifically, we derive an excess-risk decomposition that yields two additive leading-order terms: (i) an alignment term, controlled by the trace of $\bar{H}^{-1}Σ_g$ and (ii) a curvature term, controlled by $\bar{H}$, where $\bar{H}$ is the average Hessian and $Σ_g$ is the covariance of the gradient across distributions. Notably, $\bar{H}$ appears inverted in one and non-inverted in the other. We further show, via a counterexample, that neither quantity bounds the other in general, so no algorithm targeting only one term can guarantee low excess risk. Motivated by this decomposition, we propose SAGE (Spectral-Aware Gradient-Aligned Exploration) that targets both terms. The curvature component replaces SAM's gradient-scaled perturbation with the polar factor of each layer's gradient matrix, computed via Newton-Schulz iteration, so that the ascent step probes all directions with similar magnitude. On the other hand, the alignment component injects isotropic noise at the descent step, the magnitude of which scales with cross-distribution gradient disagreement. Experiments on five domain-generalization and two multi-task learning benchmarks show that the proposed method establishes a new state-of-the-art on DomainBed and acts as a general-purpose improvement to base MTL solvers, remaining competitive with, or even surpassing, state-of-the-art methods.

</details>


### [513] [Toward Privileged Foundation Models:LUPI for Accelerated and Improved Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07799)
*Xueying Ding,Leman Akoglu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: PIQL 是一种系统性地利用特权信息（PI）来加速表格基础模型（TFMs）训练并提升泛化能力的方法，通过聚合数据集统计信息和数据生成程序编码两种形式的 PI，在理论上和实验上证明了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 训练基础模型计算成本高且收敛速度慢，现有方法未能系统性地利用特权信息来同时加速学习并改善泛化。

Method: 提出了 PIQL 框架，构建两种互补的 PI：① 聚合数据集级统计信息（减轻上下文学习负担）；② 底层数据生成程序的编码（提供超出观测数据的知识）。设计了一种架构，在训练时使用 PI，推理时仅从观测上下文重建 PI，从而实现有效的知识迁移。

Result: 理论分析刻画了 PI 减小种群级近似间隙并加速有限数据下收敛的条件。实验表明 PIQL 能实现更快的收敛、更低的最终损失和更好的泛化，降低了对数据和计算的需求。

Conclusion: PI 引导的预训练是一种有原则且实用的范式，能有效提升基础模型的效率与性能。

Abstract: Training foundation models is computationally intensive and often slow to converge.We introduce PIQL,Privileged Information for Quick and Quality Learning, the first framework to systematically integrate privileged information (PI) to simultaneously accelerate learning and improve generalization in tabular foundation models (TFMs). We construct two complementary forms of PI: (i) aggregate dataset-level statistics that reduce the burden on in-context learning, and (ii) encodings of the underlying data-generating program, providing knowledge beyond observable data. We further design an architecture that effectively transfers the train-time-only PI by learning to reconstruct it from observed context at inference. We provide a theoretical analysis characterizing conditions under which PI reduces the population-level approximation gap and accelerates convergence in finite-data regimes. Empirical evidence shows that PIQL enables TFMs to achieve faster convergence, lower final loss, and better generalization, in effect, reducing data and compute requirements. Our work establishes PI-guided pretraining as a principled and practical paradigm for improving the efficiency and performance of foundation models.

</details>


### [514] [Flexible Routing via Uncertainty Decomposition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07805)
*Charlotte Peale,Siddartha Devic,Parikshit Gopalan,Udi Wieder,Aravind Gollakota*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于不确定性分解的新型模型路由方法，通过将总不确定性分解为可约和不可约两部分，实现弱模型、强模型（oracle）和弃权三种决策的动态切换，且无需重训练即可适应不同损失函数和成本参数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在平衡性能与成本的机器学习系统中，现有模型路由方法通常需要针对不同任务或成本参数重新训练，且未能有效处理本质上歧义（不可约不确定性）的查询，导致不必要的 oracle 调用。

Method: 利用高阶预测器将总不确定性分解为不可约不确定性（数据本身歧义）和可约不确定性（模型知识不足），据此设计路由规则：低不确定性时用弱模型，高可约不确定性时调用 oracle，高不可约不确定性时弃权。通过简单超参数调整即可适配不同损失函数和成本参数。

Result: 在合成数据和真实数据集上的实验表明，该方法在可约与不可约不确定性相关性不高的场景下表现良好，并具有相对于最优任务特定路由器的理论遗憾界保证。

Conclusion: 不确定性感知的路由方法能够更智能地平衡成本与性能，统一了路由和弃权决策，为动态模型选择提供了理论驱动的解决方案。

Abstract: A key strategy for balancing performance and cost in modern machine learning systems is to dynamically route queries to either a low-cost model or a more expensive oracle (such as a large pretrained model or human expert), an approach known as model routing. In this work we present a new uncertainty-aware router that (1) avoids unnecessary oracle calls on inherently ambiguous queries, and (2) adapts dynamically to different loss functions and cost parameters through simple hyperparameter changes, without retraining. Our method, applicable to any classification setting where multiple independent annotations per input are available, is based on decomposing total uncertainty into irreducible and reducible components using higher-order predictors [Ahdritz et al., 2025]. This enables a unified approach to both routing and abstention: predict with the weak model when uncertainty is low, route to the oracle when reducible uncertainty is high, and abstain when irreducible uncertainty is high. Our router comes with strong theoretical guarantees bounding regret relative to optimal task-specific routers. We conduct experiments on both synthetic and real-world datasets that demonstrate the benefits of our approach in suitable regimes -- in particular, whenever reducible and irreducible uncertainty are not too correlated.

</details>


### [515] [RelAgent: LLM Agents as Data Scientists for Relational Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07840)
*Xingyue Huang,Louis Tichelman,Jinwoo Kim,Krzysztof Olejniczak,İsmail İlkan Ceylan*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 提出RelAgent，一个基于LLM的自动化数据科学家框架，用于关系学习。它通过搜索阶段（LLM agent用数据库工具构建SQL特征程序并选择预测模型）和推理阶段（无需额外LLM调用）实现快速、确定性和可解释的预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 关系学习任务需要处理结构化数据，现有方法（GNN、表格模型、LLM）各有优劣，缺乏一个统一、高效且可解释的自动化解决方案。

Method: 两阶段框架：1) 搜索阶段——LLM agent利用数据库、验证和评估工具生成SQL特征程序并选择经典预测模型；2) 推理阶段——执行程序（SQL查询+经典模型），无需LLM参与。

Result: 最终预测器由SQL查询和经典模型组成，实现快速推理、确定性输出和内在可解释性（特征为人类可读的SQL查询）。

Conclusion: 通过将LLM用于自动化特征工程而非直接推理，RelAgent在关系学习任务中实现了效率、可解释性和可扩展性的平衡，可利用标准数据库系统部署。

Abstract: Relational learning is a challenging problem that has motivated a wide range of approaches, including graph-based models (e.g., graph neural networks, graph transformers), tabular methods (e.g., tabular foundation models), and sequence-based approaches (e.g., large language models), each with its own advantages and limitations. We propose RelAgent, an LLM-based autonomous data scientist for relational learning, which operates in two phases. In the search phase, an LLM agent uses database, validation, and evaluation workspace tools to construct SQL feature programs and select a predictive model. In the inference phase, the resulting program is executed without further LLM calls. The final predictor consists of SQL queries and a classical model, enabling fast, deterministic, and intrinsically interpretable predictions: features are human-readable queries, and predictions depend only on the resulting query-defined feature map, enabling scalable deployment using standard database systems.

</details>


### [516] [ADKO: Agentic Decentralized Knowledge Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07863)
*Lucas Nerone Rillo,Zhanhong Jiang,Nastaran Saadati,Aditya Balu,Baskar Ganapathysubramanian,Chinmay Hegde,Soumik Sarkar*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: ADKO 是一个去中心化知识优化框架，让多个智能体通过"知识令牌"（含方向信号、优势分数和LM洞察的压缩摘要）进行协作黑箱优化，无需共享原始数据或模型参数。它统一了高斯过程上置信界、并行贝叶斯优化、去中心化学习和LM引导发现，并提供了双信息损失的正式分析。实验在神经架构搜索和科学发现任务上表现优于强基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决协作黑箱优化中样本效率、隐私保护、异构目标处理和通信效率四大挑战，现有方法通常难以兼顾这些需求。

Method: 每个智能体维护本地GP代理模型，通过知识令牌（包含方向信号、优势分数和可选的LLM洞察）进行通信，实现去中心化协作优化。令牌采用有损压缩，并通过保真度感知剪枝在内存预算下保留高信息令牌。

Result: 累积遗憾可分解为GP误差、LM偏差、LM噪声和压缩损失四个部分，并给出了亚线性遗憾的充要条件。实验在神经架构搜索和科学发现上优于强基线。

Conclusion: ADKO在理论上证明了去中心化黑箱优化中遗憾分解的完整形式，实践上在多个任务上取得更好效果，为LLM辅助的分布式优化提供了新范式。

Abstract: We present Agentic Decentralized Knowledge Optimization (ADKO), a framework for collaborative black-box optimization across autonomous agents that achieves sample efficiency, privacy preservation, heterogeneous-objective handling, and communication efficiency. Each agent maintains a private Gaussian Process (GP) surrogate trained on local data and communicates only through knowledge tokens-compact, lossy summaries containing directional signals, advantage scores, and optional language-model (LM) insights-without sharing raw data or model parameters. ADKO unifies GP-Upper Confidence Bound (GP-UCB), parallel Bayesian optimization, decentralized learning, and LM-guided discovery. We provide the first formal analysis of dual information loss: token compression, quantified via mutual-information-based fidelity, and LM approximation error, decomposed into bias and stochastic noise. Our main result shows cumulative regret decomposes into GP error, LM bias, LM noise, and compression loss, with necessary and sufficient conditions for sublinear regret. We also propose fidelity-aware token pruning to preserve high-information tokens under memory budget. Experiments on neural architecture search and scientific discovery validate the theory and show consistent improvements over strong baselines.

</details>


### [517] [When Diffusion Model Can Ignore Dimension: An Entropy-Based Theory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07969)
*Ahmad Aghapour,Erhan Bayraktar*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了扩散模型采样收敛性的信息论新视角，证明对于高斯混合目标，离散化误差由潜在混合分量的香农熵控制而非环境维度，因此采样步数复杂度与潜在熵呈线性关系，与数据二阶矩仅呈对数关系，该结果也扩展到离散目标分布。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有扩散模型收敛理论无法解释其在高维数据（如图像）上仅用少量反向步数就能高效采样的现象——许多先验KL保证将离散化误差与环境维度挂钩，缺乏对内在结构如何影响复杂度的理解。

Method: 采用信息论视角分析扩散采样器的收敛性。针对高斯混合目标，证明离散化误差由潜在混合分量的香农熵控制，推导出步数复杂度与潜在熵线性相关，与数据二阶矩对数相关。分析还扩展到离散目标分布。

Result: 证明了离散化误差的控制因素是潜在表达的香农熵而非环境维度；对于高斯混合目标和离散目标分布均成立；步数复杂度与潜在熵线性、与二阶矩对数关系。

Conclusion: 扩散采样在数据分布具有紧凑潜在表示的高维空间中能保持高效，这解释了自然图像等场景下扩散模型的实际成功。

Abstract: Diffusion models perform remarkably well on high-dimensional data such as images, often using only a modest number of reverse-time steps. Despite this practical success, existing convergence theory does not fully explain why such samplers remain efficient in high dimensions. Many prior KL guarantees bound the discretization error in terms of the ambient dimension, while other improved results replace this dependence using intrinsic-dimensional or geometric structure assumptions. In this work, we develop an alternative information-theoretic perspective on diffusion sampler convergence. We prove that, for Gaussian mixture targets, the discretization error is controlled by the Shannon entropy of the latent mixture component rather than by the ambient dimension. Consequently, the leading step complexity scales linearly with latent entropy and depends only logarithmically on the second moment of the data. Our analysis also extends to discrete target distributions, where the relevant complexity is the entropy of the target rather than the dimension of the embedding space. These results suggest that diffusion sampling can remain efficient in high-dimensional spaces when the data distribution admits a compact latent representation, as is widely believed to be the case for natural images.

</details>


### [518] [Muon with Nesterov Momentum: Heavy-Tailed Noise and (Randomized) Inexact Polar Decomposition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06884)
*Sayantan Choudhury,Xiaoran Cheng,Martin Takáč,Sen Na,Mladen Kolar*

Main category: math.OC

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 本文为Muon优化器（使用Nesterov动量、非精确极分解）在非凸矩阵优化和重尾噪声下建立了收敛理论，给出了最优迭代和样本复杂度，并提出了兼容理论的随机低秩极分解方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有优化器将矩阵参数向量化处理，忽略了神经网络隐层权重的内在几何结构。Muon通过沿动量矩阵的极因子更新来弥补这一缺陷，但其理论理解滞后于实践，尤其是实际实现中使用了Nesterov动量、近似极分解以及在重尾噪声下运行，缺乏严格的理论保证。

Method: 1) 建立非精确极分解的统一理论框架（涵盖Newton-Schulz等迭代近似），量化误差在优化动态中的传播；2) 分析Muon+Nesterov动量+非精确极分解在重尾噪声下的收敛性；3) 提出随机低秩极分解方法，在保持理论兼容性的同时大幅提升计算效率。

Result: 建立了$O(\varepsilon^{\frac{-(3α-2)}{(α-1)}})$的最优迭代和样本复杂度（α∈(1,2]为重尾指数）；在σ₁=0的非精确极分解下给出了无需预知α的保证；随机低秩分解在效率上显著优于全空间方法。

Conclusion: 填补了Muon优化器在实践（Nesterov动量、非精确极分解、重尾噪声）与理论之间的鸿沟，给出了严格的收敛保证，并提供了实际可行的低秩变体。

Abstract: Most first-order optimizers treat matrix-valued parameters as vectors, ignoring the intrinsic geometry of hidden-layer weights in neural networks. Muon addresses this mismatch by updating along the polar factor of a momentum matrix, but its theoretical understanding has lagged behind practice. In particular, practical implementations incorporate Nesterov momentum, compute the polar factor only approximately, and operate with stochastic gradients that may be heavy-tailed. We close this gap by developing a convergence theory for Muon with Nesterov momentum and inexact polar decomposition in non-convex matrix optimization under heavy-tailed noise. Our analysis builds on a unified framework for inexact polar decomposition that captures practical iterative approximations such as Newton-Schulz and quantifies how their errors propagate through the optimization dynamics. Under this framework, we establish an optimal iteration and sample complexity of $O \left(\varepsilon^{\frac{-(3α-2)}{(α-1)}} \right)$ for finding an $\varepsilon$-stationary point, where $α\in(1,2]$ denotes the heavy-tail index. For the inexact-polar setting with $σ_1=0$, we also provide guarantees that do not require prior knowledge of $α$. We analyze a randomized low-rank polar decomposition that is substantially more efficient than full-space methods while remaining compatible with our theory. Numerical experiments further demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed inexact and randomized variants.

</details>


### [519] [Every Feedforward Neural Network Definable in an o-Minimal Structure Has Finite Sample Complexity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07097)
*Anastasis Kratsios,Gregory Cousins,Haitz Sáez de Ocáriz Borde,Bum Jun Kim,Simone Brugiapaglia*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 该论文证明了一类宽泛的前馈神经网络（包括MLP、CNN、GNN、Transformer等）在PAC学习框架下具有有限样本复杂度，表明分布无关的可学习性是"驯顺"前馈计算的普遍性质，而非特定架构的专属特性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 挑战和澄清关于神经网络PAC可学习性的认知——特别是此前人们认为只有特定激活函数或架构才具备有限样本复杂度，而本文证明这是前馈神经网络在o-minimal结构下的普遍性质。

Method: 利用o-minimal理论（一种模型论工具）来定义和描述前馈网络的计算过程，证明只要每一层在o-minimal结构中可定义，整个固定架构的前馈网络在agnostic PAC设置下（即使参数无界）都具有有限样本复杂度。

Result: 标准MLP、CNN、GNN和定长Transformer等现代非循环架构均满足PAC可学习性条件，覆盖线性投影、残差连接、注意力机制、池化层、归一化层和位置编码等常见操作。

Conclusion: 有限样本PAC可学习性不应被视为区分不同架构的指标，而应成为基线性质；架构比较应转向归纳偏置、对称性与几何先验、可扩展性和优化行为等更本质的维度。

Abstract: We show that, in a precise sense, a broad class of feedforward neural networks learn (have finite sample complexity) in the PAC model: every fixed finite feedforward architecture whose layers are definable in an o-minimal structure has finite sample complexity in the agnostic PAC setting, even with unbounded parameters. This covers standard fixed-size MLPs, CNNs, GNNs, and transformers with fixed sequence length, together with the operations and layers typically used in such architectures, including linear projections, residual connections, attention mechanisms, pooling layers, normalization layers, and admissible positional encodings. Hence, distribution-free learnability for modern non-recurrent architectures is not an exceptional property of particular activations or architecture-specific VC arguments, but a consequence of tame feedforward computation. Our results reposition finite-sample PAC learnability as a baseline rather than a differentiator: they shift the focus of architectural comparison toward inductive biases, symmetries and geometric priors, scalability, and optimization behaviour.

</details>


### [520] [Spectrum-Adaptive Generalization Bounds for Trained Deep Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07297)
*Mana Sakai,Masaaki Imaizumi*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种频谱自适应的后验泛化界，用于多层Transformer模型。该界利用层间谱范数控制，通过Schatten量（查询-键、值和前馈权重矩阵）表达，且Schatten指数可在训练后针对不同矩阵类型和层自适应选择，从而在频谱复杂度与维度/深度因子之间实现自适应权衡。实验表明，该界诱导的复杂度代理项比基于范数的代理项在深度和隐藏维度上增长更慢。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于范数的Transformer泛化界要么对隐藏维度有显式多项式依赖，要么在深度上存在指数级依赖，且通常预先固定范数约束，无法自适应学习到的权重矩阵谱结构。作者希望提出一种能自适应利用训练后权重频谱特性的泛化界，以更好地解释Transformer的泛化能力。

Method: 推导了多层Transformer在层间谱范数控制下的后验泛化界，该界由查询-键、值和前馈权重矩阵的层间Schatten量（如Schatten p-范数）表达。关键创新在于Schatten指数p无需预先固定，可在训练后根据每层每种矩阵的实际奇异值分布自适应选择，从而在频谱复杂度与维度/深度依赖因子之间取得最优平衡。并在BERT上进行了代理复杂度项的实证比较。

Result: 理论上获得了自适应的后验泛化界，消除了对隐藏维度的显式依赖且缓解了深度指数依赖。实证上，BERT适配的代理复杂度项表明，该界诱导的复杂度代理在深度和隐藏维度上的增长比传统范数代理更缓慢。

Conclusion: 本文从复杂度理论角度揭示了训练后Transformer的频谱结构如何反映在泛化分析中，为理解Transformer的泛化提供了新的理论视角。

Abstract: Understanding why trained Transformers generalize well is a fundamental problem in modern machine learning theory, and complexity-based generalization bounds provide a principled way to study this question. While existing norm-based bounds for Transformers remove the explicit polynomial dependence on the hidden dimension, they typically impose fixed norm constraints specified a priori and can exhibit unfavorable exponential dependence on depth. In this paper, we derive spectrum-adaptive post hoc generalization bounds for multi-layer Transformers. Under layerwise spectral norm control, the bounds are expressed in terms of layerwise Schatten quantities of the query-key, value, and feedforward weight matrices. Since the Schatten indices need not be fixed a priori and can instead be selected after training, separately for each matrix type and layer, the bounds adaptively trade off spectral complexity against the dimension- and depth-dependent factors according to the learned singular-value profiles. Empirical comparisons of BERT-adapted proxies for the leading complexity factors suggest that the proxies induced by our bounds grow more slowly with depth and hidden dimension than the corresponding norm-based proxies. Overall, our results provide a complexity-based perspective on how the spectral structure of trained Transformers is reflected in generalization analyses.

</details>


### [521] [Asymptotically Log-Optimal Bayes-Assisted Confidence Sequences for Bounded Means](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07964)
*Valentin Kilian,Stefano Cortinovis,François Caron*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 提出一种贝叶斯辅助的置信序列构建框架，利用贝叶斯工作预测模型自适应选择鞅更新，在保持有效性的同时提升效率，并在LLM评估等任务中展现优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有置信序列方法依赖于鞅更新的选择，许多构造未能利用关于数据生成分布或均值的事先信息，导致实际效率受限。

Method: 提出贝叶斯辅助框架：对每个候选均值和时间点，使用预测分布从有效的一步鞅因子中选择最大化预测期望对数增长的更新；即使先验或工作模型设定错误，仍保持有效性。若预测分布Wasserstein一致，则过程渐近对数最优。

Result: 在合成数据、LLM评估的顺序最优臂识别和预测驱动推理实验中，信息性先验显著减少置信序列宽度和采样成本，同时保持任意时点有效覆盖。

Conclusion: 该框架将贝叶斯思想融入置信序列构造，在保持严格有效性的前提下提升了效率，为实际应用提供了更实用的不确定性量化工具。

Abstract: Confidence sequences based on test martingales provide time-uniform uncertainty quantification for the mean of bounded IID observations without parametric distributional assumptions. Their practical efficiency, however, depends strongly on the choice of martingale updates, and many existing constructions do not exploit prior information about plausible data-generating distributions or mean values. We propose a Bayes-assisted framework that uses a Bayesian working predictive model to adaptively construct confidence sequences.For each candidate mean and time point, the predictive distribution selects, among valid one-step martingale factors, the update maximising predictive expected log-growth; validity is therefore preserved even when the prior or working model is misspecified. We prove that if the predictive distribution is Wasserstein-consistent, the resulting procedure is asymptotically log-optimal, matching the per-sample log-growth of an oracle procedure with access to the true distribution. We instantiate the framework using robust predictives based on Dirichlet-process mixtures and Bayesian exponentially tilted empirical likelihood. Experiments on synthetic data, sequential best-arm identification for LLM evaluation, and prediction-powered inference show that informative priors can substantially reduce confidence-sequence width and sampling effort while retaining anytime-valid coverage.

</details>


### [522] [On the Divergence of Differential Temporal Difference Learning without Local Clocks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06874)
*David Antrobius,Shangtong Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 70.0

TL;DR: 本文发现，在折扣强化学习中，全局时钟（时间步）和局部时钟（状态访问次数）的学习率具有等价性；但在平均奖励强化学习中，这种等价性被打破——差分时序差分学习在局部时钟下收敛，但在全局时钟下可能发散，从而解决了一个悬而未决的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 作者希望探究在强化学习中，全局时钟和局部时钟两种学习率设定之间的等价关系是否在不同类型的目标函数（折扣 vs. 平均奖励）下依然成立，并解决一个开放性问题。

Method: 通过构建一个反例（counterexample），对比分析差分时序差分学习在全局时钟和局部时钟两种学习率下的收敛性。

Result: 揭示了在平均奖励强化学习中，差分时序差分学习在局部时钟下收敛，但在全局时钟下可能发散，二者不等价。

Conclusion: 验证了折扣RL中两种时钟的等价性成立，但在平均奖励RL中该等价性不成立，为学习率设计提供了重要理论指导。

Abstract: Learning rate is a critical component of reinforcement learning (RL). This work uses global and local clocks to distinguish two types of learning rates. The former is of the standard form $α_t$ that depends only on the time step $t$ (i.e., a global clock). The latter is of the form $α_{ν(S_t, t)}$, where $ν(s, t)$ counts the number of visits to state $s$ until time $t$ (i.e., a local clock). In discounted RL, an RL algorithm that is convergent with a local clock is always also convergent with a global clock, and vice versa. We are not aware of any counterexample. The key contribution of this work is to show that this nice correspondence breaks down in average-reward RL. Specifically, we construct a counterexample showing that although differential temporal difference learning is convergent with a local clock, it can diverge with a global clock. This counterexample closes the open problem in Wan et al. [2021], Blaser et al. [2026].

</details>


### [523] [Bias and Uncertainty in LLM-as-a-Judge Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06939)
*James Fiedler*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 70.0

TL;DR: 本文研究了LLM-as-a-Judge评估中的偏差问题，指出共享校准的偏差校正估计器可能在模型比较中引入严重偏差，甚至导致符号反转。提出了J和ΔJ作为诊断指标，用于判断校正估计的可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM-as-a-Judge评估中，原始评判输出存在系统性偏差，现有偏差校正方法依赖于评判质量和校准稳定性，但共享校准的估计器可能引入严重偏差，需要系统研究这些失效模式并提供诊断工具。

Method: 通过理论分析、模拟实验（基于评判质量J和跨模型校准不稳定性ΔJ）以及MMLU-Pro真实数据案例研究，分析共享校准下偏差校正估计的失效模式。

Result: 共享校准的偏差校正估计在模型比较中可能产生方向错误的比较结果，且伴随高置信度；J和ΔJ可作为诊断指标预测估计可靠性。

Conclusion: 提出了J和ΔJ作为诊断工具，并给出了LaaJ评估的报告指南。

Abstract: LLM-as-a-Judge evaluation has become a standard tool for assessing base model performance. However, characterizing performance via the naive estimator, i.e., raw judge outputs, is systematically biased. Recent work has proposed estimators to correct this bias, but their reliability depends critically on judge quality and, for model comparisons, on calibration stability. Sharing calibration across compared models is practically attractive but can introduce severe bias, including cases where the comparison estimate points in the wrong direction with high apparent confidence. We study these failure modes through analytical results, simulations over judge quality ($J$) and cross-model calibration instability ($ΔJ$), and a real-data MMLU-Pro case study with sign reversal. We propose $J$ and $ΔJ$ as diagnostics for when corrected estimates, especially shared-calibration comparisons, are likely unreliable, and provide reporting guidance for LaaJ evaluation.

</details>


### [524] [ProtoSSL: Interpretable Prototype Learning from Unlabeled Time-Series Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06943)
*Steven Song,Sahil Sethi,Brett Beaulieu-Jones,Robert L. Grossman*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 70.0

TL;DR: ProtoSSL提出了一种从无标签时间序列数据中学习可解释的原型（prototypes）的框架，通过自监督学习先发现通用原型，再高效地将这些原型分配到下游任务，在低数据场景下显著优于有监督原型方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于投影的原型网络依赖标签监督，将原型绑定到特定任务，需要大量标注数据；而在时间序列领域，可解释性和预测性能同样重要，因此需要一种能从无标签数据中学习通用可解释原型的方法。

Method: 提出ProtoSSL，核心思想是将"动机发现"与"标签对齐"解耦：第一阶段通过自监督目标（直接作用于原型激活）从无标签数据中学习可复用的原型库；第二阶段通过高效的分配过程将这些原型对齐到下游任务。

Result: 在6个心电图数据集上，ProtoSSL在仅256个标注样本的低数据场景下优于有监督原型基线；通过微调，在全量数据下也超越有监督基线。人类评估中，其原型和解释更受青睐。框架还扩展到音频分类任务。

Conclusion: ProtoSSL实现了从无标签数据中学习通用、可泛化的投影式原型，并在未知下游标签空间时预先学习，随后高效地将可解释的原型分配到新的时间序列任务中，显著提升了标签效率和可解释性。

Abstract: In time-series domains where both predictive performance and interpretability are essential, deep neural networks achieve strong results but provide limited insight into how their predictions are made. Projection-based prototype networks address this limitation by grounding predictions in similarity to representative training examples, enabling case-based explanations and global prototype inspection. However, existing approaches rely on label supervision, tying prototypes to a specific task and requiring large labeled datasets. We introduce ProtoSSL, a novel framework for learning interpretable, projection-based prototypes from unlabeled time-series data and adapting them to downstream tasks. Our key idea is to separate motif discovery from label alignment. ProtoSSL first learns a reusable prototype bank using a self-supervised objective applied directly to prototype activations, and then aligns these prototypes to downstream tasks through an efficient assignment procedure. Across six electrocardiography (ECG) datasets, ProtoSSL improves label efficiency, outperforming supervised prototype baselines in low-data regimes with as few as 256 labeled examples; with fine-tuning, ProtoSSL outperforms supervised prototype baselines at full dataset scale. In a human evaluation study, ProtoSSL produces prototypes and prototype-based explanations that are judged more favorably than those learned with direct label supervision. We further show that the framework extends to audio classification. Thus, ProtoSSL enables both learning generalizable prototypes from unlabeled data before the downstream label space is known, and subsequent assignment of interpretable, projection-grounded prototypes to new time-series tasks.

</details>


### [525] [Predictive but Not Plannable: RC-aux for Latent World Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07278)
*Wenyuan Li,Guang Li,Keisuke Maeda,Takahiro Ogawa,Miki Haseyama*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 70.0

TL;DR: 本文提出RC-aux辅助目标，通过多时间跨度开环预测和预算约束的可达性监督，修正潜在世界模型中潜在空间与规划目标之间的时空不匹配问题，在不改变模型主干的情况下提升长程规划效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 潜在世界模型常以短程预测为目标训练，但部署时需要用于长程规划，导致潜在空间中欧氏距离无法反映真实的动作预算可达性，存在时空错配问题。

Method: 提出RC-aux辅助目标：1) 沿时间轴进行多跨度开环预测，突破单步一致性限制；2) 沿空间轴引入预算条件化的可达性监督与时序难负样本，使潜在空间区分不同预算下的可达状态。同时设计可达性感知规划器优化轨迹选择。

Result: 在LeWorldModel上实例化，在目标条件像素控制任务和LIBERO-Goal扩展上评估，RC-aux以较小的额外计算开销提升了规划性能。

Conclusion: 潜在世界模型的规划能力不仅依赖于预测精度，更取决于学习到的表征是否编码了下游搜索所需的时序和几何结构。

Abstract: A latent world model may achieve accurate short-horizon prediction while still inducing a latent space that is poorly aligned with planning. A key issue is spatiotemporal mismatch: these models are often trained with local predictive supervision, but deployed for long-horizon goal-directed search in latent spaces where Euclidean distance may not reflect what is reachable within a finite action budget. We present the Reachability-Correction auxiliary objective (RC-aux), a lightweight correction for this mismatch in reconstruction-free latent world models. RC-aux keeps the world-model backbone unchanged and adds planning-aligned supervision along two axes. Along the time axis, multi-horizon open-loop prediction trains the model beyond one-step consistency. Along the space axis, budget-conditioned reachability supervision, together with temporal hard negatives, encourages the latent space to distinguish states that are eventually reachable from those reachable within the current planning horizon. At test time, the learned reachability signal can also be used by a reachability-aware planner to favor trajectories that are both goal-directed and attainable under the available budget. We instantiate RC-aux on LeWorldModel and evaluate it under both continuation-training and matched-from-scratch settings. Across goal-conditioned pixel-control tasks and a LIBERO-Goal extension, RC-aux improves LeWM-style planning with modest additional cost. These results suggest that planning with latent world models depends not only on predictive accuracy, but also on whether the learned representation encodes the temporal and geometric structure required by downstream search. The code is available at https://github.com/Guang000/RC-aux.

</details>


### [526] [Learning Large-Scale Modular Addition with an Auxiliary Modulus](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07648)
*Hanato Kikuchi,Ryosuke Masuya,Kazuhiko Kawamoto,Hiroshi Kera*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 70.0

TL;DR: 本文针对模加法学习中稀疏方法带来的协变量偏移问题，提出了一种无协变量偏移的训练方法——引入辅助模数$Kq$，在保持训练与测试分布一致的同时降低问题难度，实验证明该方法在长序列、大模数、小样本场景下显著优于稀疏方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有稀疏方法通过增加训练序列中的零来降低模加法学习难度，但导致了训练与测试输入分布不一致的协变量偏移问题，影响模型泛化性能。

Method: 提出在训练阶段引入辅助模数$Kq$替代原始模数$q$，减少环绕（wrap-around）频率从而降低问题难度，同时保持训练与测试输入分布一致，消除协变量偏移。

Result: 在$N=64, q=974269$条件下，仅用10万样本即达到97.0%的τ-准确率（τ=0.05），而稀疏方法同样数据量仅9.5%，即使扩展到100万样本也仅为93.9%。

Conclusion: 提出的无协变量偏移方法在模加法学习任务上实现了更强的可扩展性和样本效率，尤其在大模数、长序列和小数据场景下优势明显。

Abstract: Learning parity functions, more general modular addition, is a challenging machine learning task due to its input sensitivity. A recent study substantially scaled modular addition learning in both the number of summands and the modulus. Its key idea is to increase zeros in training sequences, reducing the effective number of summands and thus controlling training difficulty; however, this induces covariate shift between training and test input distributions. This study theoretically and empirically analyzes this side effect and proposes a covariate-shift-free method for modular addition. Specifically, we introduce an auxiliary modulus $Kq$ during training, which reduces wrap-around frequency and problem difficulty while preserving the same input distribution across training and testing. Experiments show strong scalability and sample efficiency: even for large input length $N$, large modulus $q$, and small datasets -- where the sparse method fails to learn -- our method achieves equal or better match accuracy and relaxed $τ$-accuracy. For example, at $N=64$ and $q=974269$, our method trained on 100K samples achieves $97.0\%$ $τ$-accuracy at $τ=0.05$, while the sparse method achieves only $9.5\%$ with the same data size and $93.9\%$ even when extended to 1M samples.

</details>


### [527] [Training-Induced Escape from Token Clustering in a Mean-Field Formulation of Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07772)
*Noboru Isobe,Daisuke Inoue,Masaaki Imaizumi*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 70.0

TL;DR: 本文在带噪声的均场Transformer框架下，研究了仅训练参数线性FFN层（带L2正则化）如何影响注意力驱动的聚类动力学，发现训练会诱导一个阶段转变——初始层遵循注意力聚类，但靠近最后几层时token分布会离开聚类状态。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有均场理论分析Transformer动力学时，通常将模型参数视为给定不变的，忽略了训练过程对注意力驱动聚类行为的重塑作用。本文旨在将训练过程纳入均场理论框架，理解训练如何改变token表示的聚类动力学。

Method: 在带噪声的均场Transformer框架中，仅训练参数线性的FFN层（即FFN为参数线性函数），并使用L2正则化。通过熵正则化的交互能量来刻画注意力的聚类偏好，从数学上分析训练诱导的动力学阶段转变。

Result: 发现训练会诱导一个阶段转变：在初始层，token分布遵循注意力驱动的聚类行为；但在靠近最后几层时，token分布会离开聚类状态。这一转变可通过熵正则化交互能量的数学分析来刻画。

Conclusion: 本文指向了一种"训练感知"的Transformer动力学均场理论，将训练过程与推理动力学统一处理，为理解Transformer内部表示的形成机制提供了新的理论视角。

Abstract: Transformers perform inference by iteratively transforming token representations across layers. This layerwise computation has been studied empirically, and recent mean-field theories of Transformer dynamics explain how attention can drive token distributions toward clustering. However, existing mean-field analyses largely treat model parameters as prescribed, leaving open how training reshapes this clustering picture. We study this question in a noisy mean-field Transformer in which only a parameter-linear FFN is trained under $L^2$ regularization. We find and analyze a training-induced phase in the dynamics: after initially following attention-driven clustering, the token distribution can leave the clustered regime near the final layers. Our mathematical analysis is based on an entropy-regularized interaction energy that captures the clustering bias of attention. More broadly, our results point toward a training-aware mean-field theory of Transformer dynamics, in which training and inference dynamics are treated together.

</details>


### [528] [Interpreting Reinforcement Learning Agents with Susceptibilities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08007)
*Chris Elliott,Einar Urdshals,David Quarel,Daniel Murfet*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 70.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种将"敏感度"（susceptibilities）方法从神经网络可解释性扩展到深度强化学习领域的框架，通过在简单网格世界模型中研究后验期望值对损失扰动的响应，揭示了参数空间中模型发展的内部特征，并通过激活引导验证了结果，最后讨论了向RLHF后训练的扩展。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法难以检测深度强化学习中模型参数空间的内部发展特征，仅通过学习策略的演化无法全面理解模型行为。

Method: 将神经网络可解释性中的"敏感度"方法扩展到深度强化学习的遗憾（regret）设定中，在网格世界模型上进行实验，并通过激活引导（activation-steering）进行验证。

Result: 敏感度方法能够揭示模型在参数空间中的内部发展阶段特征，这些特征是单纯研究学习策略无法检测到的。

Conclusion: 敏感度是一种有效的深度强化学习可解释性工具，并且该框架可以扩展到RLHF后训练阶段。

Abstract: Susceptibilities are a technique for neural network interpretability that studies the response of posterior expectation values of observables to perturbations of the loss. We generalize this construction to the setting of the regret in deep reinforcement learning and investigate the utility of susceptibilities in a simple gridworld model that nevertheless exhibits non-trivial stagewise development. We argue that susceptibilities reveal internal features of the development of the model in parameter space that one cannot detect purely by studying the development of the learned policy. We validate these results with activation-steering, and discuss the framework's extension to RLHF post-training.

</details>


### [529] [Semantic State Abstraction Interfaces for LLM-Augmented Portfolio Decisions: Multi-Axis News Decomposition and RL Diagnostics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06730)
*Likhita Yerra,Remi Uttejitha Allam*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 本文提出语义状态抽象接口（SSAI），一种将稀疏非结构化文本映射为K个可审计命名坐标的方法模板，旨在在序列决策系统中分离表征假设与优化方差。在美股数据上的实验表明，SSAI的因子组合收益虽高但统计上脆弱，无法超越简单基线，作者将其定位为可解释性-性能诊断工具而非性能更强的方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法将稀疏文本直接接入决策系统时，难以区分性能提升是来自更好的表征学习还是优化策略的随机性，缺少一个可审计、可复用的标准化接口来分离这两种效应。

Method: 提出SSAI框架，将文本映射为K个语义坐标（本文K=4：情感、风险、置信度、波动率预测）。在美股数据上分别使用因子组合、岭回归预测器和RL智能体（DP-PPO, SAC）进行评估，并设计了覆盖分层控制、交易成本敏感性和统计显著性检验的评估协议。

Result: 四因子组合累计收益307.2%（夏普1.067），看似优于买入持有（243.6%），但无法通过覆盖分层控制检验，在≥0.2%交易成本下反转，且统计上弱于仅情感基线。PC1合成因子和FinBERT基线是更强的排序信号。

Conclusion: SSAI更适合作为可解释性-性能诊断工具和可复用协议，而非直接竞争更密集表征方案。其核心价值在于帮助研究者分离表征假设与优化方差的影响。

Abstract: We introduce Semantic State Abstraction Interfaces (SSAI): a methodological template for mapping sparse unstructured text into $K$ auditable, named coordinates with neutral defaults on no-news days, designed to separate representation hypotheses from optimisation variance in sequential decision systems. Our contribution is the framework and its evaluation protocol, not a claim that SSAI outperforms denser alternatives.
  We instantiate SSAI with $K=4$ axes (sentiment, risk, confidence, volatility forecast) on a US-equity panel (30 NASDAQ-100 names, FNSPID news, 2019--2023 test), and evaluate it across direct factor portfolios, supervised ridge forecasters, and RL agents (DP-PPO, SAC) that share the same fixed $φ$. The four-factor factor portfolio reaches 307.2% cumulative return and Sharpe 1.067, but apparent gains versus buy-and-hold (243.6%) fail coverage-stratified controls, reverse at $\geq 0.2$% costs, and are statistically fragile versus a sentiment-only baseline; a PC1 composite and a FinBERT portfolio baseline are stronger ranking signals in this setting. Ridge and RL blocks diagnose representation versus optimiser effects. We position SSAI as an interpretability-performance diagnostic and reusable protocol for sparse-text decision systems.

</details>


### [530] [Gated QKAN-FWP: Scalable Quantum-inspired Sequence Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06734)
*Kuo-Chung Peng,Samuel Yen-Chi Chen,Jiun-Cheng Jiang,Chen-Yu Liu,En-Jui Kuo,Yun-Yuan Wang,Prayag Tiwari,Andrea Ceschini,Chi-Sheng Chen,Yu-Chao Hsu,Chun-Hua Lin,Tai-Yue Li,Antonello Rosato,Massimo Panella,Simon See,Saif Al-Kuwari,Kuan-Cheng Chen,Nan-Yow Chen,Hsi-Sheng Goan*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种结合快速权重编程器(FWP)与量子启发式KAN网络的框架(gated QKAN-FWP)，使用单量子位数据重上传电路作为可学习非线性激活，并引入标量门控机制稳定参数更新。在时间序列、强化学习等任务上表现优异，尤其是在太阳周期预测任务中以12.5k参数超越13倍参数量的经典模型，并在真实量子处理器上验证了NISQ兼容性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有量子FWP实现依赖多量子位架构，在NISQ设备上难以扩展且经典模拟成本高。因此，作者希望设计一种既能在NISQ设备上高效运行、又能在经典模拟中保持实用性的量子启发式序列建模框架。

Method: 1) 使用单量子位数据重上传电路(DARUAN)作为可学习非线性激活函数，替代多量子位VQC；2) 提出标量门控快速权重更新规则，稳定参数演化过程，并给出理论分析（自适应记忆核、几何有界性、可并行梯度路径）；3) 将FWP与量子启发式KAN网络结合。

Result: 在528个月输入窗口、132个月预测跨度的太阳周期预测任务中，12.5k参数模型在缩放MSE、峰值幅度误差、峰值时序误差上均优于LSTM(25.9k-89.1k)、WaveNet-LSTM(167k)等基线。在IonQ和IBM量子处理器上部署后，1024次采样下相对MSE仅偏离无噪声模拟器0.1%。

Conclusion: gated QKAN-FWP是一种可扩展、参数高效且NISQ兼容的量子启发式序列建模方法。

Abstract: Fast Weight Programmers (FWPs) encode temporal dependencies through dynamically updated parameters rather than recurrent hidden states. Quantum FWPs (QFWPs) extend this idea with variational quantum circuits (VQCs), but existing implementations rely on multi-qubit architectures that are difficult to scale on noisy intermediate-scale quantum (NISQ) devices and expensive to simulate classically. We propose gated QKAN-FWP, a fast-weight framework that integrates FWP with Quantum-inspired Kolmogorov-Arnold Network (QKAN) using single-qubit data re-uploading circuits as learnable nonlinear activation, known as DatA Re-Uploading ActivatioN (DARUAN). We further introduce a scalar-gated fast-weight update rule that stabilizes parameter evolution, supported by a theoretical analysis of its adaptive memory kernel, geometric boundedness, and parallelizable gradient paths. We evaluate the framework across time-series benchmarks, MiniGrid reinforcement learning, and highlight real-world solar cycle forecasting as our main practical result. In the long-horizon setting with 528-month input window and 132-month forecast horizon, our 12.5k-parameter model achieves lower scaled Mean Square Error (MSE), peak amplitude error, and peak timing error than a suite of classical recurrent baselines with up to 13x more parameters, including Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) networks (25.9k-89.1k parameters), WaveNet-LSTM (167k), Vanilla recurrent neural network (11.5k), and a Modified Echo State Network (132k). To validate NISQ compatibility, we further deploy the trained fast programmer on IonQ and IBM Quantum processors, recovering forecasting accuracy within 0.1% relative MSE of the noiseless simulator at 1024 shots. These results position gated QKAN-FWP as a scalable, parameter-efficient, and NISQ-compatible approach to quantum-inspired sequence modeling.

</details>


### [531] [Attribution-Based Neuron Utility for Plasticity Restoration in Deep Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06834)
*Patrick Elisii,Lucas Beauchemin,Dawer Jamshed*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 本文提出GXD（梯度乘以与参考值的差），一种基于参考梯度归因的实用度量，用于评估网络中参数重置的功能成本，从而在持续学习中更可靠地恢复模型可塑性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 持续学习中，深度网络不仅面临灾难性遗忘，还会出现可塑性丧失（loss of plasticity），即模型在持续训练下越来越难以更新。现有基于自适应重置的方法使用代理信号（如激活幅度、梯度活动）来指导参数重置，但这些度量可能与其引导的重置干预行动对齐不佳，导致效果不稳定。

Method: 提出GXD（Gradient times Difference from reference），基于参考梯度归因，估计替换一个单元（参数）的一阶函数成本。GXD将自适应重置重新定义为干预成本估计问题，提供与重置功能成本对齐的度量。

Result: 实验表明，GXD在现有重置度量失效的场景下仍能保持可靠性能，使得基于重置的干预更加稳健。

Conclusion: GXD为持续学习系统提供了一种更可靠、更稳健的自适应重置方案，将问题从寻找代理信号重构为直接估计干预成本。

Abstract: Continual learning research attempts to conserve two fundamental capabilities: new knowledge acquisition and the preservation of previously acquired knowledge. While knowledge in this case can be measured through performance over an implicit or explicit task space, model plasticity generally concerns adaptability as data distributions evolve. Though much of the literature has focused on catastrophic forgetting, deep networks can also suffer from loss of plasticity, becoming progressively harder to update under continued training. Recent research has identified multiple mechanisms underlying this phenomenon, including neuron saturation, parameter norm growth, and loss of useful curvature directions. Adaptive reset-based interventions, which selectively reinitialize low-utility network parameters, have emerged as practical solutions to restore trainability. Existing utility measures used to guide resets, such as activation magnitude, contribution utility, or gradient-based activity, rely on proxy signals that can become misaligned with the intervention they are meant to guide. In this paper, we introduce gradient times difference from reference (GXD), a theoretically motivated utility measure based on reference-based gradient attribution that estimates the first-order functional cost of replacing a unit. Our results show that utility measures aligned with the functional cost of the reset can make interventions more reliable in settings where existing reset criteria degrade. GXD reframes adaptive resetting as an intervention cost estimation problem, providing a practical path toward more robust continual learning systems.

</details>


### [532] [On Privacy Leakage in Tabular Diffusion Models: Influential Factors, Attacker Knowledge, and Metrics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06835)
*Masoumeh Shafieinejad,D. B. Emerson,Behnoosh Zamanlooy,Elaheh Bassak,Fatemeh Tavakoli,Sara Kodeiri,Marcelo Lotif,Xi He*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 本文研究了表格扩散模型（TDMs）在合成表格数据时的隐私风险，通过最先进的成员推理攻击（黑盒和白盒设置）量化了训练设置、合成选择和攻击者知识对隐私泄露的影响，并揭示了启发式隐私指标（如距离最近记录）的缺陷。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 表格数据在隐私敏感领域至关重要，合成数据是降低隐私风险的重要手段；表格扩散模型（TDMs）在合成质量上表现领先，但对其隐私风险的理解和量化尚不充分。

Method: 利用最先进的成员推理攻击，分别在黑盒和白盒设置下，系统量化训练配置、合成策略及攻击者知识水平对隐私泄露的影响。

Result: 攻击者无需完全了解训练配置、相同数据分布或大量计算资源即可成功实施攻击；揭示了距离最近记录（DCR）等启发式隐私指标的局限性。

Conclusion: 需对TDM的隐私风险保持警惕，依靠简单启发式指标评估隐私是不充分的，应更系统地衡量隐私泄露。

Abstract: Tabular data plays an important role in many fields and industries, including those with elevated privacy considerations and risks. As such, there is a rising interest in generating high-quality synthetic proxies for real tabular data as a means of reducing privacy risk and proprietary data exposure. With tabular diffusion models (TDMs) demonstrating leading performance in synthesizing such data, understanding and measuring the privacy risks associated with these models is imperative. Leveraging state-of-the-art membership inference attacks for TDMs in both black- and white-box settings, this work quantifies the impact of training setup, synthesis choices, and attacker knowledge on privacy leakage. Moreover, the results demonstrate that adversaries need not have perfect knowledge of the training setup, identical data distributions, or massive compute resources to construct successful attacks. Finally, the pitfalls associated with applying heuristic privacy metrics, such as distance-to-closest record, are revealed.

</details>


### [533] [Towards Differentially Private Reinforcement Learning with General Function Approximation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07049)
*Yi He,Xingyu Zhou*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 本文首次为带差分隐私的在线强化学习提供了通用函数近似下的理论保证，提出了基于批量策略更新和指数机制的算法，实现了与线性情形相当的遗憾界 $\widetilde{O}(K^{3/5})$，并首次建立了依赖于coverability的批量更新在线RL遗憾界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有差分隐私在线RL的理论保证仅限于表格和线性设定，缺乏对通用函数近似（如神经网络）的理论支持。本文旨在填补这一空白，为更广泛的函数近似场景提供隐私保护下的理论保证。

Method: 将批量策略更新方案与指数机制相结合，并引入新的遗憾分析方法。算法在每批次中收集轨迹后，通过指数机制选择策略，从而在保护隐私的同时保证学习效率。

Result: 1) 通用函数近似下，差分隐私在线RL的遗憾界为 $\widetilde{O}(K^{3/5})$，与线性情形最优结果匹配；2) 首次建立依赖于coverability（标准复杂度度量）的批量更新在线RL遗憾界；3) 揭示了近期线性函数近似私有RL结果中的根本性缺陷。

Conclusion: 该工作将差分隐私在线RL的理论边界从表格/线性设定扩展到了通用函数近似，为隐私保护下的更复杂RL系统（如基于LLM的RLHF）提供了理论基础。同时指出现有线性设定结果中的问题，有助于澄清该领域的研究方向。

Abstract: We present the first theoretical guarantees for differentially private online reinforcement learning (RL) with general function approximation, extending beyond prior work restricted to tabular and linear settings. Our approach combines a batched policy update scheme with the exponential mechanism, together with a novel regret analysis. We show that, even under general function approximation, the regret in the model-free setting under differential privacy matches the state of the art for the linear case, scaling as $\widetilde{O}(K^{3/5})$, where $K$ denotes the number of episodes. As an important by-product, we also establish the first regret bound for online RL with batch update that depends on the standard complexity measure of coverability, complementing existing results based on a newly introduced Eluder-Condition class. In addition, we uncover fundamental gaps in recent results for private RL with linear function approximation, thereby clarifying its landscape.

</details>


### [534] [Stabilized neural Hamilton--Jacobi--Bellman solvers: Error analysis and applications in model-based reinforcement learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07116)
*Minseok Kim,Yeongjong Kim,Namkyeong Cho,Yeoneung Kim*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 本文针对基于物理信息的神经求解器在连续时间模型强化学习中的应用，提出了一种混合范式（介于网格法与PINN之间）的误差理论，证明了策略评估步骤的L2稳定性，并在多个基准上验证了理论预测的误差趋势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于物理信息的神经求解器用于连续时间强化学习时，实际实现处于一种既非经典网格法也非连续PDE PINN的混合范式，缺乏严格的误差理论支撑，因此需要建立该范式的理论保证。

Method: 将有限差分视为作用在神经网络上的移位算子，证明了一步策略评估的种群L2稳定性界，分离了残差误差、初始/外部边界不匹配、策略不匹配和模型识别误差，并给出了显式的梯度放大因子。进一步给出了有限样本配准证明和有条件的多步传播结果。

Result: 在LQR（最高64维）、Allen-Cahn控制、钟摆、Hopper和3D四旋翼基准上，与代表性基于模型和无模型RL基线对比，验证了预测的残差、策略不匹配和学习模型误差趋势。

Conclusion: 该混合范式在保持稳定有限差分的策略评估结构的同时，避免了基于网格的值函数未知量，且具有可证明的误差保证，为连续时间模型强化学习提供了理论基础。

Abstract: Physics-informed neural solvers offer a promising route to model-based reinforcement learning in continuous time, where optimal feedback synthesis is governed by Hamilton--Jacobi--Bellman (HJB) equations. Practical implementations often occupy a regime that is neither a classical grid method nor a continuous-PDE PINN: the value function is represented by a neural network, finite-difference HJB policy-evaluation operators are evaluated by network queries at shifted points, and residuals are minimized by random continuous collocation. This regime preserves the stabilized finite-difference policy-evaluation structure while avoiding grid-based value unknowns. We develop an error theory for this hybrid regime. Interpreting finite differences as shift operators acting on neural networks, we prove a population $L^2$ stability estimate for one policy-evaluation step with learned dynamics. The bound separates residual error, initial and exterior-collar mismatch, policy mismatch, and model-identification error, with an explicit gradient amplification factor for learned dynamics, while the underlying linear evaluation stability remains free of hidden inverse-viscosity blow-up. We further give a finite-sample collocation certificate and a conditional multi-step propagation result through greedy policy improvement. Experiments on compact-control LQR upto 64 dimensions, Allen--Cahn control, pendulum, Hopper, and 3D quadrotor benchmarks compare against representative model-based and model-free RL baselines, demonstrating the predicted residual, policy-mismatch, and learned-model error trends.

</details>


### [535] [GAD in the Wild: Benchmarking Graph Anomaly Detection under Realistic Deployment Challenges](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07133)
*Jingjing Zhou,Shiyu Huang,Qing Qing,Zuquan Yuan,Huafei Huang,Ziqi Xu,Mingliang Hou,Xikun Zhang,Renqiang Luo,Ivan Lee*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个多维度图异常检测(GAD)基准，系统评估GAD模型在百万级图、极端异常稀疏性和缺失节点属性三种实际部署挑战下的表现。实验发现：GNN方法难以扩展到百万节点图；检测性能在现实异常比(如0.1%)下急剧下降；基于重建的模型对属性填补策略高度敏感。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有GAD基准局限于小规模、异常比较平衡的图，与实际部署场景存在巨大差距，亟需弥合学术评估与工业应用之间的鸿沟。

Method: 从5个不同图（含2个原生产业级数据集，超370万节点）衍生出受控基准变体，覆盖三种部署相关挑战：大规模、异常极度稀疏、缺失节点属性。系统评估9种代表性GAD模型。

Result: (1) GNN方法因内存需求过高无法扩展到百万节点图；(2) 在0.1%异常比下检测性能急剧下降，常导致零召回率；(3) 重建模型对属性填补策略敏感；实验室表现不足以保障生产环境鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 发布了该基准和实证评估作为诊断测试平台，以促进面向大规模、不完美图数据的鲁棒可扩展GAD系统开发。

Abstract: Graph Anomaly Detection (GAD) is a critical task in graph machine learning with vital applications in financial fraud detection and social platform governance. However, existing GAD benchmarks are often restricted to small-scale, curated graphs with relatively balanced anomaly ratios, leaving a substantial gap between academic evaluation and real-world deployment. To bridge this gap, we present a multi-dimensional benchmark that systematically evaluates GAD models under three deployment-relevant challenges: million-scale graphs, extreme anomaly scarcity, and missing node attributes. We derive a family of controlled benchmark variants from five diverse graphs, including two native industrial-scale datasets with over 3.7 million nodes. Our extensive evaluation of nine representative GAD models reveals three major limitations: (1) most GNN-based methods fail to scale to million-node graphs due to prohibitive memory requirements; (2) detection performance drops sharply under realistic anomaly ratios (e.g., 0.1\%), often resulting in zero recall; and (3) reconstruction-based models are highly sensitive to attribute imputation strategies. Our findings suggest that strong performance in laboratory settings does not guarantee robustness in production environments. We release this benchmark and empirical evaluation as a diagnostic testbed to promote the development of robust and scalable GAD systems for large-scale, imperfect graphs encountered in practice. Code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Benchmark_GAD-E7A3.

</details>


### [536] [PerCaM-Health: Personalized Dynamic Causal Graphs for Healthcare Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07267)
*Elahe Khatibi,Ziyu Wang,Saba A. Farahani,Di Huang,Hung Cao,Ramesh Jain,Amir M. Rahmani*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: PerCaM-Health是一个从纵向健康数据中学习个性化动态因果图的框架，它先学习群体层面的时间因果图，再通过患者个体数据和滚动窗口更新进行个性化适配与演化，支持个体层面的反事实干预推理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有时间因果发现方法在个性化医疗决策中存在鸿沟：群体层面的因果模型稳定但缺乏个性化，而单个患者的因果发现因轨迹短、噪声大、非平稳而不可靠。因此需要一种既能利用群体知识又能捕捉个体动态变化的因果发现方法。

Method: 1) 学习知识引导的群体时间因果图作为先验；2) 通过患者个体时序证据和滚动窗口更新，保守地适配和演化出个性化因果图序列；3) 将因果图与时序结构方程结合，支持反事实查询（如假设性行为干预下的短期结果变化估计）。

Result: 在半合成动态健康基准上，PerCaM-Health在图恢复、动态边追踪和干预方向准确性上均优于群体级、个体级和非个性化时间因果发现基线方法。

Conclusion: 联合建模个性化和时间演化能够产生更可靠的因果结构和干预推理能力，弥合了群体级因果建模与个体级干预推理之间的鸿沟。

Abstract: Personalized healthcare decisions require reasoning about how physiological and behavioral variables influence an individual patient over time. Existing temporal causal discovery methods are poorly matched to this setting: cohort-level models provide stable but non-personalized structures, while per-patient discovery is unreliable because individual trajectories are short, noisy, irregular, and non-stationary. This creates a fundamental gap between population-level causal modeling and the patient-specific, time-varying mechanisms needed for intervention reasoning. We introduce PerCaM-Health, a framework for learning personalized dynamic causal graphs from longitudinal health data. The framework learns a knowledge-guided population temporal graph, then conservatively adapts and evolves it using patient-specific temporal evidence and rolling-window updates, producing interpretable and auditable graph sequences. By coupling these graphs with temporal structural equations, the framework enables patient-level counterfactual queries, such as estimating short-horizon outcome changes under hypothetical behavioral interventions. Experiments on a semi-synthetic dynamic health benchmark show that PerCaM-Health improves graph recovery, dynamic edge tracking, and intervention direction accuracy compared to cohort-level, per-patient, and non-personalized temporal baselines. These results demonstrate that jointly modeling personalization and temporal evolution yields more reliable causal structure and intervention reasoning.

</details>


### [537] [Bifurcation Models: Learning Set-Valued Solution Maps with Weight-Tied Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07277)
*Caleb Jore,Jialin Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于权重共享动力学的歧义建模方法（bifurcation models），允许不同初始条件收敛到不同稳定均衡解，从而避免传统监督学习中人为选择单一标签导致的偏差，并在多个科学问题中验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 许多科学和组合问题存在多个正确答案，传统监督学习强制选择单一目标标签会引入任意、不连续且难以学习的隐藏选择器。作者希望设计一种能自然表示多解集的学习范式。

Method: 提出bifurcation models，一种权重共享的动力学视角：不同初始化可以收敛到不同稳定均衡点，模型表示的是吸引子景观而非单一支路。理论证明具有局部Lipschitz分支的集值映射可由正则均衡动力学表示，且诱导的选择器几乎处处正则。

Result: 在 frustrated Ising 模型上，该方法无需分支标签即可发现多个有效均衡，优于单分支监督学习。Allen-Cahn 实验表明多样性需要显式鼓励，但存在准确率-多样性的权衡。

Conclusion: 权重共享动力学是处理多解问题的一种有前景的范式，能够自然建模解集多样性，但需要在准确性与多样性之间取得平衡。

Abstract: Many scientific and combinatorial problems admit multiple correct solutions, not a single label. Standard supervised learning resolves this ambiguity by choosing one solution as the target, but this hidden selector can be arbitrary, discontinuous, and harder to learn than the underlying solution set. We study bifurcation models, a weight-tied dynamical view in which different initializations can converge to different stable equilibria, so the model represents an attractor landscape rather than one chosen branch. We prove that broad set-valued maps with locally Lipschitz branches can be represented by regular equilibrium dynamics and that the induced selectors are almost everywhere regular, while manual selectors can be arbitrarily irregular. Experiments on frustrated Ising models show that such dynamics can discover multiple valid equilibria without branch labels and outperform single-branch supervision. Allen--Cahn experiments further show that diversity is not automatic: it can be encouraged explicitly, but with an accuracy--diversity tradeoff.

</details>


### [538] [SR$^2$-LoRA: Self-Rectifying Inter-layer Relations in Low-Rank Adaptation for Class-Incremental Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07420)
*Fengqiang Wan,Yipeng Lin,Kan Lv,Yang Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 本文提出SR²-LoRA方法，通过约束层间关系漂移（inter-layer relation drift）来缓解基于PEFT的类增量学习中的灾难性遗忘，利用奇异值对齐实现鲁棒性更强的表示关系约束。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有PEFT方法在类增量学习中仍存在灾难性遗忘问题，作者从层间关系漂移的新视角分析遗忘原因，并理论证明该漂移会缩小旧任务的分类边界。

Method: SR²-LoRA通过构造新旧模型在当前任务样本上的层间关系矩阵，并对其奇异值进行对齐（而非直接逐元素对齐），以约束层间关系漂移。理论证明奇异值对齐对估计扰动更鲁棒。

Result: 在标准CIL基准上，SR²-LoRA有效缓解灾难性遗忘，且任务数越多优势越明显。

Conclusion: 层间关系漂移是灾难性遗忘的关键因素，通过奇异值对齐约束该漂移是一种简单有效的缓解方案。

Abstract: Pre-trained models with parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) have demonstrated promising potential for class-incremental learning (CIL), yet catastrophic forgetting still persists when adapting models to new tasks. In this paper, we present a novel perspective on catastrophic forgetting through the analysis of inter-layer relation drift, i.e., the progressive disruption of relationships among layer-wise representations during the learning of new tasks. We theoretically show that the increase of such drift reduces the classification margins of previously learned tasks, thereby degrading overall model performance. To address this issue, we propose \underline{S}elf-\underline{R}ectifying inter-layer \underline{R}elation Low-Rank Adaptation~(SR$^2$-LoRA), a simple yet effective method that mitigates catastrophic forgetting by constraining inter-layer relation drift. Specifically, SR$^2$-LoRA constructs the relation matrices induced by the previous and current models on current-task samples, and aligns the corresponding singular values. We further theoretically show that this alignment exhibits greater robustness to estimation perturbations than direct entry-wise alignment. Extensive experiments on standard CIL benchmarks demonstrate that SR$^2$-LoRA effectively mitigates catastrophic forgetting, with its advantages becoming more pronounced as the number of tasks increases. Code is available in the \href{https://github.com/FqWan24/SR-2-LoRA}{repository}.

</details>


### [539] [When Losses Align: Gradient-Based Composite Loss Weighting for Efficient Pretraining](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07756)
*Ivan Karpukhin,Andrey Savchenko*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 提出一种基于梯度的双层优化方法，在线学习预训练阶段复合损失函数的权重，通过将复合梯度与下游目标对齐，以约30%的额外计算开销替代昂贵的超参数搜索。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统通过随机搜索或贝叶斯优化来调整多损失项权重的方法需要多次独立训练，计算成本极高。因此需要一种更高效的在线超参数学习方法。

Method: 提出基于梯度的双层优化（gradient-based bilevel method），在线学习预训练损失权重。核心思路是将复合预训练梯度与下游目标对齐，并利用损失结构避免全模型截断反向传播的多重反向传播，从而降低开销。

Result: 在事件序列建模和自监督计算机视觉任务上，该方法匹配或优于精心调优的基线，同时将超参数调优的计算开销降低至单次训练运行的约30%。

Conclusion: 该方法能够以极低的额外计算成本实现高效的复合损失权重自适应学习，避免了传统超参数搜索的高昂代价，可推广到多任务预训练场景。

Abstract: Modern deep models are often pretrained on large-scale data with missing labels using composite objectives, where the relative weights of multiple loss terms act as hyperparameters. Tuning these weights with random search or Bayesian optimization is computationally expensive, as it requires many independent training runs. To address this, we propose a gradient-based bilevel method that learns pretraining loss weights online by aligning the composite pretraining gradient with a downstream objective. By exploiting the structure of the loss, the method avoids the multiple backward passes typically required by truncated backpropagation through the full model, reducing the overhead of hyperparameter tuning to approximately 30% above a single training run. We evaluate the approach on event-sequence modeling and self-supervised computer vision, where it matches or improves upon carefully tuned baselines while substantially reducing the cost of hyperparameter tuning compared to random or Bayesian search.

</details>


### [540] [A Closed-Form Upper Bound for Admissible Learning-Rate Steps in Belief-Space Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06741)
*Zixi Li,Youzhen Li*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 60.0

TL;DR: 本文提出将学习率步长视为可计算而非超参数：当更新被建模为概率单纯形上的投影前向步时，可允许步长的上限可以通过自然KL/Bregman几何中的收缩性公式精确计算。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统上将学习率视为需要手动调优的超参数，缺乏理论指导。本文试图从几何视角为学习率选择提供严格的理论基础。

Method: 将优化更新建模为概率单纯形上的投影前向步，利用KL散度/Bregman散度的自然几何结构，推导可允许步长的收缩性条件，从而得到步长上界的解析公式。

Result: 可允许步长的上界不是经验调优的口号，而是可以从几何角度精确计算的公式。

Conclusion: 学习率步长的设定可以从几何理论指导，而非依赖经验调参。

Abstract: Learning-rate steps are usually treated as hyperparameters. This paper isolates a local beliefspace calculation: when an update is modeled as a projected forward step on the probability simplex, admissibility means contractivity in the natural KL/Bregman geometry. Under this model, the upper bound of an admissible step is not a tuning slogan but a formula.

</details>


### [541] [Pre-trained Tabular Foundation Models as Versatile Summary Networks for Neural Posterior Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07765)
*Elliot Pickens,Chiraag Gohel,Sidharth Satya*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 60.0

TL;DR: 本文研究如何将TabPFN（表格数据基础模型）作为无需训练的特征提取器用于基于模拟的贝叶斯推断（SBI），提出PFN-NPE方法，使用预训练的TabPFN编码器作为固定摘要网络，再搭配下游推断头（如归一化流），实验表明该方法在多种SBI场景下有效，但在捕捉联合后验结构方面存在局限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: SBI中后验估计通常需要从模拟观测数据中学习信息丰富的摘要统计量，而TabPFN这类在合成表格数据上预训练的基础模型，通过上下文学习适应测试样本，天然适合作为摘要网络。作者想探索能否将TabPFN作为训练免费的模块化摘要网络，简化SBI流程并提升效果。

Method: 提出PFN-NPE方案：（1）使用预训练的TabPFN编码器作为固定摘要网络，提取模拟器输出的特征表示；（2）将摘要特征与可定制的下游推断头（默认使用归一化流）结合进行后验估计。TabPFN参数冻结，仅训练推断头，实现即插即用。

Result: PFN-NPE在多种SBI任务中匹配或超越了现有后验近似方法；诊断探针显示TabPFN摘要有效保留了后验位置和边缘信息，但在捕捉联合后验结构方面存在不足。

Conclusion: TabPFN可以作为有效的通用摘要网络用于SBI，但联合后验结构的表示能力有限，推断网络需要根据具体任务进行模块化设计。

Abstract: In this work, we study TabPFN as a training-free, modular summary network for simulation-based Bayesian inference (SBI). Tabular foundation models such as TabPFN are pretrained on broad families of synthetic tabular data-generating processes and adapt at test time through in-context learning, making them natural candidates for SBI, where posterior estimation often depends on learning informative summaries of simulated observations. We propose PFN-NPE: a general recipe that uses a pretrained TabPFN encoder as a fixed summary network for simulator outputs, then pairs the resulting summaries with a downstream inference head chosen for the problem.
