With normalizing flows as the default inference head, PFN-NPE matches established posterior approximation methods and sometimes outperforms them. More importantly, diagnostic probes show that the TabPFN-derived summaries often preserve useful posterior location and marginal information. These analyses also reveal a limitation in that TabPFN-derived summaries may struggle to represent the joint posterior structure even when the marginals are well recovered. Still, our experiments show that TabPFN can serve as an effective summary network across a diverse set of SBI settings, with the inference network left modular and task-dependent.

</details>


### [542] [Susceptibilities and Patterning: A Primer on Linear Response in Bayesian Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07980)
*Chris Elliott,Daniel Murfet*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 60.0

TL;DR: 本文介绍了用于解释神经网络的"敏感性理论"（susceptibility theory），将观测量的后验期望对数据扰动的导数定义为敏感性，并通过涨落-耗散定理将其等价于后验协方差。不同观测量对应不同对象：每样本损失给出影响矩阵，组件定位观测量给出结构敏感性矩阵，该矩阵（差一个因子nβ）是从数据分布到结构坐标的映射的雅可比矩阵，其伪逆提供了对"模式化问题"的线性化解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为神经网络可解释性提供一个基于统计力学（特别是涨落-耗散定理）的理论框架，将数据扰动与模型内部结构变化之间的因果关系用协方差/导数的形式系统化，并解决"模式化问题"——即寻找能使模型产生特定结构变化的数据扰动。

Method: 从统计力学基础出发，将敏感性定义为后验期望对数据扰动的导数，利用涨落-耗散定理将其转化为后验协方差；通过选择不同的观测量（每样本损失→影响矩阵；组件定位观测量→结构敏感性矩阵），建立从数据分布到模型结构坐标的雅可比映射关系，并用伪逆求解线性化的模式化问题。

Result: 推导了敏感性矩阵的统计力学基础、经验估计方法及其与损失景观几何的联系；证明了结构敏感性矩阵（差一个因子nβ）是数据分布到结构坐标的雅可比矩阵，其伪逆可以求解模式化问题的线性化近似。

Conclusion: 敏感性理论提供了一个统一的贝叶斯框架来量化数据扰动如何影响神经网络的内部结构，为可解释性提供了新的理论工具，特别是通过结构敏感性矩阵实现了数据模式与模型组件的配对分析。

Abstract: These notes introduce the theory of susceptibilities as developed in [arXiv:2504.18274, arXiv:2601.12703] for interpreting neural networks. The susceptibility of an observable $φ$ to a data perturbation is defined as a derivative of a posterior expectation, which by the fluctuation--dissipation theorem equals a posterior covariance. Different choices of $φ$ yield different objects: per-sample losses give the influence matrix (the Bayesian influence function of [arXiv:2509.26544]), while component-localized observables give the structural susceptibility matrix that pairs model components with data patterns. The susceptibility matrix is (up to a factor of $nβ$) the Jacobian of the map from data distributions to structural coordinates; its pseudo-inverse provides a linearized solution to the patterning problem of [arXiv:2601.13548]: finding data perturbations that produce a desired structural change. We motivate the theory from its statistical-mechanical foundations, then give a detailed exposition of susceptibilities, their empirical estimators, and their connection to the geometry of the loss landscape.

</details>


### [543] [STEPS: A Temporal Smooth Error Propagation Solver on the Manifolds for Test-Time Adaptation in Time Series Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08005)
*Jiaqi Liu,Yifan Ouyang,Zhifei Song,Sim Kuan Goh,Ashwaq Qasem*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 60.0

TL;DR: STEPS 提出了一种将时间序列测试时自适应（TTA）建模为时间流形上的狄利克雷边值问题的方法，通过局部求解器、全局求解器和时空流形融合模块来平滑地传播和修正预测误差，在六个基准测试上平均相对MSE降低26.82%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有时间序列预测TTA方法面临弱可识别性、误差累积和长时域修正不稳定等问题，尤其是在观测前缀稀疏或含有噪声的情况下表现不佳。

Method: 将TTA重新定义为时间流形上的狄利克雷边界值问题，利用已知前缀误差作为边界条件求解未知未来误差场。包含三个组件：局部求解器（在时间平滑性假设下传播前缀误差）、全局求解器（检索稳定的跨窗口误差记忆）、时空流形融合（综合两者得到最终修正）。

Result: 在六个标准基准和四个冻结骨干网络上，平均相对MSE降低26.82%，超过最强TTA基线12.77%。在稀疏前缀和污染测试中展现出鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 将误差修正建模为时间流形上的边值问题是一种有效的TTA策略，能显著缓解误差累积和不稳定修正问题，在分布漂移下提升时间序列预测性能。

Abstract: Test-Time Adaptation (TTA) aims to improve time series forecasting under distribution shifts by using limited observations revealed during inference. However, forecasting TTA must operate in a source-free online setting, where the adaptation signal is short, temporally correlated, and potentially noisy. Existing methods can therefore suffer from weak identifiability, error accumulation, and unstable long-horizon corrections when the revealed prefix is sparse or contaminated. To address these issues, we propose STEPS, a Smooth Temporal Error Propagation Solver for TTA in time-series forecasting. STEPS reformulates forecasting TTA as a Dirichlet Boundary Value Problem on a temporal manifold, where the revealed prefix error serves as the boundary condition for the unknown future error field. Then, STEPS solves a smooth and bounded correction field in prediction space: a Local Solver propagates prefix errors under temporal smoothness, a Global Solver retrieves stable cross-window error memory and Spatiotemporal Manifold Fusion (SMF) integrates both solutions into the final correction. Across six standard benchmarks and four frozen backbones, STEPS achieves an average relative MSE reduction of 26.82% over the zero-shot backbone, exceeding the strongest compared TTA baseline by 12.77%. Additional sparse prefix and contamination tests confirm the robustness of STEPS under limited and noisy prefixes.

</details>


### [544] [Differentially Private Auditing Under Strategic Response](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07674)
*Florian A. D. Burnat*

Main category: cs.GT

Relevance: 60.0

TL;DR: 本文研究当审计对象（AI开发者）可以策略性回应时，如何在差分隐私约束下设计最优审计方案。作者将问题建模为双层Stackelberg博弈，提出福利加权漏检缺口指标，并证明朴素DP审计方案在异质性场景下效果更差，最终给出最优审计分配的四因子平衡公式和求解算法SPAD。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有DP审计假设开发者被动配合，但现实中开发者会策略性地重新分配缓解措施来应对审计。需要研究在DP约束下，审计者应如何设计查询策略以对抗开发者的策略性行为。

Method: 将问题形式化为双层Stackelberg博弈（审计者→开发者），提出福利加权漏检缺口B_w指标，通过KKT条件将双层问题转化为单层优化，并设计SPAD算法（投影梯度+超梯度）求解最优审计分配。

Result: 证明了朴素DP审计（均匀或按危害比例分配）在有效可检测性异质、福利权重与可检测性不共单调时，比非策略性基线产生更大的福利加权漏检缺口。最优分配取决于福利权重、审计漏检概率、可检测性弹性和缓解成本曲率四因子平衡。

Conclusion: 审计者在设计DP审计时必须考虑开发者的策略性响应，简单的均匀或比例分配可能适得其反；SPAD算法能够有效求解最优策略性审计方案。

Abstract: Regulatory audits of AI systems increasingly rely on differential privacy (DP) to protect training data and model internals. We study audit design when the audited developer can strategically respond to the privacy-constrained audit interface. We formalize privacy-constrained auditing as a bilevel Stackelberg game, in which an auditor commits to a query policy and DP budget allocation across harm dimensions, and a strategic developer reallocates mitigation efforts in response. We introduce the welfare-weighted under-detection gap $B_w$, the welfare-weighted true residual harm the audit fails to detect at the developer's strategic best response, and prove that naive DP auditing (uniform or harm-proportional allocation) induces a strictly larger $B_w$ than any non-strategic mitigation baseline whenever effective detectability is heterogeneous, the welfare weights are not comonotone with detectability, and the developer's optimum is interior. We characterize the optimal auditor allocation as a four-factor balance of welfare weight, audit miss-probability, detectability elasticity, and mitigation-cost curvature, and provide a single-level reformulation of the bilevel problem via the developer's KKT system. We propose Strategic Private Audit Design (SPAD), a projected-gradient algorithm with hypergradients computed through the developer's best response.

</details>


### [545] [When Descent Is Too Stable: Event-Triggered Hamiltonian Learning to Optimize](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06868)
*Yi Wang,Chandrajit Bajaj*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 55.0

TL;DR: 本文提出SHAPE，一种基于结构自适应端口-哈密顿系统的优化器，通过将优化提升到增广相空间(q,p)，利用学习到的哈密顿向量场实现结构化局部下降，并在检测到局部均衡时通过事件触发机制切换阶段，从而在固定预算非凸优化中平衡下降、探索和预算分配。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 固定预算非凸优化可能失败不是因为局部下降不稳定，而是因为太稳定——优化器到达附近驻点后，会用剩余预算精细化一个无信息的局部最小值。作者将此失败模式建模为优化器动力学的控制问题，需要决定何时下降、何时利用有前景的盆地、何时因停滞而触发移动。

Method: SHAPE将梯度下降动力学提升到增广相空间(q,p)，其中q是原始状态（候选解），p是余切变量（方向敏感性），控制器u提供当前梯度oracle的处理信息。在阶段内，学习到的哈密顿向量场诱导结构化局部下降；跨阶段，固定事件时钟在检测到局部均衡时更新端口和记忆。设计保留了无源性兼容结构，允许同一策略使用干净、随机或估计的梯度输入。

Result: 在固定预算非凸优化任务上的实验表明，与固定策略优化器相比，SHAPE提高了最佳迄今（best-so-far）性能。

Conclusion: 自适应哈密顿能量塑造为在困难优化景观中平衡下降、探索和预算分配提供了一种原则性机制。

Abstract: Fixed-budget nonconvex optimization can fail not because local descent is unstable, but because it is too stable: after reaching a nearby stationary point, an optimizer may spend the remaining evaluations refining an uninformative local minimum. We formulate this failure mode as a control problem over optimizer dynamics, where the learner must decide when to descend, when to exploit a promising basin, and when stagnation should trigger movement elsewhere. We introduce SHAPE, a structured adaptive port-Hamiltonian task-family optimizer for event-triggered minima hunting under local information. Starting from gradient-descent dynamics, SHAPE lifts optimization to an augmented phase space $(q, p)$, where the primal state $q$ represents the candidate solution, the cotangent variable $p$ carries directional sensitivity, and a controller $u$ provides processed information from current gradient oracle. Within each stage, a learned Hamiltonian vector field induces structured local descent; across stages, a fixed event clock in the implementation updates ports and memory when local equilibria are detected, with stage-dependent horizons treated in the analysis as a direct generalization. This design preserves a passivity-compatible structure while allowing the same trained policy to use clean, stochastic, or estimated gradient inputs. Experiments on fixed-budget nonconvex optimization tasks show that SHAPE improves best-so-far performance compared with fixed-policy optimizers. These results suggest that adaptive Hamiltonian energy shaping provides a principled mechanism for balancing descent, exploration, and budget allocation in difficult optimization landscapes.

</details>


### [546] [Causal-Aware Foundation-Model for Bilevel Optimization in Discrete Choice Settings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06941)
*Shivaram Subramanian,Zhengliang Xue,Markus Ettl,Yingdong Lu,Jayant Kalagnanam*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 55.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种因果感知的基础模型框架C3PO，用于离散选择环境下的实时最优定价决策。该模型通过三重头结构（模仿学习、多任务学习、上下文学习）解决双层决策问题，并在推理时通过前沿模型提示从行为经济学文献中检索增强的弹性先验，在模拟和真实数据集上取得显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有定价决策方法难以在异构用户偏好和业务约束下实现实时最优决策，且缺乏对因果关系和价格弹性的有效利用。

Method: 提出C3PO网络，包含三个头部：模仿学习（学习价格策略）、多任务学习（学习收益响应）、上下文学习（学习价格弹性）。推理时通过前沿模型从经济学文献中检索弹性先验，同时满足业务约束。

Result: 在模拟、合成和真实数据集上表现优异，价格敏感度越高收益提升越大，在医疗、招标、航空辅助定价等真实场景中跨多产品/市场实现显著增益。

Conclusion: C3PO通过因果感知和上下文学习有效提升了定价决策质量，展示了基础模型在经济学领域的应用潜力。

Abstract: We introduce a causal aware foundation-model framework for real time optimal decision making in discrete choice environments. We propose a constrained triple-head price optimization (C3PO) network to solve a bilevel decision problem in which a service provider selects an optimal assortment while heterogeneous users make personalized acceptance or rejection choices optimizing their own personalized preferences. C3PO integrates imitation learning of prices, multi-task learning of revenue responses, and in context learning of price elasticity to generate pricing recommendations while adhering to business constraints. During inference, frontier model prompting retrieves an enhanced elasticity prior for new products from behavioral economics literature, improving pricing effectiveness. We demonstrate strong in context learning performance using simulated, synthetic, and real-world datasets. C3PO is trained on simulated data generated from multiple classical discrete choice models in economics. The model is trained on data comprising simulated customer segments and counterfactual action and outcome pairs and evaluated on randomly generated choice environments with no access to the underlying preference structure. The trained model consistently improves the pricing KPIs, with gains increasing as customer price sensitivity increases. We also deploy the tuned foundation model for optimal pricing in real-world applications such as healthcare, tender pricing, airline ancillary pricing, and other domains, achieving substantial gains across multiple products, markets, and divisions.

</details>


### [547] [Less Random, More Private: What is the Optimal Subsampling Scheme for DP-SGD?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07072)
*Andy Dong,Ayfer Özgür*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 55.0

TL;DR: 本文证明，在差分隐私机器学习中，使用结构化平衡迭代子采样（BIS）替代泊松子采样，通过消除参与方差（每个样本参与训练迭代次数不均）能够实现更强的隐私放大效果，在低噪声（高效用）场景下最多可降低9.6%的噪声乘数，颠覆了"更多采样随机性意味着更强隐私放大"的传统认知。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 泊松子采样虽然因非结构化随机性便于隐私放大分析，但其引入的参与方差（每个样本出现在不同数量的训练迭代中）导致隐私放大效果次优。作者希望证明消除这种方差能够获得更好的隐私-噪声权衡。

Method: 提出平衡迭代子采样（BIS），使得每个样本参与固定次数的训练迭代；理论分析证明BIS在σ→0和σ→∞两个极端达到最优；提出近精确的蒙特卡洛会计方法（Monte Carlo accountant）来消除现有RDP和PLD分析中的解析松弛。

Result: 在60多种DP-SGD配置下，BIS在低噪声（高效用）场景中一致优于泊松子采样，所需噪声乘数最多降低9.6%。

Conclusion: 在DP-SGD中，结构化参与（BIS）比泊松子采样更具实用性和隐私性，推翻了"更多采样随机性带来更强隐私放大"的直觉。

Abstract: Poisson subsampling is the default sampling scheme in differentially private machine learning, largely because its unstructured randomness yields tractable privacy amplification analyses. Yet this same randomness introduces substantial participation variance: each sample appears in very different numbers of training iterations. In this work, we show that this variance is not merely a practical artifact to be tolerated, but a fundamental source of suboptimal privacy amplification. We prove that Balanced Iteration Subsampling (BIS), a structured scheme in which each sample participates in exactly a fixed number of iterations, achieves stronger privacy amplification than Poisson subsampling and is optimal at both extremes of the noise spectrum ($σ\to 0$ and $σ\to \infty$). Our analysis reveals that the privacy-noise tradeoff is governed not by maximizing randomness, but by eliminating participation variance while preserving uniform marginal participation across iterations. To translate this asymptotic theory into finite-noise guarantees, we introduce a practical near-exact Monte Carlo accountant for BIS, which removes the analytical slack of existing RDP and composition-based PLD analyses. Evaluations across more than 60 practical DP-SGD configurations show that BIS consistently outperforms Poisson subsampling in the low-noise regimes most relevant for high-utility private training, reducing the required noise multiplier by up to $9.6\%$. These results overturn the common intuition that more sampling randomness necessarily yields stronger privacy amplification: in DP-SGD, structured participation can be both more practical and more private. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/dong-xin-ao-andy/bis-mc-accountant.

</details>


### [548] [Risk-Consistent Multiclass Learning from Random Label-Subset Membership Queries](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07413)
*Jiaxu Su,Junpeng Li,Changchun Hua,Yana Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 55.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于随机标签子集查询的弱监督多分类学习框架，通过建模查询-响应的数据生成分布，在经验风险最小化框架下推导出目标风险的无偏估计量，并引入非负和绝对值修正的风险估计器来应对负经验风险和过拟合问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在实际标注场景中，获取精确类别标签成本高、不可靠或受隐私限制，而询问"真实标签是否属于某个子集"更容易实现。现有弱监督学习缺乏对这种直接通过子集查询响应生成弱监督信号的系统性研究。

Method: 建模随机标签子集查询的响应数据生成分布；在ERM框架下推导目标风险的无偏估计量；提出非负修正和绝对值修正两种风险修正策略解决负经验风险与过拟合问题；给出无偏估计量的泛化界和修正估计量的偏差-一致性理论分析。

Result: 理论推导了条件泛化界和超额风险界；证明了修正风险估计量的偏差与一致性；实验表明基于匹配随机查询机制的查询-响应学习可行，风险修正具有稳定效果。

Conclusion: 该工作系统性地填补了"子集查询响应直接生成弱监督信号"这一学习框架的理论空白，为成本敏感或隐私受限场景下的多分类学习提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Obtaining accurate class labels is often costly or unreliable, and may also be limited by privacy or other practical conditions. Compared with asking an annotator to provide the exact class, it is often easier to ask whether the true label belongs to a certain label subset. This query-response form defines a distinct weak-supervision mechanism: weak supervision information is generated through feedback on a label subset. Although weakly supervised learning has studied many learning frameworks, most existing work starts from established weak label objects. A systematic characterization is still lacking for weakly supervised learning generated directly by such query response observations. This paper proposes a multiclass learn ing framework under random label-subset queries. We model the data-generating distribution of query-response observations and derive an unbiased estimator of the target risk under the empirical risk minimization (ERM) framework. To address negative empirical risk and the associated overfitting problem, we introduce corrected risk estimators based on non-negative and absolute-value corrections. Theoretical analysis establishes a conditional generalization and excess-risk bound for the unbiased estimator, and a bias-and-consistency result for the corrected risk estimator. Experiments under the matched random-query mechanism demonstrate the feasibility of direct query-response learning and the stabilization effect of risk correction.

</details>


### [549] [Disagreement-Regularized Importance Sampling for Adversarial Label Corruption](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07551)
*Csongor Horváth,Ida-Maria Sintorn,Prashant Singh*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 55.0

TL;DR: 本文提出 Disagreement-Regularized Importance Sampling (DR-IS)，一种基于独立代理模型间损失排名分歧的子采样方法，用于解决标准重要性采样在标签污染下因高范数异常点而失效的问题。该方法在理论上提供了有限样本浓度界限，并在实践上对高范数攻击表现出鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准重要性采样在标签污染场景下失效，因为用于方差减少的高范数样本往往是对抗性异常点，导致采样结果被污染。本文旨在解决这一对齐问题。

Method: 提出 Disagreement-Regularized Importance Sampling (DR-IS)，基于独立代理模型之间的损失排名分歧进行子采样。利用 ε-污染模型形式化分析，并给出了有限样本浓度界限证明。

Result: 理论上证明了污染样本的排名分歧上界和干净样本的下界，且当结构期望间隙为正时能保证严格分离。实验上，DR-IS 在高范数攻击下优于基于幅值的方法（如 EL2N），并与 AUM 等方法互补。

Conclusion: DR-IS 提供了显式的有限样本浓度认证和污染界限，能够有效限制从统计尾部泄漏的噪声，在损失对齐场景下具有改进的鲁棒性。

Abstract: Standard Importance Sampling (IS) collapses under label corruption because high-norm examples, prioritized for variance reduction, are often adversarial outliers. We formalize this misalignment using an $\varepsilon$-contamination model and propose Disagreement-Regularized Importance Sampling (DR-IS), a sub-sampling method based on loss rank-disagreement across independent proxy ensemble. We prove finite-sample concentration bounds showing that the empirical rank disagreement of bulk corrupted examples is bounded above, and that of boundary-clean examples bounded below, both at rate $O(\sqrt{\log(N/δ)/K})$ with probability $1-δ$; when the structural expectation gap $Δ'$ between the two groups is positive and the boundary-clean set is at least as large as the selected subset, these bounds certify strict separation and control the contamination rate of the selected subset. Empirically, DR-IS remains robust under targeted high-norm attacks that break magnitude-based methods such as the Error $L_2$-norm (EL2N) on benchmark datasets. DR-IS complements training-dynamics approaches like Area Under the Margin ranking (AUM), offering improved robustness in the loss-aligned regime alongside explicit finite-sample concentration certificates and a contamination bound limiting noise leakage from the statistical tail of corrupted points.

</details>


### [550] [Stochastic Transition-Map Distillation for Fast Probabilistic Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07661)
*George Rapakoulias,Peter Garud,Lingjiong Zhu,Panagiotis Tsiotras*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 55.0

TL;DR: STMD是一种无需教师模型的扩散模型加速推理框架，通过蒸馏随机微分方程的完整转移映射，实现一步或几步的随机采样，同时保持概率生成特性，在图像生成任务上取得了良好效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散模型虽然生成质量高，但推理速度慢，现有蒸馏方法通常需要预训练教师模型、双层优化或轨迹模拟缓存，计算成本高且难以扩展。作者希望提出一种无需教师、高效可扩展的加速框架。

Method: 提出随机转移映射蒸馏（STMD），用条件均值流模型参数化SDE转移映射，蒸馏完整的转移映射而非仅后验均值，实现一步或几步的随机采样器，保留底层扩散过程的转移结构。

Result: 在MNIST、CIFAR-10和CelebA数据集上验证了图像生成效果，并推导了Wasserstein距离下的收敛界，为方法提供了理论保证。

Conclusion: STMD提供了一种高效、可扩展的扩散模型加速推理方案，无需教师模型，适用于需要随机推理的下游任务如扩散后验采样、逆问题和能量微调。

Abstract: Diffusion models achieve strong generation quality, diversity, and distribution coverage, but their performance often comes with expensive inference. In this work, we propose Stochastic Transition-Map Distillation (STMD), a teacher-free framework for accelerating diffusion model inference while preserving probabilistic sample generation. In contrast to score-based diffusion models, whose denoising parametrization models the mean of the posterior distribution, STMD distills the full transition map associated with the sampling stochastic differential equation (SDE). We parameterize these SDE transitions with a conditional Mean Flow model, yielding a one- or few-step stochastic sampler that retains the transition structure of the underlying diffusion process. This perspective is especially useful for downstream tasks that require stochastic inference, such as diffusion posterior sampling, inverse problems, and energy-based fine-tuning. Compared to recent distillation methods, STMD requires no pretrained teacher, bi-level optimization, or trajectory simulation and caching, enabling efficient and scalable training. We derive convergence bounds for our method in the Wasserstein distance, providing a strong theoretical foundation for our approach, and validate STMD on various image generation examples on the MNIST, CIFAR-10, and CelebA datasets.

</details>


### [551] [Robust stochastic first order methods in heavy-tailed noise via medoid mini-batch gradient sampling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07634)
*Manojlo Vukovic,Dusan Jakovetic*

Main category: math.OC

Relevance: 55.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为R-SGD-Mini的鲁棒随机梯度下降方法，通过将K大小数据批次分成M个数据块，计算每个块的随机梯度，然后选取这些梯度中位数方向进行参数更新，以应对重尾梯度噪声（可能具有无限方差）。在对称重尾噪声和非凸设置下，建立了期望时间平均梯度范数的收敛界，速率为O(T^{-1})到零的小邻域，已知时间跨度时可达O(T^{-1/2})。结合裁剪后可获得高概率收敛保证。实验表明方法优于SGD、裁剪SGD和基于均值中位数的方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有处理重尾梯度噪声的方法多基于梯度裁剪或归一化等非线性算子，本文探索了另一种途径——基于中位数（medoid）的mini-batch梯度采样，以在梯度噪声具有重尾特性（可能无限方差）时仍能保证收敛。

Method: 将K个数据点批次分成M个数据块，计算每个块的随机梯度，然后选择这些梯度中位的方向（即medoid）作为更新方向。分析了期望时间平均梯度范数的收敛界，并提出了带裁剪的变体以获得高概率收敛保证。

Result: 在对称重尾梯度噪声和非凸设置下，期望时间平均梯度范数以O(T^{-1})速率收敛到零的小邻域；已知时间跨度时可达O(T^{-1/2})。带裁剪变体获得了高概率收敛保证。实验优于SGD、裁剪SGD和基于均值中位数的方法。

Conclusion: 基于medoid的mini-batch梯度采样是处理重尾梯度噪声的有效替代方案，结合裁剪可进一步提高鲁棒性。

Abstract: We consider a first order stochastic optimization framework where, at each iteration, $K$ independent identically distributed (i.i.d.) data point samples are drawn, based on which stochastic gradients can be queried. We allow gradient noise to be heavy-tailed, with possibly infinite variances. For the considered heavy-tailed setting, many algorithmic variants have recently been proposed based on gradient clipping or other nonlinear operators (e.g., normalization) applied over noisy gradients. In this paper, we take an alternative approach and propose a novel stochastic first order method dubbed Robust Stochastic Gradient Descent with medoid mini-batch gradient sampling, R-SGD-Mini for short. The core idea of R-SGD-Mini is to split the $K$-sized data batch into $M$ distinct data chunks, form for each chunk the stochastic gradient, and update the solution estimate with respect to the stochastic gradient direction of the chunk that is medoid of gradients of all data-chunks. Under a general class of symmetric heavy-tailed gradient noises and a standard non-convex setting, we establish explicit bounds on the expected time-averaged squared gradient norm. More precisely, we show that the latter quantity converges at rate $\mathcal{O}(T^{-1})$ to a small neighborhood of zero; we explicitly characterize this neighborhood in terms of noise and algorithm's parameters. Moreover, if the time horizon is known in advance, we establish the rate of $\mathcal{O}(T^{-\frac{1}{2}}).$ Furthermore, when clipping is incorporated, we obtain convergence guaranties in the high-probability sense and recover the same rate. Experimental results indicate that R-SGD-Mini and its clipped variant consistently perform favorably compared to SGD, clipped SGD and Median-of-Means based methods.

</details>


### [552] [Geometric Kolmogorov--Arnold Network (GeoKAN)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06740)
*Abhijit Sen,Bikram Keshari Parida,Giridas Maiti,Mahima Arya,Denys I. Bondar*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 50.0

TL;DR: 本文提出GeoKAN，一种几何感知的KAN模型系列，通过学习对角黎曼度量对输入进行几何变形，从而在任务相关区域自适应分配模型表达能力，适用于科学机器学习和微分方程问题中的尖锐、刚性、局部化及强非均匀场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统KAN模型在固定欧几里得坐标下进行函数逼近，缺乏几何感知能力，难以高效处理具有剧烈变化、局部化特征的科学计算和微分方程问题。作者希望通过引入可学习的黎曼度量，让模型能自适应地"拉伸"变化剧烈的区域、"压缩"平滑区域，从而更有效地分配表示分辨率。

Method: GeoKAN通过学习一个对角黎曼度量来对输入空间进行坐标变换（扭曲），再在变形后的坐标上进行基展开和特征混合。具体提出三种变体：GeoKAN-NNMetric（神经网络直接学习度量）、GeoKAN-γ（基于标量因子的简化度量）、以及LM-KAN（学习度量的三种基函数版本：RBF、小波、傅里叶）。

Result: GeoKAN在科学机器学习和微分方程问题中表现出色，尤其擅长处理具有尖锐变化、刚度、局部化结构和强非均匀性的场景。通过学习几何感知的坐标变换，模型能自适应地将表示能力集中到最需要的区域。

Conclusion: 几何感知的输入坐标变形是一种有效的归纳偏置，能显著提升KAN模型在非均匀、局部化科学计算问题上的表现，为KAN架构在物理信息学习中的应用提供了新方向。

Abstract: We introduce Geometric Kolmogorov--Arnold Networks (GeoKANs), a family of geometry-aware KAN-type models in which approximation is carried out in learned, geometry-adapted coordinates rather than in fixed Euclidean input coordinates. GeoKAN achieves this by learning a diagonal Riemannian metric that warps the input before basis expansion and feature mixing. The learned metric provides a geometric inductive bias through local length scaling and volume distortion, and in physics-informed settings it also affects the differential structure seen by the model. Within this framework, we develop three main variants, namely GeoKAN-NNMetric, GeoKAN-$γ$, and LM-KAN. For LM-KAN, we further consider three basis-specific versions, LM-KAN-RBF, LM-KAN-Wav, and LM-KAN-Fourier. These variants allow us to study geometry-aware KAN models both as general function approximators and as surrogates in physics-informed learning. By stretching regions with rapid variation and compressing smoother regions, GeoKAN reallocates representational resolution in a task-dependent manner, allowing the model to place capacity where it is most needed. As a result, GeoKAN is well suited to sharp, stiff, localized, and strongly non-uniform regimes arising in scientific machine learning and differential-equation problems.

</details>


### [553] [Emergent Symbolic Structure in Health Foundation Models: Extraction, Alignment, and Cross-Modal Transfer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07407)
*Gajendra Katuwal,Advait Koparkar,Salar Abbaspourazad,Anshuman Mishra,Sarvesh Kirthivasan*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 50.0

TL;DR: 本文提出一种后训练框架，将健康基础模型的冻结嵌入分解为可解释的“符号”，并利用这些符号在不同模态间对齐嵌入空间，无需重新训练。实验表明，提取的符号与健康状态和生理属性选择性关联，跨模态迁移可保留95%以上的领域内性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 健康基础模型能从可穿戴传感器学习有用表示，但解释其编码内容以及训练后在模态间迁移知识仍然困难。

Method: 提出一种后训练框架：将冻结嵌入分解为可解释的方向（称为符号），并利用这些符号对齐不同模态的嵌入空间，无需重新训练。

Result: 符号与健康条件和生理属性选择性关联；跨模态迁移保留>95%的领域内性能；对齐几乎对称，且少量配对数据即达饱和。

Conclusion: 健康基础模型的嵌入包含跨模态共享的可解释符号组织，支持无需联合训练的跨域知识迁移。

Abstract: Health foundation models (FMs) learn useful representations from wearable sensors, but interpreting what they encode and transferring that knowledge across modalities after training remains difficult. We present a post-training framework that decomposes frozen embeddings into interpretable directions, referred to as symbols, and use these symbols to align the embedding spaces without retraining. We evaluate the framework on three FMs for photoplethysmography (PPG) and accelerometer data, independently pretrained on ~20M minutes of unlabeled data from ~172K participants, and analyzed on a held-out cohort of 30K subjects. We find that extracted symbols associate selectively with health conditions and physiological attributes, and these associations are partially shared across modalities and architectures. Cross-modal transfer via symbols retains more than 95% of in-domain performance, is nearly symmetric across domain directions, and saturates with limited paired data, together indicating that alignment recovers a shared low-dimensional subspace rich in physiological information. Overall, these results suggest that health FM embeddings contain an interpretable symbolic organization that is shared across modalities and supports cross-domain transfer without joint training.

</details>


### [554] [Structured Coupling for Flow Matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07676)
*Xavier Sumba,Carles Balsells-Rodas,Yingzhen Li*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 50.0

TL;DR: SCFM通过将结构化潜在变量模型与流匹配结合，在保持生成质量的同时学习可解释的潜在表示，无需牺牲样本 fidelity。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准流匹配依赖无结构源分布，难以学习可解释的潜在结构；而潜在变量模型能捕获结构但牺牲生成质量。作者旨在弥合这一差距。

Method: 提出SCFM框架，在流匹配中引入结构化潜在变量和外生噪声作为源分布，通过共享时间依赖的识别网络同时进行潜在变量模型的变分推断和中间时间流速度估计，实现结构化先验与连续传输图的联合学习。

Result: SCFM在无监督表示学习（聚类、解耦）上表现优异，同时生成质量与标准流匹配相当，证明可以学习有意义的结构而不牺牲生成保真度。

Conclusion: SCFM成功地桥接了流匹配和潜在变量模型，表明生成模型可以同时具备高质量生成和可解释的潜在结构学习能力。

Abstract: Standard flow matching scales well but typically relies on an unstructured source distribution, limiting its ability to learn interpretable latent structure. Latent-variable models, by contrast, capture structure but often sacrifice generative quality. We bridge this gap by proposing Structured Coupling for Flow Matching (SCFM), a cooperative framework that augments flow matching with structured latent representation learning. By introducing structured latent variables and exogenous noise into the source, SCFM jointly learns a structured prior (via latent variable modeling) and a continuous transport map (via flow matching). It uses a shared time-dependent recognition network for both latent variable model variational inference and intermediate-time flow velocity estimation. This yields a structurally informed yet unconditional, simulation-free flow model, where the latent variable model can also assist flow sampling. Empirically, SCFM facilitates unsupervised latent representation learning for clustering, disentanglement and downstream tasks, while remaining competitive with flow matching in sample quality, showing that meaningful structure can be learned without sacrificing generative fidelity.

</details>


### [555] [MAGIQ: A Post-Quantum Multi-Agentic AI Governance System with Provable Security](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06933)
*Sepideh Avizeh,Tushin Mallick,Alina Oprea,Cristina Nita-Rotaru,Reihaneh Safavi-Naini*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 本文提出MAGIQ框架，为多智能体AI系统设计基于后量子密码协议的策略定义与强制执行机制，确保通信安全、策略合规及问责性，并通过通用可组合性框架证明安全性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着自主AI系统（agentic AI）和量子计算的兴起，现有AI智能体架构缺乏安全的治理机制来确保智能体遵守通信策略并可被问责，同时现有密码系统面临量子计算的威胁（NIST建议2030年起弃用RSA等经典公钥算法）。需要结合后量子密码来构建智能体系统的安全框架。

Method: 设计MAGIQ框架：(i) 支持丰富的通信与访问控制策略预算定义；(ii) 使用后量子密码原语强制执行策略；(iii) 支持点对点及一对多会话级策略执行；(iv) 通过消息归因实现智能体对用户的问责。使用通用可组合性（UC）框架进行形式化建模与安全证明，并与SAGA框架进行性能对比评估。

Result: MAGIQ在计算和通信开销上进行了评估，并与当前最先进的智能体AI框架SAGA进行了比较，证明了其可行性和效率。

Conclusion: MAGIQ是迈向后量子安全智能体AI系统的第一步，为多智能体场景提供了具有形式化安全保证的策略执行与问责机制。

Abstract: Our computing ecosystem is being transformed by two emerging paradigms: the increased deployment of agentic AI systems and advancements in quantum computing. With respect to agentic AI systems, one of the most critical problems is creating secure governing architectures that ensure agents follow their owners' communication and interaction policies and can be held accountable for the messages they exchange with other agents. With respect to quantum computing, existing systems must be retrofitted and new cryptographic mechanisms must be designed to ensure long-term security and quantum resistance. In fact, NIST recommends that standard public-key cryptographic algorithms, including RSA, Diffie-Hellman (DH), and elliptic-curve constructions (ECC), be deprecated starting in 2030 and disallowed after 2035.
  In this paper, we present MAGIQ, a framework for policy definition and enforcement in multi-agent AI systems using novel, highly efficient, quantum-resistant cryptographic protocols with proven security guarantees. MAGIQ (i) allows users to define rich communication and access-control policy budgets for agent-to-agent sessions and tasks, including global budgets for one-to-many agent sessions; (ii) enforces such policies using post-quantum cryptographic primitives; (iii) supports session-based enforcement of policies for agent-to-agent and one-to-many agent sessions; and (iv) provides accountability of agents to their users through message attribution. We formally model and prove the correctness and security of the system using the Universal Composability (UC) framework. We evaluate the computation and communication overhead of our framework and compare it with the state-of-the-art agentic AI framework SAGA. MAGIQ is a first step toward post-quantum-secure solutions for agentic AI systems.

</details>


### [556] [FastOmniTMAE: Parallel Clause Learning for Scalable and Hardware-Efficient Tsetlin Embeddings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06982)
*Ahmed K. Kadhim,Lei Jiao,Rishad Shafik,Ole-Christoffer Granmo,Mayur Kishor Shende*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 本文提出FastOmniTMAE，一种基于Tsetlin Machine的加速嵌入模型训练方法，通过两阶段并行流程替代顺序训练依赖，在FPGA上实现最高5倍训练加速，同时保持与Omni TM-AE相当的嵌入质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Omni TM-AE虽然提供了一种基于逻辑的静态嵌入学习范式，但训练过程缓慢，且Tsetlin Machine在传统GPU上效率有限，亟需加速方法以推动逻辑驱动NLP嵌入模型的实用化。

Method: 将Omni TM-AE的顺序训练依赖分解为"评估"和"更新"两个并行阶段；并在SoC-FPGA平台上实现可重用的硬件加速器。

Result: 分类任务上实现最高5倍训练加速；FPGA上相似度得分为0.669，UltraScale+ SoC上为0.696，硬件占用小。

Conclusion: FastOmniTMAE在显著提升训练效率的同时保持嵌入质量，且FPGA实现验证了逻辑驱动嵌入模型在资源受限硬件上的可行性。

Abstract: Embedding models in natural language processing (NLP) increasingly rely on deep architectures such as BERT, while simpler models such as Word2Vec provide efficient representations but limited interpretability. The Tsetlin Machine (TM) offers an alternative logic-based learning paradigm. Omni TM Autoencoder (Omni TM-AE) applies this paradigm to static embedding by exploiting automaton state distributions within a single clause layer, but its training process remains slow. In this work, we propose FastOmniTMAE, a reformulation of Omni TM-AE that replaces sequential training dependencies with a two-stage parallel process: evaluation and update. Using a Single-Run Multi-Environment Benchmark covering classification, similarity, and clustering, FastOmniTMAE achieves up to 5$\times$ faster training in classification while maintaining comparable embedding quality under both Spearman and Kendall similarity measures. To address the limited efficiency of TM training on conventional GPUs, we further implement FastOmniTMAE as a reusable accelerator on SoC-FPGA platforms. The Multi-Hardware Benchmark shows that FastOmniTMAE achieves similarity scores of 0.669 on a resource-constrained FPGA and 0.696 on an UltraScale+ SoC, demonstrating efficient logic-based embedding training with a small hardware footprint.

</details>


### [557] [Integrating Causal DAGs in Deep RL: Activating Minimal Markovian States with Multi-Order Exposure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07057)
*Jiamin Xu,Jacqueline Maasch,Kyra Gan*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 本文提出MOSE方法，通过构造多阶历史状态暴露来解决因果强化学习中状态最小化表示不足以提升性能的问题，证明了"受控冗余"在因果深度RL中的必要性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有因果强化学习假设马尔可夫状态已给定，但实际应用中如何从观测变量构造满足马尔可夫性的状态表示这一基础问题尚未解决。

Method: 提出MOSE（Multi-Order State Exposure），将多阶历史状态构造输入同一Q函数，在最小状态表示基础上引入受控冗余。

Result: MOSE在常见基准和合成数据集上一致优于最小状态构造和单窗口策略；加入最小表示可进一步提升性能。

Conclusion: 最小充分性不足以保证深度RL性能，受控冗余才是发挥因果状态信息价值的关键。

Abstract: Online reinforcement learning (RL) relies on the Markov property for guaranteed performance, but real-world applications often lack well-defined states given raw observed variables. While causal RL has attracted growing interest, existing work typically assumes Markovian states are provided and focuses on using causality to accelerate learning, leaving a fundamental gap: \emph{given a longitudinal causal graph over observed variables, how does one construct MDP states that provably satisfy the Markov property?} We address this by providing a procedure that constructs a provably minimal state representation. In deep RL, we observe that the minimal representation alone empirically fails to improve performance, indicating that neural networks cannot directly exploit Markovian minimality. To address this, we propose \textbf{MOSE} (Multi-Order State Exposure), which feeds multi-order historical state constructions into the same $Q$-function. MOSE consistently outperforms both the minimal state construction and single-window policies on common benchmarks and synthetic datasets. Including the minimal representation alongside MOSE can further improve performance. Our results establish a core principle for causal deep RL: minimal sufficiency is not enough, and \emph{controlled redundancy} is necessary to unlock the benefit of causal state information.

</details>


### [558] [Arrow: A Foundation Model for Causal Discovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07204)
*Ryan Thompson,He Zhao,Daniel M. Steinberg,Edwin V. Bonilla*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: Arrow是一个基于Transformer的零样本因果发现基础模型，通过对有向无环图进行骨架-拓扑序分解来保证无环性，在大规模合成数据上预训练后可直接应用于新数据集进行因果发现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有因果发现方法计算成本高、可复用性差，且难以在零样本场景下直接应用于新数据集。作者希望通过大规模预训练的方式，构建一个可直接用于新数据的因果发现基础模型。

Method: 将DAG分解为无向骨架（skeleton）和拓扑序（topological order），利用Transformer架构对观测数据进行变量上下文化编码，分别预测骨架边概率和节点序分数；采用端到端可微的有向边复合似然进行监督训练，训练数据涵盖多种图族、函数形式、噪声模型和数据集形状。

Result: 在多种分布内/分布外合成、半合成和真实数据集上，Arrow匹配或超越了现有因果发现方法，且推理成本显著低于竞品方法。

Conclusion: 大规模多样化合成数据上的预训练可以产生快速、准确且可复用的零样本因果发现模型。

Abstract: We introduce Arrow, a foundation model for zero-shot causal discovery on observational tabular data. Arrow factorizes a directed acyclic graph into an undirected skeleton and a topological order, guaranteeing acyclicity by construction. Given a new dataset, it uses a transformer-based architecture to contextualize variables within and across observations, then predicts skeleton edge probabilities and node order scores that together define a graph. Arrow is trained in a supervised fashion on synthetic datasets with ground-truth graphs, using an end-to-end differentiable directed edge composite likelihood induced by the skeleton-order factorization. The training distribution spans diverse graph families, functional forms, noise models, and dataset shapes. Across in- and out-of-distribution synthetic, semi-synthetic, and real datasets, Arrow matches or outperforms existing causal discovery methods at substantially lower inference cost than competitive alternatives. Our results demonstrate that large-scale pretraining on diverse synthetic data can yield zero-shot causal discovery models that are fast, accurate, and reusable on new datasets.

</details>


### [559] [Don't Learn the Shape: Forecasting Periodic Time Series by Rank-1 Decomposition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07222)
*Takato Honda*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 本文提出FLAIR方法，发现周期性时间序列（如小时级电力数据）本质上是近似秩为1的（日模式×日水平），并证明在大量周期数据下，简单低秩方法（如秩1 SVD、平滑、收缩估计）与复杂深度学习模型（如PatchTST）性能相当，且无需GPU、预训练或调参。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 质疑深度学习模型在周期性时间序列预测中的必要性——当数据具有强周期性和大量历史周期时，简单参数化方法是否已经足够？探索"到底需要多少参数才能有效预测周期性时间序列"。

Method: 基于时间序列的周期矩阵化（如小时数据重塑为24×N矩阵），利用秩1 SVD分解提取日模式与日水平；使用GCV平均Ridge回归进行平滑/收缩；对8种替代方案（Fourier、EWMA、James-Stein、秩r SVD等）进行系统比较。

Result: 在GIFT-Eval全部97个配置上，8种替代方案中无一种显著优于冻结的K=2周期简单平均基线（经Holm校正）；FLAIR在聚合指标上与PatchTST持平（relMASE 0.838 vs 0.849），仅需28个标量（小时级）/57个标量（周级），在单核CPU上22分钟完成。

Conclusion: 在高秩1、多周期的周期性时间序列中，额外灵活性主要是估计噪声而非有效信号；简单的低秩+收缩方法足以匹配甚至超越复杂深度学习模型。

Abstract: How few parameters do we really need to forecast a periodic time series? An hourly electricity series, reshaped as a 24-row matrix with one column per day, is approximately rank-1: a daily shape modulated by a daily level (median centered rank-1 energy 0.82 on GIFT-Eval). Should we learn the shape? Smoothing, shrinkage, and low-rank fits all seem like obvious upgrades over the simple average of the last K=2 cycles. On all 97 GIFT-Eval configurations, we tested 8 such alternatives (e.g., Fourier, EWMA, James-Stein, rank-r SVD): none significantly beats the frozen baseline under Holm correction; two are significantly worse. The resulting method, FLAIR, is (a) Effective: matches PatchTST on aggregate GIFT-Eval (relMASE 0.838 vs 0.849); (b) Compact: 28 scalars for hourly, 57 for weekly; (c) Fast: 22 minutes on one CPU core of a MacBook Pro; (d) Closed-form & Hands-Off: one SVD per period candidate, GCV-averaged Ridge, no GPU, no pre-training, no per-task tuning. In the high-rank-1, many-cycle regime, extra flexibility is estimation noise.

</details>


### [560] [GameGen-Verifier: Parallel Keypoint-Based Verification for LLM-Generated Games via Runtime State Injection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07442)
*Chaobo Jia,Ruipeng Wan,Ting Sun,Weihao Tan,Borui Wan,Yuxuan Tong,Guangming Sheng,Hong Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 提出GameGen-Verifier，一种将游戏规范分解为可验证关键点并转化为独立验证单元的自动化验证框架，用于检测LLM生成游戏的正确性，相比基线方法准确率提升至92.2%，速度提升16.6倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM游戏生成缺乏可靠自动化验证，Agent-as-a-Verifier方法将验证退化为开放式游戏测试，存在耗时、覆盖率有限、依赖智能体能力等问题。

Method: 将规范分解为可验证关键点，每个关键点对应独立验证单元，通过补丁将游戏运行时置于具体目标状态，执行有界交互并基于关键点断言判断结果。实现GGV-Harness提供并发管理、运行时隔离和故障恢复。

Result: 在VeriGame数据集（7个品类100个游戏）上，GameGen-Verifier准确率达92.2%，远超基线58.8%，同时耗时降低16.6倍。

Conclusion: 分解式验证范式能有效替代开放式的智能体游戏测试，在准确性和效率上均显著优于现有方法。

Abstract: LLM-based game generation promises to turn natural-language specifications into executable games, but progress is limited by the lack of reliable automated verification. Unlike conventional code generation, game correctness is defined over long-horizon interaction: a game may appear correct while violating core mechanics such as state updates, interaction rules, and phase transitions. Existing Agent-as-a-Verifier approaches collapse verification into open-ended gameplay, making verdicts reachability-bound, time-consuming, coverage-limited, and sensitive to the agent's gameplay ability.
  We present GameGen-Verifier, an automated verification paradigm for LLM-generated games that decomposes a specification into verifiable keypoints and grounds them into independent verification units. Each unit patches the game runtime into a concrete target state, executes a bounded interaction, and judges the outcome against the keypoint assertion. We implement GGV-Harness, a scalable agentic harness providing concurrency management, runtime isolation, and fault recovery.
  On VeriGame, our dataset of 100 games across seven genres, GameGen-Verifier achieves up to 92.2% accuracy against human judgments versus 58.8% for the coverage-enforced Agent-as-a-Verifier baseline, while reducing wall-clock time by up to 16.6x.

</details>


### [561] [Spectral Surgery: Class-Targeted Post-Hoc Rebalancing via Hessian Spike Perturbation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07790)
*Hugo Vigna,Samuel Bontemps*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 提出"光谱手术"（Spectral Surgery），一种利用训练后网络Hessian矩阵的尖峰特征向量来调整模型权重、重新平衡各类别准确率的后处理方法，无需重新训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管已观察到深度网络Hessian谱存在尖峰结构，且尖峰数量等于类别数减1，但尚无方法将其用于实际提升分类性能。

Method: (1) 构建尖峰-类别敏感度矩阵，量化沿每个尖峰特征向量方向的类别准确率方向导数；(2) 约束优化扰动系数，优先提升弱类别性能同时保持强类别；(3) 自适应振幅控制，基于迭代级改进信号动态调整扰动预算。

Result: 在CIFAR-10和ISIC-2019上，平衡准确率和标准差均取得令人鼓舞的提升。

Conclusion: 光谱手术是一种有效的后处理微调方法，可重平衡各类别准确率，验证了Hessian谱结构在实际优化中的操作性价值。

Abstract: The Hessian spectrum of trained deep networks exhibits a characteristic structure: a continuous bulk of near-zero eigenvalues and a small number of large outlier eigenvalues (spikes), confirming the relevance of Random Matrix Theory in deep learning. The spike count matches the number of classes minus one. While prior work has described this structure, no method has exploited it operationally to improve classification performance. We propose Spectral Surgery, a post-hoc optimization method that directly perturbs model weights along spike eigenvectors to rebalance per-class accuracy without retraining. We introduce (i) a spike-class sensitivity matrix that quantifies the directional derivative of each class's accuracy along each spike eigenvector, (ii) a constrained optimization of perturbation coefficients that targets weak classes while preserving strong ones, and (iii) an adaptive amplitude control that raises or lowers the perturbation budget based on iteration-level improvement signals. We obtain encouraging results on CIFAR-10 and ISIC-2019 on both balanced accuracy and standard deviation.

</details>


### [562] [Optimal Recourse Summaries via Bi-Objective Decision Tree Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07598)
*Ioannis Chatzis,Jason Liartis,Athanasios Voulodimos,Giorgos Stamou*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 本文提出SOGAR方法，将可执行追索总结学习形式化为最优决策树学习问题，通过寻找帕累托前沿来平衡追索有效性和成本之间的权衡，无需重新训练即可事后选择期望的权衡方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的可执行追索方法在实例级别有效，但难以进行全局审计和偏差检测，因为聚合局部行动成本高且不一致。追索总结通过将人群分区并为每个子组分配共享行动来解决这一问题，但现有方法未能充分处理追索有效性与成本之间的基本权衡。

Method: SOGAR将追索总结学习形式化为最优决策树学习问题，通过浅层轴平行决策树和稀疏叶节点行动，寻找帕累托前沿——即改善一个目标必然会恶化另一个目标的完整解集。

Result: SOGAR在有效性和成本指标上均优于现有方法，能够产生稳定、低成本且有效的追索总结，并支持事后选择期望的权衡方案而无需重新训练。

Conclusion: SOGAR有效地解决了追索总结中有效性与成本之间的权衡问题，通过帕累托前沿提供灵活的事后权衡选择，为全局审计和偏差检测提供了实用工具。

Abstract: Actionable Recourse provides individuals with actions they can take to change an unfavorable classifier outcome. While useful at the instance level, it is ill-suited for global auditing and bias detection, since aggregating local actions is costly and often inconsistent. Recourse Summaries address this limitation by partitioning the population and assigning one shared action per subgroup, enabling comparison across subgroups. Designing summaries involves a fundamental trade-off between recourse effectiveness and recourse cost, which existing methods do not adequately address. We introduce Summaries of Optimal and Global Actionable Recourse (SOGAR), which formulates recourse summary learning as an optimal decision tree learning problem and finds the Pareto front -- the complete set of solutions where improving one objective necessarily worsens the other. SOGAR enables post-hoc selection of the desired trade-off without retraining. Using shallow axis-parallel decision trees and sparse leaf actions, SOGAR produces stable, low-cost, and effective recourse summaries that outperform existing approaches across effectiveness and cost metrics.

</details>


### [563] [It Just Takes Two: Scaling Amortized Inference to Large Sets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07972)
*Antoine Wehenkel,Michael Kagan,Lukas Heinrich,Chris Pollard*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种解耦表示学习与后验建模的策略，通过训练最大规模为2的均值池化Deep Set编码器，使其泛化到任意集合大小，从而大幅降低神经后验估计在集合观测场景下的训练成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在许多科学和应用场景中，条件变量是一组观测，其元素不仅依赖于目标，还受共享的未知因素影响。最优推断需要联合处理整个集合，但这要求在部署集合大小下训练估计器，导致内存和计算成本迅速变得不可承受。

Method: 训练一个基于均值池化的Deep Set编码器，训练时仅使用大小不超过2的集合，使其学习到可泛化的表示；然后对预聚合的嵌入进行后验头微调，使训练成本与部署集合大小N基本无关。

Result: 在标量、图像、多视图3D、分子和高维条件生成等多个基准上，当N达到数千时，该方法在匹配或超越标准基线的同时，大幅降低了计算成本。

Conclusion: 该方法提供了一种计算高效且理论上可解释的策略，使后验估计器能够扩展到任意大的观测集合，而不必在部署大小下直接训练。

Abstract: Neural posterior estimation has emerged as a powerful tool for amortized inference, with growing adoption across scientific and applied domains. In many of these applications, the conditioning variable is a set of observations whose elements depend not only on the target but also on unknown factors shared across the set. Optimal inference therefore requires treating the set jointly, which in turn requires training the estimator at the deployment set size -- a regime where memory and compute quickly become prohibitive. We introduce a simple, theoretically grounded strategy that decouples representation learning from posterior modeling. Our method trains a mean-pool Deep Set on sets of size at most two, producing an encoder that generalizes to arbitrary set sizes. The inference head is then finetuned on pre-aggregated embeddings, making training cost essentially independent of the deployment set size N. Across scalar, image, multi-view 3D, molecular, and high-dimensional conditional generation benchmarks with N in the thousands, our approach matches or outperforms standard baselines at a fraction of the compute.

</details>


### [564] [McNdroid: A Longitudinal Multimodal Benchmark for Robust Drift Detection in Android Malware](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06894)
*Md Mahmuduzzaman Kamol,Jesus Lopez,Saeefa Rubaiyet Nowmi,Emilia Rivas,Md Ahsanul Haque,Edward Raff,Aritran Piplai,Mohammad Saidur Rahman*

Main category: cs.CR

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: McNdroid是一个2013-2025年（缺2015年）的大型纵向多模态Android恶意软件基准数据集，包含静态、动态和图三种模态。实验表明时间退化导致性能下降，多模态融合在长时间跨度下优于单模态，且跨模态一致性随时间衰减。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实系统中的ML面临概念漂移、对抗攻击和特征成本差异等挑战，恶意软件领域天然具有这些复杂性，但缺乏大规模、纵向、多模态的组织数据来系统研究这些因素。

Method: 构建McNdroid基准数据集，包含三个对齐模态（清单与smali代码的静态特征、沙箱执行的动态行为特征、函数调用图的图特征），采用时间分离的数据划分，评估标准ML和深度学习检测器在不同训练-测试时间间隔下的表现。

Result: 时间退化导致性能下降；多模态融合在长时间跨度下优于最佳单模态；跨模态一致性随时间衰减；漂移影响单个特征空间和模态间一致性。

Conclusion: 发布了McNdroid基准及代码以支持安全关键非平稳环境下时间泛化和鲁棒多模态学习的可复现研究。

Abstract: Machine learning (ML) in real-world systems must contend with concept drift, adversarial actors, and a spectrum of potential features with varying costs and benefits. Malware naturally exhibits all of these complexities, but for the same reason, it is challenging to curate and organize data to study these factors. We present McNdroid, to our knowledge the largest longitudinal multimodal Android malware benchmark for malware detection and drift analysis. McNdroid spans 2013--2025, excluding 2015, and represents each application with three aligned modalities--static features from manifests and smali code, dynamic behavioral features from sandbox execution, and graph-based features from function-call graphs. Using temporally separated splits, we evaluate standard ML and deep-learning detectors across increasing train--test time gaps. Results show clear temporal degradation, while multimodal fusion outperforms the best single modality across long-term temporal gaps. Cross-modal agreement also declines over time, suggesting that drift affects both individual feature spaces and the consistency among modalities. We further analyze modality-specific drift, malware-family evolution, and temporal changes in model explanations. We publicly release McNdroid, benchmark splits, and code to support reproducible research on temporal generalization and robust multimodal learning in security-critical, non-stationary settings.

</details>


### [565] [Beyond the Wrapper: Identifying Artifact Reliance in Static Malware Classifiers using TRUSTEE](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07034)
*Riyazuddin Mohammed,Lan Zhang*

Main category: cs.CR

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 本文针对基于机器学习的恶意软件分类器过度依赖打包等非语义特征的问题，提出使用可解释性AI工具TRUSTEE进行事后可解释分析，发现分类器主要学习的是打包伪影和PE元数据而非真正的恶意语义，并指出数据集组成对模型行为有显著影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的静态恶意软件分类器不可靠，因为它们容易学习到打包等非语义变换形成的伪影，而非真正的恶意行为；同时这些分类器是黑盒模型，难以理解其内部决策机制。

Method: 提出两阶段框架：1) 使用事后可解释性工具TRUSTEE提取重要特征；2) 人工分析顶级特征。通过改变数据集组成比例进行对照实验，系统性评估数据集偏差对分类器学习行为的影响。

Result: TRUSTEE识别出的顶级特征主要是打包伪影、PE元数据和字符串层面n-gram，而非恶意语义特征；这些结果表明分类器对数据集组成高度敏感，可能将打包误判为恶意行为。

Conclusion: 该框架可复现地诊断分类器中的偏差，为构建更鲁棒且语义有意义的恶意软件检测模型提供了指导原则。

Abstract: Modern cybersecurity relies heavily on static machine-learning-based malware classifiers. However, transformations such as packing and other non-semantic modifications applied to executable files limit their reliability. Malware classifiers often learn these unnecessary artifacts rather than the true binary behavior because of the high association between maliciousness and packing. Moreover, these malware classifiers are black boxes, making it difficult to understand what they learn. To address this issue, we proposed a two-part framework using the post-hoc interpretability XAI tool TRUSTEE, followed by a manual analysis of the top features. We conducted several controlled experiments by varying the dataset composition ratios to understand their impact on the results. The top-ranked features across all experiments, identified by TRUSTEE, were predominantly packing artifacts, portable executable(PE) metadata, and n-grams at the string level, rather than malicious semantics. These results suggest that these malware classifiers are highly sensitive to dataset composition and can misinterpret packing as malicious behavior. Our proposed framework allows for the reproducible diagnosis of such biases and forms a guideline for building more robust and semantically meaningful malware detection models

</details>


### [566] [Classification Fields: Arbitrarily Fine Recursive Hierarchical Clustering From Few Examples](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07119)
*Yicen Li,Ruiyang Hong,Anastasis Kratsios,Haitz Sáez de Ocáriz Borde,Paul D. McNicholas*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 本文提出分类场（Classification Fields）模型，用于无限深度层次聚类结构，通过局部父到子的细化规则在R^d上生成聚类中心、Voronoi细胞和度量DAG。给定有限前缀，可学习生成器并外推至未见深度，证明指数截断收敛性和ReLU可实现性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统聚类方法只能返回有限样本的划分或有限树状图，无法处理具有无限深度递归几何结构的层次聚类问题（如分形、图像递归聚类）。本文旨在建立能够从有限观测中学习并外推至无限深度的层次聚类框架。

Method: 定义分类场生成器，包含根节点、尺度因子和局部父到子细化规则（有序、有界、分离的子残差元组）。递归生成聚类中心、Voronoi细胞及度量DAG。学习时，基于有限前缀近似生成器，通过ReLU网络实现，宽度O(ε^{-γ})、深度Õ(ε^{-3γ/2})，其中γ=logK/(-logs)。

Result: 在CFG生成层次、IFS分形和图像递归聚类层次上验证，学到的预测器在递归外推下能保持有序子插槽、无序几何和层次路径度量。理论证明在完备细胞度量Hausdorff距离下指数截断收敛。

Conclusion: 有限层次观测足以揭示局部分类规则，从而生成更深的分类场。分类场为无限深度层次聚类提供了理论基础和可学习的框架。

Abstract: Classical clustering methods usually return either a finite partition of the observed data or a finite dendrogram over it. This finite-sample view is inadequate when the hierarchy of interest is a recursive geometric object with fine-scale refinements that continue beyond the levels directly observed. We introduce classification fields: infinite-depth hierarchical cluster structures on $\mathbb{R}^d$ generated by a local parent-to-child refinement rule. A classification field generator maps each parent centre to an ordered, bounded, and separated tuple of child residuals. Together with a root and a scale factor, this rule recursively generates cluster centres, Voronoi cells, and a metric DAG encoding the hierarchy. Given only a finite prefix of such a hierarchy, we learn a classification field predictor that approximates the generator and can be rolled out to unseen depths. We prove exponential truncation convergence in the completed cell metric and ReLU realizability with width $O(\varepsilon^{-γ})$ and depth $\widetilde O(\varepsilon^{-3γ/2})$, where $γ=\log K/(-\log s)$, up to finite-window aspect-ratio factors. The approximation holds at the level of the induced compact metric structures, measured in the completed cell-metric Hausdorff distance. Experimental validation on matched CFG-generated hierarchies, IFS fractals, and image-induced recursive clustering hierarchies shows that learned predictors preserve ordered child slots, unordered geometry, and hierarchy-level path metrics under recursive rollout. These results support the claim that finite hierarchical observations can reveal local refinement rules capable of generating substantially deeper classification fields.

</details>


### [567] [How Big Should a Wireless Foundation Model Be?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07266)
*Wei-Lun Cheng,Wanjiun Liao*

Main category: cs.IT

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 本文提出无线基础模型的扩展规律受信道固有维度（dNL，约5-35）物理约束，远低于语言的千维语义空间。以NTN卫星信道为例，参数超过3000万后扩展收益急剧下降，而测试时训练（TTT）能使仅1200万参数模型在性能上超越9600万静态模型。核心结论：信道几何而非模型大小决定了物理层无线AI的扩展规律。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 无线基础模型作为AI原生通信系统的关键使能技术正快速兴起，但一个根本问题仍未解答：这些模型应该有多大？现有研究缺少从物理原理出发的扩展规律分析。

Method: 从麦克斯韦方程、有限散射体和天线孔径等物理约束出发，推导信道的非线性流形维度（dNL）作为扩展瓶颈。基于真实OTA测量和3GPP标准化信道模型验证dNL分布（5-35），并以NTN卫星信道（dNL≈14）为案例，系统分析模型参数规模与性能的扩展关系，对比传统静态扩展与推理时测试时训练（TTT）的效果。

Result: dNL在5-35之间，远低于语言的~1000维语义空间。NTN卫星信道中，参数超过3000万后扩展收益急剧下降，7000万以上进入随机渐近区（9600万→1.5亿仅提升0.52 dB）。TTT策略下，1200万参数模型比9600万静态模型在NMSE指标上提升9.9 dB（SNR=20 dB），在MCM提升7.6 dB（SNR=10 dB），参数仅为后者的1/8。

Conclusion: 无线基础模型的扩展规律受物理信道几何（dNL）而非模型大小主导，提出了一种以物理约束为导向的无线AI可扩展框架，重新定义了物理层无线AI的设计方向。

Abstract: Wireless foundation models are rapidly emerging as a key enabler of AI-native communication systems, yet a fundamental question remains unanswered: how large should these models be? We present a principled, physics-grounded answer, showing that the intrinsic dimensionality (dNL, the nonlinear manifold dimension of the channel) acts as the fundamental bottleneck, defining the scaling ceiling once a data-sufficient regime is reached. This dimensionality is not a design choice but a physical constraint: Maxwell's equations, finite scatterers, and antenna aperture inherently constrain wireless propagation environments to a limited number of degrees of freedom -- spanning 5-35 across both real-world OTA measurements and 3GPP-standardized channel models we evaluate -- orders of magnitude below the ~1,000-dimensional semantic space of language. As a consequence, we propose a scaling framework for wireless AI: taking NTN satellite channels as a representative case (dNL ~= 14), scaling gains diminish rapidly beyond ~30 million parameters, entering a stochastic asymptote above 70M where a further 1.6x increase (96M->150M) yields only 0.52 dB. Beyond this ceiling, inference-time adaptation via pilot-aided test-time training (TTT) is far more effective: a compact 12M-parameter model surpasses a static 96M model by 9.9 dB (NMSE, SNR = 20 dB) / 7.6 dB (MCM, SNR = 10 dB) at one-eighth the parameters. With dNL distributions validated across real-world indoor massive MIMO measurements, our scaling laws and TTT gains are demonstrated through NTN satellite simulations, reframing wireless AI design: channel geometry -- not model size -- fundamentally governs the scaling laws of physical-layer wireless AI.

</details>


### [568] [Semiparametric Efficient Test for Interpretable Distributional Treatment Effects](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08034)
*Houssam Zenati,Arthur Gretton*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 本文提出DR-ME方法，首个半参数有效有限位置检验，用于可解释的分布式处理效应检测。通过双重稳健核特征和协方差白化，在保持全局检验功效的同时，定位处理效应发生的具体位置，并保证后选择有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统均值比较无法捕捉处理在分布尾部、模式、离散度等方面的影响，而全局核检验虽能检测分布差异，却无法揭示差异具体发生在何处。作者希望开发一种既能检测分布式处理效应，又能定位差异位置的检验方法。

Method: 提出DR-ME框架：1) 从观测数据推导正交双重稳健核特征，其中心化oracle形式是有限见证的规范梯度；2) 对固定位置，DR-ME在原假设下服从卡方校准，局部备择下为非中心卡方分布；3) 通过协方差白化优化局部信噪比；4) 使用样本分裂保证后选择推断的有效性。

Result: 实验显示：接近名义第一类错误率；与全局双重稳健核检验相比具有竞争力的功效；在半合成医学图像研究中成功学习到可解释的位置，定位了分布式处理效应。

Conclusion: DR-ME是首个能同时检测并定位分布式处理效应的半参数有效方法，兼具统计效率和可解释性，为因果推断中的分布效应分析提供了新工具。

Abstract: Distributional treatment effects can be invisible to means: a treatment may preserve average outcomes while changing tails, modes, dispersion, or rare-event probabilities. Kernel tests can detect discrepancies between interventional outcome laws, but global tests do not reveal where the laws differ. We propose DR-ME, to our knowledge the first semiparametrically efficient finite-location test for interpretable distributional treatment effects. DR-ME evaluates an interventional kernel witness at learned outcome locations, returning causal-discrepancy coordinates rather than only a global rejection. From observational data, we derive orthogonal doubly robust kernel features whose centered oracle form is the canonical gradient of this finite witness. For fixed locations, we characterize the local testing limit: DR-ME is chi-square calibrated under the null, has noncentral chi-square local power, and uses the covariance whitening that optimizes local signal-to-noise for discrepancies visible through the selected coordinates. This efficient local-power geometry yields a principled location-learning criterion, with sample splitting preserving post-selection validity. Experiments show near-nominal type-I error, competitive power against global doubly robust kernel tests, and interpretable learned locations that localize distributional effects in a semi-synthetic medical-imaging study.

</details>


### [569] [Learned Lyapunov Shielding for Adaptive Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06934)
*Giansalvo Cirrincione,Adriano Fagiolini*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 42.0

TL;DR: 该论文将Slotine-Li自适应控制器与三种学习组件（结构化二次型李雅普诺夫函数、残差SAC策略、物理信息神经网络）结合，并设计了无需在线求解的闭式安全滤波器，在2-DOF和7-DOF机械臂上验证了效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统自适应控制器在处理未建模动力学、非线性摩擦和变负载等复杂场景时性能受限，作者希望通过学习组件增强控制器性能，同时保持安全性和可证明的收敛性保证。

Method: 1) 使用Cholesky分解参数化保证正定性的结构化二次型李雅普诺夫函数；2) 残差SAC策略提供有界力矩修正；3) PINN估计未建模动力学；4) 基于单仿射约束推导闭式安全滤波器，无需在线QP求解。

Result: 2-DOF机械臂上跟踪误差下降41%（标称摩擦）和24%（强摩擦）；7-DOF Franka Emika Panda上验证了可扩展性；识别了学习证书的暖启动病理现象。

Conclusion: 学习型证书是性能提升的主要来源，但存在暖启动病理；所提框架在理论保证和实际部署之间存在trade-off，需根据条件判断是否优于精确模型基线。

Abstract: We augment the Slotine--Li adaptive controller for Euler--Lagrange systems with three learned components: a structured-quadratic Lyapunov function \(V_ψ\) whose positive-definiteness follows from a Cholesky parameterization, a residual Soft Actor--Critic policy that adds bounded torque corrections to the analytic baseline, and a physics-informed neural network that estimates unmodeled dynamics. A closed-form safety filter, derived from the single affine constraint \(\dot V_ψ+ αV_ψ\le 0\), projects every policy output onto the safe set without requiring an online QP solver. We prove: global feasibility of the filter under a drift-decay condition on the control-degeneracy set; exponential stability under exact shielding, with a robust extension whose margin depends on the PINN approximation error; almost-sure convergence of the three-timescale policy--certificate--multiplier updates to a KKT point; and a PAC generalization bound for the certificate over compacts. On a 2-DOF manipulator with nonlinear friction and variable payload, the learned certificate accounts for most of the empirical gain: tracking error drops by 41\% on nominal friction and 24\% on aggressive friction at the centroid of the training distribution. A 7-DOF scalability study on a Franka Emika Panda confirms clean convergence of the full pipeline at industrial scale, identifies the conditions under which gains over exact model-based baselines should and should not be expected, and documents a warm-start pathology of the learned certificate that has practical implications for deployment.

</details>


### [570] [Mask2Cause: Causal Discovery via Adjacency Constrained Causal Attention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07280)
*Omar Muhammad,Pasupuleti Dhruv Shivkant,Deepak N. Subramani*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 42.0

TL;DR: Mask2Cause是一个端到端框架，通过前向传播中的掩码注意力机制直接恢复时间序列的因果图，无需后处理步骤，在多个基准上达到SOTA因果发现性能，并能将预测模型参数减少70%以上。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经方法要么依赖组件式架构无法捕获共享系统动态，要么采用解耦的后处理图提取容易过拟合虚假关联，缺乏端到端的因果发现方案。

Method: 提出倒置变量嵌入（Inverted Variable Embedding）和邻接约束掩码注意力（Adjacency-Constrained Masked Attention），通过同方差或异方差目标在预测前向传播中直接恢复因果图。

Result: 在合成混沌动力学和真实生物模拟等多样基准上达到SOTA因果发现效果，参数复杂度显著低于标准基线；推断的因果结构可将预测模型参数减少70%以上且保持预测精度。

Conclusion: 端到端因果发现不仅能提升因果结构恢复的准确性，还能大幅压缩预测模型的参数规模，验证了因果结构作为模型正则化手段的有效性。

Abstract: Leveraging deep learning for causal discovery in time series remains challenging because existing neural methods predominantly rely on component-wise architectures that fail to capture shared system dynamics or employ decoupled post-hoc graph extraction that risks overfitting to spurious correlations. We propose $\textbf{Mask2Cause}$, an end-to-end framework that recovers the underlying causal graph directly during the forecasting forward pass. Our approach introduces an Inverted Variable Embedding and an Adjacency-Constrained Masked Attention mechanism, trained with homoscedastic or heteroscedastic objectives to capture causal influences in both mean and variance. Empirical results on diverse benchmarks, from synthetic chaotic dynamics to realistic biological simulations, demonstrate state-of-the-art causal discovery with significantly reduced parameter complexity compared to standard baselines. We further show that inferred causal structures can be used to reduce parameter count of forecasting models by more than 70% on average while maintaining predictive accuracy.

</details>


### [571] [Revisiting Adam for Streaming Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06764)
*Florin Gogianu,Adrian Catalin Lutu,Razvan Pascanu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 40.0

TL;DR: 本文重新审视了无经验回放的在线深度强化学习，发现经典方法（如C51）在适当优化下能取得优异性能，并由此提出Adaptive Q(λ)算法，在55个Atari游戏上超越了现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索在不使用经验回放或并行采样的纯在线（streaming）设置下，深度强化学习是否仍能稳定学习，并分析其关键因素。

Method: 通过理论分析指出目标函数导数有界和权重更新方差调整是关键性质；基于此设计Adaptive Q(λ)算法，结合eligibility traces与方差调整机制。

Result: C51在无经验回放的在线设置下与StreamQ相竞争；Adaptive Q(λ)在55个Atari游戏上达到双倍人类基线水平，在所有指标上超越现有方法。

Conclusion: 在线深度强化学习可行的关键在于导数有界性和方差调整，这为设计更简单的流式学习算法提供了指导原则。

Abstract: Learning from a sequence of interactions, as soon as observations are perceived and acted upon, without explicitly storing them, holds the promise of simpler, more efficient and adaptive algorithms. For over a decade, however, deep reinforcement learning walked the contrary path, augmenting agents with replay buffers or parallel sampling routines, in an effort to tame learning instability. Recently, this topic has been revisited by Elsayed et al. (2024), focusing on update computation through eligibility traces and modifications to the optimisation routine, resulting in the StreamQ algorithm. In this work we take a step back, investigating the efficacy of established updates, such as those implemented by DQN and C51 within this online setting. Not only do we find that they perform well, but through analysing how the optimisation algorithm generally, and Adam in particular, interacts with these updates, we contend that two properties are essential for robust performance: i) the derivative of the objective is to be bounded and ii) weight updates are variance-adjusted. Rigorous and exhaustive experimentation demonstrates that C51, which exhibits both characteristics, is competitive with StreamQ across a subset of 55 Atari games. Using these insights, we derive a variance-adjusted algorithm based on eligibility traces, termed Adaptive Q$(λ)$, which approaches double the human baseline on the same subset, surpassing existing methods by all performance metrics.

</details>


### [572] [FlashMol: High-Quality Molecule Generation in as Few as Four Steps](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07020)
*Xinyuan Wei,Zian Li,Shaoheng Yan,Cai Zhou,Muhan Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 40.0

TL;DR: FlashMol提出了一种基于分布匹配蒸馏（DMD）的超快速分子构象生成模型，仅需4步即可生成高质量3D分子构象，相比传统1000步扩散模型实现250倍加速，且质量不降反升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统扩散模型（如GeoLDM）生成分子构象需要数百步，计算成本高，难以大规模虚拟筛选。现有加速方法虽将步数降至12-50步，但严重牺牲了样本稳定性。亟需一种既能大幅加速又能保持分子质量的生成方法。

Method: 1) 将分布匹配蒸馏（DMD，基于反向KL散度最小化）适配到分子构象生成领域；2) 重新设计分子生成的时间步长分布，为生成器提供更好的初始化；3) 引入Jensen-Shannon散度正则化项，融合前向KL散度的均值搜索行为，缓解DMD的模式搜索问题，提升多样性。

Result: 在QM9和GEOM-DRUG数据集上，FlashMol仅需4步即可匹配甚至超越原始1000步教师模型的生成质量，采样速度提升高达250倍。

Conclusion: FlashMol证明了通过蒸馏与正则化策略，可以在分子构象生成任务中实现极致的加速（4步），同时保持甚至提升生成质量，为大规模药物虚拟筛选提供了高效工具。

Abstract: Generating chemically valid 3D molecular conformations is critical for computational drug discovery. Classical diffusion-based models like GeoLDM perform well but require hundreds of steps, making large-scale in silico screening impractical. Recent efforts on few-step molecular generation have accelerated this process to 12-50 steps, but they often largely sacrifice sample stability. In this work, we present FlashMol, an ultra-fast molecule generative model producing high-quality molecular conformations in as few as 4 steps. To achieve this, we adapt distribution matching distillation (DMD) - a reverse KL-divergence minimization objective - to the molecular domain for effective distillation. Considering the local minimization behavior of DMD, we respace the molecule generation timesteps, providing the generator with much better initialization and enables effective distillation. Additionally, to mitigate the mode-seeking behavior of DMD and improve diversity, we further regularize it with a Jensen-Shannon divergence term, which incorporates the mean-seeking behavior of the forward KL divergence. Extensive experiments on QM9 and GEOM-DRUG datasets demonstrate that FlashMol matches and even surpasses the original 1000-step teacher, achieving up to 250$\times$ acceleration in sampling speed while maintaining high molecular quality.

</details>


### [573] [Solving Max-Cut to Global Optimality via Feasibility-Preserving Graph Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07113)
*Hao Chen,Chendi Qian,Christopher Morris,Andrea Lodi,Can Li*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 40.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种专用于Max-Cut问题的图神经网络，作为半定规划（SDP）松弛的轻量级神经代理，可直接嵌入精确的分支定界框架中，将边界计算成本降低高达10.6倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在精确求解组合优化问题时，分支定界算法需要反复求解强凸松弛（如SDP），计算开销巨大。作者希望设计一个轻量级的神经代理来替代昂贵的SDP求解器，在保持解有效性的同时大幅加速边界计算。

Method: 提出一种Max-Cut专用的图神经网络架构，更新步骤复杂度为O(n²+ne)，能够同时预测原始可行和对偶可行的SDP解。原始SDP解通过Goemans-Williamson算法生成可行的Max-Cut解。模型采用自监督训练方式，无需已求解的SDP松弛作为标签。

Result: 与最先进的SDP求解器Mosek相比，该方法在精确求解Max-Cut时可将边界计算成本降低高达10.6倍。

Conclusion: 验证了学习的、保持有效性的神经代理在加速结构化凸松弛的精确优化方面的潜力。

Abstract: Exact solution of hard combinatorial optimization problems often relies on strong convex relaxations, but solving these relaxations repeatedly inside a branch-and-bound algorithm can be prohibitively expensive. Hence, we consider this challenge for Max-Cut, where branch and bound commonly uses semidefinite programming (SDP) relaxations to bound subproblems. We propose a Max-Cut-specific graph neural network that serves as a principled, lightweight neural proxy for these SDP solvers and can be plugged directly into an exact branch-and-bound framework. The proposed architecture has update steps of complexity $\mathcal{O}(n^2 + ne)$, and predicts both primal- and dual-feasible SDP solutions. The primal SDP solutions yield feasible Max-Cut solutions via the Goemans--Williamson algorithm. In addition, it is trained in a self-supervised fashion without requiring solved SDP relaxations as labels. Empirically, we show that our architecture can substantially reduce the cost of bounding in exact Max-Cut solving by up to $10.6 \times$ compared with using the state-of-the-art SDP solver Mosek. Our work highlights the potential of learned, validity-preserving surrogates for accelerating exact optimization over structured convex relaxations.

</details>


### [574] [Transfer Learning Across Fast- and Full-Simulation Domains in High-Energy Physics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07471)
*Matthias Schott,Lucie Flek*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 40.0

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了高能物理中快速模拟与完全模拟数据集之间的迁移学习，使用三种代表性任务和多种神经网络架构，发现预训练模型始终优于独立训练的基线，并将目标域所需数据量减少约一半。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高能物理中全模拟样本计算成本高，快速模拟虽然高效但保真度有限，因此研究如何通过迁移学习利用快速模拟数据预训练模型，再适配到全模拟数据，以降低计算开销并提升数据效率。

Method: 在三种代表性任务（信号-本底分类、夸克-胶子喷注重标、缺失横向能量重建）上，使用密集神经网络、图神经网络和基于Transformer的架构，分别在ATLAS类快速模拟上预训练，然后迁移到CMS类快速模拟和ATLAS全模拟数据。

Result: 预训练模型在所有任务中一致优于独立训练的基线模型，并将目标域所需训练数据量减少约一半。

Conclusion: 快速模拟可以用于学习鲁棒、可复用的表示，建议将训练好的模型作为可复用的科学资产发布，超越大型基础模型的范畴。

Abstract: Machine-learning models in high-energy physics are often trained on simulated data, where fully simulated samples are computationally expensive while fast simulation provides large statistics at reduced realism. In this work, we systematically study transfer learning between fast-simulated and fully simulated datasets in a realistic LHC environment. We consider three representative tasks, signal-background classification, quark-gluon jet tagging, and missing transverse energy reconstruction, using dense neural networks, graph neural networks, and transformer-based architectures. Models are pretrained on ATLAS-like fast simulation and adapted to CMS-like fast simulation and to fully simulated ATLAS Open Data. Across all tasks, pretrained models consistently outperform independently trained baselines and require significantly less target-domain training data, typically reducing the needed statistics by about a factor of two. These results demonstrate that fast simulation can be used to learn robust, reusable representations and motivate publishing trained models as reusable scientific assets beyond large foundation models.

</details>


### [575] [Adaptive Regularization for Sparsity Control in Bregman-Based Optimizers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07892)
*Ahmad Aloradi,Tim Roith,Emanuël A. P. Habets,Daniel Tenbrinck*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 40.0

TL;DR: 本文针对Bregman优化器（LinBreg和AdaBreg）在稀疏训练中对正则化参数λ极度敏感的问题，提出了一种自适应正则化方案，通过动态调整λ使模型达到用户指定的目标稀疏度（75%-99%），在说话人验证任务上验证了方法的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的稀疏优化方法（如ℓ1正则化）通过参数λ间接控制稀疏度，但λ与最终稀疏率的映射关系复杂，尤其对于Bregman类优化器，不同变体在相同λ下稀疏度差异可达两个数量级，需要大量试错才能达到目标稀疏度，成本高昂。

Method: 提出自适应正则化机制：根据模型当前稀疏度与目标稀疏度之间的差异动态更新λ。具体在LinBreg和AdaBreg优化器基础上，引入反馈控制项来调整正则化强度。

Result: 在ECAPA-TDNN和ResNet34模型、VoxCeleb和CNCeleb数据集上的自动说话人验证实验中，该方法可靠地实现了75%-99%的目标稀疏度；相比oracle调优的非自适应基线，早期训练收敛更快，最终等错误率（EER）相当或更优；同时继承非自适应版本的分布外鲁棒性优势。

Conclusion: 自适应λ调度方案可以高效、可靠地实现目标稀疏度，避免了昂贵的超参数搜索，同时保持甚至提升模型性能与鲁棒性。

Abstract: Sparse training reduces the memory and computational costs of deep neural networks. However, sparse optimization methods, e.g., those adding an $\ell_1$ penalty, often control sparsity only indirectly through a regularization parameter $λ$, whose mapping to the final sparsity rate is non-trivial. In our experiments, we found this parameter sensitivity to be particularly pronounced for Bregman-based optimizers. Specifically, the two variants LinBreg and AdaBreg reach the same sparsity at $λ$ values that differ by up to two orders of magnitude, requiring expensive trial-and-error sweeps to achieve a user-specified sparsity. To address this, we propose an adaptive regularization scheme that updates $λ$ based on the difference between the model's current sparsity and the target sparsity. We analyze the resulting algorithm and evaluate it on automatic speaker verification with ECAPA-TDNN and ResNet34 on VoxCeleb and CNCeleb. The proposed method reliably achieves sparsity targets ranging between 75% and 99%. It also converges faster than the oracle-tuned non-adaptive baseline during early training and matches or surpasses its final performance in equal error rate. We further show that the adaptive scheme inherits key properties from its non-adaptive counterpart, including improved out-of-distribution robustness over the dense baselines.

</details>


### [576] [Prototype Guided Post-pretraining for Single-Cell Representation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07938)
*Sachini Weerasekara,Natasha Darras,Sagar Kamarthi,Colles Price,Jacqueline Isaacs*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 40.0

TL;DR: CellRefine是一种面向单细胞基础模型的后预训练方法，利用标记基因集作为结构先验来优化细胞潜在嵌入流形，在下游任务上取得最高15%的性能提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 单细胞预训练模型受限于细胞类型分布的长尾特性和基因表达数据的协变量偏移，微调性能存在瓶颈，需要在预训练与微调之间引入干预手段。

Method: 提出CellRefine方法，位于预训练与微调之间，利用多面目标函数引入标记基因集作为结构先验，引导后预训练过程并优化细胞的潜在嵌入流形。

Result: 在多个计算生物学下游任务上，CellRefine一致地提升了性能，最高提升达15%。

Conclusion: 后预训练阶段引入结构先验（如标记基因集）可以有效缓解单细胞基础模型的泛化瓶颈，为预训练模型的适配提供新范式。

Abstract: Single-cell representation learning (SCRL) from gene expression data offers a way to uncover the complex regulatory logic underlying cellular function. Inspired by large language models in natural language modeling, several single-cell pretrained models have recently been proposed that treat genes as tokens and cells as sentences. However, these models are fundamentally limited by the long-tailed nature of cell-type distributions and struggle to generalize under covariate shifts in gene expression data. While fine-tuning is often used to mitigate these issues, we observe that performance remains bounded. To address this challenge, we introduce CellRefine, a post-pretraining method that operates between the pretraining and fine-tuning stages of a single-cell foundation model. CellRefine uses a multi-faceted objective that incorporates marker-gene sets as structural priors to guide post-pretraining and refine the latent embedding manifold of cells. Across multiple computational biology tasks, empirical results show that CellRefine consistently improves downstream performance, yielding gains up to 15%.

</details>


### [577] [One Operator for Many Densities: Amortized Approximation of Conditioning by Neural Operators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06873)
*Panos Tsimpos,Edoardo Calvello,Ayoub Belhadji,Nicholas H. Nelsen*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 40.0

TL;DR: 本文提出用神经算子（Neural Operator）来学习一个通用的条件概率算子，该算子可以将任意联合密度映射到其条件密度，从而实现概率条件化问题的摊销求解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的概率条件化方法需要针对固定的联合分布逐一学习条件分布，缺乏通用性。作者希望找到一个单一的算子，能够泛化到任意联合-条件对，为构建用于贝叶斯推理的基础模型提供理论基础。

Method: 从理论上证明了条件化算子在一定密度类上的连续性，并基于此证明了可以用神经算子（Neural Operator）对其以任意精度进行逼近。实验部分在混合高斯分布上学习了该条件化映射。

Result: 在混合高斯分布类上成功学习了条件化算子，展示了该框架的可行性。

Conclusion: 该工作为通用、摊销化的概率条件化方法（如基于基础模型的贝叶斯推理）提供了理论基础。

Abstract: Probabilistic conditioning is concerned with the identification of a distribution of a random variable $X$ given a random variable $Y$. It is a cornerstone of scientific and engineering applications where modeling uncertainty is key. This problem has traditionally been addressed in machine learning by directly learning the conditional distribution of a fixed joint distribution. This paper introduces a novel perspective: we propose to solve the conditioning problem by identifying a single operator that maps any joint density to its conditional, thus amortizing over joint-conditional pairs. We establish that the conditioning operator can be approximated to arbitrary accuracy by neural operators. Our proof relies on new results establishing continuity of the conditioning operator over suitable classes of densities. Finally, we learn the conditioning map for a class of Gaussian mixtures using neural operators, illustrating the promise of our framework. This work provides the theoretical underpinnings for general-purpose, amortized methods for probabilistic conditioning, such as foundation models for Bayesian inference.

</details>


### [578] [The E$Δ$-MHC-Geo Transformer: Adaptive Geodesic Operations with Guaranteed Orthogonality](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06729)
*Arash Shahmansoori*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文提出EΔ-MHC-Geo Transformer架构，通过数据依赖的Cayley变换实现无条件正交残差连接，并引入混合机制（结合Cayley旋转与Householder反射）来处理Cayley变换无法表示的反射操作，在参数相当的情况下显著提升了长程稳定性和旋转损失等指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度Delta学习（DDL）中的Householder算子仅在特定β值下保持正交性，而Cayley变换虽能保证全β正交但无法处理特征值-1（反射）情况。作者希望设计一种即能保持无条件正交性又能覆盖整个正交群O(n)（包括旋转和反射）的残差连接架构。

Method: 1) 提出数据依赖的Cayley旋转 Q(x) = (I+(β/2)A(x))^{-1}(I-(β/2)A(x))，对所有β和输入保持正交性；2) 引入EΔ-MHC-Geo Hybrid，通过可学习的门控γ(X)在Cayley旋转和Householder反射之间动态选择；3) 设计中点坍塌正则化器 4γ(1-γ) 鼓励边界门决策。

Result: 在~1.79M参数的对比中，EΔ-MHC-Geo达到：最佳长程稳定性（JPmHC的1.9倍、GPT的3.8倍）；最佳近π旋转损失（单平面比JPmHC好4.5倍）；强范数保持能力（平均偏差0.001）；反射探测余弦对齐0.96，且层数减少33%。

Conclusion: 结合Cayley旋转和Householder反射的混合架构能同时访问O(n)的两个连通分量（旋转和反射），弥补了纯Cayley方法无法表示反射的缺陷，在保持正交性的同时提升了表达能力和性能。

Abstract: We present the E$Δ$-MHC-Geo Transformer, a novel architecture that unifies Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections (mHC), Deep Delta Learning (DDL), and the Cayley transform to obtain input-adaptive, unconditionally orthogonal residual connections. Unlike DDL, whose Householder operator is orthogonal only at $β\in \{0,2\}$, our Data-Dependent Cayley rotation $Q(x)=(I+(β/2)A(x))^{-1}(I-(β/2)A(x))$ preserves orthogonality for all $β$ and all inputs. To handle negation, an eigenvalue $-1$ case that Cayley provably excludes, we introduce the E$Δ$-MHC-Geo Hybrid, which combines Cayley rotation with Householder reflection via a learned operator-selection gate $X'=γ(X)Q(X)X+(1-γ(X))H_2(X)X$. A midpoint-collapse regularizer, $4γ(1-γ)$, encourages boundary gate decisions, where each selected component is orthogonal. In matched-parameter comparisons, with approximately 1.79M parameters per model and mean +/- standard deviation over 3 seeds, against four baselines including the concurrent JPmHC, E$Δ$-MHC-Geo achieves the best long-horizon stability, 1.9x over JPmHC and 3.8x over GPT; the best near-$π$ rotation loss, 4.5x over JPmHC on single-plane; strong norm preservation, with 0.001 mean deviation; and 0.96 negation cosine alignment in a diagnostic reflection probe, all with 33% fewer layers.
