While JPmHC's wider representation excels on pure rotation, its finite Cayley residual mixer excludes an exact $λ=-1$ operator and has no reflection branch, motivating our hybrid approach for accessing both connected components of $O(n)$.

</details>


### [579] [MIND: Monge Inception Distance for Generative Models Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06797)
*Quentin Berthet,Yu-Han Wu,Clement Crepy,Romuald Elie,Klaus Greff,Michael Eli Sander*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: MIND是一种基于 sliced Wasserstein 距离的生成模型评估指标，比 FID 更高效、更鲁棒，样本效率提升一个数量级，计算速度提升两个数量级。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: FID 需要估计高维均值和协方差矩阵，存在样本效率低、计算开销大、易受对抗攻击等问题，亟需一种更优的替代指标。

Method: 利用 sliced Wasserstein 距离，通过排序高效计算一维最优传输距离的平均值，避免高维协方差矩阵估计。

Result: MIND 在样本效率上提升 10 倍，计算速度提升 100 倍，对 moment-matching 攻击更鲁棒，与 FID 高度相关且判别能力更强。

Conclusion: MIND 可作为 FID 的更优替代，尤其适合样本量有限或需要快速迭代的场景。

Abstract: We propose the Monge Inception Distance (MIND), a metric for evaluating generative models that addresses key limitations of the widely adopted Fréchet Inception Distance (FID). The MIND metric leverages the sliced Wasserstein distance to compare distributions by averaging one-dimensional optimal transport distances, efficiently computed via sorting. This approach circumvents the estimation of high-dimensional means and covariance matrices, which underlie FID's poor sample complexity and vulnerability to adversarial attacks. We empirically demonstrate three primary advantages: (i) it is more sample-efficient by one order of magnitude, (ii) it is faster to compute by two orders of magnitude, (iii) it is more robust to adversarial attacks such as moment-matching. We show that MIND with 5k samples can replace the evaluation performance of FID with 50k samples, providing high correlation with this standard benchmark and superior discriminative performance. We further demonstrate that even smaller sample sizes (e.g., 1k or 2k) remain highly informative for rapid model iteration.

</details>


### [580] [Christoffel-DPS: Optimal sensor placement in diffusion posterior sampling for arbitrary distributions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06861)
*James Rowbottom,Nick Huang,Carola-Bibiane Schönlieb,Ben Adcock*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于Christoffel函数的无分布传感器布局框架（Christoffel-DPS），用于生成模型（如扩散模型）中的最优传感器放置（OSP），在传感器数量稀少的情况下显著优于传统高斯假设方法和现有生成式模型方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典OSP方法依赖高斯假设，无法处理真实系统中复杂的非高斯分布；现有生成式模型恢复方法虽强大，但传感器选择仍沿用经典OSP工具，两者不匹配。需要一种新的、与先进恢复模型匹配的OSP策略。

Method: 基于Christoffel函数推导出无分布传感器放置框架，提供后验采样的非渐近恢复界；实例化为Christoffel-DPS，包含离线和在线变体，适用于扩散后验采样（DPS）和流匹配模型。

Result: Christoffel-DPS在低传感器预算下优于高斯OSP基线和现有生成式模型放置方法；在结构非高斯基准上验证了有效性，且框架是模型无关的。

Conclusion: 无分布传感在理论上具有原则性，在实践中性能优越；Christoffel-DPS为稀疏传感器场景下的状态估计提供了可靠且通用的解决方案。

Abstract: State estimation is a critical task in scientific, engineering and control applications. Since the reliability of reconstructions depends on the number and position of sensors, optimal sensor placement (OSP) is essential in scenarios where measurements are sparse and expensive. Classical OSP approaches rely on Gaussian assumptions and are consequently unable to account for the complex distributions encountered in many real-world systems. Generative-model-based reconstruction using sensor guided diffusion posterior sampling (DPS) has emerged as a promising technique for reconstructing states from highly complex distributions. However, existing sensor-selection methods either require unrealistically many sensors or emulate classical OSP, creating a mismatch between modern recovery models with classical OSP tools motivating the need for fundamentally new ideas towards OSP that match the recent advances made in powerful recovery models. We introduce a distribution-free sensor placement framework based on the Christoffel function: a mathematical formulation of optimal sampling and recovery guarantees for posterior sampling with arbitrary sensors and signal distributions, from which we derive a new OSP strategy with non-asymptotic bounds on the number of sensors needed for recovery. We develop Christoffel-DPS, with offline and online variants, instantiating Christoffel sampling for generative models. Christoffel-DPS outperforms Gaussian OSP baselines and existing generative-model placement methods, validating that distribution-free sensing is both theoretically principled and practically superior. The framework is model-agnostic; we demonstrate its application to a range of unconditional DPS and flow-matching models on structurally non-Gaussian benchmarks, showing the efficacy of Christoffel-DPS in low sensor budget regimes.

</details>


### [581] [Temporal Attention for Adaptive Control of Euler-Lagrange Systems with Unobservable Memory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06877)
*Giansalvo Cirrincione,Adriano Fagiolini*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 针对具有不可观测有限时域内状态摩擦的Euler-Lagrange系统，提出了一种元控制架构：利用自注意力模块根据近期运动历史生成计算扭矩控制器的增益。注意力头数通过基于自协方差的代理分析预先选择，然后作为强化学习的超参数固定。在2-DOF机械臂上，短记忆场景下单层注意力优于更深的Transformer基线，但长记忆场景下优势消失，表明需要将秩跟踪动态集成到RL循环中。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当摩擦由不可直接观测的有限时域内状态控制时，标准确定性等价自适应律可能丧失收敛保证，需要新的控制方法。

Method: 提出元控制架构：1）自注意力块处理近期运动历史窗口生成控制器增益；2）通过基于自协方差的增量秩跟踪代理分析选择注意力头数；3）固定头数后在带屏蔽可容许性约束的强化学习阶段训练策略。

Result: 在2-DOF机械臂上，短记忆和匹配记忆场景下单层注意力元控制器分别实现12%和19%的跟踪误差降低（效应量d≈-1.1和-2.1，p<0.05）。长记忆场景下优势消失，40%训练运行出现发散或策略坍塌。

Conclusion: 固定注意力头数的静态预选方案在长记忆场景下存在局限，需要将秩跟踪动态集成到RL循环中，以实现运行时注意力头剪枝或增长。

Abstract: Adaptive control of Euler-Lagrange systems is challenging when friction is governed by a finite-horizon internal state that is not directly observable from joint measurements. In this setting, the measured closed-loop state is no longer Markovian, and standard certainty-equivalence adaptive laws may lose their convergence guarantees.
  The paper proposes a meta-control architecture in which the gains of a computed-torque controller are generated by a self-attention block processing a short window of recent motion history. The number of attention heads is selected before policy training through a surrogate analysis of the autocovariance of the memory-state gradient along the temporal window. This surrogate is based on a temporal adaptation of an incremental rank-tracking framework previously developed by the authors. The selected head count is then fixed and used as an architectural hyperparameter in a reinforcement-learning stage, where the policy is trained under a shielded admissibility constraint.
  The approach is tested on a 2-DOF manipulator with nonlinear friction and variable payload. In the short and matched memory regimes, the single-layer attention-only meta-controller outperforms a deeper Transformer baseline, with tracking-error reductions of 12 and 19 percentage points, respectively. The reported effect sizes are large, with d approximately -1.1 and -2.1, and Mann-Whitney p < 0.05 in both cases.
  In the long memory regime, however, the advantage disappears. Four out of ten training runs show either divergence or payload-invariant policy collapse, revealing a weakness in the static Phase-1 head-count prescription. This motivates moving rank-tracking inside the reinforcement-learning loop, allowing attention heads to be pruned or grown at runtime instead of fixed before training.

</details>


### [582] [Rollback-Free Stable Brick Structures Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06947)
*Chenhui Xu,Ziyue Bai,Fuxun Yu,Heng Huang,Jinjun Xiong*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出一种强化学习范式，通过在训练阶段优化物理约束（碰撞避免、全局连接、结构互锁、形状符合），实现了无需物理模拟器回滚的稳定砖块结构生成，推理速度大幅提升且生成质量达到SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自回归3D生成模型依赖外部物理模拟器进行拒绝采样和逐砖回滚，推理效率极低；需要一种将物理有效性约束从测试时矫正转移到训练时策略优化的方法。

Method: 采用强化学习范式，设计包含碰撞避免、全局连通性、结构互锁和形状符合性的装配级奖励函数，在训练阶段通过策略优化让模型内化物理先验，实现无回滚的稳定砖结构生成。

Result: 达到SOTA生成质量，同时推理速度提升数个数量级（orders of magnitude），实现了首个无需回滚的稳定砖块结构生成。

Conclusion: 强化学习范式能有效将物理约束内化到模型中，消除测试时对外部模拟器的依赖，为物理感知的3D生成提供了高效的新路径。

Abstract: While autoregressive models have advanced 3D generation, creating physically stable brick structures remains a challenge due to the strict requirements of gravity and interconnectivity. Existing approaches rely on external physical simulators during inference to perform rejection sampling and brick-by-brick rollbacks, which severely bottlenecks efficiency. To address this, we propose a reinforcement learning paradigm that shifts physical validity enforcement from test-time correction to training-time policy optimization. By utilizing assembly-level rewards, the model optimizes for collision avoidance, global connectivity, structural interlocking, and shape conformity. This paradigm allows the model to internalize physical priors, enabling the first rollback-free generation of stable brick structures. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art generation quality while accelerating inference speed by orders of magnitude. Our code and dataset are available at https://github.com/miniHuiHui/STABLE. Our models are available at https://huggingface.co/miniHui/STABLE.

</details>


### [583] [HARMONY: Bridging the Personalization-Generalization Gap by Mitigating Representation Skew in Heterogeneous Split Federated Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07211)
*Jiseok Youn,You Rim Choi,Goodsol Lee,Sangtae Ha,Hyung-Sin Kim,Saewoong Bahk*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文提出HARMONY，首个支持异构客户端架构的混合分裂联邦学习框架。通过改进元学习模拟多样化特征提取器，并利用服务器端对比学习对齐特征表示，缓解了表示偏斜问题，在保持可接受延迟的同时显著提升了ID和OOD场景下的测试准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有混合分裂联邦学习在客户端架构异构（不同模型结构）时，特征提取器输出的表示无法对齐，导致服务器端OOD预测性能严重下降。亟需一种能支持异构客户端架构且不牺牲个性化性能的混合SFL框架。

Method: 1) 改进元学习，模拟不同参数和架构下的多样化特征提取器，并学习个性化；2) 服务器端对比学习（无需共享原始标签）对齐异构客户端提取的特征表示，缓解表示偏斜。

Result: 在多个数据集和模型族上，相比现有最优方法，无OOD场景下测试准确率提升高达43.0%，有OOD场景下提升高达28.3%，且延迟在可接受范围内。

Conclusion: HARMONY有效解决了客户端架构异构下的表示偏斜问题，实现了异构混合分裂联邦学习，在准确率和效率之间取得了良好平衡。

Abstract: Mobile devices face diverse resource constraints and non-IID data class distributions, requiring fast on-device inference for local in-distribution (ID) classes and on-demand remote support for client-specific out-of-distribution (OOD) classes. Hybrid split federated learning (Hybrid SFL) couples personalized client-side front ends (supporting early exit) with a generalized server-side backend for fallback inference, balancing accuracy and cost. However, under client architectural heterogeneity, the existing hybrid SFL suffers from representation skew, where features from customized extractors fail to align in the shared space, leading to a sharp degradation in the server model responsible for OOD prediction. We propose HARMONY, the first hybrid SFL framework to support heterogeneous client architectures. HARMONY modifies meta-learning to simulate diverse extractors across parameters and architectures, and to learn to personalize. To mitigate representation skew, HARMONY conducts server-side contrastive learning to align extracted features, neither sacrificing clients' personalization nor sharing raw labels. Compared to the state of the art across multiple datasets and model families, HARMONY improves test accuracy by up to 43.0%/28.3% without/with OOD, respectively, while maintaining acceptable latency.

</details>


### [584] [Same Brain, Different Prediction: How Preprocessing Choices Undermine EEG Decoding Reliability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07212)
*Dengzhe Hou,Zihao Wu,Lingyu Jiang,Zirui Li,Fangzhou Lin,Kazunori D. Yamada*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文发现EEG深度学习模型的预测结果在预处理流程变化时极不稳定（最多42%的试次级预测翻转），并提出了三种工具来量化、分解和降低这种不稳定性：Walsh-Hadamard分解、预处理不确定性（PU）诊断指标以及NA-PGI正则化方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有EEG深度学习模型通常只在单一、未报告的预处理流程下训练和评估，忽略了预处理选择对预测结果的巨大影响，导致结果不可靠且不可复现。

Method: 1) 将预处理选择形式化为反事实干预空间（2^7种组合）；2) 使用Walsh-Hadamard分解分析预处理敏感性的加性结构；3) 提出预处理不确定性（PU）作为逐试次诊断指标；4) 引入NA-PGI图结构正则化器作为缓解策略。

Result: 在六个数据集、四种范式中，预处理变化可导致高达42%的试次级预测翻转；敏感性在实践上近似可加；PU能够捕捉模型置信度无法量化的不稳定性维度。

Conclusion: EEG深度学习结果对预处理选择高度敏感，需要系统性量化预处理不确定性并开发相应的缓解方法。

Abstract: Electroencephalography (EEG) is a cornerstone of brain-computer interfaces and clinical neuroscience, yet deep learning models are typically trained and evaluated under a single, unreported preprocessing pipeline. We formalize preprocessing choices as a counterfactual intervention space and show that EEG predictions are surprisingly unstable under this space: across six datasets spanning four paradigms, up to 42% of trial-level predictions flip when only the preprocessing changes, a variability that standard uncertainty methods do not explicitly quantify because they condition on a fixed preprocessing pipeline. We provide three tools to make this instability measurable, decomposable, and reducible. First, a Walsh-Hadamard decomposition of the 2^7 pipeline space reveals that sensitivity is near-additive in practice under the binary intervention design, enabling efficient step-by-step optimization. Second, we introduce Preprocessing Uncertainty (PU), a per-trial diagnostic that captures a dimension of instability complementary to model-based confidence. Third, we study Normalized Adaptive PGI (NA-PGI), a graph-structured regularizer that exploits the compositional structure of preprocessing interventions as one mitigation strategy with clear scope conditions.

</details>


### [585] [On the Robustness of Distribution Support under Diffusion Guidance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07220)
*Ruijia Cao,Yuchen Wu,Nisha Chadramoorthy*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文通过建立"支持鲁棒性"理论解释了扩散引导（diffusion guidance）为何能持续生成高质量样本，证明在精确访问分数函数的前提下，引导扩散过程几乎总能生成靠近目标支撑集的样本，覆盖DDIM和DDPM等多种离散化方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散引导在经验上取得了巨大成功，但其理论性质尚未被充分理解，不清楚为何它始终能生成高质量样本。本文旨在从理论上解释扩散引导的有效性。

Method: 提出"支持鲁棒性"（robustness of support）理论性质，从理论上证明在精确分数函数条件下，引导扩散过程生成的样本几乎总是保持在目标支撑集附近。分析覆盖DDIM和DDPM以及指数积分器诱导的多种离散化方案。

Result: 证明了扩散引导的样本几乎总能保持在目标支撑集附近，离支撑集的样本在结构上往往不合理且可能影响下游任务，这从理论上解释了扩散引导为何能生成物理意义合理、结构合理的样本。

Conclusion: 该工作为理解扩散引导为什么能产生高质量样本提供了严格的理论基础，为扩散模型的可靠应用提供了理论支撑。

Abstract: Diffusion guidance is a powerful technique that enables controllable and high-fidelity sample generation with diffusion models. At a high level, it modifies the score function by incorporating a guidance term that steers the generative process toward a desired condition. Despite its empirical success, the theoretical properties of diffusion guidance remain largely unexplored, and it is not well understood why it consistently produces high-quality samples.
  In this work, we explain the effectiveness of diffusion guidance by establishing a \emph{robustness of support} property. Specifically, we show that, given exact access to the score functions, guided diffusion processes almost always generate samples that remain close to the target support. This property is particularly desirable, as samples that lie off the support are often structurally implausible and may adversely affect downstream tasks. Our analysis covers both Denoising Diffusion Implicit Models (DDIM) and Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models (DDPM), and applies to a wide range of discretization schemes induced by exponential integrators. Our results provide a rigorous foundation for understanding why diffusion guidance produces physically meaningful and structurally plausible samples.

</details>


### [586] [bispectrum: Selective $G$-Bispectra Made Practical](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07270)
*Johan Mathe,Adele Myers,Simon Mataigne,Nina Miolane*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个开源PyTorch库bispectrum，实现了七种群作用下信号的G-双谱（一种完整的群不变性特征），通过选择性计算将复杂度从O(|G|^2)降至O(|G|)，在GPU上可在亚毫秒内完成计算，并在低数据、中等容量场景下优于多种池化方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: G-双谱是一种理论上完备的群不变性特征（保留信号除群作用外的全部信息），在机器学习和深度网络池化层中已被证明有效，但其高计算成本和碎片化的逐群实现严重阻碍了实际部署。

Method: 开发了开源PyTorch库bispectrum，支持7种群作用的可选G-双谱计算；对有限群利用选择性计算将复杂度从O(|G|^2)降至O(|G|)；对平面旋转利用圆盘双谱；对球面3D旋转引入增强选择性双谱，将系数从O(L^3)降至Θ(L^2)；实现了多种计算优化并在GPU上运行。

Result: 该库在GPU上可在亚毫秒内完成选择性G-双谱计算（对常用带宽限制）；在三个经典基准数据集上的实验表明，G-双谱作为池化层在低数据、中等容量场景下一致优于norm pooling、gated pooling、Fourier-ELU pooling、max pooling以及数据增强卷积基线。

Conclusion: G-双谱是一种高效的群不变特征提取方法，本工作通过开源库和计算优化使其可实际应用于深度学习流水线，在数据有限场景下具有显著优势。

Abstract: Many machine learning tasks are invariant under the action of a group $G$ of transformations: signal classification can be invariant under translations, image classification under 2D rotations, and spherical-image classification under 3D rotations. The $G$-bispectrum is a principled complete invariant of a signal (retaining all all signal's information up to the group action) with proven benefits in machine learning and as a pooling layer in deep networks. However, its deployment has been hampered by high computational cost and a patchwork of group-specific implementations. We present bispectrum, an open-source, fully unit-tested PyTorch library that implements selective $G$-bispectra for seven different group actions, as differentiable modules that can be directly incorporated into machine learning pipelines and deep learning architectures. For finite groups $G$, selectivity reduces the computational cost from $O(|G|^2)$ to $O(|G|)$. For planar rotations, we leverage the disk bispectrum. For spherical 3D rotations, we introduce an augmented selective bispectrum at band-limit $L$ which reduces the cost from $O(L^3)$ to $Θ(L^2)$ coefficients. We profile the entire library (for which we implemented various compute optimizations), showing that it delivers near-exact $G$-invariance with its selective $G$-bispectra computed in sub-millisecond time on GPU (up to commonly used bandlimits). We evaluate the benefits of incorporating $G$-bispectra as pooling layers into deep learning architectures on three classical benchmark datasets --comparing against norm pooling, gated pooling, Fourier-ELU pooling, max pooling, and (non-equivariant) data-augmented convolutional baselines. Results show that $G$-bispectra consistently outperform alternatives in the low-data, moderate-capacity regime.

</details>


### [587] [Generative Modeling with Flux Matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07319)
*Peter Pao-Huang,Xiaojie Qiu,Stefano Ermon*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: Flux Matching是一种新的生成式建模范式，它将现有的基于分数的模型推广到更广泛的非保守向量场族，通过在目标函数中施加更弱的条件，允许存在无限多个以数据为平稳分布的向量场，从而解锁了更快的采样、可解释性和机械论模型等应用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的基于分数的生成模型（如扩散模型）要求模型等于数据分数（即保守向量场），这限制了模型的设计灵活性。作者希望放宽这一约束，允许学习更广泛的向量场，从而在生成过程中引入归纳偏置、结构先验和动力学属性。

Method: Flux Matching提出了一种新的目标函数，不要求模型匹配数据分数，而是要求模型的向量场以数据分布为平稳分布。这通过一个更弱的条件实现，允许存在无限多个有效的向量场，从而可以将向量场本身作为一种设计选择而非固定目标。

Result: 该方法在高维图像数据集上表现强劲，并且新增的自由度带来了更快的采样速度、可解释和机械论模型，以及能够编码变量间有向依赖关系的动力学。

Conclusion: Flux Matching为生成式建模开辟了一个新维度，将向量场从固定目标转变为设计选择，具有广泛的应用前景。

Abstract: We introduce Flux Matching, a new paradigm for generative modeling that generalizes existing score-based models to a broader family of vector fields that need not be conservative. Rather than requiring the model to equal the data score, the Flux Matching objective imposes a weaker condition that admits infinitely many vector fields whose stationary distribution is the data. This flexibility enables a class of generative models that cannot be learned under score matching, in which inductive biases, structural priors, and properties of the dynamics can be directly imposed or optimized. We show that Flux Matching performs strongly on high-dimensional image datasets and, more importantly, that our added freedom unlocks a range of applications including faster sampling, interpretable and mechanistic models, and dynamics that encode directed dependencies between variables. More broadly, Flux Matching opens a new dimension in generative modeling by turning the vector field itself into a design choice rather than a fixed target. Code is available at https://github.com/peterpaohuang/flux_matching.

</details>


### [588] [QuadNorm: Resolution-Robust Normalization for Neural Operators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07375)
*Bum Jun Kim,Makoto Kawano,Yusuke Iwasawa,Yutaka Matsuo*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文提出QuadNorm和BlendQuadNorm，用数值积分替代均匀平均的归一化层，使神经算子具备离散化鲁棒性，显著降低跨分辨率的迁移误差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 神经算子中的归一化层通常对网格值进行均匀平均，导致归一化本身依赖离散化方式，成为跨分辨率/网格迁移误差的来源。作者希望解决这一被忽视的问题。

Method: 提出QuadNorm和BlendQuadNorm归一化族，用数值积分（quadrature）替代均匀平均；理论上证明在端点包含的均匀网格上，提议的矩估计具有O(h²)一致性，并给出迁移误差上界。

Result: 在Darcy问题上，QuadNorm在所有目标分辨率（64²到256²）上取得最佳跨分辨率性能；在真实数据上，Transolver+QuadNorm实现几乎分辨率不变的迁移；在非周期PDE和非谱架构上增益最大。

Conclusion: 归一化是神经算子中一个被忽视的分辨率依赖来源，所提出的QuadNorm系列能有效解决该问题，提升模型的跨分辨率泛化能力。

Abstract: Normalization layers in neural operators usually compute statistics by uniformly averaging discrete grid values, making the normalization itself discretization-dependent and thereby a source of transfer error across different resolutions or meshes. To enable discretization robustness, we introduce a quadrature normalization family that replaces existing uniform averaging in normalization layers with numerical quadrature: QuadNorm and BlendQuadNorm. On endpoint-inclusive uniform grids, the proposed quadrature moments are $O(h^2)$-consistent across discretizations, meaning that their cross-resolution mismatch decays quadratically with grid spacing. A transfer-error bound then predicts how normalization-induced mismatch scales with both the resolution gap and network depth. The experiments show the same gap- and depth-scaling trends predicted by the transfer-error bound. On Darcy, QuadNorm delivers the best cross-resolution performance at every tested target resolution from $64^2$ to $256^2$; on real-data benchmarks, Transolver with QuadNorm achieves nearly resolution-invariant transfer. The largest gains appear on nonperiodic PDEs and nonspectral architectures, where native-resolution improvements also emerge. We also validate BlendQuadNorm, which stays close to LayerNorm behavior and serves as a conservative default for periodic FNO settings. These results identify normalization as a previously overlooked source of resolution dependence in neural operators.

</details>


### [589] [Uncovering Hidden Systematics in Neural Network Models for High Energy Physics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07470)
*Lucie Flek,Philipp Alexander Jungs,Akbar Karimi,Timo Saala,Alexander Schmid,Matthias Schott,Philipp Soldin,Christopher Wiebusch,Ulrich Willemsen*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文揭示了神经网络对与实验不确定性一致的小扰动高度敏感，这种扰动能在几乎不改变输入分布的情况下显著改变输出，并提出了量化框架来评估和控制NN在HEP分析中的系统不确定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: NN在高能物理分析中性能优越，但对其输入的小变化敏感，导致系统不确定性的传播和估计仍是一个开放挑战。现有方法可能低估真实模型不确定性，留下未考虑的偏差。

Method: 借鉴对抗攻击研究，探索与实验不确定性完全一致的细微扰动如何导致NN输出发生显著变化。通过代表性HEP任务（事件分类、物体识别）和多种网络架构进行测试，并引入量化框架来探测和衡量NN对实验变化的隐藏敏感性。

Result: 在允许的不确定性范围内，网络可以被系统性"欺骗"且概率显著；细微扰动能大幅改变NN输出，同时保持一维和相关输入分布几乎不变。

Conclusion: 提出了一种实用的路径来评估和控制物理分析中NN的系统不确定性。

Abstract: Neural networks (NNs) are inherently multidimensional classifiers that learn complex, non-linear relationships among input observables. While their flexibility enables unprecedented performance in high-energy physics (HEP) analyses, it also makes them sensitive to small variations in their inputs. Consequently, the propagation and estimation of systematic uncertainties in NN-based models remain an open challenge. There are indications that uncertainties derived in control regions or from nominal variations of input features can underestimate the true model uncertainty, potentially leaving biases unaccounted for. Inspired by insights from adversarial-attack studies in machine learning, we explore how subtle perturbations, fully consistent with the experimental uncertainties on the input observables, can lead to substantial changes in NN outputs, while keeping the one-dimensional and correlated input distributions nearly unchanged. Using a set of representative HEP tasks, including event classification and object identification, and testing across a variety of network architectures, we demonstrate that networks can be systematically "fooled" at significant rates within the allowed uncertainty envelopes. Building on this observation, we introduce a quantitative framework to probe and measure the hidden sensitivity of neural networks to realistic experimental variations, providing a practical path to evaluate and control their systematic uncertainty in physics analyses.

</details>


### [590] [Excluding the Target Domain Improves Extrapolation: Deconfounded Hierarchical Physics Constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07485)
*Tsuyoshi Okita*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出去混杂分层门控机制(DHG)，通过反事实估计和后门调整消除温度混杂，结合由粗到细物理约束，在电池温度外推任务上实现46%的RMSE改进（0.397→0.215）。还发现预训练时排除目标域数据比包含数据效果更好（RMSE 0.224 vs 0.324）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有物理约束深度生成模型在OOD外推时面临两个挑战：物理定律的层次结构未被充分利用，以及混杂变量问题（如温度）导致模型学到虚假关联而非真正的物理不一致性。

Method: 提出DHG（Deconfounded Hierarchical Gate），结合do-operator反事实估计和后门调整去除温度混杂，使层次门控反映真实的物理不一致性而非虚假温度效应；再采用由粗到细（Coarse-to-Fine）的物理约束逐步应用于生成过程。

Result: 在锂离子电池温度外推基准上（训练24°C，测试4.0-43.0°C），DHG达到RMSE=0.215，比基线Pure CFM（0.397）提升46%。预训练阶段排除目标域数据比包含数据效果好39%（RMSE 0.224 vs 0.324）。

Conclusion: DHG有效解决了物理约束生成模型中的混杂变量和层次约束问题；并且预训练策略的一个重要结论是：在外推任务中，排除目标域数据可能比包含数据更好，因为模型能学到更通用的领域无关物理模式。

Abstract: Extrapolation to out-of-distribution conditions is a fundamental challenge for physics-constrained deep generative models. Existing methods apply physical constraints as a single static regularization term uniformly across the generation process, and address neither the hierarchical structure of physical laws and the confounding variable problem. We propose the Deconfounded Hierarchical Gate (DHG), which serves as a diagnostic and control mechanism: it identifies when and how strongly temperature confounding contaminates each constraint level, so that hierarchical gates reflect intrinsic physical inconsistency rather than spurious temperature effects. DHG combines counterfactual estimation via the do-operator with backdoor adjustment to remove confounding, then applies Coarse-to-Fine physical constraints progressively. We report a counter-intuitive finding in pretraining: excluding the target-domain data from pretraining outperforms including it by 39% in extrapolation performance (RMSE 0.224 vs. 0.324). This occurs because FNO learns domain-agnostic physical patterns that transfer more effectively when the target domain is withheld. On a lithium-ion battery temperature extrapolation benchmark (trained at 24 degrees Celsius, evaluated at 4.0--43.0 degrees Celsius), our method achieves RMSE = 0.215, a 46% improvement over the unconstrained baseline (Pure CFM: 0.397).

</details>


### [591] [Beyond Distribution Estimation: Simplex Anchored Structural Inference Towards Universal Semi-Supervised Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07557)
*Yaxin Hou,Jun Ma,Hanyang Li,Bo Han,Jie Yu,Yuheng Jia*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为SAGE的新方法，通过图状态划分和单纯形锚定框架来解决通用半监督学习（UniSSL）中因标记数据稀缺且未标记数据分布未知而导致的伪标签错误和表示混淆问题，在五个基准上平均提升8.52%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有半监督学习方法通常假设未标记数据分布均匀或需要充足标记数据来估计分布，但在现实场景中标记数据稀缺、未标记数据分布未知且任意，导致大量错误伪标签和表示混淆。作者希望绕过分布估计，通过更可靠的表示级结构推理来解决问题。

Method: 提出SAGE方法：1) 利用Simplex Anchored Graph-state Equipartition（单纯形锚定图状态划分）捕获高阶样本间依赖关系，建立结构一致性；2) 采用满足单纯形等角紧框架的向量作为坐标帧，引导类间表示分离；3) 基于分布无关指标的加权策略优先选择可靠伪标签；4) 设置辅助分支隔离潜在的错误伪标签。

Result: 在五个标准基准上，SAGE一致优于现有最先进方法，平均准确率提升8.52%。

Conclusion: 在通用半监督学习（UniSSL）这一更具挑战性的范式下，通过表示级结构推理而非依赖分布假设，能够有效缓解伪标签错误和表示混淆问题，SAGE方法验证了这一思路的有效性。

Abstract: Semi-supervised learning faces significant challenges in realistic scenarios where labeled data is scarce and unlabeled data follows unknown, arbitrary distributions. We formalize this critical yet under-explored paradigm as Universal Semi-supervised Learning (UniSSL). Existing methods typically leverage unlabeled data via pseudo-labeling. However, they often rely on the idealized assumption of a uniform unlabeled data distribution or require sufficient labeled data to estimate it. In the UniSSL setting, such dependencies lead to numerous erroneous pseudo-labels, thereby triggering representation confusion. Fortunately, we observe that inter-sample relations captured by representations are more reliable than pseudo-labels. Leveraging this insight, we shift our focus to representation-level structural inference to bypass distribution estimation. Accordingly, we propose Simplex Anchored Graph-state Equipartition (SAGE), which captures high-order inter-sample dependencies to establish structural consensus for guiding representation learning. Meanwhile, to mitigate representation confusion, we employ vectors that satisfy a simplex equiangular tight frame to serve as a coordinate frame for guiding inter-class representation separation. Finally, we introduce a weighting strategy based on distribution-agnostic metrics to prioritize reliable pseudo-labels and an auxiliary branch to isolate potentially erroneous pseudo-labels. Evaluations on five standard benchmarks show that SAGE consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, with an average accuracy gain of \textbf{8.52\%}.

</details>


### [592] [Efficient Verification of Neural Control Barrier Functions with Smooth Nonlinear Activations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07757)
*Jun Zhang,Haibo Zhang,Chun Liu,Xiaofan Wang,Liang Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: LightCROWN通过利用激活函数的解析特性计算更紧的雅可比界，改进了基于CROWN的神经网络控制屏障函数形式化验证方法，在倒立摆、Dubins车和平面四旋翼等非线性控制系统中将验证成功率提升至100%，并提高了速度和可扩展性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的CROWN方法在验证具有非线性激活函数（如tanh）的神经网络控制屏障函数时，依赖保守的线性松弛来计算雅可比界，导致可扩展性受限。本文旨在解决这一瓶颈。

Method: 提出LightCROWN方法，通过利用激活函数的解析性质（如tanh的导数特性）来计算更紧的雅可比界，从而提升CROWN框架的验证精度和效率。

Result: 在倒立摆、Dubins车和平面四旋翼等非线性控制系统中，LightCROWN将验证成功率提升高达100%，同时加快了验证速度和可扩展性。

Conclusion: LightCROWN为CROWN框架提供了一种通用的改进策略，能够更高效地验证复杂的神经网络控制屏障函数。

Abstract: Formal verification of neural control barrier functions (NCBFs) remains challenging, especially for neural networks with nonlinear activations like \(\tanh\). Existing CROWN-based methods rely on conservative linear relaxations for Jacobian bounds, limiting scalability. We propose LightCROWN, which computes tighter Jacobian bounds by exploiting the analytical properties of activation functions. Experiments on nonlinear control systems including the inverted pendulum, Dubins car, and planar quadrotor demonstrate that LightCROWN improves verification success rates up to 100\%, while enhancing speed and scalability. Our approach provides a generalizable improvement for CROWN-based frameworks, enabling more efficient verification of complex NCBFs. The code can be found at github.com/Autonomous-Systems-and-Control-Lab/verify-neural-CBF.

</details>


### [593] [Distributional simplicity bias and effective convexity in Energy Based Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07844)
*Aurélien Decelle,Alfonso de Jesús Navas Gómez,Beatriz Seoane*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文利用有效模型（广义伊辛模型/能量傅里叶展开）对二值变量上的能量基学习进行了动力学分析，揭示了梯度流存在两类不动点（数据一致点与伪点），并证明了低阶相互作用先于高阶被学习，解释了分布简单性偏好现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 能量基学习的训练本质上是非凸的，导致对初始化敏感、易陷入局部最优以及梯度动力学不稳定，亟需从理论上理解其学习动力学行为。

Method: 将能量函数视为有效模型（广义伊辛模型或傅里叶展开），从梯度流动力学角度分析能量基学习，研究不动点的存在性与稳定性，以及相互作用阶数的学习顺序。

Result: 1. 在充分表达力下，梯度流存在两类不动点：数据一致点（精确匹配目标分布）和伪点（满足平稳性但不匹配目标分布）。2. 数据一致点附近的扰动要么稳定要么中性（中性方向保持有效模型不变）。3. 梯度动力学导致低阶相互作用先于高阶相互作用被学习。

Conclusion: 该机制解释了分布简单性偏好的原因，并说明实践中低阶非数据一致的不动点不会出现。

Abstract: Energy-based learning is a powerful framework for generative modelling, but its training is inherently non-convex, leading potentially to sensitivity to initialisation, poor local optima, and unstable gradient dynamics. We present a dynamical analysis of energy-based learning through the lens of the effective model, which can be interpreted as either a generalised Ising model with higher-order interactions or the Fourier expansion of the energy. Under sufficient expressivity, we show that the gradient flow induced by learning strictly positive distributions over binary variables admits two types of fixed points: data-consistent points, which exactly reproduce the target distribution, and spurious points, which satisfy stationarity without matching the target distribution. Around data-consistent points, we show that perturbations are either stable or neutral, with neutral directions leaving the effective model invariant. Finally, we show that gradient dynamics induce a hierarchy in which lower-order interactions are learned before higher-order ones. This provides a mechanistic explanation for the distributional simplicity bias and clarifies why fixed points that are not data-consistent at low orders are not observed in practice.

</details>


### [594] [Black-box model classification under the discriminative factorization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07878)
*Hayden Helm,Merrick Ohata,Carey Priebe*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文提出"判别因式分解"（discriminative factorization）框架，用于在黑盒环境下区分高质量与低质量的查询集（query sets），帮助更有效地推断模型级属性。研究表明，在查询预算下，随机分类概率随查询数量指数级衰减，且估计的分解参数能预测经验性能衰减率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法对模型级属性的推断依赖于"查询集"的质量，但查询集的选择高度敏感，缺乏系统性的质量标准。本文旨在提供一个理论框架来区分高质量与低质量查询集，提升黑盒模型分类的可靠性和效率。

Method: 提出判别因式分解（discriminative factorization）框架，通过分析模型对一组查询的嵌入响应关系，量化查询集质量。理论证明随机分类概率随查询预算指数级衰减，并通过三个审计任务验证分解参数与经验衰减率的关系。

Result: 实验表明：1）估计的分解参数能很好地预测经验性能衰减率；2）基于判别场（discriminative field）选择的查询集能够复现"oracle"查询集的经验排序。

Conclusion: 判别因式分解为黑盒模型级分类中查询集的选择提供了理论指导，有助于提升模型属性推断的效率和可靠性。

Abstract: Access to modern generative systems is often restricted to querying an API (the ``black-box" setting) and many properties of the system are unknown to the user at inference time. While recent work has shown that low-dimensional representations of models based on the relationship between their embedded responses to a set of queries are useful for inferring model-level properties, the quality of these representations is highly sensitive to the query set. We introduce the \emph{discriminative factorization} to distinguish between high- and low-quality query sets in the context of black-box model-level classification. Under this framework, the probability of chance-level classification decays exponentially in the query budget. On three auditing tasks, estimated factorization parameters predict the empirical performance decay rate. We conclude by showing that query sets selected using the estimated discriminative field reproduce the empirical ordering of oracle query sets.

</details>


### [595] [INO-SGD: Addressing Utility Imbalance under Individualized Differential Privacy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07930)
*Xiao Tian,Jue Fan,Rachael Hwee Ling Sim,Bryan Kian Hsiang Low*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文提出INO-SGD算法，针对个性化差分隐私（IDP）场景下存在的效用不平衡问题——隐私要求更强的数据子集在训练中会被严重欠表示，导致模型在这些数据上表现较差。该算法通过策略性地降低批次内数据的权重来提升高隐私数据上的性能，同时满足IDP约束。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有IDP算法存在严重的效用不平衡问题：来自隐私要求更强的数据所有者（如敏感疾病阳性病例）的数据在训练模型中被严重欠表示，导致模型在类似数据上部署时性能较差。需要一种既能满足IDP约束又能缓解效用不平衡的算法。

Method: 提出INO-SGD算法，在每个批次内策略性地降低数据权重，以提升高隐私数据在所有迭代中的性能表现。该算法专门设计用于满足个性化差分隐私（IDP）要求。

Result: 通过实验证明了INO-SGD算法在实际中的可行性，能够改善高隐私数据子集上的模型性能。

Conclusion: INO-SGD算法在满足个性化差分隐私约束的同时，有效缓解了隐私要求不同的数据子集间的效用不平衡问题。

Abstract: Differential privacy (DP) is widely employed in machine learning to protect confidential or sensitive training data from being revealed. As data owners gain greater control over their data due to personal data ownership, they are more likely to set their own privacy requirements, necessitating individualized DP (IDP) to fulfil such requests. In particular, owners of data from more sensitive subsets, such as positive cases of stigmatized diseases, likely set stronger privacy requirements, as leakage of such data could incur more serious societal impact. However, existing IDP algorithms induce a critical utility imbalance problem: Data from owners with stronger privacy requirements may be severely underrepresented in the trained model, resulting in poorer performance on similar data from subsequent users during deployment. In this paper, we analyze this problem and propose the INO-SGD algorithm, which strategically down-weights data within each batch to improve performance on the more private data across all iterations. Notably, our algorithm is specially designed to satisfy IDP, while existing techniques addressing utility imbalance neither satisfy IDP nor can be easily adapted to do so. Lastly, we demonstrate the empirical feasibility of our approach.

</details>


### [596] [Slowly Annealed Langevin Dynamics: Theory and Applications to Training-Free Guided Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07950)
*Atsushi Nitanda,Dake Bu,Yueming Lyu,Tanya Veeravalli*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文提出Slowly Annealed Langevin Dynamics (SALD)及其变体VA-SALD，通过时间减速策略提升Langevin动力学对移动目标分布的跟踪能力，并应用于扩散模型的免训练引导生成，提供了非渐近收敛保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的Langevin动力学采样器在跟踪移动目标分布时存在精度不足的问题，且扩散模型的引导生成通常需要额外训练。本文旨在通过时间减速策略改善采样质量，并实现免训练的引导生成。

Method: 提出SALD框架，利用KL微分不等式建立非渐近收敛保证；进一步提出VA-SALD，显式融入预训练模型的边际分布，通过减速校正引导带来的偏差，实现免训练引导生成。

Result: 建立了SALD的非渐近收敛理论，证明了减速通过收缩中间目标分布和改进路径复杂度来提升跟踪性能；VA-SALD在扩散模型及相关生成模型上实现了有理论保证的免训练引导生成。

Conclusion: SALD和VA-SALD为Langevin动力学采样和扩散模型引导生成提供了统一的理论框架，明确了中间函数不等式和引导偏差的作用。

Abstract: We study Slowly Annealed Langevin Dynamics (SALD), a sampler for tracking a path of moving target distributions and approximating the terminal target through time slowdown. We establish non-asymptotic convergence guarantees via a KL differential inequality, showing that slowdown improves tracking through contraction of intermediate targets and the complexity of the path. Motivated by training-free guided generation with pretrained score-based generative models, we further introduce Velocity-Aware SALD (VA-SALD), which explicitly incorporates the underlying marginal distributions of the pretrained model and uses slowdown to correct the additional deviation induced by guidance. This yields a principled framework for training-free guided generation for diffusion-based and related generative model families, together with convergence guarantees that clarify the roles of intermediate functional inequalities and guidance bias. Code is available at https://github.com/anitan0925/sald.

</details>


### [597] [GRAPHLCP: Structure-Aware Localized Conformal Prediction on Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08074)
*Peyman Baghershahi,Fangxin Wang,Debmalya Mandal,Sourav Medya*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出GRAPHLCP框架，通过结合图拓扑结构和节点间依赖关系进行局部化CP，利用特征感知密度化和PPR核计算来提升GNN的不确定性量化效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有CP方法应用于GNN时，依赖嵌入空间邻近度进行定位不可靠，导致预测集效率低，且图数据的组合特性使预测不够确定。

Method: 提出GRAPHLCP框架：(1)特征感知密度化步骤缓解稀疏图的局部性偏差；(2)基于Personalized PageRank的核计算建模结构邻近性；(3)实现拓扑依赖的锚点采样和校准加权，捕获局部和长程依赖。

Result: 在多个回归和分类数据集上，GRAPHLCP在有限样本下保证边际覆盖，并在多种条件覆盖场景下实现良好的测试条件覆盖效率。

Conclusion: 显式融入图拓扑和节点间依赖可以显著提升CP在GNN上的预测集效率，GRAPHLCP是一种有效且保证覆盖的解决方案。

Abstract: Conformal prediction (CP) provides a distribution-free approach to uncertainty quantification with finite-sample guarantees. However, applying CP to graph neural networks (GNNs) remains challenging as the combinatorial nature of graphs often leads to insufficiently certain predictions and indiscriminative embeddings. Existing methods primarily rely on embedding-space proximity for localization, which can be unreliable for graphs and yield inefficient prediction sets. We propose GRAPHLCP, a proximity-based localized CP framework that explicitly incorporates graph topology and inter-node dependencies into localization and weighting. Our approach introduces a feature-aware densification step to mitigate locality bias in sparse graphs, followed by a Personalized PageRank-based kernel computation to model structural proximity. This enables topology-dependent anchor sampling and calibration weighting that captures both local and long-range dependencies. Extensive experiments on several regression and classification datasets demonstrate that GRAPHLCP guarantees marginal coverage with finite samples while efficiently attaining favorable test conditional coverage across various conditioning scenarios.

</details>


### [598] [A Refined Generalization Analysis for Extreme Multi-class Supervised Contrastive Representation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07596)
*Nong Minh Hieu,Antoine Ledent*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文针对对比表示学习在有限标注数据下（元组存在依赖关系）的样本复杂度问题，提出了两项改进：1) 证明了一个与类别数R同阶的界，不依赖于最稀有类别的概率；2) 提出了一种跨类别聚集风险的估计器，在长尾分布等极端多类场景下样本复杂度为O(k)。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有对比表示学习的样本复杂度分析假设样本独立同分布，但实际中对比元组来自有限标注数据池，存在依赖关系。已有工作虽用U-Statistics分析此问题，但其风险界依赖于最稀有类别的概率ρ_min^{-1/2}，在长尾多类场景下过于悲观。

Method: 1) 改进了已有的理论分析，证明了与类别数R同阶的样本复杂度界，不依赖于类别分布。2) 设计了新的估计器，通过跨类别聚集风险来捕捉整体风险集中性，在类别分布长尾时得到更紧的界。

Result: 改进后的样本复杂度与类别数R同阶，不依赖ρ_min；新估计器在长尾分布下样本复杂度为O(k)（k为每个元组的样本数）。

Conclusion: 本文在理论上推进了对对比表示学习样本复杂度的理解，尤其适用于多类长尾分布的实际场景，为CRL的理论保证提供了更紧的界。

Abstract: Contrastive Representation Learning (CRL) has achieved strong empirical success in multiple machine learning disciplines, yet its theoretical sample complexity remains poorly understood. Existing analyses usually assume that input tuples are identically and independently distributed, an assumption violated in most practical settings where contrastive tuples are constructed from a finite pool of labeled data, inducing dependencies among tuples. While one recent work analyzed this learning setting using U-Statistics to estimate the population risk, the techniques used therein require the risk of each class to concentrate uniformly, making excess risk bounds scale in the order of $ρ_{\min}^{-{1}/{2}}$ where $ρ_{\min}$ denotes the probability of the rarest class. Such a dependency can be overly pessimistic in the extreme multiclass settings where there are many tail classes which contribute minimally to the overall population risk. Our contributions are two-fold. Firstly, we improve upon the previous work and prove a bound with a sample complexity of the same order as the number of classes $R$, regardless of the distribution over classes. Furthermore, we formulate a different estimator that captures the concentration of the risk \textit{across classes}, enabling sharper bounds in extreme multi-class learning scenarios, especially where class distributions are long-tailed. Under mild assumptions on the class distributions, the resulting sample complexity is $\mathcal{O}(k)$ where $k$ is the number of samples per tuple.

</details>


### [599] [GRASP -- Graph-Based Anomaly Detection Through Self-Supervised Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07812)
*Robin Buchta,Carsten Kleiner,Felix Heine,Gabi Dreo Rodosek*

Main category: cs.CR

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出基于掩码自监督分类的溯源入侵检测系统GRASP，通过掩码进程可执行文件信息并利用两跳溯源图邻域进行推理，将分类错误标记为异常，无需阈值设定即可检测APT攻击。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于溯源的入侵检测系统依赖预定义或子集确定的阈值，检测稳定性有限且难以泛化检测任意异常行为，同时忽视了进程可执行文件在描述系统活动中的关键作用。

Method: GRASP采用掩码自监督分类方法，掩码掉进程的可执行文件信息，通过两跳溯源图邻域学习推理被掩码信息，将分类错误（即推理结果与实际不一致）的进程标记为异常。

Result: 在DARPA TC和OpTC数据集上，GRASP一致性地检测出异常行为（包括已知攻击），优于现有系统；在所有可执行文件行为可学习的数据集上检测出所有文档化的攻击，并发现了未被标注为攻击的可疑异常行为。

Conclusion: GRASP通过掩码自监督分类摆脱了阈值依赖，提升了检测稳定性和泛化能力，证明了利用进程可执行文件及溯源图邻域信息进行异常检测的有效性。

Abstract: Advanced persistent threat (APT) attacks remain difficult to detect due to their stealth, adaptability, and use of legitimate system components. Provenance-based intrusion detection systems (PIDS) offer a promising defense by capturing detailed relationships between system components and actions. However, current PIDS rely on predefined or subset-determined thresholds, which limit detection stability and the ability to detect any anomalous behavior in general. Furthermore, related work often neglects the role of process executables, which describe system activity by interacting through a process with files, network components, and other processes. We introduce GRASP, a PIDS based on masked self-supervised classification. GRASP masks the executable information of processes and learns to infer it from their two-hop provenance graph neighborhood, marking misclassified processes as anomalies. It captures behavior patterns for the learned executables without thresholding, making it robust against interference and unknown activities. Evaluations on the DARPA TC and OpTC datasets demonstrate that GRASP consistently detects anomalous behavior, including known attack-related activities, outperforming existing systems. Our PIDS identifies all documented attacks on datasets where the behavior of executables is learnable. In addition, compared to existing systems, GRASP uncovers potentially malicious anomalous behavior not labeled as an attack in the documentation.

</details>


### [600] [Characterizing and Correcting Effective Target Shift in Online Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07886)
*Ziyan Li,Naoki Hiratani*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文研究了在线核回归与离线回归之间的关系，发现在线核回归等价于使用偏移、不准确目标输出的离线回归。通过目标校正（target correction），在线核学习可以学到与离线方法相同的预测器。在CIFAR-10和CORe50上的实验表明，使用迭代校正目标的在线SGD在持续学习设置中优于直接使用真实目标的学习方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代机器学习系统在线学习（尤其是分布偏移下）表现不佳，而在线学习是智能的核心特征。作者希望从理论上理解在线学习与离线学习的基本关系，并改进在线学习在非平稳环境中的表现。

Method: 推导了在线核回归所学函数的闭式解，揭示其等价于使用偏移目标的离线回归；提出目标校正方法（闭式解和迭代形式）使在线学习学到与离线相同的预测器；在CIFAR-10和CORe50上验证持续学习效果。

Result: 在线核回归等价于使用偏移（shifted）且不准确目标的离线回归；通过目标校正，在线学习可以恢复与离线学习相同的预测器；在持续学习图像分类任务中，带迭代校正目标的SGD优于使用真实目标的方法。

Conclusion: 该工作为分析和改进非平稳环境中的在线学习提供了基本框架，揭示了在线与离线学习的深层联系，并提出了一种实用的目标校正策略。

Abstract: Online learning from a stream of data is a defining feature of intelligence, yet modern machine learning systems often struggle in this setting, especially under distributional shift. To understand its basic properties, we study the relationship between online and offline learning in the context of kernel regression. We derive a closed-form expression for the function learned by online kernel regression, revealing that online kernel regression is equivalent to offline regression with shifted, inaccurate target outputs. Conversely, we show that by compensating for this effective shift in the teaching signal through target correction, online kernel-based learning can provably learn the same predictor as its offline counterpart. We derive both a closed-form expression for this target correction and an iterative form that can be applied sequentially. Applying this framework to image classification tasks on CIFAR-10 and CORe50, we show that online stochastic gradient descent with iteratively corrected targets outperforms learning with the true targets in continual learning settings. This work therefore provides a basic framework for analyzing and improving online learning in non-stationary environments.

</details>


### [601] [Penalty-Based First-Order Methods for Bilevel Optimization with Minimax and Constrained Lower-Level Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08006)
*Yiyang Shen,Yutian He,Weiran Wang,Qihang Lin*

Main category: math.OC

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文研究了上下层均为极小极大结构的双层优化问题，提出了基于惩罚的一阶方法，在确定性和随机性设置下分别达到了$\tilde{O}(ε^{-4})$和$\tilde{O}(ε^{-9})$的oracle复杂度，并证明凸约束下层极小化问题可转化为该框架，改进了现有结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有双层优化方法主要针对下层为极小化问题且通常要求强凸性，无法直接应用于下层为极小极大结构的场景（如对抗训练、鲁棒优化等新兴应用），亟需解决这一理论空白。

Method: 提出基于惩罚的一阶方法（penalty-based first-order methods），通过将双层极小极大问题转化为惩罚形式的单层优化，避免了要求下层问题强凸性的限制。在确定性环境下推导了$\tilde{O}(ε^{-4})$复杂度，在随机梯度环境下推导了$\tilde{O}(ε^{-9})$复杂度。

Result: 确定性设置下达到$\tilde{O}(ε^{-4})$的oracle复杂度；凸约束下层极小化问题可转化为该框架，复杂度从$\tilde{O}(ε^{-7})$改进至$\tilde{O}(ε^{-4})$；随机设置下达到$\tilde{O}(ε^{-9})$的oracle复杂度。

Conclusion: 本文为下层具有极小极小极大结构的双层优化提供了理论保证和高效算法，并展示了通过拉格朗日对偶推广到更广泛问题的可能性。

Abstract: We study a class of bilevel optimization problems in which both the upper- and lower-level problems have minimax structures. This setting captures a broad range of emerging applications. Despite the extensive literature on bilevel optimization and minimax optimization separately, existing methods mainly focus on bilevel optimization with lower-level minimization problems, often under strong convexity assumptions, and are not directly applicable to the minimax lower-level setting considered here. To address this gap, we develop penalty-based first-order methods for bilevel minimax optimization without requiring strong convexity of the lower-level problem. In the deterministic setting, we establish that the proposed method finds an $ε$-KKT point with $\tilde{O}(ε^{-4})$ oracle complexity. We further show that bilevel problems with convex constrained lower-level minimization can be reformulated as special cases of our framework via Lagrangian duality, leading to an $\tilde{O}(ε^{-4})$ complexity bound that improves upon the existing $\tilde{O}(ε^{-7})$ result. Finally, we extend our approach to the stochastic setting, where only stochastic gradient oracles are available, and prove that the proposed stochastic method finds a nearly $ε$-KKT point with $\tilde{O}(ε^{-9})$ oracle complexity.

</details>


### [602] [Physics-based Digital Twins for Integrated Thermal Energy Systems Using Active Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06756)
*Umme Mahbuba Nabila,Paul Seurin,Linyu Lin,Majdi I. Radaideh*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种主动学习框架，将系统级Modelica仿真与四种代理模型（SINDyC、MvG-SINDyC、FNN、GRU）结合，用于热能分配系统的实时监督控制。在IDNL的GHX子系统上验证，主动学习仅需随机采样1/5的轨迹即可达到相近精度，其中GRU预测精度最高，SINDyC最高效可解释，MvG-SINDyC支持不确定性量化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高保真仿真成本高，纯数据驱动代理模型缺乏鲁棒性，需要兼具准确性、可解释性、不确定性感知且计算高效的数字孪生方法。

Method: 提出主动学习框架，将Modelica系统仿真与四种代理模型耦合，并针对每种代理设计特定的主动学习查询策略（如马氏距离采样、基于误差的采样），优先选择信息量丰富的轨迹进行学习。

Result: 主动学习框架仅需1/5仿真轨迹即可达到与随机采样相当的预测精度；GRU预测保真度最高，SINDyC计算效率最高且可解释性最强，MvG-SINDyC支持不确定性量化且计算收益最大。

Conclusion: 所提主动学习框架能有效降低对大量高保真仿真数据的需求，不同代理模型各有优势，可根据具体需求（精度、效率、可解释性、不确定性量化）灵活选择。

Abstract: Real-time supervisory control of thermal energy distribution systems requires digital twins that are accurate, interpretable, and uncertainty-aware, yet remain data and computationally efficient. High-fidelity simulations alone are costly, while purely data-driven surrogates often lack robustness. To address these challenges, this work proposes an active learning (AL) framework that couples system-level Modelica simulations with four simpler physics-informed and data-driven surrogate modeling approaches: deterministic Sparse Identification of Nonlinear Dynamics with Control (SINDyC), its probabilistic multivariate-Gaussian extension (MvG-SINDyC), feedforward neural network (FNN), and gated recurrent unit (GRU) network. Tailored to each surrogate, model-specific AL query strategies are employed, including Mahalanobis-distance sampling in coefficient space for MvG-SINDyC and error-based sampling in prediction space for SINDyC, FNN, and GRU, allowing the learning process to prioritize dynamically informative trajectories.
  The proposed approach is demonstrated on the glycol heat exchanger (GHX) subsystem of the Thermal Energy Distribution System (TEDS) at Idaho National Laboratory. Across key GHX outputs--the bypass mass flow rate $\dot{m}_{\mathrm{GHX}}$ and heat transfer rate $Q_{\mathrm{GHX}}$-the AL framework achieves comparable predictive accuracy using as few as one-fifth of the simulation trajectories required by random sampling. Among the evaluated surrogates, the GRU achieves the highest predictive fidelity, while SINDyC remains the most computationally efficient and interpretable. The probabilistic MvG-SINDyC surrogate further enables uncertainty quantification and exhibits the largest computational gains under AL.

</details>


### [603] [Why DDIM Hallucinates More than DDPM: A Theoretical Analysis of Reverse Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06831)
*Muhammad H. Ashiq,Samanyu Arora,Abhinav N. Harish,Ishaan Kharbanda,Hung Yun Tseng,Grigorios G. Chrysos*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 本文从理论上研究了两种扩散采样器（DDPM和DDIM）在混合高斯目标上的幻觉现象，证明DDIM在临界时间后会被困在最近两个模式之间的线段上产生幻觉，而DDPM的随机性帮助其避免幻觉。实验验证了DDPM幻觉率更低，并提出增加随机步可帮助DDIM避免幻觉。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解扩散模型中幻觉现象的理论根源，特别是随机性（DDPM）与确定性（DDIM）采样器在生成质量上的差异，为设计更好的采样器提供理论指导。

Method: 理论分析DDIM（逆ODE）和DDPM（逆SDE）在混合高斯目标上的行为，推导临界时间τ后的动力学特性；通过实验验证理论预测。

Result: DDIM在临界时间后会被困在最近两个模式之间的线段上产生幻觉；DDPM的随机性帮助其脱离该区域，从而显著降低幻觉率；增加随机步可帮助DDIM避免幻觉。

Conclusion: 随机性是避免扩散模型幻觉的关键机制，为改进采样器设计提供了新方向——在确定性采样器中引入适当的随机性可提升生成质量。

Abstract: We theoretically study the hallucination phenomena in two canonical diffusion samplers: the stochastic Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model (DDPM) and the deterministic Denoising Diffusion Implicit Model (DDIM). We analyze the reverse ODE (DDIM) and SDE (DDPM) for a Gaussian mixture target, proving that after a critical time $τ$, (a) DDIM can become stuck on the segment connecting the two nearest modes and (b) DDPM *stochasticity* helps it become unstuck from this region, thus avoiding hallucination. Our empirical validation verifies that DDPM has a significantly lower hallucination rate than DDIM when this region is entered. Building on our observations, we exhibit how using additional stochastic steps can help DDIM avoid hallucinations and offer new insights on how to design improved samplers.

</details>


### [604] [Streaming Adversarial Robustness in Fuzzy ARTMAP: Mechanism-Aligned Evaluation, Progressive Training, and Interpretable Diagnostics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06902)
*Shane Cairns,Leonardo Enzo Brito da Silva,Sasha Petrenko,Donald C. Wunsch,Jian Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 本文研究了流式原型学习器（Fuzzy ARTMAP）的对抗鲁棒性，提出了与ART架构类别竞争机制对齐的白盒攻击方法WB-Softmax，并揭示了不同评估协议下防御排名的反转现象，最终提出了两阶段选择性训练作为最优策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 离线深度网络的对抗鲁棒性已被广泛研究，但严格单次传递的流式神经学习器（如基于自适应共振理论的Fuzzy ARTMAP）的鲁棒性尚不清楚，需要填补这一空白。

Method: 提出WB-Softmax，一种与ARTMAP类别竞争和地图场预测机制对齐的可微白盒攻击代理；形式化流式评估原则（最终部署模型上评估鲁棒性）；引入两阶段选择性训练作为防御策略。

Result: WB-Softmax在四个图像基准上对vanilla Fuzzy ARTMAP实现89-100%攻击成功率；防御排名在不同协议下反转（离线对抗训练在迁移攻击下强但在自适应白盒评估下崩溃）；两阶段选择性训练提供最强整体鲁棒性；ART类别几何可解释地诊断分离坍塌和匹配分数反转。

Conclusion: 为流式原型学习器的对抗鲁棒性提供了机制对齐、协议感知的评估框架，表明鲁棒性评估必须考虑部署场景和攻击协议的匹配。

Abstract: Adversarial robustness has been studied extensively for offline deep networks, but less is known about strict single-pass streaming neural learners. This paper studies adversarial robustness in Fuzzy ARTMAP, an Adaptive Resonance Theory architecture based on category competition, complement coding, match tracking, and replay-free prototype updates. We introduce WB-Softmax, a differentiable white-box attack surrogate aligned with ARTMAP's category-competition and map-field prediction mechanism, and formalize a streaming evaluation principle requiring robustness to be assessed on the final deployed model. Across four image benchmarks, WB-Softmax achieves 89-100% attack success on vanilla Fuzzy ARTMAP models. We show that defense rankings can reverse across protocols: offline adversarial training may appear strong under transfer attacks yet collapse under adaptive white-box evaluation, whereas progressive two-stage selective training provides the strongest overall replay-free robustness. We further show that ART's explicit category geometry enables interpretable diagnosis of separation collapse and match-score inversion. These results provide a mechanism-aligned, protocol-aware framework for adversarial robustness in streaming prototype-based learners.

</details>


### [605] [Inductive Power Grid Cascading Failure Analysis with GRU-Gated Graph Attention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07010)
*Tianxin Zhou,Xiang Li,Haibing Lu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 提出一种GRU门控图注意力网络，在有限训练网格的级联故障数据上训练后，可零样本迁移到未见过的电网，识别脆弱输电线路。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 级联故障前识别脆弱输电线路至关重要，但现有方法依赖单一电网训练，无法迁移到未知电网，跨电网知识迁移是开放问题。

Method: 在多个训练网格的级联故障数据上联合训练一个GRU门控图注意力网络（GRU控制节点在级联迭代中保留/丢弃信息），训练后直接应用于未见过的电网，无需微调。

Result: 模型零样本迁移到多个新网格（跨时间、跨领域设置），识别脆弱线路的效果优于传统的结构与电气基线方法。

Conclusion: 提出了一种跨电网可迁移的脆弱线路识别方法，无需目标电网的训练数据即可有效工作。

Abstract: Identifying vulnerable transmission lines in power grids before a cascading failure occurs is challenging: existing methods can learn inter-line failure correlations from cascade data, but they are trained and evaluated on a single grid, and transferring the learned knowledge to an unseen grid remains an open problem. We address this by training a single Gated Recurrent Unit (GRU)-gated Graph Attention Network on combined cascading failure data from limited training grids and applying it directly to any unseen grid without retraining. A GRU gate controls what information each node retains or discards at each cascade iteration. Empirical evaluation shows that the model transfers zero-shot to multiple new grids spanning inter-time and inter-domain settings. Using information extracted from the trained model, we consistently identify more vulnerable lines than established structural and electrical baselines.

</details>


### [606] [Almost Sure Convergence Rates of Stochastic Approximation and Reinforcement Learning via a Poisson-Moreau Drift](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07104)
*Xinyu Liu,Zixuan Xie,Shangtong Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 本文针对马尔可夫噪声下随机逼近和强化学习算法的几乎必然收敛率问题，建立了接近最优的收敛率结果：对于幂律学习率得到接近 o(n^{1-2η}) 的收敛率，对于调和学习率得到接近 o(n^{-1}) 的收敛率。核心创新是利用泊松方程校正马尔可夫噪声的 Lyapunov 漂移构造。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 建立马尔可夫噪声下随机逼近算法几乎必然收敛率是基础理论难题，此前缺乏严格的理论保证，需要填补这一空白。

Method: 提出新颖的 Lyapunov 漂移构造方法，将基于泊松方程的马尔可夫噪声校正与 Moreau-envelope 平滑技术相结合，用于处理收缩映射。

Result: 幂律学习率下获得接近 o(n^{1-2η}) 的几乎必然收敛率；调和学习率下获得接近 o(n^{-1}) 的几乎必然收敛率，接近于 i.i.d. 噪声下的最优率 O(n^{-1}log log n)。

Conclusion: 该工作为马尔可夫噪声下 RL 算法的收敛性提供了更强的理论保证，对 Q-learning 和 TD 学习等算法的理论分析有重要意义。

Abstract: Establishing almost sure convergence rates for stochastic approximation and reinforcement learning under Markovian noise is a fundamental theoretical challenge. We make progress towards this challenge for a class of stochastic approximation algorithms whose expected updates are contractive, a setting that arises in many reinforcement learning algorithms such as $Q$-learning and linear temporal difference learning. Specifically, for a power-law learning rate $O(n^{-η})$ with $η\in (1/2, 1)$, we obtain an almost sure convergence rate arbitrarily close to $o(n^{1 - 2η})$. For a harmonic learning rate $O(n^{-1})$, we obtain an almost sure convergence rate arbitrarily close to $o(n^{-1})$, which we argue is a strong result because it is close to the optimal rate $O(n^{-1}\log\log n)$ given by the law of the iterated logarithm (for a special case of i.i.d. noise). Key to our analysis is a novel Lyapunov drift construction that applies a Poisson-equation based correction for Markovian noise to the well-established Moreau-envelope smoothing for the contractive mapping.

</details>


### [607] [Learned Lagrangian Models of PDEs via Euler-Lagrange Residual Minimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07157)
*Lyra Zhornyak,Eric Forgoston,M. Ani Hsieh*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于学习型连续拉格朗日量的动力系统预测方法，通过优化积分器实现偏微分方程的长程稳定预测，误差可与经典辛方法媲美。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于学习的方法在预测PDE动力学时存在长时间预测不稳定的问题，而传统数值积分器依赖解析模型，难以与学习到的连续模型结合。作者希望将物理保守结构与数据驱动方法结合，实现稳定长程预测。

Method: 1) 直接使用学习到的连续拉格朗日量；2) 设计基于优化的积分器，在局部时空片上最小化平方Euler-Lagrange残差，构造近辛结构；3) 通过Jacobi迭代实现线性复杂度缩放；4) 模型误差与积分误差解耦。

Result: 在双摆、一维和二维波动方程上验证，误差与传统辛方法相当，能泛化到空间变化动力学和任意边界条件，无需重新训练。

Conclusion: 该方法成功将连续拉格朗日学习与稳定积分结合，为物理引导的机器学习预测PDE动力学提供了新范式。

Abstract: We present the first method to directly use a learned continuous Lagrangian to forecast the dynamics of systems governed by partial differential equations, exploiting the inherent conservative structure to achieve stable long-range predictions. We develop an optimization-based integrator that minimizes the squared Euler--Lagrange residual via a mesh-free near-symplectic construction on local space-time patches. Different from integrators for analytical models, integrators for learned models should decouple model error (phase error) from integration error (conservation error). By relying on optimization rather than time-stepping, we bypass the global coupling inherent to fixed discretizations, which slows time- and space-stepping and complicates learning. Our method scales linearly with domain size via Jacobi iteration, and places no structural requirements on the learned network, allowing it to be coupled with existing physics-guided machine learning (ML) methods. We validate our approach on a learned representation of a double pendulum, a one-dimensional wave equation, and a two-dimensional wave equation. Our method achieves error comparable to classical symplectic methods while generalizing to spatially varying dynamics and arbitrary boundary conditions without retraining.

</details>


### [608] [Neurosymbolic Imitation Learning with Human Guidance: A Privileged Information Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07166)
*Nikhilesh Prabhakar,Varun Balaji,Athresh Karanam,Kristian Kersting,Sriraam Natarajan*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 提出一种神经符号方法（neuro-symbolic）用于模仿学习，结合神经网络处理高维数据的能力和符号方法的泛化优势，并利用训练时特有的注视数据（gaze data）作为特权信息，在多个任务上验证了有效性、效率和泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 纯神经网络方法需要大量样本且容易过拟合，而纯符号方法无法有效处理高维数据。作者希望结合两者优势，并利用训练阶段独有的特权信息（注视数据）来提升模仿学习的性能。

Method: 提出一种神经符号（neuro-symbolic）框架，将神经网络用于处理高维输入（如图像），符号模块用于推理和泛化；同时利用训练时特有的注视数据（gaze）作为额外的特权信息来辅助学习。

Result: 实验表明该方法在有效性、样本效率和泛化能力上均优于纯神经和纯符号基线方法。

Conclusion: 神经符号方法结合特权信息能有效兼顾高维数据处理和泛化能力，是模仿学习的一个有前景的方向。

Abstract: Imitation learning is widely used for learning to act in complex environments. While pure neural-based methods handle high dimensional data effectively, they suffer from the requirement of large number of samples and are prone to overfitting. Pure symbolic approaches, while generalize well, do not handle high-dimensional data effectively. We propose a neurosymbolic approach that achieves the best of both worlds, i.e, handling high-dimensional data while achieving generalization. The key advantage of our approach is that it can effectively exploit additional privileged information that is available only during training (in our case, gaze data). Our empirical evaluations demonstrate the effectiveness, efficiency and the generalization capability of our proposed approach.

</details>


### [609] [VNN-LIB 2.0: Rigorous Foundations for Neural Network Verification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07451)
*Ann Roy,Allen Antony,Andrea Gimelli,Matthew L. Daggitt*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 本文针对VNN-LIB 1.0作为神经网络验证标准在语法、语义、类型系统等方面的缺陷，提出了VNN-LIB 2.0的理论基础，核心创新是引入"网络理论"抽象概念，使标准独立于具体ONNX版本，并给出了形式化语法、类型系统和语义，最后在Agda定理证明器中机械化验证了其内部一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: VNN-LIB 1.0缺乏精确的语法、语义和类型系统，表达能力有限，且依赖语义非形式化且不断演变的ONNX模型，这与SMT-LIB等成熟标准形成鲜明对比。为了解决这些问题，需要为VNN-LIB建立严谨的形式化基础。

Method: 提出"网络理论"（network theory）这一抽象概念，它刻画了神经网络模型格式所需的最小语义接口，使VNN-LIB独立于具体的ONNX版本；在此基础之上，构建了更具表达力的查询语言的形式化语法、针对数值域的类型系统，以及形式化语义；最后在Agda定理证明器中对标准进行了机械化验证。

Result: 建立了VNN-LIB 2.0的理论基础，包括网络理论抽象、形式化语法、类型系统和语义，并通过Agda机械化验证确保了内部一致性，为可信的神经网络验证提供了稳健而严谨的基础。

Conclusion: VNN-LIB 2.0通过形式化方法解决了VNN-LIB 1.0的关键缺陷，为神经网络验证领域提供了一个更可靠、更具表达力和可扩展的标准基础。

Abstract: Neural network verification is an active and rapidly maturing research area, with a growing ecosystem of solvers and tools. The VNN-LIB standard was introduced to support interoperability in this ecosystem, but Version~1.0 has several serious short-comings as a formal foundation: it lacks a precise syntax, semantics, and type system, offers limited expressivity, and relies on externally defined ONNX models whose semantics are informal and constantly evolving. The latter distinguishes VNN-LIB from established standards such as SMT-LIB, where queries are self-contained and have fixed semantics.
  In this paper we address these challenges by developing the theoretical foundations of VNN-LIB~2.0. Our key contribution is the introduction of the notion of a \emph{network theory}, which abstractly characterises the minimal semantic interface required from a neural network model format. This abstraction enables VNN-LIB to be defined independently of any specific ONNX version while remaining compatible with evolving model representations. Building on this foundation, we present a formal syntax for a more expressive query language, a type system for it over the numeric domains provided by the network theory, and finally a formal semantics. To ensure internal consistency, the standard is mechanised in the Agda theorem prover. VNN-LIB~2.0 therefore provides robust and rigorous foundations for trustworthy neural network verification.

</details>


### [610] [Learning Minimal-Deviation Corrections for Multi-Dimensional Mismodelling in HEP Simulations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07460)
*Matthias Schott,Lucie Flek*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于神经网络的方法，在仅有一维目标分布可用的约束下，通过最小偏差原则学习对模拟事件进行变换，以修正高能物理中蒙特卡洛模拟的多维建模误差，同时保持原始模拟的相关结构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高能物理中蒙特卡洛模拟在复杂场景下常无法复现观测数据，而实际中实验信息往往仅以1D分布形式提供，传统的1D重加权方法忽略特征间的相关性，完全多维方法又需要大量目标数据，缺乏在有限信息下有效修正多维建模误差的方法。

Method: 提出神经网络方法，在仅有1D目标分布的条件下学习一个从模拟到目标的变换。该方法采用最小偏差原则：变换后的数据尽量接近原始模拟（保持全局相关结构），同时确保其1D边缘分布与给定的目标分布一致。

Result: 通过受控的模拟伪数据实验表明，该方法能有效改善与目标分布的一致性，同时保持多维结构的一致性。

Conclusion: 该方法适用于传统技术不足的复杂高维分析场景，为在有限信息下增强蒙特卡洛建模提供了可扩展的解决方案。

Abstract: Accurate Monte Carlo (MC) modelling in high-energy physics is challenging, particularly in complex scenarios where simulations fail to reproduce observed data. In practice, experimental information is often limited to one-dimensional (1D) distributions, while mismodelling arises in a multidimensional feature space. This restricts traditional correction methods, as one-dimensional reweighting ignores correlations and fully multidimensional approaches require large target datasets. We propose a neural network-based method that operates under these constraints by learning a transformation of simulated events that reproduces the available 1D target distributions while remaining close to the original simulation. This minimal-deviation principle preserves the global correlation structure of the baseline model while enabling targeted corrections of mismodelled features. Using controlled studies with simulated pseudo-data, we show that the method improves agreement with target distributions and maintains a consistent multidimensional structure. The approach is designed for complex, high-dimensional analyses where traditional techniques are insufficient, providing a scalable way to enhance MC modelling under limited information.

</details>


### [611] [Drifting Field Policy: A One-Step Generative Policy via Wasserstein Gradient Flow](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07727)
*Juil Koo,Mingue Park,Jiwon Choi,Yunhong Min,Minhyuk Sung*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 提出一种基于漂移模型的非ODE单步生成策略DFP，将策略更新视为反向KL Wasserstein-2梯度流，实现了优于ODE基策略的操控任务性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有ODE-based策略（如扩散策略）推理速度慢，亟需一种高效的、非ODE的单步生成策略用于机器人操控。

Method: 将策略更新建模为概率空间中的反向KL Wasserstein-2梯度流，分解为动作值上升项和锚定策略的评分匹配项（信任区域约束），最终推导出可计算的行为克隆式损失（在Top-K评论家筛选的动作上）。

Result: 在Robomimic和OGBench的多项操控任务上达到SOTA，优于ODE基策略。

Conclusion: 非ODE参数化的漂移模型适合该机制，实现了一步推理的高效优质策略。

Abstract: We propose Drifting Field Policy (DFP), a non-ODE one-step generative policy built on the drifting model paradigm. We frame the policy update as a reverse-KL Wasserstein-2 gradient flow toward a soft target policy, so that each DFP update corresponds to a gradient step in probability space. By construction, this gradient is decomposed into an ascent toward higher action-value regions and a score matching with the anchor policy as a trust region. We further derive a simple, tractable surrogate of the otherwise intractable update loss, akin to behavior cloning on top-K critic-selected actions. We find empirically that this mechanism uniquely benefits the drifting backbone owing to its non-ODE parameterization. With one-step inference, DFP achieves state-of-the-art performance on several manipulation tasks across Robomimic and OGBench, outperforming ODE-based policies.

</details>


### [612] [\mathsf{VISTA}: Decentralized Machine Learning in Adversary Dominated Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07841)
*Hanzaleh Akbari Nodehi,Parsa Moradi,Soheil Mohajer,Mohammad Ali Maddah-Ali*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 本文提出VISTA算法，在恶意节点占多数的去中心化机器学习场景中，通过自适应调整一致性阈值来激励理性攻击者，使得全局优化仍能收敛到SGD的渐进性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有鲁棒聚合方法依赖诚实多数假设，但当攻击者控制多数节点时失效。本文从激励角度出发，将攻击者视为理性智能体，通过控制接受阈值来平衡估计误差与奖励风险。

Method: 提出VISTA算法，利用优化历史自适应调整一致性接受阈值，在迭代过程中动态权衡早期快速进展与后期抗攻击精度，并给出理论收敛性分析。

Result: 数值实验表明VISTA在收敛速度上优于静态阈值方法；理论证明即使攻击者占多数，通过激励自适应的阈值调整，仍能保持标准SGD的渐进收敛行为。

Conclusion: 在攻击者主导的去中心化学习中，通过合理的激励设计（而非依赖诚实多数假设）仍可实现可靠收敛，为去中心化机器学习的安全鲁棒性提供了新范式。

Abstract: Decentralized machine learning often relies on outsourcing computations, such as gradient evaluations, to untrusted worker nodes. Existing robust aggregation methods can mitigate malicious behavior under honest-majority assumptions, but may fail when adversaries control a majority of the workers. We study this adversary-dominated setting through an incentive-oriented framework in which reports are accepted and rewarded only when they are mutually consistent up to a threshold. This turns the adversary from a pure saboteur into a rational agent that trades off increasing estimation error against the risk of rejection and loss of reward.
  We consider iterative optimization under this model. Unlike one-shot computation, iterative learning requires long-horizon decisions: permissive acceptance rules enable faster early progress but admit more adversarial corruption, while strict rules improve estimation accuracy but cause frequent rejections. We propose \mathsf{VISTA}, an adaptive algorithm that tunes the acceptance threshold using the optimization history. Numerical results show that \mathsf{VISTA} improves convergence over static thresholds. We also provide a rigorous convergence analysis showing that, with suitable incentive-aware adaptation, adversary-dominated decentralized learning can retain the asymptotic convergence behavior of standard SGD without relying on an honest majority.

</details>


### [613] [Aggregation in conformal e-classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07963)
*Vladimir Vovk*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 本文实验研究了交叉共形e预测（一种聚合共形e预测器的方法）及其更简单灵活的改进版本，旨在平衡预测效率与计算效率并保持有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 共形预测器的聚合可以在保持有效性的同时平衡预测效率与计算效率，但传统方法会牺牲有效性。共形e预测器更容易聚合而不损失有效性，因此需要研究更高效灵活的聚合方法。

Method: 实验研究交叉共形e预测及其修改版本，分析其预测效率、计算成本和有效性保持情况。

Result: 交叉共形e预测及其改进方法能在一定程度上保持有效性，同时提供更灵活和概念上更简单的聚合方式。

Conclusion: 共形e预测器的聚合方法（尤其是改进版本）在保持有效性的同时提供了更好的灵活性和计算效率。

Abstract: Aggregating conformal predictors is a standard way of balancing their predictive and computational efficiency while retaining their validity, at least approximately. An important advantage of conformal e-predictors is that they are easier to aggregate without sacrificing their validity. This paper studies experimentally cross-conformal e-prediction, which is an existing method of aggregating conformal e-predictors, and its modifications that are conceptually simpler and more flexible.

</details>


### [614] [Reinforcement Learning for Exponential Utility: Algorithms and Convergence in Discounted MDPs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08053)
*Gugan Thoppe,L. A. Prashanth,Ankur Naskar,Sanjay Bhat*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 本文针对折扣MDP中指数效用优化的强化学习问题，提出了两种基于Q值的模型无关算法（双时间尺度Q学习和单时间尺度幂律算法），并证明了策略最优性和收敛性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 指数效用优化下的折扣MDP缺乏 principled 的基于值函数的算法，本文旨在填补这一理论空白。

Method: 推导两种Q值扩展形式并证明其算子在不同度量下为压缩映射；提出双时间尺度Q学习算法（证明几乎必然收敛和有限时间收敛率）和单时间尺度幂律算子算法（基于局部Lipschitz性、单调性等精细分析证明收敛）。

Result: 两种算法均能收敛到指数效用最优策略；双时间尺度算法有有限时间收敛率保证，单时间尺度算法在标量情形下有有限时间分析。

Conclusion: 为指数效用目标下的基于值函数的强化学习奠定了理论基础，提供了可收敛的模型无关算法。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) for exponential-utility optimization in discounted Markov decision processes (MDPs) lacks principled value-based algorithms. We address this gap in the fixed risk-aversion setting. Building on the Bellman-type equation for exponential utility studied in \cite{porteus1975optimality}, we derive two Q-value-style extensions and show that the associated operators are contractions in the $L_\infty$ and sup-log/Thompson metrics, respectively. We characterize their fixed points and prove that the induced greedy stationary policy is optimal for the exponential-utility objective among stationary policies. These structural results lead to two model-free algorithms: a two-timescale Q-learning--style algorithm, for which we establish almost-sure convergence and provide finite-time convergence rates via timescale separation, and a one-timescale algorithm governed by a sublinear power-law operator. Since the latter does not admit a global contraction in standard metrics, we prove its convergence using delicate arguments based on local Lipschitzness, monotonicity, homogeneity, and Dini derivatives, and provide a scalar finite-time analysis that highlights the challenges in obtaining convergence rates in the vector case. Our work provides a foundation for value-based RL under exponential-utility objectives.

</details>


### [615] [Continuous First, Discrete Later: VQ-VAEs Without Dimensional Collapse](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06870)
*Xinyu Zhao,Nikita Karagodin,Hamed Hassani,Sinan Hersek,Paul Pu Liang,Yury Polyanskiy*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 28.0

TL;DR: 本文发现VQ-VAE存在维度坍塌问题（表征仅占满秩的1-2%），提出AE Warm-Up方法：先训练无量化自编码器再引入VQ，通过理论分析（结合序贯学习与率失真理论）解释了坍塌原因并证明该方法能恢复表征维度，在VQGAN和WavTokenizer上验证了效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的VQ-VAE改进主要关注码本大小和利用率，但维度坍塌（表征陷入极低维子空间）这一根本问题未被解决，且已有方法无法突破由此导致的损失下界。

Method: 提出AE Warm-Up：在引入VQ之前先让模型作为无量化自编码器训练；理论框架结合序贯学习效应与率失真理论，解释VQ抑制低方差方向导致维度坍塌。

Result: 在VQGAN上，码本有效维度从3-5提升至17-19，rFID降低17-35%；在WavTokenizer上，码本维度从4提升至17-19，PESQ提升11-14%。

Conclusion: AE Warm-Up是一个简单有效的解决方案，能恢复表征维度并突破损失下界；理论分析可预测下游性能与热身时长的关系，支持自适应切换策略。

Abstract: While many approaches to improve VQ-VAE performance focus on codebook size and utilization, the effect of dimensional collapse, where trained VQ-VAE representations live in an extremely low-dimensional subspace (1-2% of full rank), remains unaddressed. We show theoretically and empirically that dimension collapse causes a hard loss lower bound that various codebook improvement techniques fail to surpass. Our analytic framework extends the sequential learning effect of Saxe et al. [2014] by introducing ideas from rate-distortion theory and explains how the latent collapse is caused by the VQ suppressing lower-variance directions. Our theory justifies a simple solution: a "warm-up phase" that trains the model as an (unquantized) autoencoder before introducing VQ. On both synthetic experiments and large-scale image (VQGAN) and audio (WavTokenizer) VQ-VAEs, we show that AE Warm-Up successfully restores representation dimension, leading to lower reconstruction and perceptual loss at the same training budget. Across codebook sizes $K \in$ {$2^{10}, 2^{14}, 2^{16}$}, AE warm-up raises VQGAN codebook effective dimension from 3-5 to 17-19 and reduces rFID by 17-35%; on WavTokenizer at $K \in$ {$2^{13}, 2^{14}$}, it raises codebook dimension from 4 to 17-19 and improves PESQ by 11-14%. We empirically characterize how warm-up duration governs the achievable final loss. In agreement with experiment, our theoretical analysis predicts downstream performance as a function of warm-up length, enabling an adaptive criterion for switching from AE Warm-up to VQ-VAE training.

</details>


### [616] [On Training in Imagination](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06732)
*Nadav Timor,Ravid Shwartz-Ziv,Micah Goldblum,Yann LeCun,David Harel*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 本文研究了基于模型的强化学习（MBRL）中，使用学习到的动力学和奖励模型进行策略更新时，模型误差对回报和策略优化的影响。作者扩展了Asadi等人的分析到带学习奖励模型的MDP，推导了最小化回报误差边界的动力学/奖励样本最优分配比例，并发现更小的Lipschitz常数能收紧该边界。同时，研究了REINFORCE算法对噪声奖励的容忍性，证明零均值奖励噪声不会使梯度估计有偏，仅增加与 rollout 数量成反比的方差项，从而引出预算约束下"更多廉价含噪rollout"与"更少昂贵精确rollout"之间的权衡，并将其简化为一个一维优化问题来刻画最优解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MBRL方法在策略更新时不查询真实环境，完全依赖学习模型产生的想象轨迹（rollouts），但学习到的动力学和奖励模型必然存在误差，这些误差如何影响策略的性能和优化尚缺乏系统的量化分析，因此需要理论框架来理解误差传播并指导资源分配。

Method: 1) 将Asadi等人关于动力学误差的界分析扩展到包含学习奖励模型的MDP，推导回报误差上界；2) 在幂律缩放假设下，求解最小化该上界的动力学样本与奖励样本最优分配比例；3) 分析REINFORCE梯度估计在零均值奖励噪声下的偏差和方差特性；4) 将预算约束下的采样策略选择转化为一维优化问题。

Result: 1) 推导了MBRL中考虑奖励模型误差时的回报误差上界及其最优样本分配策略；2) 证明零均值奖励噪声不会引入梯度偏差，且方差随rollout数增加而减小；3) 给出了预算约束下选择"更多含噪rollout"还是"更少精确rollout"的最优决策准则。

Conclusion: 学习到的动力学和奖励模型的Lipschitz常数越小，回报误差边界越紧，这一视角与Wang等人(2026)的时间直化目标有理论联系；在固定预算下，可以通过一维优化找到最优的rollout数量与噪声水平权衡。

Abstract: State-of-the-art model-based reinforcement learning methods train policies on imagined rollouts. These rollouts are trajectories generated by a learned dynamics model and are scored by a learned reward model, but without querying the true environment during policy updates. We study this training paradigm by quantifying how errors in learned dynamics and reward models affect returns and policy optimization. First, we extend the analysis of Asadi et al. (2018) to MDPs with learned reward models, and derive the optimal sample allocation--the ratio of dynamics samples to reward samples that minimizes a bound on return error under power-law scaling assumptions. We identify lower Lipschitz constants of the learned dynamics, reward, and policy as a representation desideratum that tightens this bound, and we connect this perspective to the temporal-straightening objective of Wang et al. (2026). Second, we examine how policy optimization with REINFORCE tolerates noisy rewards, which are often cheaper to obtain. We show that zero-mean reward noise leaves the gradient estimator unbiased and adds at most a variance term that decreases with the number of rollouts. This introduces a practical tradeoff: given a fixed budget, should one buy more rollouts with cheaper but noisier rewards, or fewer rollouts with more expensive but less noisy rewards? We reduce this choice to a one-dimensional optimization problem and characterize the optimum.

</details>


### [617] [From Model to Data (M2D): Shifting Complexity from GNNs to Graphs for Transparent Graph Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06814)
*Debolina Halder Lina,Arlei Silva*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出Model-to-Data (M2D)蒸馏框架，将GNN模型复杂度转移到数据空间，通过增强图特征和结构使简单学生模型匹配复杂教师模型性能，从而提升架构可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有GNN可解释方法聚焦于归因单个预测，缺乏架构级透明度，无法解释简单与复杂模型间的性能差距。

Method: M2D蒸馏：将教师模型的行为（特征增强、结构增强）蒸馏到图数据中，使简单学生模型（如浅层GNN）在增强后数据上达到与复杂教师模型相当的性能。

Result: M2D能够以可解释的方式揭示注意力聚合、公平性目标等底层机制，在保持性能的同时增强GNN透明度。

Conclusion: 通过将模型行为物化到数据空间，M2D提供了一种新的架构级可解释性视角，帮助理解不同GNN架构设计带来的性能差异。

Abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) achieve high performance but can be opaque to humans, making it difficult to understand and compare the many proposed architectures. While existing explainability methods attribute individual predictions to nodes, edges, or features, they do not provide architectural transparency or explain the fundamental performance gap between simple and more complex models. To address this limitation, we introduce Model-to-Data (M2D) distillation, a new framework that increases transparency by transferring model complexity into the data space. M2D distills the teacher model into an augmented graph with enriched features and structure, enabling a simple student to match the teacher's performance. By materializing model behavior in the data, our approach allows humans to inspect architectural advantages directly. We show that M2D reveals underlying mechanisms such as fairness objectives and attention-based aggregation in an interpretable way, enhancing GNN transparency while preserving performance.

</details>


### [618] [A Rod Flow Model for Adam at the Edge of Stability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06821)
*Eric Regis,Sinho Chewi*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 本文扩展了“rod flow”连续模型到Adam、动量SGD、RMSProp等八种优化器，在边缘稳定性区域比传统连续模型更准确地跟踪离散迭代。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
