Results show that the proposed framework achieves an average accuracy of 89.03% and an average macro F1-score of 87.64%, consistently outperforming existing 1D baseline methods in terms of balanced classification performance, with substantially lower variance across five independent runs, indicating improved stability and reproducibility. Overall, these findings demonstrate that 2D spectrogram-based representations, combined with temporal modeling and adversarial domain adaptation, provide a robust and competitive alternative to conventional 1D EEG inputs for cross-dataset sleep staging.

</details>


### [656] [Multi-Objective Multi-Agent Bandits: From Learning Efficiency to Fairness Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06864)
*John Wang,Mengfan Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文研究了多目标多智能体多臂老虎机（MO-MA-MAB）问题，提出了两种算法：Pareto UCB1 Gossip用于高效学习（Pareto后悔），Simulated NSW UCB Gossip用于公平学习（社会福利），并证明了前者达到O(log T)后悔，后者达到O(T^{3/4})后悔，揭示了公平约束带来的学习代价。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究未同时考虑多目标多智能体场景下的效率（Pareto最优）和公平性（社会福利）学习问题，本文旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 提出Pareto UCB1 Gossip算法（显式分离统计不确定性与共识误差）和Simulated NSW UCB Gossip算法（偏好模拟+gossip效用估计+UCB探索）。

Result: Pareto UCB1 Gossip达到O(log T)后悔（实例相关）和O(√T)（实例无关），Simulated NSW UCB Gossip达到O(T^{3/4})后悔；实验效率提升约100%，公平性提升约50%。

Conclusion: 公平约束会限制信息聚合并减缓收敛速度，这是效率与公平之间的固有权衡。

Abstract: We study multi-objective multi-agent multi-armed bandits (MO-MA-MAB) under stochastic rewards, where agents observe heterogeneous reward vectors and communicate over time-varying graphs. We formulate this emerging problem setting to address \emph{efficient learning}, measured by Pareto regret, and incorporate \emph{fair learning} as an additional goal, captured via social welfare. To measure efficiency, we formulate Pareto regret and develop \textsc{Pareto UCB1 Gossip}, whose novel exploration radius explicitly separates statistical uncertainty in Pareto-based inference from consensus error. To express the fairness constraint, we formulate a Nash Social Welfare objective over preference-scalarized rewards and propose \textsc{Simulated NSW UCB Gossip}, which integrates preference-based reward simulation, gossip-based utility estimation, and UCB-style exploration. We prove that \textsc{Pareto UCB1 Gossip} achieves \(\mathcal{O}(\log T)\) regret and an instance-independent rate of \(\mathcal{O}(\sqrt{T})\), while \textsc{Simulated NSW UCB Gossip} achieves an instance-independent regret bound of \(\mathcal{O}(T^{3/4})\). This separation reveals the cost of imposing the fairness constraint to our efficiency objective: fairness limits information aggregation and slows convergence. Experiments show that our methods consistently outperform baselines, improving performance by approximately \(100\%\) and \(50\%\) in the efficiency and fairness settings, respectively.

</details>


### [657] [Conservative Flows: A New Paradigm of Generative Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06905)
*Eshed Gal,Md Shahriar Rahim Siddiqui,Moshe Eliasof,Eldad Haber*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种替代传统噪声先验生成范式的方法，通过保持数据分布不变的高散随机动力学进行生成，从数据支持的状态而非噪声初始化，并开发了两种概率保持采样机制（校正Langevin动力学和预测-校正流），在多个数据集上优于原始生成方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统生成模型依赖于从噪声先验到数据的传输，本文试图探索一种替代范式，通过保持数据分布不变的高散随机动力学直接生成，避免噪声初始化的局限性。

Method: 提出两种概率保持采样机制：1）带Metropolis调整的校正Langevin动力学；2）预测-校正流，可直接利用任何预训练流模型的检查点，从数据支持的状态出发进行生成。

Result: 在合成Swiss-roll、ImageNet-256和Oxford Flowers-102数据集上，所提采样器一致优于原始生成流程。

Conclusion: 验证了从数据支持状态出发的高散随机动力学生成范式的有效性，可作为传统噪声先验方法的替代方案。

Abstract: Modern generative modeling is dominated by transport from a noise prior to data. We propose an alternative paradigm in which generation is performed by a discrete stochastic dynamics that leaves the data distribution invariant, initialized from data-supported states rather than from noise. The framework can utilize any pretrained flow model. We develop two probability-preserving sampling mechanisms, a corrected Langevin dynamics with a Metropolis adjustment and a predictor-corrector flow, that operate directly on existing checkpoints. We validate the framework on a synthetic Swiss-roll target, ImageNet-256 and Oxford Flowers-102, where our samplers consistently improve over the original generation procedures.

</details>


### [658] [Learning Material-Aware Hamiltonian Risk Fields for Safe Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07038)
*Aditya Sai Ellendula,Yi Wang,Chandrajit Bajaj*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于上下文能量的风险感知导航策略，通过学习一个具有可证伪选择性特征的力通道，使导航系统仅在存在低风险可行机动时激活规避行为，在无安全替代方案时抑制横向动作。通过CVaR尾部风险目标优化，在多个场景（延迟逃逸、越野地形、静态地图、高速公路交通）中验证了该方法相比基线显著提升了安全性和成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有风险感知导航方法常常在不必要时过早激活规避行为，或在不安全的场景中产生虚假机动，缺乏选择性——即策略应仅在存在更低风险的可行路径时暴露规避自由度，否则应抑制。本文旨在设计一种具有明确选择性特征的导航策略。

Method: 在port-Hamiltonian导航策略中增加一个上下文能量项，产生一个具有可证伪选择性特征的力通道。当局部风险场中存在可行低风险方向时，上下文力被激活朝向该方向；当逃逸路径被阻塞或不可用时，路径感知门控机制抑制横向力。使用CVaR尾部风险目标来聚焦梯度更新中的罕见但后果严重的风险转换。

Result: 在延迟逃逸基准测试中，成功率从0.480提升至0.810，过早力激活从0.950降至0.180；在RELLIS-3D越野地形中，正确激活率0.837，虚假激活率0.114；在DFC2018静态语义地图中，灾难性失败从0.60降至0.10，振荡减少90.7%；在高速公路交通中，碰撞率从100%降至0%（当存在逃逸路径时），无助场景下横向动作被抑制。

Conclusion: 选择性特征源于上下文能量的梯度结构而非训练调参，证明了该方法的可证伪性和泛化能力。

Abstract: Risk-aware navigation should be selective: a policy should expose evasive degrees of freedom only when the local scene admits a lower-risk feasible maneuver, and suppress them when no safer alternative exists. We show that adding one context-energy term to a port-Hamiltonian navigation policy produces a learned force channel with exactly this falsifiable signature. When the local risk field contains a feasible lower-risk direction, the induced context force activates toward it; when the apparent escape is blocked or not yet available, a route-aware gate suppresses lateral force rather than hallucinating an unsafe maneuver. A CVaR tail-risk objective focuses gradient updates on rare but consequential risk transitions. We validate the selectivity signature across four settings. In the primary delayed-required-escape benchmark, route-aware CVaR reduces premature force activation from 0.950 to 0.180 versus DWA while raising success from 0.480 to 0.810 with zero replans. On real off-road terrain (RELLIS-3D), route-aware enrichment achieves correct activation rate 0.837 and false activation rate 0.114, compared to 0.378/0.752 for scalar risk gradients. On static semantic maps (DFC2018), enrichment reduces catastrophic failure from 0.60 to 0.10 and oscillation by 90.7% while preserving path efficiency. In highway traffic, collisions drop from 100% to 0% when a lane escape is feasible; when no escape exists, the policy suppresses the lateral maneuver. The selectivity property follows from the gradient structure of the context energy rather than from training-time tuning.

</details>


### [659] [Unlocking High-Fidelity Molecular Generation from Mass Spectra via Dual-Stream Line Graph Diffusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07048)
*Xujun Che,Xiuxia Du,Depeng Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出DualLGD，一种双流线图扩散模型，将分子图去噪分解为原子和键两个子问题的交替求解，通过关联约束的双向交叉注意力同步两个流，在分子生成任务上取得约3倍于之前最先进方法的性能提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图扩散方法将原子和键放在单一计算流中处理，原子-键信息同步只能跨层隐式进行。作者认为这种单流范式是架构瓶颈，而非特定聚合核的选择。

Method: 提出DualLGD双流线图扩散架构：(1) 原子级推理和键级推理分别在各自独立的表示空间中运行；(2) 利用线图作为键空间的数学构造；(3) 关联约束的双向交叉注意力在每个层级同步两个流，确保每个原子只关注其入射键，反之亦然。

Result: 在NPLIB1和MassSpecGym基准上分别达到34.37%和23.89%的top-1准确率，约为之前最优方法的3倍。消融实验表明架构是主要改进来源：无预训练的DualLGD已超越之前最佳的全预训练模型。

Conclusion: 双流架构设计是分子生成任务的关键瓶颈突破，分离原子和键推理并显式同步优于传统单流范式。

Abstract: De novo molecular generation from tandem mass spectra is a challenging inverse problem whose core difficulty lies in the circular dependency between atom-level and bond-level reasoning: determining a bond's type requires knowing its endpoint atoms' chemical environment, yet an atom's environment is in turn defined by its incident bonds. Existing graph diffusion methods process atoms and bonds within a single computation stream, where atom-bond information synchronization can only occur implicitly across layers. We argue that this single-stream paradigm, rather than the choice of any particular aggregation kernel, is a key architectural bottleneck. We propose DualLGD (Dual-stream Line Graph Diffusion), which reformulates molecular graph denoising as the alternating solution of two coupled subproblems: atom-level reasoning and bond-level reasoning, each operating in its own dedicated representation space. The line graph provides a natural mathematical construction for the bond space, in which bond angles, dihedrals, conjugation chains, and rings correspond to local topological motifs between bonds. Incidence-constrained bidirectional cross-attention synchronizes the two streams at every layer, ensuring that each atom attends only to its incident bonds and vice versa, respecting the fundamental chemical principle that an atom's environment is determined by its bonding context. On the NPLIB1 and MassSpecGym benchmarks, DualLGD achieves top-1 accuracy of 34.37\% and 23.89\%, approximately $3\times$ the previous state of the art. Ablation studies confirm the architecture as the primary source of improvement: DualLGD without any pre-training already surpasses the previous best fully pretrained model.

</details>


### [660] [Actor-Critic with Active Importance Sampling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07094)
*Majid Molaei,Gabor Paczolay,Matteo Papini,Alberto Maria Metelli,Marcello Restelli*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出AISAC算法，通过主动重要性采样优化行为策略以降低策略梯度估计方差，在连续动作空间中采用高斯行为策略，实验表明相比标准Actor-Critic方法在倒立摆和Half Cheetah任务上提升了学习速度、样本效率和训练稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准Actor-Critic方法在策略梯度估计中存在高方差问题，影响学习和收敛效率。本文旨在通过优化行为策略的数据收集分布来降低梯度方差，同时保持无偏估计。

Method: AISAC算法基于重要性采样原理，主动优化行为策略以最小化梯度方差。对于连续动作空间，采用高斯行为策略，并通过交叉熵最小化进行优化。理论分析证明了方差降低和无偏性。

Result: 在Inverted Pendulum和Half Cheetah任务上，AISAC相比标准Actor-Critic方法表现出更快的收敛速度、更高的样本效率和更稳定的训练过程，并且优化行为策略同时改善了目标策略更新和评论家估计精度。

Conclusion: AISAC通过优化行为策略有效降低了策略梯度方差，加速了收敛并稳定了强化学习训练，具有实际应用潜力。未来工作将集成到Soft Actor-Critic和TD3等高级算法中。

Abstract: This paper introduces the Active-Importance-Sampling Actor-Critic (AISAC) algorithm, an extension of the Actor-Critic framework for reducing variance in policy gradient estimation. AISAC optimizes the behavior policy to minimize gradient variance while preserving unbiased gradient estimates. Using importance sampling principles, the algorithm adapts the behavior policy toward efficient data collection distributions aligned with target policy gradients.
  For continuous action spaces, AISAC employs Gaussian behavior policies optimized through cross-entropy minimization. We provide theoretical analysis demonstrating variance reduction and unbiasedness. Experiments on Inverted Pendulum and Half Cheetah tasks show improved learning speed, sample efficiency, and training stability compared to standard Actor-Critic methods.
  Results indicate that optimizing the behavior policy improves both target policy updates and critic estimation accuracy across different hyperparameter settings. AISAC accelerates convergence and stabilizes reinforcement learning training, making it promising for real-world applications. Future work includes integration with advanced algorithms such as Soft Actor-Critic and TD3 for more complex environments.

</details>


### [661] [Conformal-Style Quantile Analyses for Stochastic Bandits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07115)
*Chengyu Du,Mengfan Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出ACP-UCB1算法，将置信学习（conformal prediction）与多臂赌博机结合，优化上尾分位数（而非均值）的累积遗憾，实现对数级遗憾上界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典随机赌博机算法以均值为优化目标，但许多实际应用（如风险偏好场景）更关注上尾性能（高分位点）。均值与上尾分位数对臂的排序可能不同，现有方法缺乏针对上尾目标的遗憾理论分析。

Method: 提出ACP-UCB1策略：自适应置信上尾端点估计（基于recompute的conformity scores）+ UCB型乐观奖励。技术难点包括：适应水平下重计算分位数的扰动论证、奖励分位数集中性、以及自适应水平的确定性定位。

Result: ACP-UCB1实现对数级上尾分位数遗憾，每臂贡献为O(log n / Δ^{ACP}_j)。提供与UCB1的遗憾分解对比，数值实验验证有效性。

Conclusion: 首次在理论上将置信预测与赌博机上尾优化结合，为非常规优化目标（如高分位点）的在线学习提供可行框架。

Abstract: Stochastic bandit algorithms are usually analyzed under a mean-reward criterion, yet many problems favor arms with strong upper-tail performance, which we study herein. For a fixed miscoverage level \(α\), the natural upper-tail target of arm \(j\) is the upper endpoint \(F_j^{-1}(1-α/2)\) of a central prediction interval. This target can rank arms differently from their means, creating a central mismatch with the classical bandit objective. To this end, we propose ACP-UCB1, a conformal-style policy that combines an adaptive conformal estimate of the upper endpoint with a UCB-type optimism bonus. The technical challenge is that the conformity scores used by ACP-UCB1 are recomputed from evolving empirical quantile estimates and evaluated at an adaptive level. We control this endpoint through reward-quantile concentration, a perturbation argument for recomputed score quantiles, and deterministic localization of the adaptive level. ACP-UCB1 achieves logarithmic upper-quantile regret with per-arm contribution \(O(\nicefrac{\log n}{Δ_j^{\mathrm{ACP}}})\). We also provide metric-specific regret decompositions comparing ACP-UCB1 with UCB1 and use numerical experiments to validate performance and improvement.

</details>


### [662] [Simple KNN-Based Outlier Detection Achieves Robust Clustering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07130)
*Tianle Jiang,Yufa Zhou*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文研究鲁棒k-Means聚类（含异常值）问题，证明在最优聚类规模的合理假设下，简单去除K近邻距离大的点即可实现与现有复杂方法相当的近似保证，且实验表明该方法在聚类代价和运行时间上优于或匹敌多种更复杂的算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管鲁棒k-Means与异常值检测密切相关，但经典异常值检测启发式方法在鲁棒k-Means中的有效性在理论和实践上都尚不明确，作者希望桥接异常值检测与聚类技术。

Method: 提出基于K近邻（KNN）距离的简单启发式方法：在最优聚类规模的假设下，去除KNN距离较大的点作为异常值，然后将鲁棒k-Means问题简化为标准k-Means问题。

Result: 理论证明该方法可实现常数因子近似保证，无需引入额外中心或丢弃多余异常值；实验上在真实数据集上优于或匹敌多种更复杂的算法，且运行时间更短。

Conclusion: 简单的KNN启发式方法在鲁棒聚类中出人意料地有效，为异常值检测与聚类的技术桥接提供了新机会。

Abstract: Being robust to the presence of outliers is crucial for applying clustering algorithms in practice. In the $\textit{robust $k$-Means}$ problem (i.e., $k$-Means with outliers), the goal is to remove $z$ outliers and minimize the $k$-Means cost on the remaining points. Despite the close connection between robust $k$-Means and outlier detection, both theoretical and empirical understanding of the effectiveness of $\textit{classic outlier detection heuristics}$ for robust $k$-Means remains limited. In this paper, we prove that under a practical assumption on the optimal cluster sizes, simply removing points with large $K$-Nearest-Neighbor distances achieves performance comparable to prior work in terms of approximation guarantees: it yields a constant-factor reduction from robust $k$-Means to standard $k$-Means, without introducing additional centers or discarding extra outliers, as is commonly required by existing approaches. Empirically, experiments on real-world datasets show that our method outperforms or matches several more sophisticated algorithms in terms of clustering cost and runtime. These results demonstrate that simple KNN-based heuristics can be surprisingly effective for robust clustering, highlighting new opportunities to bridge techniques from outlier detection and clustering.

</details>


### [663] [Regret-Oracle Complexity Tradeoffs in Agnostic Online Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07155)
*Idan Attias,Steve Hanneke,Arvind Ramaswami*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于弱一致性预言机的自适应动态不可知到可归约约简方法，通过VC维动态剪枝非可实现的标签序列，将预言机复杂度从双指数级降低到多项式级O(T^{d_VC+1})，同时保持近乎最优的期望遗憾，并形式化了遗憾-预言机复杂度的权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典不可知在线学习依赖Littlestone的SOA算法，但SOA计算上不可行。现有oracle高效方法虽能实现近最优期望遗憾，但预言机复杂度高达双指数级O(T^{2^{O(d_LD)}})，亟需更高效的方案。

Method: 提出自适应动态不可知到可归约约简方法，利用VC维(d_VC)来限制动态维护的活动路径数量，通过弱一致性预言机（仅判断数据集是否可实现）主动在线剪枝非可实现的标签序列，从而降低查询复杂度。

Result: 将总查询复杂度从双指数级降低到O(T^{d_VC+1})，同时保持近最优期望遗憾；提供了遗憾-预言机复杂度的上界和下界；下界表明查询次数Q=o(√T)时，期望遗憾至少为Ω(T/Q)。

Conclusion: 提出的动态剪枝策略显著提升了oracle高效在线学习的效率，证明了用更弱的弱一致性预言机（而非ERM预言机）也能实现高效学习，并系统刻画了遗憾与查询预算之间的权衡关系。

Abstract: Agnostic online learning is classically solved via a reduction to the realizable setting, utilizing Littlestone's Standard Optimal Algorithm (SOA) as a base learner. However, the SOA is computationally intractable to execute even for a single round. To overcome this barrier, recent work in oracle-efficient online learning replaces the SOA with a realizable base learner that accesses the concept class exclusively through an offline empirical risk minimization (ERM) oracle. While such agnostic learners achieve near-optimal expected regret, they suffer from a doubly-exponential oracle complexity of $O\big(T^{2^{O(d_\mathrm{LD})}}\big)$, where $d_\mathrm{LD}$ is the Littlestone dimension and $T$ is the number of rounds. In this work, we significantly improve this oracle complexity while relying on an even weaker primitive: a weak-consistency oracle, which merely decides whether a given labeled dataset is realizable. At the core of our approach is an adaptive and dynamic agnostic-to-realizable reduction that actively prunes non-realizable label sequences on the fly. By using the VC dimension ($d_\mathrm{VC}$) to bound the number of dynamically maintained active paths, our algorithm reduces the total query complexity down to $O(T^{d_\mathrm{VC}+1})$ while perfectly preserving near-optimal expected regret. Crucially, this dynamic pruning also yields a memory reduction over the standard reduction. Furthermore, we formally quantify the regret--oracle complexity tradeoff, providing upper bounds that smoothly interpolate between restricted query budgets and attainable expected regret. We complement these with lower bounds proving that any learner restricted to $Q = o(\sqrt{T})$ queries must suffer an expected regret of $Ω(T/Q)$.

</details>


### [664] [Cost-Ordered Feasibility for Multi-Armed Bandits with Cost Subsidy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07171)
*Ishank Juneja,Carlee Joe-Wong,Osman Yağan*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文研究了带成本补贴的多臂老虎机（MAB-CS）问题，目标是在满足最低奖励约束的前提下最小化累积成本。作者提出了实例相关的下界，并设计了COF算法，该算法通过智能地组合所有臂的样本来评估廉价臂的可行性。理论分析和实验表明，COF在累积成本和质量遗憾方面优于现有基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典MAB问题追求最大化累积奖励，但许多实际应用需要在保证最低奖励质量的前提下最小化成本。现有研究未能充分刻画这种带约束的优化问题，尤其是在约束条件与未知最优奖励相关时，缺乏有效的理论下界和实用算法。

Method: 作者首先推导了MAB-CS问题的实例依赖下界，为问题提供了新的理论洞见。随后提出COF（Cost-Ordered Feasibility）算法，智能地利用所有臂的样本来判断廉价臂是否满足质量约束。算法通过排序成本并系统性地检验可行性来实现成本与质量之间的权衡。

Result: 理论层面：COF在累积成本和质量遗憾上均达到了实例依赖的上界，且上界在定性上优于现有基线方法。实验层面：在MovieLens、Goodreads数据集及合成数据上，COF相比基线方法表现出更优的经验性能。

Conclusion: 本文为MAB-CS问题提供了更深刻的理论理解（新的下界），并提出了一个理论上更优、实践中更有效的COF算法，展示了在成本-质量约束下的决策问题的良好解决方案。

Abstract: The classic multi-armed bandit (MAB) problem tackles the challenge of accruing maximum reward while making decisions under uncertainty. However, in applications, often the goal is to minimize cost subject to a constraint on the minimum permissible reward, an objective captured by multi-armed bandits with cost-subsidy (MAB-CS). Of interest to this paper is the setting where the quality (reward) constraint is specified relative to the unknown best reward and the cost of each arm is known. We characterize the expected sub-optimal samples required by any policy by proving instance-dependent lower bounds that offer new insight into the problem and are a strict generalization of prior bounds. Then, we propose an algorithm called Cost-Ordered Feasibility (COF) that leverages our insight and intelligently combine samples from all arms to gauge the feasibility of a cheap arm. Thereafter, we analyze COF to establish instance-dependent upper bounds on its expected cumulative cost and quality regret, i.e., relative to the cheapest feasible arm. Finally, we empirically validate the merits of COF, comparing it to baselines from the literature through extensive simulation experiments on the MovieLens and Goodreads datasets as well as representative synthetic instances. Not only does our paper develop qualitatively better theoretical regret upper bounds, but COF also convincingly demonstrates improved empirical performance.

</details>


### [665] [Learning Multi-Relational Graph Representations for DNA Methylation-Based Biological Age Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07175)
*Qing Qing,Xikun Zhang,Zhongyuan Zhang,Jiarui Liu,Xingtong Yu,Xiaotao Shen,Ziqi Xu,Qixin Zhang,Zhe Wang,Renqiang Luo*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出RelAge-GNN，一个多关系图神经网络框架，用于基于DNA甲基化的年龄预测。该方法构建了三种互补的图（共甲基化、基因组共定位、基因级关联），并通过可学习的门控机制融合不同分支的表征，在年龄预测和疾病队列的年龄加速检测上取得了有竞争力的结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的基于DNA甲基化的年龄预测方法大多将CpG位点视为独立特征，忽略了它们之间复杂且异质的生物学关系。作者希望通过引入图神经网络来建模这些关系，从而提升年龄预测的准确性和生物学可解释性。

Method: RelAge-GNN构建了三种互补的关系图：共甲基化模式图、基因组共定位图和基因级关联图；每个图由独立的GNN分支建模，并通过可学习的门控机制自适应融合多分支表征，最终用于年龄预测。

Result: 在大规模数据集上，RelAge-GNN达到了与现有最先进方法相当的预测精度，且与实足年龄的相关性更强；在多种疾病队列中，模型对年龄加速现象具有更灵敏的检测能力。

Conclusion: 通过显式建模CpG位点之间的多关系结构，RelAge-GNN不仅提升了年龄预测性能，还通过事后可解释性分析揭示了不同关系结构和CpG位点的贡献，为衰老相关研究提供了生物意义深刻的洞见。

Abstract: Aging clocks aim to estimate biological age, a measure of physiological state distinct from chronological age, from observable biomarkers, and are widely used for health assessment and disease analysis. DNA methylation is a particularly informative biomarker due to its stability and strong association with aging, and recent learning-based approaches have improved predictive performance. However, most existing methods treat CpG sites as independent features, overlooking the complex and heterogeneous biological relationships among them. We propose RelAge-GNN, a multi-relational graph neural network framework for DNA methylation-based age prediction. Our method constructs three complementary graphs capturing co-methylation patterns, genomic co-localization, and gene-level associations among CpG sites. Each graph is modeled by an independent GNN branch, and a learnable gating mechanism adaptively fuses the resulting representations. Experiments on large-scale datasets show that RelAge-GNN achieves competitive accuracy and stronger correlation with chronological age compared to state-of-the-art methods. Moreover, the model exhibits improved sensitivity in detecting age acceleration across diverse disease cohorts, highlighting its potential utility for disease characterization. Finally, through post hoc interpretability analyses, we quantify the contributions of different relational structures and CpG sites, providing biologically meaningful insights and suggesting potential directions for aging-related research. Our code is available at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/RelAge-GNN-F1E3/.

</details>


### [666] [Improved Model-based Reinforcement Learning with Smooth Kernels](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07218)
*Kun Long,Yuqiang Li,Xianyi Wu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文针对连续状态-动作空间的在线强化学习，提出了一种基于核平滑的模型驱动方法，通过引入Bernstein式探索奖励，在Lipschitz连续性假设下实现了比现有方法更优的遗憾界，特别是在对时间步长的依赖上有所改进。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典强化学习理论在连续状态-动作空间中主要依赖低秩MDP等强结构假设，缺乏灵活性。核平滑方法利用MDP的平滑性提供另一范式，但现有方法的遗憾界在时间步长依赖上不够理想。本文旨在改进这一依赖关系。

Method: 提出一种基于核平滑的模型驱动在线RL方法，在有限时域Lipschitz连续性假设下，将Bernstein式探索奖励融入核平滑框架，并推导了新的Bernstein型鞅集中不等式来支撑理论分析。

Result: 实现了在时间步长依赖上优于现有最优方法的遗憾界，理论分析证明了Bernstein式奖励与核平滑之间的协同效应。

Conclusion: 所提出的方法在连续状态-动作空间的在线RL中取得了理论上的进步，新的鞅集中不等式可能具有独立的研究价值。

Abstract: For continuous state-action space scenarios, classical reinforcement learning (RL) theory predominantly focuses on low-rank Markov decision processes (MDPs), which provide sample-efficient guarantees at the expense of restrictive structural assumptions. Kernel smoothing model-based approaches offer a promising alternative paradigm that instead leverages the smoothness of the MDP and employs non-parametric kernel smoothing estimates of transition dynamics. This paper proposes a new kernel-smoothing model-based approach for online reinforcement learning in finite-horizon settings under Lipschitz continuity assumptions on the MDP. By incorporating a Bernstein-style exploration bonus into the kernel smoothing framework, our method achieves a regret bound which improves upon the state-of-the-art regret bound in its dependence on the horizon. The theoretical advancement relies on a delicate analysis of the synergy between Bernstein-style bonuses and kernel smoothing, where a new tight Bernstein-type concentration inequality for martingales may be of independent interest.

</details>


### [667] [Sample Complexity of Stochastic Optimization with Integer Variables](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07239)
*Hongyu Cheng,Yinghao Zheng,Marco Molinaro,Amitabh Basu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文研究了整数随机优化的样本复杂度，发现与连续优化相比，整数优化有时需要更多样本，有时需要更少样本，具体取决于目标函数和约束的结构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解整数随机优化相对于连续优化在统计复杂度（所需样本量）上的差异，填补该领域在样本复杂度分析方面的空白。

Method: 通过理论分析，针对不同目标函数（Lipschitz、强凸光滑）和约束结构（ℓ∞球、ℓ2球）建立整数与连续优化样本复杂度的上下界。

Result: 1) ℓ∞球上的Lipschitz混合整数非凸优化与线性优化样本复杂度相同；2) ℓ2球上整数优化可能比连续优化需要更少样本；3) 强凸光滑目标下整数优化需要Ω(1/ε²)样本，而连续仅需O(1/ε)。

Conclusion: 整数优化的样本复杂度与连续优化存在本质差异，不能简单等同，其复杂度高度依赖于问题结构。

Abstract: We establish sample complexity results for stochastic optimization over the integers, especially with a view to understand the complexity with respect to the corresponding continuous optimization problem. We show that integer optimization can sometimes require strictly more samples and sometimes strictly smaller number of samples, depending on the structure of the objective and constraints. 1. For Lipschitz objectives over subsets of the $\ell_\infty$ ball, the statistical complexity of general stochastic mixed-integer, nonlinear, nonconvex optimization is exactly the same as stochastic linear optimization with just bound constraints. 2. For Lipschitz objectives over subsets of the $\ell_2$ ball, we show that integer optimization can require strictly *smaller* sample size compared to the continuous setting in a certain regime. To get to this result, we also establish tight sample complexity results for nonconvex continuous stochastic optimization which, to the best of our knowledge, do not appear in prior work. 3. For strongly convex, smooth objectives, integer optimization has high statistical complexity compared to the continuous setting. In particular, we show that integer optimization requires $Ω(1/ε^2)$ samples to report an $ε$-approximate solution, compared to the well-known $O(1/ε)$ sample complexity from the continuous optimization literature.

</details>


### [668] [FlightSense: An End-to-End MLOps Platform for Real-Time Flight Delay Prediction via Rotation-Chain Propagation Features and Agentic Conversational AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07364)
*Aditi J. Shelke,Renuka J. Shelke,Yash M. Kamerkar*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出FlightSense，一个基于MLOps的航班延误预测平台，通过三阶段特征工程（基础特征→飞机轮转链传播特征→气象特征）将ROC AUC从0.732提升至0.879，并部署为包含实时天气、交互式仪表盘和对话式AI助手的生产系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有航班延误预测方法将上游延误视为静态输入，未能显式建模延误通过飞机轮转链的动态传播机制，且缺乏结合天气感知对话界面的端到端部署系统。

Method: 提出三版本渐进式特征工程框架：V1使用11个基于时刻表的特征训练XGBoost基线；V2引入11个基于尾号追踪的飞机轮转链延误传播特征；V3集成5个NOAA气象特征。系统部署在AWS上，包含Lambda实时天气摄取、SageMaker推理、Streamlit仪表盘和Amazon Bedrock Nova对话助手。

Result: 基于7.07百万条BTS 2018数据的测试集ROC AUC：V1为0.732，V2提升至0.875（轮转传播特征是主要增益来源），V3达到0.879。

Conclusion: 飞机轮转链的延误传播特征显著优于传统静态特征，MLOps架构证明了其在实际生产环境中的可行性，且结合对话式AI接口提升了系统的可交互性。

Abstract: Flight delays impose cascading operational and financial burdens across the aviation network, costing the U.S. economy billions of dollars annually by disrupting interconnected aircraft rotation systems. While prior machine learning approaches have demonstrated strong predictive performance, most treat upstream delays as static input variables rather than explicitly modeling how delays propagate dynamically through aircraft rotation chains, and none have deployed such systems alongside a live weather-aware conversational AI interface for end-user interaction. This paper presents FlightSense, an end-to-end MLOps platform for real-time flight delay prediction built through a progressive three-version feature engineering framework. Version 1 trains an XGBoost classifier on 11 schedule-based features establishing a baseline ROC AUC of 0.732 on 7.07 million BTS 2018 On-Time Performance records. Version 2 introduces 11 delay propagation features derived from aircraft rotation chains via tail-number tracking, yielding the dominant performance gain (AUC 0.732 to 0.875) and surpassing the single-stage XGBoost baseline reported by Zhou (2025). Version 3 integrates five NOAA meteorological features across 10 major U.S. airports, achieving a final test set AUC of 0.879. FlightSense is deployed as a production AWS MLOps pipeline incorporating live weather ingestion via Lambda, real-time SageMaker inference, an interactive Streamlit dashboard, and an Amazon Bedrock Nova Micro conversational assistant answering natural-language delay queries via a tool-use architecture.

</details>


### [669] [Have Graph -- Will Lift? The Case for Higher-Order Benchmarks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07397)
*Bastian Rieck*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文是一篇观点论文，指出几何/拓扑深度学习领域模型多样性丰富但缺乏合适的基准数据集，呼吁社区在提升现有图数据集之外，也积极寻找和收集新数据集来支撑该领域的研究基础。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 几何/拓扑深度学习（如消息传递、层论等）在机器学习中发展迅速，模型架构日益多样，但缺乏足够且合适的基准数据集，导致研究者只能重复提升已有图数据集，限制了领域发展。

Method: 这是一篇观点论文（Opinion Paper），不提出具体技术方法，而是通过分析当前领域现状，指出数据集匮乏的问题，并倡议社区采取措施收集新数据集。

Result: 指出当前现状：模型多样性丰富 vs. 基准数据集稀缺，研究者被迫对已有图数据集进行"提升"（lifting）以包含高阶信息。

Conclusion: 呼吁社区在提升现有数据集之外，更应积极寻找和构建新的数据集，以夯实拓扑深度学习领域的研究基础。

Abstract: After a somewhat rocky start, geometry and topology have established a foothold in machine learning. Message passing, either on graphs or higher-order complexes, is one of the main drivers of geometric deep learning, and paradigms that were once considered to be firmly in the realm of the abstract-like sheaves-have been "tamed" to serve as novel inductive biases for model architectures in topological deep learning. The veritable diversity of models, however, is in stark contrast to the scarcity of suitable benchmark datasets. As a result, researchers often resort to lifting existing graph datasets to include higher-order information. In this opinion paper, I want to encourage the community to also source new datasets, which may be used to prop up the foundations of our research field.

</details>


### [670] [A Flexible Adaptive Stable Clustering Algorithm for Archive-Scale Online Mass Spectrometry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07424)
*Shao Shi,Xin Yang,Huiran Feng,Jianhuai Ye,Tianlong Hu,Yaling Zeng,Tzung-May Fu,Lei Zhu,Huizhong Shen,Chen Wang,Shu Tao*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: FASC是一个将相似性核与优化逻辑解耦的聚类框架，能在保持确定性收敛的同时实现O(N)线性扩展，在2500万质谱数据上成功自动识别大气气溶胶老化路径和稀有工业示踪物。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有聚类方法在可扩展性、度量灵活性和算法稳定性之间存在无法兼得的矛盾，阻碍了从多TB级质谱数据流中提取可操作的化学信息。

Method: 提出Flexible Adaptive Stable Clustering (FASC)，采用密度增强相似性选择规则和几何约束，将相似性核与优化逻辑架构解耦，实现确定性、与顺序无关的收敛。

Result: 在标准ML基准上达到>99.5%聚类纯度和0.99调整兰德指数；在2500万质谱上展示严格线性运行时扩展(O(N))，自动识别了二次无机气溶胶的大气老化路径和丰度<0.2%的超稀有工业示踪物。

Conclusion: FASC为环境大数据挖掘提供了可扩展的基础设施，有效解决了聚类中的可扩展性-灵活性-稳定性三角矛盾。

Abstract: Modern online mass spectrometry generates multi-terabyte data streams critical for understanding Earth's environmental systems. However, extracting actionable chemical insights from these repositories is impeded by a computational bottleneck: existing clustering methods force a compromise among scalability, metric flexibility, and algorithmic stability. Here, we introduce Flexible Adaptive Stable Clustering (FASC), a dynamical systems framework that resolves these constraints by architecturally decoupling the similarity kernel from rigorous optimization logic. Unlike legacy heuristics that suffer from stochastic drift and algorithmic blending, FASC employs a Density-Augmented Similarity Selection rule and geometric constraints to guarantee deterministic, order-independent convergence. After validating FASC on canonical machine-learning ground truths (achieving >99.5% cluster purity and 0.99 Adjusted Rand Index), we deployed the framework on 25 million mass spectra of atmospheric aerosols. Demonstrating strictly linear empirical runtime scaling (O(N)), FASC autonomously mapped atmospheric aging pathways of secondary inorganic aerosols while isolating ultra-rare industrial tracers (<0.2% abundance), providing a scalable infrastructure for mining environmental big data.

</details>


### [671] [Inference-Time Attribute Distribution Alignment for Unconditional Diffusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07456)
*Hao Luan,See-Kiong Ng,Chun Kai Ling*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文针对无条件扩散模型的推理时属性分布对齐问题，提出了一种基于最优控制的插件式方法，在不重新训练或微调预训练模型的前提下，通过添加时变扰动来控制反向扩散过程，以对齐生成样本的群体属性分布（如人口统计学平衡或语义比例）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有扩散模型的可控生成方法大多关注单个样本的属性控制，但在需要生成样本群体遵循特定属性分布（如人口平衡、语义比例）的场景中力不从心。作者正式定义了"推理时属性分布对齐"这一新问题，并试图在不重训模型的前提下解决。

Method: 将推理时属性分布对齐建模为反向扩散过程上的最优控制问题：将反向扩散视为动态系统的 rollout，通过添加加性时变扰动作为控制信号，使用基于最优控制的算法优化可微的分布匹配目标，同时引入控制代价惩罚以保证数据保真度。

Result: 在图像生成实验中，所提出的插件式方法能够在无需重训或微调预训练扩散模型的前提下，比基线方法更好地将属性分布对齐到多样且灵活的测试时目标分布。

Conclusion: 该工作为无监督扩散模型在群体层面上的属性可控生成提供了一种高效且灵活的推理时解决方案，具有良好的即插即用特性。

Abstract: Inference-time controllable generation is essential for real-world applications of unconditional diffusion models. However, most existing techniques focus on individual samples, struggling in applications that require the sample population to follow specific attribute distributions (e.g., demographic balance or semantic proportions). We formalize this setting as the inference-time attribute distributional alignment problem for pretrained unconditional diffusion models. To address this, we cast inference-time attribute distributional alignment as an optimal control problem over the reverse diffusion process, viewing the process as the rollout of a dynamical system and augmenting it with additive, time-dependent perturbations as control. We solve for the perturbations using an optimal-control-based algorithm to optimize a differentiable distribution-matching objective while penalizing control effort to preserve data fidelity. Experiment results in image generation demonstrate that our proposed plug-and-play approach can better align attribute distributions to diverse and flexible test-time targets compared to baselines, without retraining or finetuning the pretrained diffusion model.

</details>


### [672] [Physical Simulators as Do-Operators: Causal Discovery under Latent Confounders for AI-for-Science](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07467)
*Tsuyoshi Okita*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出CFM-SD方法，利用第一性原理物理模拟器作为干预算子，在存在潜在混淆变量和真实干预数据的情况下进行因果发现，理论上仅需O(d)次单变量干预即可识别d变量因果结构，在合成数据和真实科学数据上均显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有因果发现方法（IGSP、DCDI、ENCO）假设因果充分性（无潜在混淆变量）且依赖合成模拟器中的虚拟干预，但在AI-for-Science场景（如分子设计、材料科学）中潜在混淆变量普遍存在，且真实干预（如基于物理的模拟）每个数据点需要数小时到数天，亟需能处理这些实际约束的方法。

Method: CFM-SD（因果流匹配与模拟数据）方法，将第一性原理物理模拟器作为Pearl干预演算中的do算子，利用流匹配技术同时处理潜在混淆变量和真实干预数据，实现因果结构学习。

Result: 合成数据上（γ=0.2-0.8），CFM-SD平均F1=0.800，远超基线方法（F1=0.127-0.562）；真实科学数据上，分子毒性预测和电池电解质优化分别实现57-58%的偏差降低。

Conclusion: CFM-SD在存在潜在混淆变量的真实科学场景中展现了显著的实用价值，超越了仅适用于合成基准的现有因果发现方法。

Abstract: Existing interventional causal discovery methods -- IGSP, DCDI, ENCO -- assume causal sufficiency (no latent confounders) and rely on virtual interventions in synthetic simulators. In AI-for-Science settings such as molecular design and materials science, latent confounders are ubiquitous and real interventions (e.g., physics-based simulations) require hours to days per data point. We propose CFM-SD (Causal Flow Matching with Simulation Data), which uses first-principles physical simulators as do-operators in Pearl's interventional calculus to simultaneously handle latent confounders and real interventional data. Theoretically, $d$-variable causal structure is identifiable with $O(d)$ single-variable interventions -- the minimum under physical realizability constraints. In Intrinsic Evaluation on synthetic data ($γ=0.2$--$0.8$), CFM-SD achieves average F1$=0.800$ vs. F1$=0.127$--$0.562$ for all baselines. In Extrinsic Evaluation on real scientific data, CFM-SD achieves 57--58\% bias reduction in molecular toxicity prediction and battery electrolyte optimization, demonstrating practical value beyond synthetic benchmarks.

</details>


### [673] [NPMixer: Hierarchical Neighboring Patch Mixing for Time Series Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07476)
*Jung Min Choi,Vijaya Krishna Yalavarthi,Lars Schmidt-Thieme*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出NPMixer，一种基于可学习平稳小波变换和邻域混合模块的分层架构，用于多变量时间序列预测，在7个基准数据集上的28个实验设置中，71.4%的场景取得了最优MSE。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决多变量时间序列预测中局部时间动态与全局跨变量依赖关系的建模难题。

Method: 提出层次化架构NPMixer：1) 可学习平稳小波变换，自适应学习滤波器系数，将信号分解为趋势和细节分量；2) 邻域混合模块通过层次化MLP在非重叠patch上捕获局部时间动态；3) 通道混合编码器处理高频分量以学习通道相关性，同时保持全局趋势的稳定性。

Result: 在7个基准数据集上，28个实验设置中71.4%达到最佳MSE性能，一致优于SOTA模型。

Conclusion: NPMixer通过可学习的多尺度分解与层次化混合架构，有效兼顾了局部时间模式与全局跨变量依赖，显著提升了时间序列预测精度。

Abstract: Multivariate time series forecasting remains a challenge due to the complexity of local temporal dynamics and global dependencies across multiple variables.
  In this paper, we propose \textbf{N}eighboring \textbf{P}atching \textbf{Mixer} (\textbf{NPMixer}), a hierarchical architecture featuring a Learnable Stationary Wavelet Transform that adaptively learns filter coefficients to decompose signals into trend and detail components in a data-dependent manner.
  Our framework introduces a Neighboring Mixer Block that captures local temporal dynamics through a series of hierarchical MLP layers operating on non-overlapping patches.
  Specifically, the mixer block utilizes MLPs to learn temporal patterns within and across these patches, expanding the receptive field to capture multi-scale dependencies.
  A Channel-Mixing Encoder is applied to high-frequency components to learn channel correlations while preserving the stability of the underlying global trend.
  Extensive experiments on seven benchmark datasets demonstrate that NPMixer consistently outperforms state-of-the-art models, achieving better performance in 20 out of 28 ($71.4\%$) evaluated experimental setups for MSE.

</details>


### [674] [Toward Better Geometric Representations for Molecule Generative Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07693)
*Shaoheng Yan,Zian Li,Cai Zhou,Qiaojing Huang,Kai Liu,Muhan Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出LENSEs框架，通过在分子表征条件生成中引入表征头、感知损失和节点级表征对齐损失，解决了预训练分子编码器表征不平滑、生成过程中利用不充分的问题，在分子生成任务上取得SOTA结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有分子表征条件生成方法受限于预训练编码器（如UniMol）产生的表征不平滑且生成过程中未被充分利用，导致生成质量和效率受限。作者希望更好地挖掘分子表征在生成方法中的潜力。

Method: 提出LENSEs框架，包含三个互补机制：(1) 表征头（Representation Head），在生成任务中同时训练以提取多级表征；(2) 分子感知损失（Molecule Perceptual Loss），在语义信息丰富的表征空间中优化生成器；(3) 节点级表征对齐损失（REPA），显式对齐生成器隐状态与编码器表征，缩小预训练与生成之间的语义差距。

Result: 在GEOM-DRUG数据集上，LENSEs达到97.28%有效性和98.51%分子稳定性，超越现有先进方法；通过Lipschitz常数降低（4.6倍）和QM9探测任务，证明了得到的表征更平滑且信息更丰富。

Conclusion: LENSEs有效提升了分子表征条件生成的质量，并通过实验表明，结合对齐目标进行生成训练可作为分子编码器的一种潜在预训练范式。

Abstract: Geometric representation-conditioned molecule generation provides an effective paradigm that decouples molecule representation modeling from structure generation. By decoupling molecule generation into two stages-first generating a meaningful molecule representation, and then generating a 3D molecule conditioned on this representation-the efficiency and quality of the generation process can be significantly enhanced. However, its effectiveness is fundamentally limited by the quality of the representation space: pretrained molecular encoders, such as UniMol, produce representations that are non-smooth and not fully exploited during the generative training process. In this work, we propose LENSEs, a framework that better exploits the potential of molecule representations in representation-conditioned generation methods. In particular, LENSEs introduces three complementary mechanisms: (1) a representation head, simultaneously trained during generative tasks, that extracts multi-level representations from the pretrained encoder; (2) a molecule perceptual loss that optimizes the generator in a semantic-informative representation space; and (3) a node-level representation alignment (REPA) loss that explicitly aligns the generator's hidden states with encoder representations, reducing the semantic gap between pretraining and generation. We demonstrate the effectiveness of these improvements through extensive molecule generation tasks. Specifically, on the challenging molecule generation dataset GEOM-DRUG, LENSEs achieves 97.28% validity and 98.51% molecule stability, surpassing existing advanced methods. Further analyses through Lipschitz constant reduction (4.6x) and QM9 probing tasks also demonstrate the smoother, more informative refined representations, establishing generative training with alignment objectives as a potential pretraining paradigm for molecular encoders.

</details>


### [675] [Intelligent Truck Matching in Full Truckload Shipments using Ping2Hex approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07733)
*Srinivas Kumar R,Jose Mathew,Ankit Singh Chauhan,Dinesh Rajkumar,Aravind Manoj,Mohit Goel*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出ITM 2.0，一种利用GPS数据和机器学习（LightGBM）进行卡车与货物匹配的系统，通过六边形空间索引和概率排序，在物流场景中显著提升了匹配精度和覆盖率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决由于车辆标识符缺失或损坏导致的传统卡车-货物匹配失效问题，从而提升整车运输的供应链可见性和ETA预测准确性。

Method: 将匹配问题建模为概率排序问题，使用Uber H3六边形空间索引对GPS轨迹进行离散化提取路径相似度特征，结合时间信息，采用LightGBM梯度提升模型，并辅以阈值后处理。

Result: 相比规则基线，北美精度提升26个百分点，欧洲提升14个百分点，覆盖率翻倍。对地理编码误差（1km内）、多候选卡车和稀疏GPS点具有鲁棒性。

Conclusion: ITM 2.0在生产环境中有效解决了缺失标识符场景下的卡车-货物匹配问题，显著提升了供应链可见性。

Abstract: Accurate truck-to-shipment matching using GPS data is foundational for full truckload supply chain visibility, enabling real-time tracking and accurate estimated time of arrival (ETA) predictions. However, missing or corrupted vehicle identifiers prevent traditional matching approaches, leaving shipments without visibility. This paper presents Intelligent Truck Matching (ITM) 2.0, a machine learning system that addresses this critical gap by formulating matching as a probabilistic ranking problem. Our approach leverages Uber H3 hexagonal spatial indexing to discretize GPS pings into route similarity features, combined with temporal information, then applies LightGBM gradient boosting with threshold-based post-processing. Through rigorous evaluation including offline model selection (SVM, XGBoost, LightGBM), comprehensive ablation studies, and production shadow testing, we demonstrate substantial gains over rule-based baselines. ITM 2.0 achieves 26 percentage point precision improvement in North America and 14 points in Europe, while doubling coverage. Deployed in production at Project44 handling full truckload shipments, the system demonstrates robustness to geocoding errors up to 1 km, multiple candidate trucks, and sparse pings.

</details>


### [676] [Neural Operators as Efficient Function Interpolators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07792)
*Vasilis Niarchos,Angelos Sirbu,Sokratis Trifinopoulos*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出将神经算子（NOs）重新用于有限维函数插值，通过引入辅助基空间，使有限维函数可视为作用于基空间函数的算子。实验表明，NOs在精度匹配或超越MLP和KAN的同时，参数更少、训练更快。在核质量模型修正任务中，TFNO集成达到198.2 keV的误差，位列最佳神经网络方法之一。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 神经算子（NOs）原本设计用于无限维函数空间之间的映射，本文试图探索将其重新应用于有限维函数插值问题，并证明其相比传统MLP和KAN的优势。

Method: 引入辅助基空间，将任意有限维函数视为通过复合作用于基空间函数的算子；使用Tensorized Fourier Neural Operator (TFNO) 进行实现和评估。

Result: 在解析函数基准上，NOs以更少参数和训练时间达到或超越MLP和KAN的精度；在核质量模型修正任务中，TFNO集成达到198.2 keV的RMSE。

Conclusion: NOs可作为有限维函数插值的可扩展框架，从解析基准到结构化科学数据均表现优异。

Abstract: Neural operators (NOs) are designed to learn maps between infinite-dimensional function spaces. We propose a novel reframing of their use. By introducing an auxiliary base-space, any finite-dimensional function can be viewed as an operator acting by composition on functions of the base-space. Through a range of benchmarks on analytic functions of increasing complexity and dimensionality, we demonstrate that NOs can match or outperform standard multilayer perceptrons and Kolmogorov--Arnold Networks in accuracy while requiring significantly fewer parameters and training time. As a real-world application, we apply a two-dimensional Tensorized Fourier Neural Operator (TFNO) to the nuclear chart, learning a correction to state-of-the-art nuclear mass models as a partially observed residual field. A TFNO ensemble reaches a held-out root-mean-square error of 198.2 keV, placing it among the best recent neural-network approaches while retaining high parameter efficiency and short training times. More broadly, these results introduce NOs as a scalable framework for finite-dimensional function interpolation, from analytic benchmarks to structured scientific data.

</details>


### [677] [Actor-Critic Algorithm for Dynamic Expectile and CVaR](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07857)
*Yudong Luo,Erick Delage*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种无需转移扰动的软max策略梯度方法，结合模型无关的动态风险价值学习，构建了离策略演员-评论家算法，在风险规避任务中优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有优化动态风险的随机策略方法存在两方面挑战：策略更新通常需要转移扰动（transition perturbation），而价值学习依赖基于模型的方法。作者旨在解决这些问题，提出更高效的无模型方法。

Method: 1) 在软max策略参数化下推导出无需转移扰动的代理策略梯度；2) 利用可 elicitability 性质，开发针对动态分位数（expectile）和条件风险价值（CVaR）的无模型价值学习方法；3) 受 Expected SARSA 和 Expected Policy Gradient 启发，构建无模型离策略演员-评论家算法。

Result: 在具有可验证风险规避行为的领域中，所提算法能够学习到风险规避策略，并在多个指标上持续优于现有方法。

Conclusion: 本文成功解决了动态风险优化中策略更新和价值学习的难题，证明了无需转移扰动和模型假设即可实现高效的风险敏感强化学习。

Abstract: Optimizing dynamic risk with stochastic policies is challenging in both policy updates and value learning. The former typically requires transition perturbation, while the latter may rely on model-based approaches. To address these challenges, we propose a surrogate policy gradient without transition perturbation under softmax policy parameterization. We further develop model-free value learning methods for dynamic expectile and conditional value-at-risk by leveraging elicitability. Finally, inspired by Expected SARSA and Expected Policy Gradient, a model-free off-policy actor-critic algorithm is constructed. Empirical results in domains with verifiable risk-averse behavior show that our algorithm can learn risk-averse policy and consistently outperforms other existing methods.

</details>


### [678] [Graph-Structured Hyperdimensional Computing for Data-Efficient and Explainable Process-Structure-Property Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07999)
*Jingzhan Ge,Ajeeth Vellore,Ajinkya Palwe,Ahsan Khan,David Gorsich,Matthew P. Castanier,SeungYeon Kang,Farhad Imani*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出PSP-HDC，一种基于图结构超维度计算框架，用于处理稀疏、异质且交互主导的多光子光还原3D微结构制造中的过程-结构-性能预测问题，通过将有向PSP图编码为内部先验，实现高精度预测与内在可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多光子光还原制造中，可用数据稀疏、异质且交互主导，传统特征向量模型在统计上欠定（易产生虚假相关、域迁移差、解释不稳定），而机理管道依赖难以获取的校准子模型，亟需一种能处理这种复杂数据结构的预测框架。

Method: PSP-HDC采用图结构超维度计算：1) 可训练标量到超向量编码器学习参数特定嵌入；2) 通过图对齐的绑定与捆绑操作沿有向PSP依赖组合样本表示；3) 通过关联记忆检索与类别原型进行预测；4) 利用同一原型记忆同时支持决策与属性归因，提供参数级、组级和组内级内在解释。

Result: 在3D平台的薄层电阻区域预测上，PSP-HDC在1000次随机划分中达到0.910±0.077的准确率，在过程折刀泛化设置下达到0.896，优于强基线方法。

Conclusion: 图结构超维度计算能有效处理稀疏、异质、交互主导的制造数据，兼具高预测性能和内在可解释性，为早期过程开发提供了可行的PSP预测方案。

Abstract: Multiphoton photoreduction enables high-fidelity fabrication of complex 3D microstructures, yet reliable process-structure-property (PSP) prediction remains difficult because the available data are sparse, heterogeneous, and interaction-dominated. In this regime, conventional feature-vector models are statistically underdetermined, making them prone to spurious correlations, poor regime transfer, and unstable post hoc explanations, whereas mechanistic pipelines depend on calibrated submodels that are rarely available during early process development. We present PSP-HDC, a graph-structured hyperdimensional computing framework that encodes a directed PSP graph as an internal prior for representation, inference, and explanation. A trainable scalar-to-hypervector encoder learns parameter-specific embeddings on a fixed hyperdimensional basis to accommodate heterogeneous scales and noise. Sample representations are then composed through graph-aligned binding and bundling along directed PSP dependencies, and prediction is performed by associative-memory retrieval against class prototypes. Because the same prototype memories support both decision making and attribution, PSP-HDC provides intrinsic explanations at the parameter, group, and within-group levels, while memory alignment and separation quantify prototype formation during training. On sheet-resistance regime prediction for the 3D platform, PSP-HDC achieves an accuracy of 0.910 +/- 0.077 over 1000 random splits and 0.896 under process-fold generalization, outperforming strong baselines.

</details>


### [679] [Adaptive Domain Decomposition Physics-Informed Neural Networks for Traffic State Estimation with Sparse Sensor Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08028)
*Eunhan Ka,Ludovic Leclercq,Satish V. Ukkusuri*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出ADD-PINN，一种两阶段残差引导的物理信息神经网络框架，用于基于LWR模型的稀疏固定传感器交通速度场重建。通过全局PINN训练→残差引导子域分解→子网络初始化的流程，在I-24 MOTION数据集上（1500次实验）达到最低误差，训练速度比XPINN快2.4倍，并在NGSIM实验中通过激波指示器自动退化为单域模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统PINN在交通状态估计中会过度平滑LWR模型产生的激波，导致速度场重建不准确，需要一种能保留激波结构且计算高效的PINN框架。

Method: 两阶段框架：1)训练粗粒度全局PINN；2)根据残差分布自动放置子域边界并初始化子网络，同时使用数据驱动的激波指示器决定是否启用分解（弱激波时退化为单域）。

Result: 在25个配置中18个获得最低相对L2误差，15个稀疏传感配置中14个最优；训练速度比XPINN快2.4倍；NGSIM中激波指示器在50次运行中全部抑制分解，单域退化为最优。

Conclusion: 残差引导的空间分解是稀疏固定传感器场景下PINN类模型离线重建的有效设计原则，激波指示器能自动判断是否需要分解。

Abstract: Traffic state estimation from sparse fixed sensors is challenging because physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) tend to over-smooth the shockwaves admitted by the Lighthill-Whitham-Richards (LWR) model. This study proposes Adaptive Domain Decomposition Physics-Informed Neural Networks (ADD-PINN), a two-stage residual-guided framework for LWR-based offline speed-field reconstruction. A coarse global PINN is first trained; its spatial residual profile is then used to place subdomain boundaries and initialize child subnetworks in a decomposition-enabled mode, while a data-driven shock indicator can retain a single-domain fallback when localized evidence of transition is weak. The primary offline I-24 MOTION evaluation spans five days, five sensor configurations, and ten seeds per configuration, yielding 1,500 runs in total. Against neural and physics-informed baselines, ADD-PINN attains the lowest relative L2 error in 18 of 25 configurations and in 14 of 15 sparse-sensing cases, while training 2.4 times faster than the extended PINN (XPINN) baseline. An ablation study supports spatial-only decomposition as an effective default for fixed-sensor traffic reconstruction in the evaluated settings. Supplementary Next Generation Simulation (NGSIM) experiments serve as a negative control: the shock indicator suppresses decomposition in all 50 runs, and the default single-domain fallback ranks first across all sensor configurations. These results support residual-guided spatial decomposition as an effective PINN-family design for offline reconstruction when sparse fixed sensing coincides with localized transition regions.

</details>


### [680] [Don't Get Your Kroneckers in a Twist: Gaussian Processes on High-Dimensional Incomplete Grids](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08036)
*Mads Greisen Højlund,August Smart Lykke-Møller,Henry Moss,Ove Christiansen*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: CUTS-GPR 是一种通过组合加性核与不完整网格实现快速核矩阵-向量积的新方法，能够在高维数据上以近线性或线性时间完成精确高斯过程回归，在数十亿数据点和数千维度的基准测试中表现出色。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高斯过程回归在高维和大规模数据场景下面临计算瓶颈（传统方法O(N³)），尤其在计算化学中高维势能面的贝叶斯建模长期缺乏高效解决方案，亟需可扩展的精确GPR方法。

Method: 通过组合加性核（additive kernel）与不完整网格（incomplete grid）结构，利用由此产生的核矩阵特殊结构实现极快的矩阵-向量积，达到近线性甚至线性缩放。

Result: 在数十亿数据点和数千维度的基准测试中验证了可扩展性；在N=447,265和D=24的完整GPR计算（含超参优化）仅需数小时；成功应用于高维势能面的贝叶斯建模。

Conclusion: CUTS-GPR实现了高维精确GPR的高效计算，为计算化学中的高维势能面建模提供了可行方案，突破了大尺度GPR的关键瓶颈。

Abstract: We introduce CUTS-GPR, a new method for performing numerically exact Gaussian process regression (GPR) in high-dimensional settings. The key component of CUTS-GPR is an extremely fast kernel matrix-vector product, which exhibits near-linear or even linear scaling with the amount of training data, $N$, and low-order polynomial scaling with dimensionality, $D$. This is obtained by combining an additive kernel with an incomplete grid and exploiting the resulting structure of the kernel matrix. We demonstrate the scalability of the matrix-vector product by running benchmarks with billions of data points and thousands of dimensions. Full GPR calculations, including hyperparameter optimization, are completed in a matter of hours for $N = 447 265$ and $D = 24$. We demonstrate that our CUTS-GPR enables Bayesian modeling of high-dimensional potential energy surfaces - a longstanding challenge in computational chemistry.

</details>


### [681] [Zero-Shot Imagined Speech Decoding via Imagined-to-Listened MEG Mapping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08075)
*Maryam Maghsoudi,Shihab Shamma*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种利用听觉MEG数据辅助解码想象语音的三阶段方法：先训练模型将想象MEG映射到听觉MEG，再用听觉数据训练对比解码器，最后对想象数据进行映射和解码，在留出受试者上验证了可行性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 想象语音解码面临数据稀缺和跨被试/会话时间对齐困难的问题，而听觉语音数据更丰富且标签更可靠。作者希望利用听觉数据来弥补想象数据的不足。

Method: 三阶段流水线：(1)训练线性/神经模型将想象MEG映射到听觉MEG；(2)仅用听觉MEG训练对比词解码器（使用语义、声学、音素嵌入）；(3)将想象MEG通过映射得到预测听觉响应，再用解码器解码。使用受训音乐家被试以改善时间对齐。

Result: 在留出被试上的秩基分析显示想象词解码显著高于随机水平，且性能随训练数据量增加而提升。

Conclusion: 该方法是可扩展的，有望应用于实际脑机接口场景，但当前仅是概念验证。

Abstract: Decoding imagined speech from non-invasive brain recordings is challenging because imagined datasets are scarce and difficult to align temporally across subjects and sessions In this work, we propose a new approach to the decoding of imagined speech that leverages the richer and more reliably labeled recordings during listening to speech. We collected paired listened and imagined MEG recordings to rhythmic melodic and spoken stimuli from trained musicians. Using trained musicians helped improve temporal alignment across conditions. We then developed a three-stage decoding pipeline that revealed consistent and meaningful relationships between neural activity evoked by imagining and listening to the same stimuli. First, we trained six linear and neural models to map imagined MEG responses to listened responses. We evaluated these models against a null baseline from unseen subjects to validate that the predicted-listening responses preserve stimulus-specific information. In the second stage, we trained a contrastive word decoder exclusively on the listened MEG responses, and evaluated it using four embedding strategies including semantic, acoustic, and phonetic representations. In the third stage, we process the imagined MEG responses from held-out subjects through the mapping pipeline to compute the corresponding listening responses that are then decoded by the listened decoder. Using rank-based analysis, we show that the imagined words are decodable significantly above chance. We shall report here the results of a proof-of-concept implementation to decode imagined speech, where all evaluations are performed on held-out subjects. We also demonstrate that performance improves with training data size, suggesting that this approach is scalable and can directly be made applicable to realistic brain-computer interface scenarios.

</details>


### [682] [TUANDROMD-X: Advanced Entropy and Visual Analytics Dataset for Enhanced Malware Detection and Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06718)
*Parthajit Borah,Upasana Sarmah,D. K. Bhattacharyya,J. K. Kalita*

Main category: cs.CR

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出TUANDROMD-X，一个基于静态分析、包含视觉和熵特征的多类恶意软件数据集，旨在解决高质量恶意软件数据集匮乏的问题，帮助研究人员设计更快速、更有效的恶意软件检测系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 恶意软件和基于恶意软件的攻击日益普遍和复杂，传统基于签名的防御方法容易规避。高质量数据集（包含多种恶意软件家族和良性软件样本）的缺乏是恶意软件研究的主要瓶颈。

Method: 基于静态分析构建多类恶意软件数据集TUANDROMD-X，为每个样本提取视觉特征和基于熵的特征，以区分恶意软件和良性软件，降低了高特征工程和动态分析的开销。

Result: 构建了TUANDROMD-X数据集，其视觉和熵特征能够有效区分不同家族的恶意软件和良性软件，为设计更快更好的恶意软件检测系统提供了基础。

Conclusion: TUANDROMD-X数据集有助于解决恶意软件研究中的数据瓶颈问题，支持研究人员和网络安全专家开发更高效的检测系统。

Abstract: Malware and malware-based attacks are becoming more prevalent and complex. Attackers regularly come up with new techniques that have the ability to evade conventional and signature-based malware defense. In order to address such threats, there is an increasing demand for advanced and better defense solutions. Machine learning-based techniques are efficiently capable of defending against malware and malware-based attacks. Nevertheless, creating and efficiently testing such techniques demand high-quality datasets having samples of various malware families as well as goodware. The lack of such datasets continues to be a major bottleneck in malware research. In this paper, we introduce TUANDROMD-X, a multiclass malware dataset with visual and entropy-based features of each sample, distinctly identifying malware from goodware. The dataset is created based on static analysis, lowering the overhead that comes with high feature engineering and dynamic analysis. As a result, TUANDROMD-X facilitates researchers and cyber-security experts to design faster and better malware detection systems.

</details>


### [683] [Kernel Selection is Model Selection: A Unified Complexity-Penalized Approach for MMD Two-Sample Tests](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06883)
*Yijin Ni,Xiaoming Huo*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出CP-MMD（复杂度惩罚最大均值差异），通过将核选择视为模型选择问题，利用两样本均匀集中不等式推导出复杂度惩罚项，从而在连续参数空间（包括标量带宽、多项式特征带宽和深度网络参数）上实现无网格的直接优化，在保证无条件第一类错误控制的同时最大化检验功效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MMD的检验功效完全取决于所选的核函数，但固定核会无法区分某些分布，因此需要动态优化核函数。然而基于数据的优化违反了i.i.d.假设，现有方法要么存在过拟合和方差崩溃问题（比率准则），要么无法扩展到连续搜索空间（聚合方法）。

Method: 将数据驱动的核选择重新定义为模型选择问题，基于两样本均匀集中不等式推导出复杂度惩罚项（CP-MMD），该惩罚项用核搜索空间的复杂度来约束经验MMD，从而数学上吸收了优化代价，支持在连续参数类上的直接、无网格最大化。

Result: CP-MMD在线性、多项式特征和深度核等多种核类上，匹配或超过了最先进的检验功效，同时保持了有效的第一类错误控制。

Conclusion: 通过形式化地考虑优化复杂度，CP-MMD能够在最大化真实检验功效的同时确保无条件第一类错误有效性，打破了现有框架中数据驱动核选择的固有困境。

Abstract: The Maximum Mean Discrepancy (MMD) is a cornerstone statistic for nonparametric two-sample testing, but its test power is dictated entirely by the chosen kernel. Because any fixed kernel inherently fails to distinguish certain distributions, the kernel must be dynamically optimized. However, data-driven optimization violates the foundational i.i.d. assumption, forcing a strict trade-off in existing frameworks. Ratio criteria ignore this dependence, inducing overfitting and variance collapse on rich kernel classes. Conversely, aggregation methods bypass the dependence using finite grids, but this strategy cannot scale to continuous search spaces like deep kernels.
  To break this dichotomy, we establish data-driven kernel selection as a model selection problem. We propose Complexity-Penalized MMD (CP-MMD), a criterion derived by applying the two-sample uniform concentration inequality of preceding works to the post-optimization MMD problem. The resulting penalty bounds the empirical MMD by the complexity of the kernel search space, mathematically absorbing the cost of optimization, so that CP-MMD enables direct, grid-free maximization over continuous parametric classes, including scalar bandwidths, polynomial feature bandwidths, and deep network parameters. By formally accounting for optimization complexity, we prove that CP-MMD maximizes true test power while ensuring unconditional Type-I validity. Consequently, CP-MMD enables grid-free kernel selection across linear, polynomial-feature, and deep regimes, matching or exceeding state-of-the-art test power.

</details>


### [684] [Generalising Travel Time Prediction To Varying Route Choices In Urban Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06918)
*Łukasz Gorczyca,Kacper Drozd,Michał Bujak,Rafał Kucharski*

Main category: cs.MA

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出GenTTP框架，能区分不同路径选择，在变化路径分配下准确预测交通流和旅行时间，弥补了传统GNN方法仅适用于典型重复性需求模式的局限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于图神经网络的系统级旅行时间预测方法仅适用于典型和重复性需求模式，无法捕捉不同路径选择带来的网络级旅行时间变化。

Method: 提出Generalised Travel Time Predictor (GenTTP)，学习复杂的时空交通模式以及路径选择与旅行时间之间的微观关系。

Result: GenTTP能成功区分路径选择，在不同路径分配变体下提供准确的流量和旅行时间预测。

Conclusion: 填补了旅行时间预测模型在跨不同路径分配下泛化能力的空白，即相同需求因驾驶员在可用路径上的分布不同可产生显著不同的网络级结果。

Abstract: Previous methods that predict system-wide travel time, predominantly grounded in graph neural networks, remain limited to typical and recurring demand patterns. While they successfully predict future congestion following daily commute, they inherently approximate a single demand realisation and fail to capture varying route choices. In this work, we propose a Generalised Travel Time Predictor (GenTTP) that successfully differentiates route choices and offers accurate flow and travel time predictions. Our framework learns to uncover complex spatiotemporal traffic patterns and microscopic relationships between route choices and the resulting travel times. This addresses a critical gap: the lack of travel time prediction models that generalise across varying route assignments, where the same demand can produce substantially different network-wide outcomes depending on how travellers are distributed over available paths.

</details>


### [685] [Physics-Based Flow Matching for Full-Field Prediction of Silicon Photonic Devices](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06929)
*Joseph Quaratiello,Anthony Rizzo*

Main category: physics.optics

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出PIC-Flow，一个基于条件流匹配的生成式神经代理模型，用于替代传统FDTD仿真预测光子集成电路的电磁场分布。模型结合U-Net架构、Helmholtz残差约束和界面感知掩码技术，在三种光子器件（多模干涉仪、Y分支、定向耦合器）上训练，并能泛化到未见器件类型（S弯、锥形器等）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 光子集成电路设计需要大量电磁场仿真，但传统FDTD方法计算成本高昂，即使是简单器件结构也很昂贵。作者希望开发一种快速的神经代理模型来替代FDTD仿真，加速设计空间探索。

Method: 1) 使用条件流匹配(Conditional Flow Matching)作为生成框架，学习从高斯噪声到物理有效场解的速度场；2) 实值U-Net处理分裂的实部和虚部场通道；3) 通过Helmholtz残差损失(∇²E_z + k₀²εE_z = 0)进行物理约束训练；4) 引入界面感知掩码方案，排除介电边界像素处有限差分模板误差主导的区域。

Result: 在22,500个FDTD仿真数据上训练（多模干涉仪、Y分支、定向耦合器），模型在保留测试集上表现良好，且能泛化到未见过的器件类别（S弯、锥形器、级联Y分支）。消融实验验证了各组件有效性。

Conclusion: 该工作不是FDTD的直接替代，但建立了基础框架。通过更广泛的数据覆盖、更多算力和训练优化，有望扩展到宽带、器件无关的场预测，大幅提升复杂光子器件和电路的快速设计空间探索效率。

Abstract: Designing photonic integrated circuits requires accurate electromagnetic field simulations, which remain computationally expensive even for simple device geometries. We present PIC-Flow, a generative neural surrogate that predicts electromagnetic field distributions for photonic devices given their geometry and operating wavelength as an alternative to costly finite-difference time-domain (FDTD) simulations. Our approach combines three key ideas: (i) conditional flow matching as the generative framework, learning a velocity field that transports Gaussian noise to physically valid field solutions; (ii) a real-valued U-Net operating on split real and imaginary field channels; and (iii) physics-constrained training through a Helmholtz residual loss enforcing $\nabla^2 E_z + k_0^2 \varepsilon E_z = 0$. We introduce an interface-aware masking scheme for the Helmholtz residual that excludes dielectric boundary pixels where finite-difference stencil errors dominate, yielding a physically meaningful compliance metric. The data set consists of 22,500 ground-truth FDTD simulations split evenly between multimode interferometers, Y-branches, and directional couplers at $λ=1.55\,μ$m in an 80/10/10 split between training, validation, and test sets. We evaluate ablations on the network against the held out test devices and also show that the model generalizes to held out device classes such as S-bends, tapers, and cascaded Y-branches. Rather than a drop-in replacement for FDTD, this work establishes a foundation that, with broader data coverage, more compute, and further training optimization, could scale toward broadband, device-agnostic field prediction with dramatically improved runtime for rapid design-space exploration of complex photonic devices and circuits.

</details>


### [686] [Locally Near Optimal Piecewise Linear Regression in High Dimensions via Difference of Max-Affine Functions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06959)
*Haitham Kanj,Kiryung Lee*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出自适应块梯度下降（ABGD）算法，通过将分段线性函数参数化为最大仿射函数差（DoMA），实现了分段线性回归的求解，并在理论和实验上验证了其收敛性和最优性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决分段线性回归问题，提供一种具有理论保证的高效参数化方法。

Method: 将分段线性函数参数化为DoMA（差分为最大仿射函数），提出ABGD算法，并采用适用于最大仿射函数的初始化方法。

Result: ABGD算法在亚高斯噪声下线性收敛，样本复杂度为$\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(d\max(\sigma_z/\epsilon,1)^2)$，无噪声时仅需$\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(d)$样本即可精确恢复，且达到极小最优（至多对数因子）。

Conclusion: ABGD算法在理论和实验上均表现出色，具有最优的样本效率和良好的实际性能。

Abstract: This paper presents a parametric solution to piecewise linear regression through the Adaptive Block Gradient Descent (ABGD) algorithm. The heart of the method is the parametrization of piecewise linear functions as the difference of max-affine (DoMA) functions. A non-asymptotic local convergence analysis for ABGD is provided under sub-Gaussian covariate and noise distributions. To initialize ABGD, we adapt a prior algorithm originally developed for the simpler setting of max-affine functions. When suitably initialized, ABGD converges linearly to an $ε$-accurate estimate given $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(d\max(σ_z/ε,1)^2)$ observations where $σ_z^2$ denotes the noise variance. This implies exact recovery given $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(d)$ samples in the noiseless case. Also, such a rate is shown to be minimax optimal up to logarithmic factors. Synthetic numerical results corroborate the theoretical guarantees for ABGD. We also observe competitive performance compared to the state-of-the-art methods on real-world datasets.

</details>


### [687] [A Behavioral Framework for Data-Driven Modeling of Nonlinear Systems in Vector-Valued Reproducing Kernel Hilbert Spaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07052)
*Boya Hou,Maxim Raginsky*

Main category: eess.SY

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文将Jan Willems的行为方法推广到向量值再生核希尔伯特空间中的一类离散时间非线性系统，并应用于数据驱动建模，通过最小范数插值和子空间识别两种方法实现无需显式系统辨识的建模。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将行为方法从线性系统推广到非线性系统，并解决数据驱动建模中无需显式系统辨识步骤的问题。

Method: 在向量值RKHS中推广行为方法，结合最小范数插值和子空间识别两种数据驱动建模方法。

Result: 成功将行为方法推广到包含Volterra级数、Hammerstein状态空间实现等非线性系统类别，并建立了与数据驱动方法的联系。

Conclusion: 提出了非线性系统行为方法的理论框架，并为数据驱动建模提供了新的途径。

Abstract: We generalize Jan Willems' behavioral approach to a class of discrete-time nonlinear systems in a vector-valued reproducing kernel Hilbert space (RKHS). Apart from linear time-invariant systems, this class covers nonlinear systems modeled by Volterra series and their autoregressive variants, as well as systems admitting Hammerstein-type state-space realizations. We apply the proposed framework to the problem of data-driven modeling of such systems, i.e., when simulation or control objectives for an unknown system are carried out without an explicit system identification step. To that end, we link the behavioral approach to two data-driven modeling methods in a vector-valued RKHS: (1) minimum-norm interpolation and (2) subspace identification.

</details>


### [688] [TRACE: Transport Alignment Conformal Prediction via Diffusion and Flow Matching Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07100)
*Zhenhan Fang,Aixin Tan,Jian Huang*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: TRACE框架利用扩散模型和流匹配模型中的传输对齐（transport alignment）定义非一致性分数，从而为多维度输出构建有效的共形预测区间，无需显式似然评估或可逆变换。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为多维度输出构建有效且信息丰富的共形预测区间仍是一个基础挑战，现有方法依赖严格的几何假设或需要显式似然评估和可逆变换，限制了其在复杂生成场景中的适用性。

Method: 提出TRACE框架，通过扩散/流匹配模型中的传输对齐定义非一致性分数——沿随机传输轨迹平均去噪或速度匹配误差，得到标量值后使用分割共形预测校准，获得可交换性下的有效边际覆盖。

Result: 在合成和真实数据集上验证了有效覆盖，且生成的区域能自然地适应多模态和非凸的条件分布。

Conclusion: 运输对齐的共形预测方法能有效处理复杂生成模型中的多维度输出不确定性量化，突破了传统方法的适用性限制。

Abstract: Constructing valid and informative conformal prediction regions for multi-dimensional outputs remains a fundamental challenge. While conformal prediction provides finite-sample, distribution-free coverage guarantees, its practical performance critically depends on the choice of nonconformity score. Existing approaches often rely on restrictive geometric assumptions or require explicit likelihood evaluation and invertible transformations, limiting their applicability in complex generative settings.
  In this work, we introduce TRACE (TRansport Alignment Conformal Estimation), a conformal prediction framework that defines nonconformity through transport alignment in diffusion and flow matching models. Rather than evaluating likelihoods, we measure how well a candidate output aligns with the learned generative dynamics by averaging denoising or velocity-matching errors along stochastic transport trajectories. The resulting transport-based scores are scalar-valued and can be calibrated using split conformal prediction, yielding valid marginal coverage under exchangeability. We further analyze the statistical properties of the proposed scores and their sensitivity to computational budget. Experiments on synthetic and real datasets demonstrate valid coverage and show that the resulting regions adapt naturally to multimodal and non-convex conditional distributions.

</details>


### [689] [Breaking QAOA's Fixed Target Hamiltonian Barrier: A Fully Connected Quantum Boltzmann Machine via Bilevel Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07473)
*Jun Liu*

Main category: quant-ph

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于QAOA双层优化架构的全连接量子玻尔兹曼机（QBM），通过内外环训练分别模拟正相能量最小化和负相对比散度学习。实验表明：单层QAOA电路下无噪声测量目标量子态概率达0.9559；在主流量子设备噪声水平下仍达0.6047，噪声加倍时仍保持0.3859；在图像生成任务中展现出强鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 针对经典部分连接玻尔兹曼机和主流量子玻尔兹曼机（QBM）的局限性，提出一种全连接QBM架构以提升表达能力和性能。

Method: 将QAOA电路扩展为双层优化架构：内环训练基于QAOA计算过程模拟正相能量最小化，外环训练通过优化目标哈密顿量结构参数模拟负相对比散度学习。

Result: 单层电路(p=1)下无噪声测量概率0.9559；主流噪声下0.6047；加倍噪声下0.3859，且目标态始终为最高概率态；图像生成任务中即使在噪声下也能稳定生成目标图像。

Conclusion: 所提全连接QBM在低电路深度下具有优越性能和强噪声鲁棒性，适用于当前商业化量子计算设备。

Abstract: To overcome the limitations of classical partially connected Boltzmann machines and mainstream quantum Boltzmann machines (QBMs), this work extends the conventional circuit of the quantum approximate optimization algorithm (QAOA) to a bilevel optimization architecture and proposes a fully connected QBM. The inner-loop training simulates positive phase energy minimization based on the computational process of the conventional QAOA circuit, whereas the outer-loop training simulates negative phase contrastive divergence learning by optimizing the structural parameters of the target Hamiltonian. It is found that, first, the model exhibits superior performance using only a single layer (p=1) in the QAOA circuit, with an average probability of 0.9559 in measuring the target quantum state under noiseless conditions. Second, the model exhibits notable noise robustness. Under the typical noise level of current mainstream commercial quantum computing devices, the average probability of measuring the target quantum state reaches 0.6047; when the noise rises to a more stringent level with doubled intensity, this probability remains at 0.3859. In both scenarios, the target quantum state maintains the highest measurement probability among all detected states, with a value several times higher than that of the second-ranked state. This indicates that the model retains strong robustness even when noise meets or exceeds the upper limit of current mainstream commercial quantum computing devices. Third, under a block-by-block learning strategy with p=1 and only 10 measurement shots, the model consistently generates the target "qubit" grid image regardless of noise interference, demonstrating strong robustness in image generation.

</details>


### [690] [Debiased Counterfactual Generation via Flow Matching from Observations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07665)
*Hugh Dance,Johnny Xi,Peter Orbanz,Benjamin Bloem-Reddy*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于去混淆流的反事实分布估计方法，利用观测分布与反事实分布之间的内在联系（如相同的支撑集、尾部行为等），通过流匹配和有效影响函数校正实现半参数有效估计，在高维实验中优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有反事实分布估计方法将反事实分布视为独立生成目标，忽视了其与观测数据之间的关系。本文旨在利用两者之间的内在联系，提出更高效的估计方法。

Method: 证明了在标准假设下观测分布与反事实分布具有支撑集相同、尾部行为一致等性质；基于流匹配（flow-matching）将问题建模为从观测分布到反事实分布的去混淆流；推导了基于高效影响函数（EIF）校正的半参数有效估计量；扩展到高维最小能量流场景。

Result: 去混淆流方法在反事实分布估计任务上优于现有去偏方法，同时缓解了基于流的方法的已知失败模式。

Conclusion: 利用观测分布与反事实分布的内在联系进行去混淆流估计是一种有效且高效的方法，具有良好的理论性质和实证表现。

Abstract: Estimating counterfactual distributions under interventions is central to treatment risk assessment and counterfactual generation tasks. Existing approaches model the counterfactual distribution as a standalone generative target, without exploiting its relationship to the observational data. In this work, we show that under standard assumptions, observational and counterfactual outcome distributions are tightly linked: they have identical support and tail behavior, remain statistically close under weak confounding, and share any features of high-dimensional outcomes which are invariant to confounders. These properties motivate learning counterfactual distributions not from scratch, but via a deconfounding flow from the observational distribution. We formulate this problem via flow-matching and derive a semiparametrically efficient estimator based on a novel efficient influence function correction. We subsequently extend our estimator to target minimal-energy flows in high-dimensions, which we show can be especially simple targets between observational and counterfactual distributions. In experiments, deconfounding flows outperform existing debiased counterfactual distribution estimators, while also mitigating known failure modes of flow-based methods.

</details>


### [691] [Flow Matching for Count Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07746)
*Ganchao Wei,John Pearson*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出 count-FM，一个基于连续时间生灭过程和流匹配的计数数据生成框架，实现了计数空间中的高效分布映射，在单细胞 RNA 测序和神经脉冲数据上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有处理高维计数数据的方法要么将计数视为类别状态，要么将其转换为连续空间，这两种方式在计数范围较大时都不自然且效率低下。需要一种直接在计数空间中工作的生成框架。

Method: 基于连续时间生灭过程的流匹配框架，通过学习条件转移率实现无模拟训练，支持计数空间中任意源分布到目标分布的传输。

Result: 在模拟实验中，count-FM 用更少的参数达到了比基线更好的样本质量；在 scRNA-seq 和神经脉冲数据上，无条件生成、传输和条件生成任务均提升了样本质量和建模效率。

Conclusion: count-FM 为计数数据提供了一种高效、可解释的生成建模方案，证明了流匹配框架在离散计数数据上的适用性。

Abstract: High-dimensional count data arise in applications such as single-cell RNA sequencing and neural spike trains, where mapping between distributions across successive batches or time points form critical components of data analysis. The recent success of diffusion- and flow-based deep generative models for images, video, and text motivates extending these ideas to count-valued settings, but many existing methods either treat each count as a categorical state or transform counts into a continuous space, neither of which is natural or efficient when the count range is large. We propose count-FM, a flow-matching framework for count data based on a continuous-time birth-death process with local unit jumps. Count-FM learns marginal transitions efficiently in count space through simulation-free training of conditional transition rates, allowing transport between arbitrary count-distributed source and target populations. In simulation, count-FM achieves better sample quality than representative baselines while using substantially fewer parameters. We further apply count-FM to scRNA-seq and neural spike-train data for unconditional generation, transport, and conditional generation. Across these tasks, count-FM yields improved sample quality, greater modeling efficiency, and interpretable transport paths.

</details>


### [692] [Interactive Trajectory Planning with Learning-based Distributionally Robust Model Predictive Control and Markov Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07768)
*Erik Börve,Nikolce Murgovski,Morteza Haghir Chehreghani,Leo Laine*

Main category: eess.SY

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 论文针对交互式轨迹规划中周围智能体决策不确定性问题，提出结合PAC学习与分布鲁棒优化的MPC框架，可在样本数量约束下在鲁棒MPC和全能SMPC之间插值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决交互式轨迹规划中周围智能体决策分布学习不准确带来的控制鲁棒性问题。

Method: 结合PAC学习理论（保证学习误差界）与分布鲁棒优化（对学习误差进行鲁棒处理），构建DR-MPC框架，根据样本数量自适应调节鲁棒性与最优性之间的权衡。

Result: 提出的PAC学习驱动的DR-MPC能够在可用样本数量的约束下，在鲁棒MPC（样本少）和理想SMPC（样本多）之间动态插值。

Conclusion: PAC学习与分布鲁棒优化的结合为不确定性下的轨迹规划提供了一种数据自适应的控制方法。

Abstract: We investigate interactive trajectory planning subject to uncertainty in the decisions of surrounding agents. To control the ego-agent, we aim to first learn the decision distribution and solve a Stochastic Model Predictive Control (SMPC) problem. To account for errors in the learned distribution, we show that it is possible to utilize Probably Approximately Correct (PAC) learning in combination with Distributionally Robust (DR) optimization to obtain a solution which accounts for the errors induced by the learning model. The results indicate that our PAC learning-based DR-MPC framework provides a method to interpolate between a robust MPC and an omnipotent SMPC, based on the available number of samples.

</details>


### [693] [PropSplat: Map-Free RF Field Reconstruction via 3D Gaussian Propagation Splatting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08035)
*William Bjorndahl,Maninder Pal Singh,Farhad Nouri,Joseph Camp*

Main category: eess.SP

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出PropSplat，一种无需地图的传播建模方法，利用3D各向异性高斯基元重构射频场，在稀疏测量数据下即可实现高精度信号传播预测，在户外和室内数据集上均显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的站点特定传播模型依赖射线追踪（需3D地图）或密集测量，成本高昂且不适用于快速部署场景（地理数据不可用或过时）。作者希望消除对地理数据的依赖，实现从稀疏RF测量中直接学习传播环境。

Method: PropSplat使用3D各向异性高斯基元表示RF场，每个高斯编码一个标量路径损耗偏移量，相对于一个带可学习路径损耗指数的显式基线路径损耗模型。高斯初始沿收发路径分布，端到端优化，无需外部信息（如楼层平面图、地形数据库）。

Result: 户外大规模测试中（测量间隔300m），PropSplat的RMSE为5.38 dB，优于WRF-GS+（5.87 dB）、GSRF（7.46 dB）和NeRF²（14.76 dB）。室内BLE定位误差为0.19m，比NeRF²（1.84m）提升一个数量级。

Conclusion: 准确、站点特定的传播重构可以从稀疏的RF测量中实现，减少了对地理数据作为RF环境建模先决条件的依赖。

Abstract: Building a site-specific propagation model typically requires either ray-tracing over detailed 3D maps or dense measurement campaigns. Both approaches are expensive and often infeasible for rapid deployments where geographic data is unavailable or outdated. We present PropSplat, a map-free propagation modeling method that reconstructs radio frequency (RF) fields using 3D anisotropic Gaussian primitives. Each Gaussian encodes a scalar path loss offset relative to an explicit baseline path loss model with a learnable path loss exponent. Gaussians are initialized along observed transmitter--receiver paths and optimized end-to-end to learn the propagation environment without external information like floor plans, terrain databases, or clutter data. We evaluate PropSplat against wireless radiance field methods NeRF$^2$, GSRF, and WRF-GS+ on two real-world datasets. On large-scale outdoor drive-tests spanning multiple topographical regions at six sub-6 GHz frequencies, PropSplat achieves 5.38 dB RMSE when training measurements are spaced 300m apart and outperforms WRF-GS+ (5.87 dB), GSRF (7.46 dB), and NeRF$^2$ (14.76 dB). On indoor Bluetooth Low Energy measurements, PropSplat achieves 0.19m mean localization error, an order of magnitude better than NeRF$^2$ (1.84m), while achieving near-identical received signal strength prediction accuracy. These results show that accurate site-specific propagation reconstruction is achievable from sparse RF-native measurements. The need for geographic data as a prerequisite for scalable RF environment modeling is reduced.

</details>


### [694] [Why Self-Inconsistency Arises in GNN Explanations and How to Exploit It](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07527)
*Wenxin Tai,Yaqian Liu,Ting Zhong,Fan Zhou*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 11.0

TL;DR: 本文研究自解释图神经网络（SI-GNNs）中解释自不一致的问题，发现重新解释导致上下文扰动是直接原因，提出潜在信号分配假说解释边缘敏感性的差异，并设计了一种无需训练的后处理策略SD（自去噪），仅需一次额外前向传播即可校准解释，实验证明SD在轻微计算开销下持续提升解释质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自解释图神经网络（SI-GNNs）产生的解释存在自不一致现象——将模型重新应用于其自身的解释性子图时，可能产生不同的解释。这种不一致性损害了模型的可信度，但其根本原因尚未被充分理解，本文旨在揭示这一现象的成因并提出解决方案。
